analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Evo-Depth 提出轻量级深度增强 VLA 框架，无需额外传感器即可提升机器人操作的空间理解能力。

papers.title: A CUBS-Compatible Ultrasound Morphology and Uncertainty-Aware Baseline for Carotid Intima-Media Segmentation and Preliminary Risk Prediction
papers.abstract: Carotid atherosclerosis is a major contributor to ischemic stroke and transient ischemic attack. Conventional ultrasound assessment is commonly based on intima-media thickness, plaque appearance, stenosis degree, and peak systolic velocity, but these morphology- and velocity-based indicators may not fully capture patient-specific vascular risk. This study presents AtheroFlow-XNet, a CUBS-compatible ultrasound morphology and uncertainty-aware learning baseline for carotid intima-media segmentation and preliminary risk prediction. Using the Carotid Ultrasound Boundary Study dataset, manual lumen-intima and media-adventitia boundary annotations were converted into dense intima-media masks for supervised segmentation. Clinical variables were incorporated into an auxiliary risk-prediction branch, and Monte Carlo dropout was used for uncertainty-aware inference. The model was evaluated using a patient-level train-validation-test split with 1,522 training images, 326 validation images, and 328 testing images. The proposed model achieved a Dice coefficient of 0.7930 for LI-MA mask segmentation, a segmentation loss of 0.2359, and an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve of 0.6910 for preliminary risk prediction. Qualitative results showed that predicted masks were generally aligned with manual annotations, while uncertainty maps highlighted ambiguous wall-boundary regions. These results suggest that ultrasound-derived carotid morphology can support automated wall analysis and uncertainty-aware interpretation. Since CUBS does not provide Doppler waveforms or CFD-derived hemodynamic biomarkers, this work should be interpreted as a reproducible morphology-driven baseline. Future work will incorporate Doppler-derived flow profiles, patient-specific vascular reconstruction, and CFD-based wall shear biomarkers.

analysis.tldr: 提出AtheroFlow-XNet，一种兼容CUBS数据集的超声形态与不确定性感知基线模型，用于颈动脉内膜-中膜分割和初步风险预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统超声评估依赖内膜-中膜厚度、斑块外观等形态和速度指标，可能无法充分捕捉患者特异性血管风险，需要更全面的自动化分析方法。
analysis.problem: 实现颈动脉内膜-中膜分割和初步风险预测，并引入不确定性感知以提升可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于CUBS数据集，将手动标注转换为密集内膜-中膜掩膜进行监督分割；引入临床变量作为辅助风险预测分支；使用蒙特卡洛dropout实现不确定性感知推理。
contributions: 提出了AtheroFlow-XNet，一个兼容CUBS的超声形态与不确定性感知基线模型。
在分割和风险预测任务上进行了定量评估，并展示了不确定性图对模糊边界的指示作用。
analysis.experiments: 使用CUBS数据集，按患者级别划分训练/验证/测试集（1522/326/328张图像），分割Dice系数0.7930，损失0.2359，风险预测AUC为0.6910。
limitations: CUBS数据集不包含多普勒波形或CFD血流动力学生物标志物，结果仅作为形态驱动基线。
风险预测AUC较低（0.6910），可能需结合更多临床特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AtheroFlow-XNet，一种兼容CUBS数据集的超声形态与不确定性感知基线模型，用于颈动脉内膜-中膜分割和初步风险预测。

papers.title: ACE-LoRA: Adaptive Orthogonal Decoupling for Continual Image Editing
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art diffusion models often rely on parameter-efficient fine-tuning to perform specialized image editing tasks. However, real-world applications require continual adaptation to new tasks while preserving previously learned knowledge. Despite the practical necessity, continual learning for image editing remains largely underexplored. We propose ACE-LoRA, a dynamic regularization framework for continual image editing that effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting. ACE-LoRA leverages Adaptive Orthogonal Decoupling to identify and orthogonalize task interference, and introduces a Rank-Invariant Historical Information Compression strategy to address scalability issues in continual updates. To facilitate continual learning in image editing and provide a standardized evaluation protocol, we introduce CIE-Bench, the first comprehensive benchmark in this domain. CIE-Bench encompasses diverse and practically relevant image editing scenarios with a balanced level of difficulty to effectively expose limitations of existing models while remaining compatible with parameter-efficient fine-tuning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing baselines in terms of instruction fidelity, visual realism, and robustness to forgetting, establishing a strong foundation for continual learning in image editing.

analysis.tldr: 提出ACE-LoRA框架，通过自适应正交解耦和秩不变历史信息压缩实现持续图像编辑，并构建首个基准CIE-Bench。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实应用需要模型持续适应新图像编辑任务，同时保留已学知识，但持续学习在图像编辑领域尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 扩散模型在持续图像编辑中面临灾难性遗忘和任务干扰问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有参数高效微调方法在连续任务中容易遗忘旧知识，且缺乏标准化评估协议。
analysis.method: ACE-LoRA：自适应正交解耦识别并正交化任务干扰，结合秩不变历史信息压缩策略解决持续更新的可扩展性问题。
contributions: 提出ACE-LoRA动态正则化框架，有效缓解灾难性遗忘
引入自适应正交解耦和秩不变历史信息压缩策略
构建首个持续图像编辑基准CIE-Bench，包含多样化场景和标准化评估协议
analysis.experiments: 在CIE-Bench上实验，ACE-LoRA在指令保真度、视觉真实感和抗遗忘性上持续优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定扩散模型架构
基准覆盖场景有限，未提及跨领域泛化
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ACE-LoRA框架，通过自适应正交解耦和秩不变历史信息压缩实现持续图像编辑，并构建首个基准CIE-Bench。

papers.title: Multi-scale Coarse-to-fine Modeling for Test-time Human Motion Control
papers.abstract: We present MSCoT, a multi-scale, coarse-to-fine model for test-time human motion synthesis and control. Unlike recent approaches that rely on multiple iterative denoising/token-prediction steps, or modules tailored for specific control signals, MSCoT discretizes motion into a multi-scale hierarchical representation and predicts the entire token sequence at each temporal scale in a coarse-to-fine fashion. Building on this coarse-to-fine paradigm, we propose an efficient multi-scale token guidance strategy that overcomes the challenge of discrete sampling and steers the token distribution towards the control goals, allowing for fast and flexible control. To address the limitations of a discrete codebook, a lightweight token refiner further adds continuous residuals to the discrete token embeddings and allows differentiable test-time refinement optimization to ensure precise alignment with the control objectives. MSCoT is able to produce quality motions, consistent with the control constraints, while offering substantially faster sampling than diffusion-based approaches. Experiments on popular benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art controllable text-to-motion generation performance of MSCoT over existing baselines, with better motion quality (48% FID improvement), higher control accuracy (-61% avg error), and $10 \times$ faster inference speed on HumanML3D.

analysis.tldr: MSCoT提出多尺度粗到细建模与高效token引导策略，实现快速、灵活、高质量的人体运动控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时人体运动控制方法依赖多次迭代去噪/令牌预测或特定控制信号模块，导致推理慢、灵活性差。
analysis.problem: 如何实现快速、灵活且高质量的人体运动合成与控制，同时克服离散码本的限制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将运动离散化为多尺度层次表示，以粗到细方式预测每个时间尺度的完整令牌序列；提出多尺度令牌引导策略实现高效控制；引入轻量令牌精炼器添加连续残差，支持可微测试时优化以精确对齐控制目标。
contributions: 提出多尺度粗到细建模框架MSCoT，实现快速测试时运动控制。
设计多尺度令牌引导策略和令牌精炼器，提升控制精度和运动质量。
analysis.experiments: 在HumanML3D基准上，与现有基线相比，FID改进48%，平均误差降低61%，推理速度提升10倍。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练码本质量。
多尺度表示可能增加模型复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MSCoT提出多尺度粗到细建模与高效token引导策略，实现快速、灵活、高质量的人体运动控制。

papers.title: SCRWKV: Ultra-Compact Structure-Calibrated Vision-RWKV for Topological Crack Segmentation
papers.abstract: Achieving pixel-level accurate segmentation of structural cracks across diverse scenarios remains a formidable challenge. Existing methods face significant bottlenecks in balancing crack topology modeling with computational efficiency, often failing to reconcile high segmentation quality with low resource demands. To address these limitations, we propose the Ultra-Compact Structure-Calibrated Vision RWKV (SCRWKV), a network that achieves high-precision modeling via a novel Structure-Field Encoder (SFE) backbone while maintaining linear complexity. The SFE integrates the Adaptive Multi-scale Cascaded Modulator (AMCM) to enhance texture representation and utilizes the Structure-Calibrated Insight Unit (SCIU) as its core engine. Specifically, the SCIU employs the Geometry-guided Bidirectional Structure Transformation (GBST) to capture topological correlations and integrates the Dynamic Self-Calibrating Decay (DSCD) into Dy-WKV to suppress noise propagation. Furthermore, we introduce a lightweight Cross-Scale Harmonic Fusion (CSHF) decoder to achieve precise feature aggregation. Systematic evaluations on multiple benchmarks characterized by complex textures and severe interference demonstrate that SCRWKV, with only 1.22M parameters, significantly outperforms SOTA methods. Achieving an F1 score of 0.8428 and mIoU of 0.8512 on the TUT dataset, the model confirms its robust potential for efficient real-world deployment. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出仅1.22M参数的SCRWKV网络，通过结构场编码器和线性复杂度RWKV实现高精度拓扑裂缝分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有裂缝分割方法在拓扑建模与计算效率之间存在瓶颈，难以兼顾高分割质量与低资源需求。
analysis.problem: 实现跨场景像素级精确的裂缝分割，同时平衡拓扑结构建模与计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Ultra-Compact Structure-Calibrated Vision RWKV (SCRWKV)，包含Structure-Field Encoder (SFE)主干（集成Adaptive Multi-scale Cascaded Modulator (AMCM)和Structure-Calibrated Insight Unit (SCIU)），其中SCIU利用Geometry-guided Bidirectional Structure Transformation (GBST)捕获拓扑相关性，并集成Dynamic Self-Calibrating Decay (DSCD)抑制噪声；以及轻量级Cross-Scale Harmonic Fusion (CSHF)解码器。
contributions: 提出SCRWKV网络，以1.22M超小参数量实现高精度裂缝分割。
设计SFE主干和CSHF解码器，有效建模拓扑结构并保持线性复杂度。
analysis.experiments: 在多个复杂纹理和严重干扰的基准上评估，在TUT数据集上F1=0.8428，mIoU=0.8512，显著优于SOTA方法。
limitations: 可能仅在裂缝分割领域验证，泛化性未知。
摘要未提及与其他轻量级方法的详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出仅1.22M参数的SCRWKV网络，通过结构场编码器和线性复杂度RWKV实现高精度拓扑裂缝分割。

papers.title: Road Maps as Free Geometric Priors: Weather-Invariant Drone Geo-Localization with GeoFuse
papers.abstract: Drone-view geo-localization aims to match a query drone image, often captured under adverse weather conditions (e.g., rain, snow, fog), against a gallery of geo-tagged satellite images. Weather-induced degradations in the drone view, such as noise, reduced visibility, and partial occlusions, severely exacerbate the intrinsic cross-view domain gap. While prior methods predominantly rely on weather-specific architectures or data augmentations, they have largely overlooked road map data, a readily available modality that provides strong, inherently weather-invariant geometric layout cues (e.g., road networks and building footprints) at negligible additional cost. We introduce GeoFuse, a cross-modal fusion framework that integrates precisely aligned road map tiles with satellite imagery to yield more discriminative and weather-resilient representations. We first augment the existing University-1652 and DenseUAV benchmarks with geo-aligned road maps, supplying structural priors robust to meteorological variations. Building on this, we propose a flexible fusion module that combines satellite and road map features via token-level and channel-level interactions, with a lightweight dynamic gating mechanism that adaptively weights modality contributions per instance. Finally, we employ class-level cross-view contrastive learning to promote robust alignment between weather-degraded drone features and the fused satellite-roadmap representations. Extensive experiments under diverse weather conditions show that GeoFuse consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving +3.46% and +23.18% Recall@1 accuracy on the University-1652 and DenseUAV benchmarks, respectively.

analysis.tldr: GeoFuse通过融合道路地图与卫星图像，实现天气不变的无人机地理定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机地理定位在恶劣天气下性能严重下降，现有方法依赖天气专用架构或数据增强，但忽略了道路地图这一低成本、天气不变的几何先验。
analysis.problem: 解决无人机视图在恶劣天气下与卫星图像之间的跨视图域差距问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 天气退化（噪声、能见度降低、部分遮挡）加剧了无人机与卫星视图之间的域差距；道路地图提供天气不变的几何布局线索。
analysis.method: 提出GeoFuse框架，包括：1) 为现有基准添加地理对齐的道路地图；2) 融合模块通过token级和通道级交互以及动态门控机制自适应融合卫星和道路地图特征；3) 类别级跨视图对比学习对齐天气退化无人机特征与融合表示。
contributions: 首次将道路地图作为几何先验用于天气不变的无人机地理定位。
提出GeoFuse跨模态融合框架，包含动态门控和对比学习。
在University-1652和DenseUAV基准上分别提升Recall@1达3.46%和23.18%。
analysis.experiments: 在University-1652和DenseUAV基准上，模拟多种天气条件进行实验，GeoFuse一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 依赖道路地图数据的可用性和对齐精度。
未在真实恶劣天气数据上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoFuse通过融合道路地图与卫星图像，实现天气不变的无人机地理定位。

papers.title: SceneParser: Hierarchical Scene Parsing for Visual Semantics Understanding
papers.abstract: General scene perception has progressed from object recognition toward open-vocabulary grounding, part localization, and affordance prediction. Yet these capabilities are often realized as isolated predictions that localize objects, parts, or interaction points without capturing the structured dependencies needed for interaction-oriented scene understanding. To address this gap, we introduce Hierarchical Scene Parsing, an interaction-oriented parsing task that represents physical scenes as explicit scene -> object -> part -> affordance hierarchies with cross-level bindings. We instantiate this task with SceneParser, a VLM-based parser trained for unified hierarchical generation with structural-completion pseudo labels and curriculum learning. To support training and evaluation, we construct SceneParser-Bench, a large-scale benchmark built with a scalable hierarchical data engine, containing 110K training images, a 5K validation split, 777K objects, 1.14M parts, 1.74M affordance annotations, and 1.74M valid object-part-affordance chain instances. We further introduce Level-1 to Level-3 conditional metrics and ParseRate to evaluate localization, cross-level binding, and hierarchical completeness. Experiments show that existing MLLMs and perception-stitching pipelines struggle with hierarchical parsing on our SceneParser-Bench, while SceneParser achieves stronger structure-aware performance. Besides, ablations, evaluations on COCO and AGD20K, and a downstream planning probe demonstrate that our SceneParser is compatible with conventional tasks and provides an actionable representation for visual understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化场景解析任务和VLM解析器SceneParser，实现场景-物体-部件-功能层次结构理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有场景感知方法（如开放词汇定位、部件定位、功能预测）通常输出孤立的预测，缺乏交互导向场景理解所需的结构化依赖关系。
analysis.problem: 如何将物理场景表示为显式的场景-物体-部件-功能层次结构，并实现跨层级绑定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有MLLM和感知拼接流水线在层次化解析任务上表现不佳，而SceneParser实现了更强的结构感知性能。
analysis.method: 基于VLM的解析器，采用结构补全伪标签和课程学习进行统一层次化生成训练，并构建大规模基准SceneParser-Bench。
contributions: 提出层次化场景解析任务，定义场景-物体-部件-功能层次结构及跨层级绑定。
构建SceneParser-Bench大规模基准，包含110K训练图像、777K物体、1.14M部件、1.74M功能注释和1.74M有效链实例。
引入Level-1到Level-3条件指标和ParseRate评估定位、跨层级绑定和层次完整性。
实验表明SceneParser在层次化解析上优于现有MLLM和感知拼接方法，并在COCO、AGD20K和下游规划探测中表现良好。
analysis.experiments: 在SceneParser-Bench上评估，与现有MLLM和感知拼接流水线对比；在COCO和AGD20K上消融实验；下游规划探测验证。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模标注数据，构建成本高。
层次化解析的泛化性可能受限于训练数据覆盖的场景类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化场景解析任务和VLM解析器SceneParser，实现场景-物体-部件-功能层次结构理解。

papers.title: Representative Attention For Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Linear attention has emerged as a promising direction for scaling Vision Transformers beyond the quadratic cost of dense self-attention. A prevalent strategy is to compress spatial tokens into a compact set of intermediate proxies that mediate global information exchange. However, existing methods typically derive these proxy tokens from predefined spatial layouts, causing token compression to remain anchored to image coordinates rather than the semantic organization of visual content. To overcome this limitation, we propose Representative Attention (RPAttention), a linear global attention mechanism that performs token compression directly in representation space. Instead of constructing intermediate tokens from fixed spatial partitions, it dynamically forms a compact set of learned representative tokens to enable semantically related regions to communicate regardless of their spatial distance, by following a lightweight Gather-Interact-Distribute paradigm. Spatial tokens are first softly gathered into representative tokens through competitive similarity-based routing. The representatives then perform global interaction within a compact latent space, before broadcasting the refined information back to all spatial tokens via query-driven cross-attention. Via replacing coordinate-driven aggregation with representation-driven compression, RPAttention preserves global receptive fields while adaptively aligning token communication with the content structure of each this http URL reduces the dominant token interaction complexity from quadratic to linear scaling with respect to the number of spatial tokens, while maintaining expressive global context modeling. Extensive experiments across diverse vision transformer backbones on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation demonstrate the effectiveness of our design.

analysis.tldr: 提出Representative Attention，通过表示空间中的动态令牌压缩实现线性全局注意力，提升视觉Transformer效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 线性注意力通过压缩空间令牌为中间代理来降低自注意力的二次复杂度，但现有方法依赖预定义空间布局，导致令牌压缩锚定于图像坐标而非语义组织，限制了全局上下文建模的灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种线性全局注意力机制，使令牌压缩在表示空间中进行，从而自适应地对齐令牌通信与视觉内容的语义结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法从固定空间分区构建中间令牌，使得令牌压缩受限于图像坐标，无法根据语义内容动态调整。
analysis.method: 提出RPAttention，采用Gather-Interact-Distribute范式：首先通过基于相似性的竞争路由将空间令牌软聚集到一组可学习的代表令牌中；然后在紧凑的潜在空间中进行全局交互；最后通过查询驱动的交叉注意力将精炼信息广播回所有空间令牌。
contributions: 提出Representative Attention，一种在表示空间中进行令牌压缩的线性全局注意力机制，克服了空间坐标锚定的限制。
通过Gather-Interact-Distribute范式，实现了从二次到线性的复杂度降低，同时保持全局感受野和表达性上下文建模。
analysis.experiments: 在多种视觉Transformer骨干网络上进行图像分类、目标检测和语义分割的广泛实验，验证了方法的有效性。
limitations: 可能对代表令牌的数量敏感，需要调参。
在极长序列或高分辨率图像上的性能尚未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Representative Attention，通过表示空间中的动态令牌压缩实现线性全局注意力，提升视觉Transformer效率。

papers.title: SteerSeg: Attention Steering for Reasoning Video Segmentation
papers.abstract: Video reasoning segmentation requires localizing objects across video frames from natural language expressions, often involving spatial reasoning and implicit references. Recent approaches leverage frozen large vision-language models (LVLMs) by extracting attention maps and using them as spatial priors for segmentation, enabling training-free grounding. However, these attention maps are optimized for text generation rather than spatial localization, often resulting in diffuse and ambiguous grounding signals. In this work, we introduce SteerSeg, a lightweight framework that identifies attention misalignment as the key bottleneck in attention-based grounding and proposes to steer attention at its source through input-level conditioning. SteerSeg combines learnable soft prompts with reasoning-guided Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting. The soft prompts reshape the attention distribution to produce more spatially concentrated maps, while CoT-derived attributes resolve ambiguity among similar objects by guiding attention toward the correct instance. The resulting attention maps are converted into point prompts across keyframes to guide a segmentation model, while candidate tracklets are ranked and selected using correlation-based scoring. Our approach freezes the LVLM and segmentation model parameters and learns only a small set of soft prompts, preserving the model's pretrained reasoning capabilities while significantly improving grounding. Despite being trained only on Ref-YouTube-VOS, SteerSeg generalizes well across diverse benchmarks, significantly improving the spatial grounding capability of LVLMs. Project page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 通过输入级注意力引导，无需微调LVLM即可提升视频推理分割的空间定位能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法利用冻结LVLM的注意力图作为空间先验进行分割，但注意力图针对文本生成优化，导致定位信号弥散模糊，限制了视频推理分割的性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调大型视觉语言模型的前提下，改善其注意力图的空间集中性，以提升视频推理分割中基于注意力的定位准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出冻结LVLM的注意力图存在注意力错位（attention misalignment），即注意力分布弥散且模糊，无法准确聚焦目标对象，这是基于注意力定位的关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出SteerSeg框架，结合可学习软提示（soft prompts）和推理引导的思维链（CoT）提示，通过输入级条件调整注意力分布；软提示重塑注意力使其更集中，CoT属性解决相似对象歧义；将优化后的注意力图转换为点提示，结合候选轨迹相关性评分进行分割。
contributions: 识别注意力错位为基于注意力定位的关键瓶颈，并提出输入级注意力引导方法。
提出SteerSeg框架，结合软提示和CoT提示，无需微调LVLM即可显著提升空间定位能力。
在Ref-YouTube-VOS上训练后，跨多个基准展现良好泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖CoT提示的质量和软提示的初始化。
仅针对视频推理分割场景，泛化到其他任务需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过输入级注意力引导，无需微调LVLM即可提升视频推理分割的空间定位能力。

papers.title: MemLens: Benchmarking Multimodal Long-Term Memory in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Memory is essential for large vision-language models (LVLMs) to handle long, multimodal interactions, with two method directions providing this capability: long-context LVLMs and memory-augmented agents. However, no existing benchmark conducts a systematic comparison of the two on questions that genuinely require multimodal evidence. To close this gap, we introduce MEMLENS, a comprehensive benchmark for memory in multimodal multi-session conversations, comprising 789 questions across five memory abilities (information extraction, multi-session reasoning, temporal reasoning, knowledge update, and answer refusal) at four standard context lengths (32K-256K tokens) under a cross-modal token-counting scheme. An image-ablation study confirms that solving MEMLENS requires visual evidence: removing evidence images drops two frontier LVLMs below 2% accuracy on the 80.4% of questions whose evidence includes images. Evaluating 27 LVLMs and 7 memory-augmented agents, we find that long-context LVLMs achieve high short-context accuracy through direct visual grounding but degrade as conversations grow, whereas memory agents are length-stable but lose visual fidelity under storage-time compression. Multi-session reasoning caps most systems below 30%, and neither approach alone solves the task. These results motivate hybrid architectures that combine long-context attention with structured multimodal retrieval. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: MemLens 是首个系统比较长上下文 LVLM 与记忆增强智能体在多模态多轮对话中记忆能力的基准，发现两者各有优劣，需混合架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准缺乏对长上下文 LVLM 和记忆增强智能体在多模态多轮对话中记忆能力的系统比较，而真实场景需要多模态证据支持。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和比较长上下文 LVLM 与记忆增强智能体在多模态多轮对话中的记忆能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长上下文 LVLM 在短上下文中准确率高但随对话增长性能下降；记忆增强智能体性能稳定但存储压缩导致视觉保真度损失；多会话推理能力普遍低于30%。
analysis.method: 构建包含789个问题、覆盖5种记忆能力和4种上下文长度的基准 MEMLENS，采用跨模态 token 计数方案，并通过图像消融实验验证视觉证据的必要性。
contributions: 提出首个系统比较长上下文 LVLM 与记忆增强智能体在多模态多轮对话中记忆能力的基准 MEMLENS。
通过大规模实验揭示两类方法的互补性，并指出混合架构的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 评估了27个 LVLM 和7个记忆增强智能体，图像消融实验显示移除证据图像后前沿 LVLM 准确率降至2%以下。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖四种上下文长度，可能未涵盖更长上下文场景。
未深入分析混合架构的具体实现方式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MemLens 是首个系统比较长上下文 LVLM 与记忆增强智能体在多模态多轮对话中记忆能力的基准，发现两者各有优劣，需混合架构。

papers.title: SEDiT: Mask-Free Video Subtitle Erasure via One-step Diffusion Transformer
papers.abstract: Recent breakthroughs in video diffusion models have significantly accelerated the development of video editing techniques. However, existing methods often rely on inpainting video frames based on masked input, which requires extracting the target video mask in advance, and the precision of the segmentation directly affects the quality of the completion. In this paper, we present SEDiT, a novel one-stage video Subtitle Erasure approach via One-step Diffusion Transformer. We introduce a mask-free inference approach that enables direct erasure of the targeted subtitle. The proposed one-stage framework mitigates the sub-optimality inherent in the two-stage processing of prior models. Since subtitle removal is a localized editing task in which most pixels remain unchanged, the underlying distribution shift is minimal, making it well-suited to one-step generation under rectified flow. We empirically validate the reliability of one-step denoising and further provide a formal theoretical justification. Under the localized-editing structure of subtitle removal, the conditional optimal transport (OT) map and its induced rectified flow velocity field are Lipschitz continuous with respect to the latent variable, which underpins the theoretical feasibility of one-step sampling. To address the challenge of long-term temporal consistency, we adopt a hybrid training strategy by occasionally conditioning the model with a clean first-frame latent. This facilitates temporal continuity, allowing each segment during inference to leverage the output of its predecessor. To avoid visible seams caused by cropping and reinserting processed targets, particularly in scenarios involving substantial motion, we feed the original video directly into SEDiT. Thanks to one-step and chunk-wise streaming inference, our method can efficiently handle native 1440p video with infinite length.

analysis.tldr: SEDiT 提出一种无需掩码的单步扩散 Transformer 方法，用于高效擦除视频字幕。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频编辑方法依赖掩码输入，需要预先提取目标掩码，分割精度直接影响完成质量，且两阶段处理存在次优性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖掩码的情况下，高效且高质量地擦除视频中的字幕。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 字幕移除是局部编辑任务，大部分像素不变，分布偏移小，适合单步生成；条件最优传输映射和整流流速度场关于潜变量是 Lipschitz 连续的，保证了单步采样的理论可行性。
analysis.method: 提出 SEDiT，一种基于单步扩散 Transformer 的无掩码视频字幕擦除方法，采用混合训练策略（偶尔以干净首帧为条件）保证时间一致性，并通过直接输入原始视频和分块流式推理处理长视频。
contributions: 提出首个无需掩码的单步视频字幕擦除框架，避免了两阶段处理的次优性。
从理论上证明了在局部编辑结构下单步采样的可行性。
采用混合训练策略和分块流式推理，实现了高效处理无限长度原生 1440p 视频。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对大幅运动场景下的拼接痕迹处理仍有挑战。
单步生成可能在某些复杂字幕场景下质量受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SEDiT 提出一种无需掩码的单步扩散 Transformer 方法，用于高效擦除视频字幕。

papers.title: Your CLIP has 164 dimensions of noise: Exploring the embeddings covariance eigenspectrum of contrastively pretrained vision-language transformers
papers.abstract: Contrastively pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) serve as powerful feature extractors. Yet, their shared latent spaces are prone to structural anomalies and act as repositories for non-semantic, multi-modal noise. To address this phenomenon, we employ spectral decomposition of covariance matrices to decompose the VLM latent space into a multi-modal semantic signal component and a shared noise subspace. We observe that this noise geometry exhibits strong subgroup invariance across distinct data subsets. Crucially, pruning these shared noise dimensions is mainly harmless, preserving or actively improving downstream task performance. By isolating true semantic signals from artifactual noise, this work provides new mechanistic insights into the representational structure of modern VLMs, suggesting that a substantial fraction of their latent geometry is governed by shared, architecture-level noise rather than task-relevant semantics alone.

analysis.tldr: VLM 共享潜空间存在大量非语义噪声，通过协方差谱分解可分离并剪除噪声维度而不损害下游性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 对比预训练的视觉-语言模型（VLM）虽作为强大特征提取器，但其共享潜空间存在结构异常，并积累了大量非语义、多模态噪声，影响表征的纯净性和可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何识别并分离 VLM 共享潜空间中的语义信号与非语义噪声，并验证噪声维度的可剪除性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到噪声几何结构在不同数据子集间呈现强子群不变性，且剪除这些共享噪声维度对下游任务性能无害甚至有益。
analysis.method: 对 VLM 的协方差矩阵进行谱分解，将潜空间分解为多模态语义信号分量和共享噪声子空间。
contributions: 揭示了 VLM 潜空间中存在大量由架构级噪声主导的维度，而非仅任务相关语义。
提出通过谱分解分离语义信号与噪声，并证明剪除噪声维度可保持或提升下游性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能依赖于特定 VLM 架构，泛化性需验证。
噪声维度的剪除策略可能对某些任务有细微影响，需更全面评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLM 共享潜空间存在大量非语义噪声，通过协方差谱分解可分离并剪除噪声维度而不损害下游性能。

papers.title: Hierarchical Image Tokenization for Multi-Scale Image Super Resolution
papers.abstract: We introduce a multi-scale Image Super Resolution (ISR) method building on recent advances in Visual Auto-Regressive (VAR) modeling. VAR models break image tokenization into additive, gradually increasing scales, using Residual Quantization (RQ), an approach that aligns perfectly with our target ISR task. Previous works taking advantage of this synergy suffer from two main shortcomings. First, due to the limitations in RQ, they only generate images at a predefined fixed scale, failing to map intermediate outputs to the corresponding image scales. They also rely on large backbones or a large corpus of annotated data to achieve better performance. To address both shortcomings, we introduce two novel components to the VAR training for ISR, aiming at increasing its flexibility and reducing its complexity. In particular, we introduce a) a \textbf{Hierarchical Image Tokenization (HIT)} approach that progressively represents images at different scales while enforcing token overlap across scales, and b) a \textbf{Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) regularization term} that, relying solely on the (LR,HR) pair, encourages the transformer to produce the latter over the former. Our proposed HIT acts as a strong inductive bias for the VAR training, resulting in a small model (300M params vs 1B params of VARSR), that achieves state-of-the-art results without external training data, and that delivers multi-scale outputs with a single forward pass.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化图像分词（HIT）和DPO正则化，实现多尺度超分辨率，模型更小且无需外部数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于VAR的ISR方法受限于残差量化，只能生成固定尺度图像，且依赖大模型或大量标注数据，灵活性和效率不足。
analysis.problem: 如何实现灵活的多尺度图像超分辨率，同时降低模型复杂度和数据依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出层次化图像分词（HIT），通过跨尺度令牌重叠实现多尺度表示；引入直接偏好优化（DPO）正则化项，仅利用低-高分辨率对鼓励模型生成高分辨率输出。
contributions: 提出HIT方法，作为强归纳偏置，使VAR训练能生成多尺度输出且仅需单次前向传播。
引入DPO正则化，无需外部数据即可提升超分辨率性能。
在300M参数模型上达到SOTA，优于1B参数的VARSR。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对极端尺度变化或复杂纹理的泛化能力有限。
DPO正则化可能对低-高分辨率对的质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化图像分词（HIT）和DPO正则化，实现多尺度超分辨率，模型更小且无需外部数据。

papers.title: SurgicalMamba: Dual-Path SSD with State Regramming for Online Surgical Phase Recognition
papers.abstract: Online surgical phase recognition (SPR) underpins context-aware operating-room systems and requires committing to a prediction at every frame from past context alone. Surgical video poses three demands that natural-video recognizers do not jointly address: procedures span tens of thousands of frames, time flows non-uniformly as long routine stretches are punctuated by brief phase-defining transitions, and the visual domain is narrow so backbone features are strongly correlated across channels. Existing recognizers either let per-frame cost grow with elapsed length, or hold cost bounded but advance state at a uniform rate with channel-independent dynamics, leaving the latter two demands unaddressed. We present SurgicalMamba, a causal SPR model built on Mamba2's structured state-space duality (SSD) that holds per-frame cost at O(d). It introduces three SSD-compatible components, each targeting one demand: a dual-path SSD block that separates long- and short-term regimes at the level of recurrent state; intensity-modulated stepping, a continuous-time time-warp that adapts the slow path's effective rate to phase-relevant information; and state regramming, a per-chunk Cayley rotation that opens cross-channel mixing in the otherwise axis-aligned SSM recurrence. The learned rotation planes inherit a phase-aligned structure without any direct supervision, offering an interpretable internal signature of surgical workflow. Across seven public SPR benchmarks, SurgicalMamba reaches state-of-the-art accuracy and phase-level Jaccard under strict online evaluation: 94.6%/82.7% on Cholec80 (+0.7 pp/+2.2 pp over the strongest prior) and 89.5%/68.9% on AutoLaparo (+1.7 pp/+2.0 pp), at 119 fps on a single GPU. Ablations isolate the contribution of each component. The code is publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出 SurgicalMamba，基于 Mamba2 的 SSD 架构，通过双路径状态、强度调制步进和状态重编程实现高效在线手术阶段识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线手术阶段识别需要从过去上下文逐帧预测，但手术视频具有超长帧数、非均匀时间流和窄视觉域导致通道强相关三个挑战，现有方法无法同时解决。
analysis.problem: 设计一个因果模型，在保持每帧计算成本恒定的同时，处理手术视频的长序列、非均匀时间动态和通道间强相关性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 手术视频中长时间常规操作被短暂阶段定义转换打断，时间流非均匀；视觉域窄导致骨干特征通道间强相关。
analysis.method: 基于 Mamba2 的 SSD 架构，引入双路径 SSD 块（分离长短时状态）、强度调制步进（自适应时间扭曲）和状态重编程（每块 Cayley 旋转实现跨通道混合）。
contributions: 提出 SurgicalMamba，首个利用 Mamba2 SSD 架构实现高效在线手术阶段识别的模型。
设计三个 SSD 兼容组件：双路径 SSD、强度调制步进和状态重编程，分别解决长序列、非均匀时间和通道相关性问题。
在七个公开基准上达到 SOTA，Cholec80 准确率 94.6%/Jaccard 82.7%，AutoLaparo 89.5%/68.9%，速度 119 fps。
analysis.experiments: 在七个公开手术阶段识别基准上评估，包括 Cholec80 和 AutoLaparo，达到 SOTA 准确率和 Jaccard 指标，并进行了消融实验。
limitations: 可能对极长视频序列的泛化能力需进一步验证。
状态重编程的旋转平面可解释性仅在手术领域验证，通用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 SurgicalMamba，基于 Mamba2 的 SSD 架构，通过双路径状态、强度调制步进和状态重编程实现高效在线手术阶段识别。

papers.title: Masked Next-Scale Prediction for Self-supervised Scene Text Recognition
papers.abstract: Scene Text Recognition requires modeling visual structures that evolve from coarse layouts to fine-grained character strokes. Training such models relies on large amounts of annotated data. Recent self-supervised approaches, such as Masked Image Modeling (MIM), alleviate this dependency by leveraging large-scale unlabeled data. Yet most existing MIM methods operate at a single spatial scale and fail to capture the hierarchical nature of scene text. In this work, we introduce Masked Next-Scale Prediction (MNSP), a unified self-supervised framework designed to explicitly model cross-scale structural evolution. The framework incorporates Next-Scale Prediction (NSP), which learns hierarchical representations by predicting higher-resolution features from lower-resolution contexts. Naive scale prediction, however, tends to produce spatially diffuse attention, directing the model toward background regions rather than textual structures. MNSP resolves this limitation by jointly learning cross-scale prediction and masked image reconstruction. NSP captures global layout priors across resolutions, while masked reconstruction imposes strong local constraints that guide attention toward informative text regions. A Multi-scale Linguistic Alignment module further maintains semantic consistency across different resolutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MNSP achieves state-of-the-art performance, reaching 86.2\% average accuracy on the challenging Union14M benchmark and 96.7\% across six standard datasets. Additional analyses show that our method improves robustness under extreme scale and layout variations. Code is available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出掩码下一尺度预测（MNSP）自监督框架，通过跨尺度结构演化建模提升场景文字识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 场景文字识别需要建模从粗粒度布局到细粒度笔画的视觉结构，现有自监督方法（如MIM）仅在单一空间尺度操作，无法捕捉场景文本的层次结构，且依赖大量标注数据。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自监督框架显式建模场景文本的跨尺度结构演化，以提升识别性能并减少对标注数据的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 朴素尺度预测会导致注意力空间弥散，使模型关注背景区域而非文本结构。
analysis.method: 提出掩码下一尺度预测（MNSP）框架，联合学习跨尺度预测（NSP）和掩码图像重建（MIM），NSP捕获全局布局先验，MIM施加局部约束引导注意力至文本区域，并引入多尺度语言对齐模块保持语义一致性。
contributions: 提出MNSP自监督框架，显式建模场景文本的跨尺度结构演化。
通过联合NSP和MIM解决朴素尺度预测的注意力弥散问题。
在多个基准上达到SOTA，并提升对极端尺度和布局变化的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在Union14M基准上平均准确率86.2%，在六个标准数据集上平均96.7%，并分析了极端尺度和布局变化下的鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能对极度扭曲或低质量文本图像效果有限。
多尺度语言对齐模块可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出掩码下一尺度预测（MNSP）自监督框架，通过跨尺度结构演化建模提升场景文字识别性能。

papers.title: Denoising-GS: Gaussian Splatting with Spatial-aware Denoising
papers.abstract: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have achieved remarkable success in high-fidelity Novel View Synthesis (NVS), yet the optimization process inevitably introduces noisy Gaussian primitives due to the sparse and incomplete initialization from Structure-from-Motion (SfM) point clouds. Most existing methods focus solely on adjusting the positions of primitives during optimization, while neglecting the underlying spatial structure. To this end, we introduce a new perspective by formulating the optimization of 3DGS as a primitive denoising process and propose Denoising-GS, a spatial-aware denoising framework for Gaussian primitives by taking both the positions and spatial structure into consideration. Specifically, we design an optimizer that preserves the spatial optimization flow of primitives, facilitating coherent and directed denoising rather than random perturbations. Building upon this, the Spatial Gradient-based Denoising strategy jointly considers the spatial supports of primitives to ensure gradient-consistent updates. Furthermore, the Uncertainty-based Denoising module estimates primitive-wise uncertainty to prune redundant or noisy primitives, while the Spatial Coherence Refinement strategy selectively splits primitives in sparse regions to maintain structural completeness. Experiments conducted on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that Denoising-GS consistently enhances NVS fidelity while maintaining representation compactness, achieving state-of-the-art performance across all benchmarks. Source code and models will be made publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 将3D高斯泼溅优化视为原始去噪过程，提出空间感知去噪框架提升新视角合成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D高斯泼溅在优化中因SfM点云稀疏不完整而引入噪声原始，现有方法仅调整位置忽略空间结构，限制了合成质量。
analysis.problem: 如何同时考虑高斯原始的位置和空间结构，实现去噪式优化以提升新视角合成保真度和紧凑性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 优化过程中噪声原始的存在源于稀疏初始化，且现有方法缺乏对空间结构的利用。
analysis.method: 提出Denoising-GS框架，包含空间优化流保持、空间梯度去噪、不确定性剪枝和空间一致性细化四个模块。
contributions: 将3DGS优化重新定义为原始去噪过程，引入空间感知视角。
设计空间梯度去噪策略和不确定性剪枝模块，联合优化位置与结构。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上实验，达到SOTA性能，代码和模型将开源。
limitations: 可能依赖SfM初始化质量，极端稀疏场景效果待验证。
不确定性估计的阈值需手动调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将3D高斯泼溅优化视为原始去噪过程，提出空间感知去噪框架提升新视角合成质量。

papers.title: HeatKV: Head-tuned KV-cache Compression for Visual Autoregressive Modeling
papers.abstract: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models have recently demonstrated impressive image generation quality while maintaining low latency. However, they suffer from severe KV-cache memory constraints, often requiring gigabytes of memory per generated image. We introduce HeatKV, a novel compression method that adapts cache allocation in each head based on its attention to previously generated scales. Using a small offline calibration set, the attention heads are ranked according to their attention scores over prior scales. Based on this ranking, we construct a static pruning schedule tailored to a given memory budget. Applied to the Infinity-2B model, HeatKV achieves $2 \times$ higher compression ratio in memory allocation for KV cache compared to existing methods, while maintaining similar or better image fidelity, prompt alignment and human perception score. Our method achieves a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) for VAR model KV-cache compression, showcasing the effectiveness of fine-grained, head-specific cache allocation.

analysis.tldr: HeatKV 通过头级注意力排序实现 VAR 模型 KV-cache 的 2 倍压缩，保持图像质量。
analysis.research_motivation: VAR 模型生成图像时 KV-cache 内存消耗巨大，每张图像需数 GB，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著降低图像质量的前提下，高效压缩 VAR 模型的 KV-cache。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同注意力头对先前尺度的关注程度不同，可据此进行差异化缓存分配。
analysis.method: 利用离线校准集按注意力分数对头排序，基于排序和内存预算构建静态剪枝计划，实现头级缓存分配。
contributions: 提出 HeatKV，一种针对 VAR 模型的头级 KV-cache 压缩方法。
在 Infinity-2B 模型上实现 2 倍压缩比，同时保持或提升图像保真度、提示对齐和人类感知评分。
analysis.experiments: 在 Infinity-2B 模型上评估，与现有方法相比，HeatKV 在压缩比和图像质量指标上达到 SOTA。
limitations: 依赖离线校准集，可能影响泛化性。
静态剪枝计划可能无法适应动态生成过程。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HeatKV 通过头级注意力排序实现 VAR 模型 KV-cache 的 2 倍压缩，保持图像质量。

papers.title: Unlocking Complex Visual Generation via Closed-Loop Verified Reasoning
papers.abstract: Despite rapid advancements, current text-to-image (T2I) models predominantly rely on a single-step generation paradigm, which struggles with complex semantics and faces diminishing returns from parameter scaling. While recent multi-step reasoning approaches show promise, they are hindered by ungrounded planning hallucinations lacking verification, monolithic post-hoc reflection, long-context optimization instabilities, and prohibitive inference latency. To overcome these bottlenecks, we propose the Closed-Loop Visual Reasoning (CLVR) framework, a comprehensive system that deeply couples visual-language logical planning with pixel-level diffusion generation. CLVR introduces an automated data engine with step-level visual verification to synthesize reliable reasoning trajectories, and proposes Proxy Prompt Reinforcement Learning (PPRL) to resolve long-context optimization instabilities by distilling interleaved multimodal histories into explicit reward signals for accurate causal attribution. Furthermore, to mitigate the severe latency bottleneck caused by iterative denoising, we propose $\Delta$-Space Weight Merge (DSWM), a theoretically grounded method that fuses alignment weights with off-the-shelf distillation priors, reducing the per-step inference cost to just 4 NFEs without requiring expensive re-distillation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CLVR outperforms existing open-source baselines across multiple benchmarks and approaches the performance of proprietary commercial models, unlocking general test-time scaling capabilities for complex visual generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出闭环视觉推理框架CLVR，通过视觉验证、强化学习和权重融合实现复杂文本到图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前T2I模型依赖单步生成，难以处理复杂语义，且参数扩展收益递减；多步推理方法存在规划幻觉、优化不稳定和推理延迟高等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何实现可靠、高效的多步推理式复杂视觉生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多步推理方法存在无验证的规划幻觉、整体事后反思、长上下文优化不稳定和推理延迟瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出CLVR框架，包含：1) 自动数据引擎与步骤级视觉验证；2) 代理提示强化学习(PPRL)解决长上下文优化不稳定；3) Δ-空间权重合并(DSWM)降低推理成本至4步。
contributions: 提出闭环视觉推理框架，将视觉语言逻辑规划与扩散生成深度耦合。
提出PPRL方法，通过蒸馏多模态历史为显式奖励信号实现准确因果归因。
提出DSWM方法，无需重新蒸馏即可将推理成本降至4步。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上优于现有开源基线，接近商业模型性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量验证数据。
DSWM方法在极端复杂场景下的泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出闭环视觉推理框架CLVR，通过视觉验证、强化学习和权重融合实现复杂文本到图像生成。

papers.title: LPH-VTON: Resolving the Structure-Texture Dilemma of Virtual Try-On via Latent Process Handover
papers.abstract: Virtual Try-On (VTON) aims to synthesize photorealistic images of garments precisely aligned with a person's body and pose. Current diffusion-based methods, however, face a fundamental trade-off between structural integrity and textural fidelity. In this paper, we formalize this challenge as a consequence of complementary inductive biases inherent in prevailing architectures: models heavily reliant on spatial constraints naturally favor geometric alignment but often suppress textures, whereas models dominated by unconstrained generative priors excel at vibrant detail rendering but are prone to structural drift. Based on this diagnosis, we propose LPH-VTON, a new synergistic framework that resolves this tension within a single, continuous denoising process. LPH-VTON strategically decomposes the generation, leveraging a structure-biased model to establish a geometrically consistent latent scaffold in the early stages, before handing over control to a texture-biased model for high-fidelity detail rendering. Extensive experiments validate our approach. Our model achieves a superior Pareto-optimal balance, establishing new benchmarks in perceptual faithfulness while maintaining highly competitive structural alignment across the standard dataset VITON-HD, proving the efficacy of temporal architectural decoupling.

analysis.tldr: 提出LPH-VTON框架，通过潜在过程交接解决虚拟试穿中结构完整性与纹理保真度的权衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型在虚拟试穿中面临结构完整性与纹理保真度的根本性权衡，缺乏有效方法同时兼顾两者。
analysis.problem: 解决虚拟试穿中结构对齐与纹理细节渲染之间的冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，依赖空间约束的模型偏向几何对齐但抑制纹理，而无约束生成先验的模型擅长细节渲染但易结构漂移。
analysis.method: 提出LPH-VTON，在单一连续去噪过程中，早期使用结构偏置模型建立几何一致的潜在支架，后期切换至纹理偏置模型进行高保真细节渲染。
contributions: 形式化了虚拟试穿中结构-纹理权衡问题，归因于架构的互补归纳偏置。
提出LPH-VTON框架，通过时间架构解耦实现结构完整性与纹理保真度的帕累托最优平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在VITON-HD数据集上验证，模型在感知保真度上达到新基准，同时保持高度竞争力的结构对齐。
limitations: 可能依赖特定架构选择，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论多视角或复杂姿态下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LPH-VTON框架，通过潜在过程交接解决虚拟试穿中结构完整性与纹理保真度的权衡问题。

papers.title: FactorizedHMR: A Hybrid Framework for Video Human Mesh Recovery
papers.abstract: Human Mesh Recovery (HMR) is fundamentally ambiguous: under occlusion or weak depth cues, multiple 3D bodies can explain the same image evidence. This ambiguity is not uniform across the body, as torso pose and root structure are often relatively well constrained, whereas distal articulations such as the arms and legs are more uncertain. Building on this observation, we propose FactorizedHMR, a two-stage framework that treats these two regimes differently. A deterministic regression module first recovers a stable torso-root anchor, and a probabilistic flow-matching module then completes the remaining non-torso articulation. To make this completion reliable, we combine a composite target representation with geometry-aware supervision and feature-aware classifier-free guidance, preserving the torso-root anchor while improving single-reference recovery of ambiguity-prone articulation. We also introduce a synthetic data pipeline that provides the paired image-camera-motion supervision under diverse viewpoints. Across camera-space and world-space benchmarks, FactorizedHMR remains competitive with strong baselines, with the clearest gains in occlusion-heavy recovery and drift-sensitive world-space metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出FactorizedHMR，将人体网格恢复分解为确定性躯干回归和概率流匹配补全，提升遮挡下的恢复质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 人体网格恢复存在固有的模糊性，尤其在遮挡或弱深度线索下，不同身体部位的不确定性不同，现有方法未充分利用这一结构差异。
analysis.problem: 如何针对人体不同部位的不确定性差异，设计混合框架以提升视频人体网格恢复的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 躯干姿态和根结构相对确定，而四肢等远端关节更不确定，需要分别处理。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用确定性回归模块恢复稳定的躯干-根锚点；第二阶段用概率流匹配模块补全非躯干关节，结合复合目标表示、几何感知监督和特征感知无分类器引导。
contributions: 提出FactorizedHMR，将HMR分解为确定性躯干回归和概率流匹配补全。
引入合成数据流水线，提供多样视角下的配对图像-相机-运动监督。
在遮挡严重和世界空间漂移指标上取得显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在相机空间和世界空间基准上与强基线竞争，在遮挡严重和世界空间漂移指标上增益最明显。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据质量。
流匹配模块的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FactorizedHMR，将人体网格恢复分解为确定性躯干回归和概率流匹配补全，提升遮挡下的恢复质量。

papers.title: SR-Prominence: A Crowdsourced Protocol and Dataset Suite for Perceptually-Weighted Super-Resolution Artifact Evaluation
papers.abstract: Modern image super-resolution methods generate detailed, visually appealing results, but they often introduce visual artifacts: unnatural patterns and texture distortions that degrade perceived quality. These defects vary widely in perceptual impact--some are barely noticeable, while others are highly disturbing--yet existing detection methods treat them equally. We propose artifact prominence as an evaluative target, defined as the fraction of viewers who judge a highlighted region to contain a noticeable artifact. We design a crowdsourced annotation protocol and construct SR-Prominence, a dataset suite containing 3,935 artifact masks from DeSRA, Open Images, Urban100, and a realistic no-ground-truth Urban100-HR setting, annotated with prominence. Re-annotating DeSRA reveals that 48.2% of its in-lab binary artifacts are not noticed by a majority of viewers. Across the suite, we audit SR artifact detectors, image-quality metrics, and SR methods. We find that classical full-reference metrics, especially SSIM and DISTS, provide surprisingly strong localized prominence signals, whereas no-reference IQA methods and specialized artifact detectors often fail to generalize across datasets and reference settings. SR-Prominence is released with an objective scoring protocol that allows new metrics to be benchmarked on our suite without further crowdsourcing. Together, the data and protocols enable SR artifact evaluation to move from binary defect presence toward perceptual impact. SR-Prominence is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于众包感知权重的超分伪影显著性评估协议与数据集，推动超分伪影评估从二值缺陷检测转向感知影响度量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有超分辨率方法生成的图像虽细节丰富，但常引入视觉伪影，且不同伪影的感知影响差异巨大，而现有检测方法对所有伪影一视同仁，缺乏基于感知权重的评估。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和量化超分伪影的感知显著性，并构建相应的评估协议与数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重新标注DeSRA数据集发现，48.2%的实验室二值伪影实际上不被多数观看者注意到，表明现有二值标注与真实感知存在显著偏差。
analysis.method: 提出伪影显著性（artifact prominence）概念，定义为认为高亮区域包含明显伪影的观看者比例；设计众包标注协议，构建包含3,935个伪影掩码的数据集套件，并提供客观评分协议以便新指标无需额外众包即可基准测试。
contributions: 提出伪影显著性作为超分伪影评估的新目标，并设计众包标注协议。
构建SR-Prominence数据集套件，涵盖多个数据集和真实无参考场景。
系统审计现有SR伪影检测器、图像质量指标和SR方法，发现全参考指标（SSIM、DISTS）提供强局部显著性信号，而无参考方法和专用检测器泛化能力差。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 众包标注可能受观看者个体差异影响，显著性分数可能存在噪声。
数据集规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有类型的超分伪影。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于众包感知权重的超分伪影显著性评估协议与数据集，推动超分伪影评估从二值缺陷检测转向感知影响度量。

papers.title: Exploring Vision-Language Models for Online Signature Verification: A Zero-Shot Capability Study
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in general visual reasoning, yet their applicability to rigorous biometric tasks remains unexplored. This work presents an exploratory study evaluating the zero-shot performance of state-of-the-art VLMs (GPT-5.2 and Gemini 2.5 Pro) on the Signature Verification Challenge (SVC) benchmark. To enable visual processing, raw kinematic time-series are converted into static images, encoding pressure information into stroke opacity whenever available in the source data. Furthermore, we introduce a scoring protocol that extracts latent token probabilities to compute robust biometric scores. Experimental results reveal a significant performance dichotomy dependent on signal quality and forgery type. In random forgery scenarios, the zero-shot VLM achieves exceptional discrimination, with GPT-5.2 reaching an Equal Error Rate of 0.32% in mobile tasks, outperforming supervised state-of-the-art systems. Conversely, in skilled forgery scenarios, where the task is more challenging because both signatures are almost identical, the results are significantly worse, and a critical "Rationalization Trap" emerges: chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning degrades performance as the model produces kinematic hallucinations to justify forgery artifacts as natural variability.

analysis.tldr: 探索VLM在在线签名验证中的零样本能力，发现随机伪造场景下表现优异，但熟练伪造场景下CoT推理会陷入“合理化陷阱”。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在通用视觉推理中表现强劲，但能否应用于严格的生物特征任务（如签名验证）尚不清楚，现有方法依赖监督学习，零样本能力未知。
analysis.problem: 评估VLM在在线签名验证任务上的零样本性能，并分析其在不同伪造类型下的表现差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机伪造场景下VLM表现优异（GPT-5.2 EER=0.32%），但熟练伪造场景下性能显著下降，且CoT推理导致“合理化陷阱”：模型产生运动幻觉，将伪造痕迹解释为自然变化。
analysis.method: 将原始运动时间序列转换为静态图像（编码压力信息），设计基于token概率的评分协议，在SVC基准上测试GPT-5.2和Gemini 2.5 Pro的零样本性能。
contributions: 首次系统评估VLM在在线签名验证中的零样本能力
发现并命名“Rationalization Trap”现象，揭示CoT推理在细粒度生物特征任务中的局限性
analysis.experiments: 在SVC基准上测试，随机伪造场景下GPT-5.2在移动任务中EER=0.32%，超越监督SOTA；熟练伪造场景下性能显著下降。
limitations: 仅评估两个VLM，泛化性有限
未探索其他模态或训练策略来缓解Rationalization Trap
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探索VLM在在线签名验证中的零样本能力，发现随机伪造场景下表现优异，但熟练伪造场景下CoT推理会陷入“合理化陷阱”。

papers.title: MechVerse: Evaluating Physical Motion Consistency in Video Generation Models
papers.abstract: Text- and image-conditioned video generation models have achieved strong visual fidelity and temporal coherence, but they often fail to generate motion governed by kinematic and geometric constraints. In these settings, object parts must remain rigid, maintain contact or coupling with neighboring components, and transfer motion consistently across connected parts. These requirements are especially explicit in articulated mechanical assemblies, where motion is constrained by rigid-link geometry, contact/coupling relations, and transmission through kinematic chains. A generated video may therefore appear plausible while violating the intended mechanism, such as rotating a part that should translate, deforming a rigid component, breaking coupling between parts, or failing to move downstream components. To evaluate this gap, We introduce MechVerse, a benchmark for mechanically consistent image-to-video generation. MechVerse contains 21,156 synthetic clips from 1,357 mechanical assemblies across 141 categories, organized into three tiers of increasing kinematic complexity: independent articulation, pairwise coupling, and densely coupled multi-part mechanisms. Each clip is paired with a structured prompt describing part identities, stationary supports, moving components, motion primitives, direction, speed/extent, and inter-part dependencies. We evaluate proprietary, open-source, and fine-tuned image-to-video models using standard video metrics, instruction-following scores, and human judgments of motion correctness and kinematic coupling. Results show that current models can preserve appearance and smoothness while failing to generate mechanically admissible motion, with errors increasing as coupling complexity grows. MechVerse provides a benchmark for measuring and improving mechanism-aware video generation from image and language inputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出 MechVerse 基准，系统评估视频生成模型在机械运动一致性上的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽在视觉保真度和时间连贯性上表现良好，但常生成违反运动学和几何约束的运动，尤其在机械装配场景中，需要精确的刚体运动、接触耦合和运动传递。
analysis.problem: 视频生成模型缺乏对机械运动一致性的建模能力，无法保证生成视频中物体部件的运动符合物理约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在保持外观和流畅性的同时，生成的运动可能违反机械原理，如旋转本应平移的部件、变形刚性部件、破坏部件间耦合或未能驱动下游部件，且错误率随耦合复杂度增加而上升。
analysis.method: 构建包含21,156个合成视频片段、1,357个机械装配体、141个类别的基准MechVerse，按运动学复杂度分为独立关节、成对耦合、密集耦合多部件三个层级，每个片段配有结构化提示，并采用标准视频指标、指令遵循分数和人工判断进行评估。
contributions: 提出MechVerse基准，系统评估视频生成模型的机械运动一致性。
揭示当前模型在机械运动约束下的失败模式，并随耦合复杂度增加错误率上升。
analysis.experiments: 评估了闭源、开源和微调图像到视频模型，使用标准视频指标、指令遵循分数和人工判断。
limitations: 基准仅包含合成机械装配数据，未涉及真实世界复杂场景。
未提供具体模型改进方法或训练策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 MechVerse 基准，系统评估视频生成模型在机械运动一致性上的不足。

papers.title: Editor's Choice: Evaluating Abstract Intent in Image Editing through Atomic Entity Analysis
papers.abstract: Humans naturally communicate through abstract concepts like "mood". However, current image editing benchmarks focus primarily on explicit, literal commands, leaving abstract instructions largely underexplored. In this work, we first formalize the definition and taxonomy of abstract image editing. To measure instruction-following in this challenging domain, we introduce Entity-Rubrics, a framework that breaks down abstract edits into individual, entity-level assessments and achieves strong correlation with human judgment. Alongside this framework, we contribute AbstractEdit, the first benchmark dedicated to abstract image editing across diverse real-world scenes. Evaluating 11 leading models on this dataset reveals a fundamental challenge: standard architectures struggle to balance intent and preservation, commonly defaulting to under-editing or over-editing. Our analysis demonstrates that driving meaningful improvements relies heavily on integrating advanced LLM text encoders and iterative thinking. Looking forward, our entity-based paradigm can generalize beyond assessment to serve as a reward model, enable models to correctly interpret abstract communication, or highlight specific failures in test-time critique loops. Ultimately, we hope this work serves as a stepping stone toward seamless multimodal interaction, closing the gap between rigid machine execution and the natural, open-ended way humans communicate.

analysis.tldr: 提出抽象图像编辑基准AbstractEdit与实体级评估框架Entity-Rubrics，揭示现有模型在意图与保真度间的失衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像编辑基准主要关注显式文字指令，忽略了人类自然交流中的抽象概念（如“情绪”），导致模型难以理解抽象意图。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化定义抽象图像编辑，并构建能评估模型遵循抽象指令能力的基准与评估方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准架构在抽象编辑中难以平衡意图与保真度，常出现欠编辑或过编辑；引入高级LLM文本编码器和迭代推理可显著提升性能。
analysis.method: 形式化抽象图像编辑的定义与分类；提出Entity-Rubrics框架，将抽象编辑分解为实体级评估；构建AbstractEdit基准。
contributions: 首次形式化抽象图像编辑的定义与分类体系
提出Entity-Rubrics框架，实现实体级评估并与人类判断高度相关
构建首个抽象图像编辑基准AbstractEdit，覆盖多样真实场景
系统评估11个模型，揭示意图与保真度失衡问题，并指出改进方向
analysis.experiments: 在AbstractEdit基准上评估11个领先模型，发现标准架构普遍存在欠编辑或过编辑问题；分析表明集成高级LLM文本编码器和迭代推理是关键。
limitations: 基准规模可能有限，未覆盖所有抽象概念
评估框架依赖实体分解，可能不适用于高度抽象的全局编辑
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出抽象图像编辑基准AbstractEdit与实体级评估框架Entity-Rubrics，揭示现有模型在意图与保真度间的失衡。

papers.title: Multi-proposal Collaboration and Multi-task Training for Weakly-supervised Video Moment Retrieval
papers.abstract: This study focuses on weakly-supervised Video Moment Retrieval (VMR), aiming to identify a moment semantically similar to the given query within an untrimmed video using only video-level correspondences, without relying on temporal annotations during training. Previous methods either aggregate predictions for all instances in the video, or indirectly address the task by proposing reconstructions for the query. However, these methods often produce low-quality temporal proposals, struggle with distinguishing misaligned moments in the same video, or lack stability due to a reliance on a single auxiliary task. To address these limitations, we present a novel weakly-supervised method called Multi-proposal Collaboration and Multi-task Training (MCMT). Initially, we generate multiple proposals and derive corresponding learnable Gaussian masks from them. These masks are then combined to create a high-quality positive sample mask, highlighting video clips most relevant to the query. Concurrently, we classify other clips in the same video as the easy negative sample and the entire video as the hard negative sample. During training, we introduce forward and inverse masked query reconstruction tasks to impose more substantial constraints on the network, promoting more robust and stable retrieval performance. Extensive experiments on two standard benchmarks affirm the effectiveness of the proposed method in VMR.

analysis.tldr: 提出多提案协作与多任务训练方法，提升弱监督视频时刻检索的提案质量和稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 弱监督视频时刻检索（VMR）无需时序标注，但现有方法生成的时序提案质量低，难以区分同一视频中的错配时刻，且依赖单一辅助任务导致不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用时序标注的情况下，生成高质量时序提案并实现鲁棒的弱监督视频时刻检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法生成的时序提案质量低，难以区分同一视频中的错配时刻，且单一辅助任务导致训练不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出MCMT方法：首先生成多个提案并从中推导可学习的高斯掩码，组合成高质量正样本掩码；将同一视频中其他片段作为易负样本，整个视频作为难负样本；引入前向和反向掩码查询重构任务进行多任务训练。
contributions: 提出多提案协作策略，通过组合多个提案的高斯掩码生成高质量正样本掩码。
引入前向和反向掩码查询重构任务，增强网络约束，提升检索稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在两个标准基准数据集上进行实验，验证了方法的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖提案生成的质量，若初始提案较差则影响后续协作。
多任务训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多提案协作与多任务训练方法，提升弱监督视频时刻检索的提案质量和稳定性。

papers.title: HDRFace: Rethinking Face Restoration with High-Dimensional Representation
papers.abstract: Face restoration under complex degradations still remains an ill-posed inverse problem due to severe information loss. Although diffusion models benefit from strong generative priors, most methods still condition only on low-quality inputs, making it difficult to recover identity-critical details under heavy degradations. In this work, we propose HDRFace, a High-Dimensional Representation conditioned Face restoration framework that injects semantically rich priors into the conditional flow without modifying the generative backbone. Our pipeline first obtains a structurally reliable intermediate restoration with an off-the-shelf restorer, then uses a pretrained high-dimensional feature encoder to extract fine-grained facial representations from both the low-quality input and the intermediate result, and injects them as additional conditions for generation. We further introduce SDFM, a Structure-Detail aware adaptive Fusion Mechanism that emphasizes global constraints during structure modeling and strengthens representation guidance during detail synthesis, balancing structural consistency and detail fidelity. To validate the generalization ability of our method, we implement the proposed framework on two generative models, SD V2.1-base and Qwen-Image, and consistently observe stable and coherent performance gains across different architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出高维表示条件注入框架HDRFace，在不修改生成骨干网络的情况下提升人脸修复的身份细节恢复能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂退化下的人脸修复因信息严重丢失而高度病态，现有扩散模型仅依赖低质量输入条件，难以恢复身份关键细节。
analysis.problem: 如何在重度退化条件下，不修改生成骨干网络，向扩散模型注入语义丰富的先验以恢复身份关键细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先通过现成修复器获得结构可靠的中间结果，再用预训练高维特征编码器从低质量输入和中间结果中提取细粒度面部表示，并作为额外条件注入生成过程；同时提出结构-细节自适应融合机制SDFM，在结构建模时强调全局约束，在细节合成时增强表示引导。
contributions: 提出HDRFace，一种高维表示条件人脸修复框架，无需修改生成骨干网络即可注入语义丰富先验。
提出SDFM结构-细节自适应融合机制，平衡结构一致性与细节保真度。
在SD V2.1-base和Qwen-Image两种生成模型上验证了方法的泛化能力，均获得稳定且一致的性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在SD V2.1-base和Qwen-Image两种生成模型上实现框架，观察到稳定且一致的性能增益。
limitations: 依赖现成修复器的中间结果质量，可能引入误差。
高维特征编码器的预训练过程未在摘要中说明，可能影响可复现性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出高维表示条件注入框架HDRFace，在不修改生成骨干网络的情况下提升人脸修复的身份细节恢复能力。

papers.title: The Velocity Deficit: Initial Energy Injection for Flow Matching
papers.abstract: While Flow Matching theoretically guarantees constant-velocity trajectories, we identify a critical breakdown in high-dimensional practice: the Velocity Deficit. We show that the MSE objective systematically underestimates velocity magnitude, causing generated samples to fail to reach the data manifold-a phenomenon we term Integration Lag. To rectify this, we propose Initial Energy Injection, instantiated via two complementary methods: the training-based Magnitude-Aware Flow Matching (MAFM) and the training-free Scale Schedule Corrector (SSC). Both are grounded in our discovery of a crucial asymmetry: velocity contraction causes harmful kinetic stagnation at the trajectory's start, yet acts as a beneficial denoising mechanism at its end. Empirically, SSC yields significant efficiency gains with zero retraining and just one line of code. On ImageNet-1k (256x256), it improves FID by 44.6% (from 13.68 to 7.58) and achieves a 5x speedup, enabling a 50-step generator (FID 7.58) to beat a 250-step baseline (FID 8.65). Furthermore, our methods generalize to Text-to-Image tasks and high-resolution generation, improving FID on MS-COCO by ~22%.

analysis.tldr: 发现流匹配中速度欠估计导致生成失败，提出初始能量注入方法显著提升效率与质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 流匹配理论上保证恒定速度轨迹，但在高维实践中出现速度欠估计问题，导致生成样本无法到达数据流形，影响生成质量与效率。
analysis.problem: 流匹配中MSE目标函数系统性低估速度幅度，造成积分滞后，使生成轨迹无法有效到达数据流形。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现速度收缩在轨迹起始阶段导致有害的动能停滞，而在末端则起到有益的去噪作用，存在关键不对称性。
analysis.method: 提出初始能量注入，包括基于训练的幅度感知流匹配（MAFM）和无需训练的尺度调度校正器（SSC），后者仅需一行代码即可实现零重训练的效率提升。
contributions: 识别并形式化流匹配中的速度欠估计问题（速度赤字）及其导致的积分滞后现象。
提出两种互补的初始能量注入方法（MAFM和SSC），有效缓解速度赤字，提升生成质量与采样效率。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-1k (256x256)上，SSC将FID从13.68降至7.58（提升44.6%），实现5倍加速，50步生成器（FID 7.58）优于250步基线（FID 8.65）；在MS-COCO文本到图像任务上FID提升约22%。
limitations: 方法在更高分辨率或更复杂场景下的泛化性有待进一步验证。
MAFM需要额外训练，可能增加计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现流匹配中速度欠估计导致生成失败，提出初始能量注入方法显著提升效率与质量。

papers.title: Probing into Camera Control of Video Models
papers.abstract: Video is a rich and scalable source of 3D/4D visual observations, and camera control is a key capability for video generation models to produce geometrically meaningful content. Existing approaches typically learn a mapping from camera motion to video using additional camera modules and paired data. However, such datasets are often limited in scale, diversity, and scene dynamics, which can bias the model toward a narrow output distribution and compromise the strong prior learned by the base model. These limitations motivate a different perspective on camera control. In this paper, we show that camera control need not be modeled as an implicit mapping problem, but can instead be treated as a form of geometric guidance that induces displacements across frames. Specifically, we reformulate camera control into a set of displacement fields and apply them via differentiable resampling of latent features during denoising. Our simple approach achieves effective camera control with minimal degradation across diverse quality metrics compared to fine-tuned baselines. Since our method is applicable to most video diffusion models without training, it can also serve as a probe to study the camera control capabilities of base models. Using this probe, we identify universal biases shared by representative video models, as well as disparities in their responses to camera control. Finally, we benchmark their performance in multi-view generation, offering insights into their potential for 3D/4D tasks.

analysis.tldr: 将视频模型中的相机控制重新定义为几何引导的位移场，无需训练即可实现有效控制并揭示模型固有偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有相机控制方法依赖额外模块和配对数据，但数据集规模有限、多样性不足，会限制模型输出分布并损害基模型先验，亟需一种不依赖大规模训练数据的新视角。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行额外训练或微调的情况下，实现对视频生成模型的精确相机控制，同时保持基模型的生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将相机控制重新表述为位移场，通过在去噪过程中对潜在特征进行可微重采样来施加几何引导，无需训练即可应用于大多数视频扩散模型。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的相机控制方法，通过位移场和可微重采样实现有效控制，且质量退化最小。
该方法可作为探针，揭示不同视频模型对相机控制的通用偏差和响应差异，并评估其多视图生成性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能对复杂相机运动或大位移场景的控制精度有限。
作为探针，其揭示的偏差可能受限于所选模型和测试设置。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将视频模型中的相机控制重新定义为几何引导的位移场，无需训练即可实现有效控制并揭示模型固有偏差。

papers.title: SuperADD: Training-free Class-agnostic Anomaly Segmentation -- CVPR 2026 VAND 4.0 Workshop Challenge Industrial Track
papers.abstract: Visual anomaly detection (AD) for industrial inspection is a highly relevant task in modern production environments. The problem becomes particularly challenging when training and deployment data differ due to changes in acquisition conditions during production. In the VAND 4.0 Industrial Track, models must remain robust under distribution shifts such as varying illumination and their performance is assessed on the MVTec AD 2 dataset. To address this setting, we propose a training-free and class-agnostic anomaly detection pipeline based on the work of SuperAD. Our approach improves generalization through several modifications designed to enhance robustness under distribution shifts. These adaptations include using a DINOv3 backbone, overlapping patch-wise processing, intensity-based augmentations, improved memory-bank subsampling for better coverage of the data distribution, and iterative morphological closing for cleaner and more spatially consistent anomaly maps. Unlike methods that rely on class-specific architectures or per-class hyperparameter tuning, our method uses a single architecture and one shared hyperparameter configuration across all object classes. This makes the approach well suited for industrial deployment, where product variants and appearance changes must be handled with minimal adaptation effort. We achieve segmentation F1 scores of $62.61\%$, $57.42\%$, and $54.35\%$ on test public, private, and private mixed of MVTec AD 2 respectively, thereby outperforming SuperAD and other state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、类别无关的异常分割方法SuperADD，通过改进DINOv3骨干、重叠补丁处理等增强分布偏移鲁棒性，在MVTec AD 2上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业视觉异常检测中，训练与部署数据因采集条件变化（如光照）导致分布偏移，现有方法依赖类别特定架构或超参数调优，难以适应产品变体，亟需鲁棒且通用的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 解决工业异常检测中分布偏移下的鲁棒分割问题，要求无需训练、类别无关且适应多种产品变体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于SuperAD的无需训练、类别无关异常检测流程，采用DINOv3骨干、重叠补丁处理、强度增强、改进内存库子采样和迭代形态学闭合。
contributions: 提出训练无关、类别无关的异常分割方法，仅用单一架构和共享超参数配置。
通过多项改进（DINOv3骨干、重叠补丁、强度增强、内存库子采样、形态学闭合）增强分布偏移鲁棒性。
在MVTec AD 2数据集上取得SOTA性能，F1分数分别为62.61%、57.42%、54.35%。
analysis.experiments: 在MVTec AD 2数据集上评估，测试公开、私有和私有混合子集，F1分数分别为62.61%、57.42%、54.35%，优于SuperAD等现有方法。
limitations: 可能对极端分布偏移或未见异常类型泛化能力有限。
依赖DINOv3骨干，计算资源需求可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、类别无关的异常分割方法SuperADD，通过改进DINOv3骨干、重叠补丁处理等增强分布偏移鲁棒性，在MVTec AD 2上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Can Visual Mamba Improve AI-Generated Image Detection? An In-Depth Investigation
papers.abstract: In recent years, computer vision has witnessed remarkable progress, fueled by the development of innovative architectures such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), diffusion-based architectures, Vision Transformers (ViTs), and, more recently, Vision-Language Models (VLMs). This progress has undeniably contributed to creating increasingly realistic and diverse visual content. However, such advancements in image generation also raise concerns about potential misuse in areas such as misinformation, identity theft, and threats to privacy and security. In parallel, Mamba-based architectures have emerged as versatile tools for a range of image analysis tasks, including classification, segmentation, medical imaging, object detection, and image restoration, in this rapidly evolving field. However, their potential for identifying AI-generated images remains relatively unexplored compared to established techniques. This study provides a systematic evaluation and comparative analysis of Vision Mamba models for AI-generated image detection. We benchmark multiple Vision Mamba variants against representative CNNs, ViTs, and VLM-based detectors across diverse datasets and synthetic image sources, focusing on key metrics such as accuracy, efficiency, and generalizability across diverse image types and generative models. Through this comprehensive analysis, we aim to elucidate Vision Mamba's strengths and limitations relative to established methodologies in terms of applicability, accuracy, and efficiency in detecting AI-generated images. Overall, our findings highlight both the promise and current limitations of Vision Mamba as a component in systems designed to distinguish authentic from AI-generated visual content. This research is crucial for enhancing detection in an age where distinguishing between real and AI-generated content is a major challenge.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估Vision Mamba在AI生成图像检测中的潜力与局限。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成图像技术快速发展带来滥用风险，现有检测方法（CNN、ViT、VLM）已有研究，但Mamba架构在此任务上的潜力尚未被系统探索。
analysis.problem: 评估Vision Mamba模型在AI生成图像检测任务中的性能、效率与泛化能力，并与主流方法进行对比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对多种Vision Mamba变体进行基准测试，与代表性CNN、ViT和VLM检测器在多个数据集和生成源上比较，关注准确率、效率和跨生成模型泛化性。
contributions: 首次系统评估Vision Mamba在AI生成图像检测中的表现
提供与CNN、ViT、VLM检测器的全面对比分析
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定数据集或生成模型上有效
Mamba架构的检测性能可能不如现有最优方法
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统评估Vision Mamba在AI生成图像检测中的潜力与局限。

papers.title: COAL: Counterfactual and Observation-Enhanced Alignment Learning for Discriminative Referring Multi-Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Referring Multi-Object Tracking (RMOT) faces a fundamental structural contradiction between the high-discriminability demand and the sparse semantic supervision. This mismatch is particularly acute in highly homogeneous scenarios that require fine-grained discrimination over complex compositional semantics. However, under sparse supervision, models overfit to salient yet insufficient cues, thereby encouraging shortcut learning and semantic collapse. To resolve this, we propose COAL (Counterfactual and Observation-enhanced Alignment Learning), a framework that advances RMOT beyond isolated structural optimization through knowledge regularization. First, we introduce Explicit Semantic Injection (ESI) via a VLM to densify the observation space and enhance instance discriminability. Second, leveraging LLM reasoning, we propose Counterfactual Learning (CFL) to augment supervision, enforcing strict attribute verification for robust compositional recognition. These strategies are unified within a Hierarchical Multi-Stream Integration (HMSI) architecture, which distills external knowledge into domain-specific discriminative representations. Experiments on Refer-KITTI and Refer-KITTI-V2 benchmarks validate COAL's efficacy. Notably, it surpasses the state-of-the-art by 7.28% HOTA on the highly challenging Refer-KITTI-V2. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of knowledge regularization for resolving the sparsity-discriminability paradox in RMOT.

analysis.tldr: 提出COAL框架，通过反事实学习和观察增强对齐解决RMOT中稀疏监督与高判别性需求的结构矛盾。
analysis.research_motivation: Referring Multi-Object Tracking (RMOT) 面临高判别性需求与稀疏语义监督之间的结构性矛盾，尤其在需要细粒度区分的同质场景中，模型容易过拟合到显著但不足的线索，导致捷径学习和语义坍塌。
analysis.problem: 解决RMOT中稀疏监督下模型判别性不足和语义坍塌的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在稀疏监督下，模型会过拟合到显著但不足的线索，导致捷径学习和语义坍塌。
analysis.method: 提出COAL框架，包含显式语义注入（ESI）通过VLM稠密化观察空间，反事实学习（CFL）通过LLM推理增强监督，以及层次化多流集成（HMSI）架构蒸馏外部知识为领域特定判别性表示。
contributions: 提出COAL框架，通过知识正则化解决RMOT中稀疏性与判别性悖论。
引入显式语义注入和反事实学习两种策略，分别增强观察空间和监督信号。
在Refer-KITTI和Refer-KITTI-V2上取得SOTA，尤其在Refer-KITTI-V2上HOTA提升7.28%。
analysis.experiments: 在Refer-KITTI和Refer-KITTI-V2基准上验证，在Refer-KITTI-V2上HOTA超越SOTA 7.28%。
limitations: 依赖VLM和LLM的外部知识，可能引入额外计算开销。
方法在更广泛场景或不同数据集上的泛化性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出COAL框架，通过反事实学习和观察增强对齐解决RMOT中稀疏监督与高判别性需求的结构矛盾。

papers.title: Do Composed Image Retrieval Benchmarks Require Multimodal Composition?
papers.abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) is a multimodal retrieval task where a query consists of a reference image and a textual modification, and the goal is to retrieve a target image satisfying both. In principle, strong performance on CIR benchmarks is assumed to require multimodal composition, i.e., combining complementary information from reference image and textual modification. In this work, we show that this assumption does not always hold. Across four widely used CIR benchmarks and eleven Generalist Multimodal Embedding models, a large fraction of queries can be solved using a single modality (from 32.2% to 83.6%), revealing pervasive unimodal shortcuts. Thus, high CIR performance can arise from unimodal signals rather than true multimodal composition. To better understand this issue, we perform a two-stage audit. First, we identify shortcut-solvable queries through cross-model analysis. Second, we conduct human validation on 4,741 shortcut-free queries, of which only 1,689 are well-formed, with common issues including ambiguous edits and mismatched targets. Re-evaluating models on this validated subset reveals qualitatively different behaviour: queries can no longer be solved with a single modality, and successful retrieval requires combining both inputs. While accuracy decreases, reliance on multimodal information increases. Overall, current CIR benchmarks conflate shortcut-solvable, noisy, and genuinely compositional queries, leading to an overestimation of model capability in multimodal composition.

analysis.tldr: 当前组合图像检索基准存在单模态捷径，导致模型能力被高估。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合图像检索（CIR）任务要求模型结合参考图像和文本修改进行检索，但现有基准可能包含单模态捷径，导致模型性能被高估，需要重新评估。
analysis.problem: 揭示并量化CIR基准中普遍存在的单模态捷径问题，并构建无捷径的验证子集以准确评估模型的多模态组合能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在四个CIR基准和十一个通用多模态嵌入模型上，32.2%到83.6%的查询可通过单模态解决，表明存在普遍的单模态捷径。
analysis.method: 两阶段审计：首先通过跨模型分析识别捷径可解查询；然后对4,741个无捷径查询进行人工验证，筛选出1,689个格式良好的查询，并在此子集上重新评估模型。
contributions: 发现CIR基准中存在大量单模态捷径，导致模型性能被高估。
构建了经过人工验证的无捷径查询子集，并证明在该子集上模型必须结合多模态信息才能成功检索。
analysis.experiments: 在四个CIR基准和十一个通用多模态嵌入模型上进行了实验，并进行了人工验证。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 人工验证可能引入主观偏差。
无捷径子集规模较小，可能不足以全面评估模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 当前组合图像检索基准存在单模态捷径，导致模型能力被高估。

papers.title: MonoPRIO: Adaptive Prior Conditioning for Unified Monocular 3D Object Detection
papers.abstract: Monocular 3D object detection remains challenging because metric size and depth are underdetermined by single-view evidence, particularly under occlusion, truncation, and projection-induced scale-depth ambiguity. Although recent methods improve depth and geometric reasoning, metric size remains unstable in unified multi-class settings, where class variability and partial visibility broaden plausible size modes. We propose MonoPRIO, a unified monocular 3D detector that targets this bottleneck through adaptive prior conditioning in the size pathway. MonoPRIO constructs class-aware size prototypes offline, routes each decoder query to a soft mixture prior, applies uncertainty-aware log-space conditioning, and uses Cluster-Aligned Prior (CAP) regularisation on matched positives during training. On the official KITTI test server, MonoPRIO achieves the strongest fully reported unified multi-class result among methods reporting complete Car, Pedestrian, and Cyclist metrics. In the car-only setting, it also achieves the strongest 3D bounding-box AP across Easy/Moderate/Hard categories among compared methods without extra data, while using substantially less compute than MonoCLUE. Ablations and diagnostics show complementary gains from routed injection and CAP, with the largest benefits in ambiguity-prone, partially occluded, and low-data regimes. These findings indicate that adaptive priors are most effective when image evidence underdetermines metric size, while atypical geometry or extreme visibility loss can still cause mismatch between routed priors and true instance geometry. Code, trained models, result logs, and reproducibility material are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应先验条件方法MonoPRIO，通过类感知尺寸原型和软混合先验路由提升单目3D检测的尺寸稳定性，在KITTI上取得统一多类最优结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 单目3D检测中，度量尺寸和深度因单视图证据不足而难以确定，尤其在遮挡、截断和尺度-深度模糊下，现有方法在统一多类设置中尺寸预测不稳定。
analysis.problem: 解决统一多类单目3D检测中因类别变异和部分可见性导致的尺寸预测不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，自适应先验在图像证据不足以确定度量尺寸时最有效，但非典型几何或极端可见性损失仍可能导致路由先验与真实实例几何不匹配。
analysis.method: 构建类感知尺寸原型，对每个解码器查询路由到软混合先验，应用不确定性感知的对数空间条件化，并在训练中使用聚类对齐先验正则化。
contributions: 提出MonoPRIO，一种通过自适应先验条件提升单目3D检测尺寸稳定性的统一检测器。
在KITTI测试集上取得统一多类设置下最强结果，并在仅汽车设置中以更少计算量达到最优AP。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI官方测试服务器上评估，报告了统一多类和仅汽车设置的指标，并进行了消融和诊断实验。
limitations: 非典型几何或极端可见性损失仍可能导致路由先验与真实实例几何不匹配。
方法依赖离线构建的类感知尺寸原型，可能对罕见类别适应性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应先验条件方法MonoPRIO，通过类感知尺寸原型和软混合先验路由提升单目3D检测的尺寸稳定性，在KITTI上取得统一多类最优结果。

papers.title: BioHuman: Learning Biomechanical Human Representations from Video
papers.abstract: Understanding human motion beyond surface kinematics is crucial for motion analysis, rehabilitation, and injury risk assessment. However, progress in this domain is limited by the lack of large-scale datasets with biomechanical annotations, and by existing approaches that cannot directly infer internal biomechanical states from visual observations. In this paper, we introduce a simulation-based framework for estimating muscle activations from existing motion capture datasets, resulting in BioHuman10M, a large-scale dataset with synchronized video, motion, and activations. Building on BioHuman10M, we propose BioHuman, an end-to-end model that takes monocular video as input and jointly predicts human motion and muscle activations, effectively bridging visual observations and internal biomechanical states. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BioHuman enables accurate reconstruction of both kinematic motion and muscle activity, and generalizes across diverse subjects and motions. We believe our approach establishes a new benchmark for video-based biomechanical understanding and opens up new possibilities for physically grounded human modeling.

analysis.tldr: 从视频中学习人体生物力学表征，实现运动与肌肉激活联合预测。
