To validate RC and support community benchmarking, we further introduce PROVE-Bench, a two-tier real-world benchmark comprising PROVE-M, an 80-video paired dataset with motion augmentation, and PROVE-H, a 100-video challenging subset without ground truth. Together, RC metrics and PROVE-Bench form the PROVE (Perceptual RemOVal cohErence) evaluation framework for visual media. Experiments across diverse image and video benchmarks demonstrate that RC achieves substantially stronger alignment with human judgments than existing evaluation protocols. The code for RC metrics and PROVE-Bench are publicly available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出感知一致的视觉媒体移除一致性评估指标RC和基准PROVE-Bench。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像/视频物体移除评估指标与人类感知不一致，全参考指标鼓励复制粘贴而非真实擦除，无参考指标有系统偏差，全局时序指标对局部伪影不敏感。
analysis.problem: 缺乏与人类感知对齐的视觉媒体移除一致性评估指标和基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全参考指标奖励复制粘贴行为；无参考指标偏向模糊结果；全局时序指标对编辑区域内的局部伪影不敏感。
analysis.method: 提出RC-S（空间一致性）和RC-T（时序一致性）两个感知对齐指标，以及包含PROVE-M和PROVE-H的PROVE-Bench基准。
contributions: 提出RC-S和RC-T指标，通过滑动窗口特征比较和分布跟踪实现感知对齐。
构建PROVE-Bench基准，包含80个视频的配对数据集和100个视频的无GT挑战子集。
analysis.experiments: 在多种图像和视频基准上，RC指标与人类判断的一致性显著优于现有评估协议。
limitations: 可能对特定类型的编辑（如大区域移除）鲁棒性不足。
基准规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出感知一致的视觉媒体移除一致性评估指标RC和基准PROVE-Bench。

papers.title: Mitigating Mask Prior Drift and Positional Attention Collapse in Large Diffusion Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large diffusion vision-language models (LDVLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive models, enabling parallel decoding for efficient inference and leveraging bidirectional attention for global context. Despite these advances, their behavior under long-form generation remains underexplored. In this work, we show that existing LDVLMs suffer from repetitive generation and degraded visual grounding, and identify two underlying causes. First, repetitive generation originates from a mask token prior: since generation tokens are initialized as mask tokens, their hidden representations progressively drift toward a shared prior direction over generation steps. Second, a fundamental misalignment between the positional attention bias and the iterative unmasking process suppresses attention toward informative visual tokens, degrading visual grounding. Based on these insights, we propose a training-free approach, introducing Mask Prior Suppression and Monotonic RoPE Scaling to mitigate mask prior drift and positional attention collapse during decoding. Experiments on general multimodal benchmarks and visual grounding tasks demonstrate improvements over baseline LDVLMs, with robust gains on long-form description benchmarks. Our results show that these failures can be effectively addressed with a lightweight, plug-and-play strategy that requires no additional training and generalizes across diverse LDVLM architectures.

analysis.tldr: 揭示大型扩散视觉-语言模型在长文本生成中的掩码先验漂移和位置注意力崩溃问题，并提出无需训练的轻量级解决方案。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型扩散视觉-语言模型（LDVLM）作为自回归模型的替代方案，具有并行解码和全局上下文优势，但其在长文本生成中的行为尚未被充分探索，存在重复生成和视觉定位退化的问题。
analysis.problem: 解决LDVLM在长文本生成中因掩码先验漂移和位置注意力崩溃导致的重复生成和视觉定位退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到两个根本原因：1) 重复生成源于掩码先验漂移，即生成token初始化为掩码token，其隐藏表示随生成步骤逐渐向共享先验方向漂移；2) 位置注意力偏置与迭代去掩码过程之间的根本性错位，抑制了对信息性视觉token的注意力，导致视觉定位退化。
analysis.method: 提出无需训练的方法，包括掩码先验抑制（Mask Prior Suppression）和单调RoPE缩放（Monotonic RoPE Scaling），以缓解解码过程中的掩码先验漂移和位置注意力崩溃。
contributions: 首次识别并分析了LDVLM在长文本生成中的掩码先验漂移和位置注意力崩溃问题。
提出一种轻量级、即插即用的无需训练策略，有效缓解上述问题，并在多种LDVLM架构上泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在通用多模态基准和视觉定位任务上进行了实验，结果显示相比基线LDVLM有改进，并在长描述基准上取得稳健增益。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 方法可能对超参数敏感，需要针对不同架构调整。
仅针对解码阶段，未涉及训练阶段的改进。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示大型扩散视觉-语言模型在长文本生成中的掩码先验漂移和位置注意力崩溃问题，并提出无需训练的轻量级解决方案。

papers.title: From Sparse to Dense: Spatio-Temporal Fusion for Multi-View 3D Human Pose Estimation with DenseWarper
papers.abstract: In multi-view 3D human pose estimation, models typically rely on images captured simultaneously from different camera views to predict a pose at a specific moment. While providing accurate spatial information, this traditional approach often overlooks the rich temporal dependencies between adjacent frames. We propose a novel 3D human pose estimation input method: the sparse interleaved input to address this. This method leverages images captured from different camera views at various time points (e.g., View 1 at time $t$ and View 2 at time $t+\delta$), allowing our model to capture rich spatio-temporal information and effectively boost performance. More importantly, this approach offers two key advantages: First, it can theoretically increase the output pose frame rate by N times with N cameras, thereby breaking through single-view frame rate limitations and enhancing the temporal resolution of the production. Second, using a sparse subset of available frames, our method can reduce data redundancy and simultaneously achieve better performance. We introduce the DenseWarper model, which leverages epipolar geometry for efficient spatio-temporal heatmap exchange. We conducted extensive experiments on the Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets. Results demonstrate that our method, utilizing only sparse interleaved images as input, outperforms traditional dense multi-view input approaches and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The source code for this work is available at: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出稀疏交错输入和DenseWarper模型，利用极线几何实现时空热图融合，在稀疏输入下超越传统密集多视图方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统多视图3D人体姿态估计依赖同时刻多视角图像，忽略了相邻帧的时间依赖，且受限于单视角帧率，数据冗余高。
analysis.problem: 如何利用不同时间点的稀疏多视图图像，融合时空信息以提升3D人体姿态估计的精度和时间分辨率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出稀疏交错输入方法，使用不同时间点的多视图图像；设计DenseWarper模型，基于极线几何进行高效的时空热图交换与融合。
contributions: 提出稀疏交错输入方法，利用不同时间点的多视图图像捕获时空信息，可理论提升输出帧率N倍。
设计DenseWarper模型，通过极线几何实现高效时空热图融合，在稀疏输入下达到SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上实验，稀疏交错输入优于传统密集多视图输入，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能对相机同步精度要求较高。
时间偏移δ的选择可能影响性能，未讨论自适应策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出稀疏交错输入和DenseWarper模型，利用极线几何实现时空热图融合，在稀疏输入下超越传统密集多视图方法。

papers.title: ArcGate: Adaptive Arctangent Gated Activation
papers.abstract: Activation functions are central to deep networks, influencing non-linearity, feature learning, convergence, and robustness. This paper proposes the Adaptive Arctangent Gated Activation (ArcGate) function, a flexible formulation that generates a broad spectrum of activation shapes via a three-stage non-linear transformation. Unlike conventional fixed-shape activations such as ReLU, GELU, or SiLU, ArcGate uses seven learnable parameters per layer, allowing the neural network to autonomously optimize its non-linearity to the specific requirements of the feature hierarchy and data distribution. We evaluate ArcGate using ResNet-50 and Vision Transformer (ViT-B/16) architectures on three widely used remote sensing benchmarks: PatternNet, UC Merced Land Use, and the 13-band EuroSAT MSI multispectral dataset. Experimental results show that ArcGate consistently outperforms standard baselines, achieving a peak overall accuracy of 99.67% on PatternNet. Most notably, ArcGate exhibits superior structural resilience in noisy environments, maintaining a 26.65% performance lead over ReLU under moderate Gaussian noise (standard deviation 0.1). Analysis of the learned parameters reveals a depth-dependent functional evolution, where the model increases gating strength in deeper layers to enhance signal propagation. These findings suggest that ArcGate is a robust and adaptive general node activation function for high-resolution earth observation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应反正切门控激活函数ArcGate，通过每层七个可学习参数实现非线性形状自适应，在遥感图像分类中优于ReLU/GELU/SiLU，并在噪声环境下保持鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统固定形状激活函数（如ReLU、GELU、SiLU）无法根据数据分布和特征层级自适应调整非线性，限制了深度网络的表达能力和鲁棒性，尤其在遥感等噪声敏感任务中表现不足。
analysis.problem: 设计一种可学习的激活函数，使其能够根据每层特征层次和数据分布自动优化非线性形状，提升模型性能和对噪声的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现ArcGate在深层网络中学习到的门控强度增加，表明模型通过增强信号传播来适应深度依赖的功能演化；在噪声环境下，ArcGate相比ReLU保持显著性能优势（中等高斯噪声下领先26.65%）。
analysis.method: 提出ArcGate激活函数，通过三层非线性变换（线性缩放、反正切变换、门控调制）生成灵活的形状，每层使用七个可学习参数，网络可自主优化非线性。
contributions: 提出ArcGate，一种具有每层七个可学习参数的自适应激活函数，能生成多种非线性形状。
在三个遥感基准数据集上，ArcGate在ResNet-50和ViT-B/16上均超越标准基线，PatternNet上达到99.67%准确率。
揭示ArcGate在噪声环境下的强鲁棒性（中等高斯噪声下领先ReLU 26.65%），并发现深层门控强度增强的深度依赖演化规律。
analysis.experiments: 在PatternNet、UC Merced Land Use和13波段EuroSAT MSI三个遥感数据集上，使用ResNet-50和ViT-B/16架构进行图像分类实验，并与ReLU、GELU、SiLU等基线比较。
limitations: 仅在高分辨率遥感图像上验证，未在自然图像或更大规模数据集上测试。
每层七个额外参数可能增加模型复杂度和过拟合风险，尤其在小型数据集上。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应反正切门控激活函数ArcGate，通过每层七个可学习参数实现非线性形状自适应，在遥感图像分类中优于ReLU/GELU/SiLU，并在噪声环境下保持鲁棒性。

papers.title: HASTE: Training-Free Video Diffusion Acceleration via Head-Wise Adaptive Sparse Attention
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based video generation has advanced substantially in visual fidelity and temporal coherence, but practical deployment remains limited by the quadratic complexity of full attention. Training-free sparse attention is attractive because it accelerates pretrained models without retraining, yet existing online top-$p$ sparse attention still spends non-negligible cost on mask prediction and applies shared thresholds despite strong head-level heterogeneity. We show that these two overlooked factors limit the practical speed-quality trade-off of training-free sparse attention in Video DiTs. To address them, we introduce a head-wise adaptive framework with two plug-in components: Temporal Mask Reuse, which skips unnecessary mask prediction based on query-key drift, and Error-guided Budgeted Calibration, which assigns per-head top-$p$ thresholds by minimizing measured model-output error under a global sparsity budget. On Wan2.1-1.3B and Wan2.1-14B, our method consistently improves XAttention and SVG2, achieving up to 1.93 times speedup at 720P while maintaining competitive video quality and similarity metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出头自适应稀疏注意力机制，无需训练即可加速视频扩散模型，通过时间掩码复用和误差引导预算校准提升速度-质量权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频扩散模型因全注意力的二次复杂度而部署受限，现有训练无关稀疏注意力虽无需重训，但掩码预测开销大且忽略头级异质性，限制了实际加速效果。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重训练的前提下，通过头自适应稀疏注意力机制降低视频扩散模型中全注意力的计算开销，同时保持生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到现有在线 top-p 稀疏注意力存在两个被忽视的因素：掩码预测开销不可忽略，以及共享阈值忽略了头级异质性，导致实际速度-质量权衡受限。
analysis.method: 提出头自适应框架，包含两个即插即用组件：时间掩码复用（Temporal Mask Reuse）根据查询-键漂移跳过不必要的掩码预测；误差引导预算校准（Error-guided Budgeted Calibration）通过最小化模型输出误差为每个头分配 top-p 阈值，满足全局稀疏预算。
contributions: 揭示了现有训练无关稀疏注意力在视频扩散模型中因掩码预测开销和头级异质性导致的性能瓶颈。
提出头自适应稀疏注意力框架，包含时间掩码复用和误差引导预算校准两个即插即用组件。
在 Wan2.1-1.3B 和 Wan2.1-14B 上验证，实现高达 1.93 倍加速（720P），同时保持竞争性视频质量和相似度指标。
analysis.experiments: 在 Wan2.1-1.3B 和 Wan2.1-14B 模型上评估，与 XAttention 和 SVG2 对比，实现最高 1.93 倍加速（720P），视频质量和相似度指标保持竞争力。
limitations: 方法依赖预训练模型，可能不适用于其他架构或任务。
时间掩码复用策略在快速运动场景下可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出头自适应稀疏注意力机制，无需训练即可加速视频扩散模型，通过时间掩码复用和误差引导预算校准提升速度-质量权衡。

papers.title: Head Forcing: Long Autoregressive Video Generation via Head Heterogeneity
papers.abstract: Autoregressive video diffusion models support real-time synthesis but suffer from error accumulation and context loss over long horizons. We discover that attention heads in AR video diffusion transformers serve functionally distinct roles as local heads for detail refinement, anchor heads for structural stabilization, and memory heads for long-range context aggregation, yet existing methods treat them uniformly, leading to suboptimal KV cache allocation. We propose Head Forcing, a training-free framework that assigns each head type a tailored KV cache strategy: local and anchor heads retain only essential tokens, while memory heads employ a hierarchical memory system with dynamic episodic updates for long-range consistency. A head-wise RoPE re-encoding scheme further ensures positional encodings remain within the pretrained range. Without additional training, Head Forcing extends generation from 5 seconds to minute-level duration, supports multi-prompt interactive synthesis, and consistently outperforms existing baselines. Project Page: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: Head Forcing 通过为不同注意力头分配定制 KV 缓存策略，无需训练即可将自回归视频生成从 5 秒扩展到分钟级。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型支持实时合成，但在长时生成中面临误差累积和上下文丢失问题，现有方法对所有注意力头统一处理，导致 KV 缓存分配次优。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练的情况下，解决自回归视频扩散模型在长时生成中的误差累积和上下文丢失问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现自回归视频扩散 Transformer 中的注意力头存在功能异质性：局部头负责细节细化，锚点头负责结构稳定，记忆头负责长程上下文聚合。
analysis.method: 提出 Head Forcing，一种无训练框架，为每种头类型分配定制 KV 缓存策略：局部头和锚点头仅保留关键 token，记忆头采用分层记忆系统与动态情节更新；并引入头级 RoPE 重编码方案确保位置编码在预训练范围内。
contributions: 发现自回归视频扩散模型中注意力头的功能异质性，并据此分类为局部头、锚点头和记忆头。
提出 Head Forcing 框架，通过定制 KV 缓存策略和头级 RoPE 重编码，无需训练即可将生成时长从 5 秒扩展到分钟级，并支持多提示交互合成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在分钟级生成和多提示交互合成中持续优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖于预训练模型的头功能分布，不同模型可能需要重新分析。
分层记忆系统的计算开销在极长序列中可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Head Forcing 通过为不同注意力头分配定制 KV 缓存策略，无需训练即可将自回归视频生成从 5 秒扩展到分钟级。

papers.title: Reduce the Artifacts Bias for More Generalizable AI-Generated Image Detection
papers.abstract: As the misuse of AI-generated images grows, generalizable image detection techniques are urgently needed. Recent state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods adopt aligned training datasets to reduce content, size, and format biases, empowering models to capture robust forgery cues. A common strategy is to employ reconstruction techniques, e.g., VAE and DDIM, which show remarkable results in diffusion-based methods. However, such reconstruction-based approaches typically introduce limited and homogeneous artifacts, which cannot fully capture diverse generative patterns, such as GAN-based methods. To complement reconstruction-based fake images with aligned yet diverse artifact patterns, we propose a GAN-based upsampling approach that mimics GAN-generated fake patterns while preserving content, size, and format alignment. This naturally results in two aligned but distinct types of fake images. However, due to the domain shift between reconstruction-based and upsampling-based fake images, direct mixed training causes suboptimal results, where one domain disrupts feature learning of the other. Accordingly, we propose a Separate Expert Fusion (SEF) framework to extract complementary artifact information and reduce inter-domain interference. We first train domain-specific experts via LoRA adaptation on a frozen foundational model, then conduct decoupled fusion with a gating network to adaptively combine expert features while retaining their specialized knowledge. Rather than merely benefiting GAN-generated image detection, this design introduces diverse and complementary artifact patterns that enable SEF to learn a more robust decision boundary and improve generalization across broader generative methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method yields strong results across 13 diverse benchmarks. Codes are released at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出GAN上采样与分离专家融合框架，减少伪影偏差，提升AI生成图像检测的泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于重建的检测方法（如VAE、DDIM）引入的伪影类型有限且同质，无法覆盖GAN等多样生成模式，导致泛化性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何生成对齐且多样化的伪影模式，并有效融合不同伪影域的特征，以提升AI生成图像检测的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重建伪影与上采样伪影之间存在域偏移，直接混合训练会导致一个域干扰另一个域的特征学习，造成次优结果。
analysis.method: 提出GAN-based上采样方法生成对齐的GAN风格伪影，并设计分离专家融合（SEF）框架：先通过LoRA在冻结基础模型上训练域特定专家，再用门控网络进行解耦融合，自适应组合专家特征。
contributions: 提出GAN-based上采样方法，生成与重建伪影对齐但多样化的伪影模式，弥补重建方法对GAN生成模式覆盖不足的问题。
提出分离专家融合（SEF）框架，通过域特定专家和门控融合减少域间干扰，学习更鲁棒的决策边界。
analysis.experiments: 在13个不同基准上进行了广泛实验，方法取得了强结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练基础模型的质量和LoRA适配的稳定性。
门控融合机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GAN上采样与分离专家融合框架，减少伪影偏差，提升AI生成图像检测的泛化性。

papers.title: GeoVista: Visually Grounded Active Perception for Ultra-High-Resolution Remote Sensing Understanding
papers.abstract: Interpreting ultra-high-resolution (UHR) remote sensing images requires models to search for sparse and tiny visual evidence across large-scale scenes. Existing remote sensing vision-language models can inspect local regions with zooming and cropping tools, but most exploration strategies follow either a one-shot focus or a single sequential trajectory. Such single-path exploration can lose global context, leave scattered regions unvisited, and revisit or count the same evidence multiple times. To this end, we propose GeoVista, a planning-driven active perception framework for UHR remote sensing interpretation. Instead of committing to one zooming path, GeoVista first builds a global exploration plan, then verifies multiple candidate regions through branch-wise local inspection, while maintaining an explicit evidence state for cross-region aggregation and de-duplication. To enable this behavior, we introduce APEX-GRO, a cold-start supervised trajectory corpus that reformulates diverse UHR tasks as Global-Region-Object interactive reasoning processes with a unified, scale-invariant spatial representation. We further design an Observe-Plan-Track mechanism for global observation, adaptive region inspection, and evidence tracking, and align the model with a GRPO-based strategy using step-wise rewards for planning, localization, and final answer correctness. Experiments on RSHR-Bench, XLRS-Bench, and LRS-VQA show that GeoVista achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code and dataset are available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: GeoVista 通过全局规划与分支验证实现超高分遥感图像的主动感知，在多个基准上达到 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感视觉-语言模型在超高分图像中采用单路径探索（单次聚焦或单序列轨迹），容易丢失全局上下文、遗漏分散区域或重复计数相同证据，难以高效定位稀疏微小的视觉证据。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种规划驱动的主动感知框架，使模型能够全局规划、分支验证并去重聚合证据，从而准确理解超高分遥感图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单路径探索策略在超高分遥感场景中会导致全局上下文丢失、区域遗漏和证据重复计数。
analysis.method: 提出 GeoVista 框架，包含：1) 全局探索计划构建；2) 分支局部验证多个候选区域；3) 显式证据状态用于跨区域聚合与去重。引入 APEX-GRO 语料库将任务统一为 Global-Region-Object 交互推理，设计 Observe-Plan-Track 机制，并使用 GRPO 策略以逐步奖励对齐模型。
contributions: 提出规划驱动的主动感知框架 GeoVista，实现全局规划与分支验证的遥感图像理解。
构建 APEX-GRO 冷启动监督轨迹语料库，统一超高分遥感任务为 Global-Region-Object 交互推理。
设计 Observe-Plan-Track 机制与 GRPO 对齐策略，在多个基准上取得 SOTA 性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 RSHR-Bench、XLRS-Bench 和 LRS-VQA 三个基准上评估，GeoVista 达到 SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量轨迹语料库 APEX-GRO 的构建，泛化性需进一步验证。
分支验证的计算开销可能较大，实时性有待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoVista 通过全局规划与分支验证实现超高分遥感图像的主动感知，在多个基准上达到 SOTA。

papers.title: Real2Sim in HOI: Toward Physically Plausible HOI Reconstruction from Monocular Videos
papers.abstract: Recovering 4D human-object interaction (HOI) from monocular video is a key step toward scalable 3D content creation, embodied AI, and simulation-based learning. Recent methods can reconstruct temporally coherent human and object trajectories, but these trajectories often remain visual artifacts while failing to preserve stable contact, functional manipulation, or physical plausibility when used as reference motions for humanoid-object simulation. This reveals a fundamental interaction gap: HOI reconstruction should not stop at tracking a human and an object, but should recover the relation that makes their motion a coherent interaction. We introduce $\textbf{HA-HOI}$, a framework for reconstructing physically plausible 4D HOI animation from in-the-wild monocular videos. Instead of treating the human and object as independent entities in an ambiguous monocular 3D space, we propose a $\textit{human-first, object-follow}$ formulation. The human motion is recovered as the interaction anchor, and the object is reconstructed, aligned, and refined relative to the human action. The resulting kinematic trajectory is then projected into a physics-based humanoid-object simulation, where it acts as a teacher trajectory for stable physical rollout. Across benchmark and in-the-wild videos, $\textbf{HA-HOI}$ improves human-object alignment, contact consistency, temporal stability, and simulation readiness over prior monocular HOI reconstruction methods. By moving beyond visually plausible trajectory recovery toward physically grounded interaction animation, our work takes a step toward turning general monocular HOI videos into scalable demonstrations for humanoid-object behavior. Project page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出HA-HOI框架，从单目视频重建物理合理的4D人-物交互动画，采用人优先、对象跟随策略并引入物理仿真。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单目HOI重建方法虽能恢复时间一致的人与物体轨迹，但作为人形机器人-物体仿真的参考运动时，常缺乏稳定接触、功能操作和物理合理性，存在交互鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 如何从单目视频重建物理合理的4D人-物交互动画，使重建结果不仅视觉合理，还能用于物理仿真。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法重建的轨迹在作为仿真参考运动时，无法保持稳定接触、功能操作或物理合理性，说明视觉重建与物理仿真之间存在根本性交互鸿沟。
analysis.method: 提出HA-HOI框架，采用人优先、对象跟随（human-first, object-follow）策略：先恢复人体运动作为交互锚点，再相对于人体动作重建、对齐和细化物体；最后将运动学轨迹投影到基于物理的人形-物体仿真中，作为教师轨迹引导稳定的物理展开。
contributions: 提出HA-HOI框架，实现从单目视频到物理合理4D HOI动画的重建。
采用人优先、对象跟随策略，改善人-物对齐、接触一致性和时间稳定性。
将运动学轨迹与物理仿真结合，提升重建结果的仿真就绪性。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集和野外视频上评估，HA-HOI在人-物对齐、接触一致性、时间稳定性和仿真就绪性方面优于先前单目HOI重建方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的人体姿态估计，对严重遮挡或快速运动鲁棒性有限。
物理仿真部分可能增加计算开销，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HA-HOI框架，从单目视频重建物理合理的4D人-物交互动画，采用人优先、对象跟随策略并引入物理仿真。

papers.title: ClickRemoval: An Interactive Open-Source Tool for Object Removal in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Existing object removal tools often rely on manual masks or text prompts, making precise removal difficult for non-expert users in complex scenes and often leading to incomplete removal or unnatural background completion. To address this issue, we present ClickRemoval, an open-source interactive object removal tool built on pretrained Stable Diffusion models and driven solely by user clicks. Without additional training, hand-drawn masks, or text descriptions, ClickRemoval localizes target objects and restores the background through self-attention modulation during denoising. Experiments show that ClickRemoval achieves competitive results across quantitative metrics and user studies. We release a complete software package at this https URL under the Apache-2.0 license.

analysis.tldr: 基于点击的交互式扩散模型物体移除工具，无需训练或掩码。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有物体移除工具依赖手动掩码或文本提示，非专业用户在复杂场景中难以精确移除，常导致移除不完整或背景修复不自然。
analysis.problem: 如何仅通过用户点击实现精确的物体移除和背景修复，无需额外训练或掩码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于预训练Stable Diffusion模型，通过用户点击定位目标物体，在去噪过程中利用自注意力调制修复背景。
contributions: 提出ClickRemoval，一种仅需点击的交互式物体移除工具，无需训练或掩码。
开源完整软件包，便于社区使用和扩展。
analysis.experiments: 在定量指标和用户研究中取得有竞争力的结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂遮挡或小物体效果有限。
依赖预训练扩散模型的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于点击的交互式扩散模型物体移除工具，无需训练或掩码。

papers.title: Think When Needed: Adaptive Reasoning-Driven Multimodal Embeddings with a Dual-LoRA Architecture
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have emerged as a powerful backbone for multimodal embeddings. Recent methods introduce chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning into the embedding pipeline to improve retrieval quality, but remain costly in both model size and inference cost. They typically employ separate reasoner and embedder with substantial parameter overhead, and generate CoT indiscriminately for every input. However, we observe that for simple inputs, discriminative embeddings already perform well, and redundant reasoning can even mislead the model, degrading performance. To address these limitations, we propose Think When Needed (TWN), a unified multimodal embedding framework with adaptive reasoning. TWN introduces a dual-LoRA architecture that attaches reasoning and embedding adapters to a shared frozen backbone, detaching gradients at their interface to mitigate gradient conflicts introduced by joint optimization while keeping parameters close to a single model. Building on this, an adaptive think mechanism uses a self-supervised routing gate to decide per input whether to generate CoT, skipping unnecessary reasoning to reduce inference overhead and even improve retrieval quality. We further explore embedding-guided RL to optimize CoT quality beyond supervised training. On the 78 tasks of MMEB-V2, TWN achieves state-of-the-art embedding quality while being substantially more efficient than existing generative methods, requiring only 3-5% additional parameters relative to the backbone and up to 50% fewer reasoning tokens compared to the full generative mode.

analysis.tldr: TWN 提出双LoRA架构与自适应推理门控，在保持多模态嵌入质量的同时大幅降低推理开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将CoT推理引入多模态嵌入管道，但存在模型参数大、推理成本高，且对简单输入进行冗余推理反而降低性能的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加参数和推理开销的前提下，自适应地决定何时需要CoT推理以提升多模态嵌入质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对于简单输入，判别式嵌入已足够好，冗余的CoT推理反而会误导模型，降低检索质量。
analysis.method: 提出TWN框架，采用双LoRA架构（推理适配器和嵌入适配器）共享冻结骨干，梯度分离以缓解联合优化冲突；并设计自监督路由门控自适应决定是否生成CoT，进一步探索嵌入引导的强化学习优化CoT质量。
contributions: 提出双LoRA架构，实现推理与嵌入适配器共享骨干，参数仅增加3-5%。
设计自适应推理门控机制，根据输入复杂度决定是否生成CoT，减少最多50%推理token。
在MMEB-V2的78个任务上达到SOTA嵌入质量，同时显著提升效率。
analysis.experiments: 在MMEB-V2基准的78个任务上评估，TWN达到SOTA嵌入质量，参数仅增加3-5%，推理token减少最多50%。
limitations: 自适应门控的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布。
强化学习阶段可能引入额外训练成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TWN 提出双LoRA架构与自适应推理门控，在保持多模态嵌入质量的同时大幅降低推理开销。

papers.title: DermAgent: A Self-Reflective Agentic System for Dermatological Image Analysis with Multi-Tool Reasoning and Traceable Decision-Making
papers.abstract: Dermatological diagnosis requires integrating fine-grained visual perception with expert clinical knowledge. Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) facilitate interactive medical image analysis, their application in dermatology is hindered by insufficient domain-specific grounding and hallucinations. To address these issues, we propose DermAgent, a collaborative multi-tool agent that orchestrates seven specialized vision and language modules within a Plan-Execute-Reflect framework. DermAgent delivers stepwise, traceable diagnostic reasoning through three core components. First, it employs complementary visual perception tools for comprehensive morphological description, dermoscopic concept annotation, and disease diagnosis. Second, to overcome the lack of domain prior, a dual-modality retrieval module anchors every prediction in external evidence by cross-referencing 413,210 diagnosed image cases and 3,199 clinical guideline chunks. To further mitigate hallucinations, a deterministic critic module conducts strict post-hoc auditing via confidence, coverage, and conflict gates, automatically detecting inter-source disagreements to trigger targeted self-correction. Extensive experiments on five dermatology benchmarks demonstrate that DermAgent consistently outperforms state-of-the-art MLLMs and medical agent baselines across zero-shot fine-grained disease diagnosis, concept annotation, and clinical captioning tasks, exceeding GPT-4o by 17.6% in skin disease diagnostic accuracy and 3.15% in captioning ROUGE-L. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: DermAgent 是一个多工具协作的皮肤科图像分析智能体，通过计划-执行-反思框架和确定性批评模块，显著提升了诊断准确性和可追溯性。
analysis.research_motivation: 皮肤科诊断需要细粒度视觉感知与专家临床知识的结合，但现有多模态大模型在皮肤科应用中受限于领域知识不足和幻觉问题。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够整合多工具推理、利用外部领域知识并具备自我纠错能力的皮肤科图像分析系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 DermAgent，包含三个核心组件：1）互补视觉感知工具（形态描述、皮肤镜概念标注、疾病诊断）；2）双模态检索模块，利用 413,210 个诊断图像案例和 3,199 个临床指南片段作为外部证据；3）确定性批评模块，通过置信度、覆盖率和冲突门控进行事后审计，自动检测不一致并触发自我纠正。整体采用计划-执行-反思框架。
contributions: 提出 DermAgent，一个多工具协作的皮肤科图像分析智能体，具备可追溯的决策过程。
引入双模态检索模块，利用大规模诊断图像和临床指南作为外部知识源，缓解领域先验不足。
设计确定性批评模块，通过后验审计和自动纠错减少幻觉。
在五个皮肤科基准上超越现有最先进模型，皮肤疾病诊断准确率比 GPT-4o 高 17.6%。
analysis.experiments: 在五个皮肤科基准上进行了零样本细粒度疾病诊断、概念标注和临床描述任务，DermAgent 一致优于最先进的多模态大模型和医疗智能体基线，皮肤疾病诊断准确率比 GPT-4o 高 17.6%，描述 ROUGE-L 高 3.15%。
limitations: 可能依赖外部知识库的质量和覆盖范围。
多工具协作可能增加计算开销和推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DermAgent 是一个多工具协作的皮肤科图像分析智能体，通过计划-执行-反思框架和确定性批评模块，显著提升了诊断准确性和可追溯性。

papers.title: SceneForge: Structured World Supervision from 3D Interventions
papers.abstract: Many multimodal learning tasks require supervision that remains consistent across edits, viewpoints, and scene-level interventions. However, such supervision is difficult to obtain from observation-level datasets, which do not expose the underlying scene state or how changes propagate through it. We present SceneForge, an intervention-driven framework that generates structured supervision from editable 3D world states. SceneForge represents each scene as a persistent world with semantic, geometric, and physical dependencies. By applying explicit interventions (e.g., object removal or camera variation) and propagating their effects through scene dependencies, SceneForge renders supervision that remains consistent with object structure and scene-level effects. This produces aligned outputs including counterfactual observations, multi-view observations, and effect-aware signals such as shadows and reflections, all derived from a shared world state rather than post hoc image-space processing. We instantiate SceneForge using Infinigen and Blender to construct a licensing-clean indoor supervision resource with a large number of counterfactual pairs and aligned annotations from over 2K scenes, covering both diverse single-view and registered multi-view settings. Under matched training budgets, incorporating SceneForge supervision improves both object removal and scene removal performance across multiple benchmarks in both quantitative and qualitative evaluation. These results indicate that modeling supervision as structured state transitions in editable worlds provides a practical and scalable foundation for intervention-consistent multimodal learning.

analysis.tldr: SceneForge 通过可编辑3D世界中的结构化干预生成一致的多模态监督信号，提升场景编辑任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有观察级数据集无法暴露底层场景状态或变化传播，导致多模态学习缺乏跨编辑、视角和场景干预的一致性监督。
analysis.problem: 如何从可编辑3D世界状态中生成结构化、干预一致的监督信号，以支持多模态学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SceneForge 将每个场景表示为具有语义、几何和物理依赖的持久世界，通过显式干预（如物体移除、相机变化）并传播其效果，渲染出与物体结构和场景效果一致的监督信号，包括反事实观测、多视角观测及阴影反射等效果感知信号。
contributions: 提出干预驱动的结构化监督生成框架 SceneForge，从可编辑3D世界状态生成一致的多模态监督。
构建大规模室内监督资源，包含大量反事实对和对齐标注，覆盖单视图和多视图设置。
实验证明 SceneForge 监督在物体移除和场景移除任务上提升多个基准的性能。
analysis.experiments: 使用 Infinigen 和 Blender 构建超过2000个场景的室内监督资源，在物体移除和场景移除任务上进行定量和定性评估，在匹配训练预算下，SceneForge 监督提升了多个基准的性能。
limitations: 依赖3D场景生成工具（Infinigen, Blender），可能限制场景多样性和真实感。
干预类型可能有限，未覆盖所有可能的场景操作。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SceneForge 通过可编辑3D世界中的结构化干预生成一致的多模态监督信号，提升场景编辑任务性能。

papers.title: Systematic Discovery of Semantic Attacks in Online Map Construction through Conditional Diffusion
papers.abstract: Autonomous vehicles depend on online HD map construction to perceive lane boundaries, dividers, and pedestrian crossings -- safety-critical road elements that directly govern motion planning. While existing pixel perturbation attacks can disrupt the mapping, they can be neutralized by standard adversarial defenses. We present MIRAGE, a framework for systematic discovery of semantic attacks that bypass adversarial defenses and degrade mapping predictions by finding plausible environmental variation (e.g. shadows, wet roads). MIRAGE exploits the latent manifold of real-world data learned by diffusion models, and searches for semantically mutated scenes neighboring the ground truth with the same road topology yet mislead the mapping predictions. We evaluate MIRAGE on nuScenes and demonstrate two attacks: (1) boundary removal, suppressing 57.7% of detections and corrupting 96% of planned trajectories; and (2) boundary injection, the only method that successfully injects fictitious boundaries, while pixel PGD and AdvPatch fail entirely. Both attacks remain potent under various adversarial defenses. We use two independent VLM judges to quantify realism, where MIRAGE passes as realistic 80--84% of the time (vs. 97--99% for clean nuScenes), while AdvPatch only 0--9%. Our findings expose a categorical gap in current adversarial defenses: semantic-level perturbations that manifest as legitimate environmental variation are substantially harder to mitigate than pixel-level perturbations.

analysis.tldr: 利用扩散模型发现语义攻击，可绕过防御并破坏在线地图构建。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶依赖在线高精地图感知安全关键道路元素，现有像素级扰动攻击易被标准对抗防御中和，亟需发现更隐蔽的语义级攻击。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地发现能绕过对抗防御、通过合理环境变化（如阴影、湿路面）破坏地图预测的语义攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义级扰动（如合理环境变化）比像素级扰动更难被现有防御缓解，存在防御缺口。
analysis.method: MIRAGE框架：利用扩散模型学习真实数据潜在流形，搜索与真实场景拓扑相同但误导地图预测的语义变异场景。
contributions: 提出MIRAGE框架，通过条件扩散模型系统发现语义攻击。
实现两种攻击：边界移除（抑制57.7%检测，破坏96%轨迹）和边界注入（唯一成功注入虚构边界的方法）。
揭示当前对抗防御在语义级扰动上的显著缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes数据集上评估，边界移除攻击抑制57.7%检测并破坏96%规划轨迹；边界注入攻击成功注入虚构边界，而PGD和AdvPatch完全失败。MIRAGE生成场景80-84%被VLM判为真实（干净数据97-99%，AdvPatch仅0-9%）。
limitations: 仅针对在线地图构建任务，其他感知任务未验证。
依赖扩散模型，计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用扩散模型发现语义攻击，可绕过防御并破坏在线地图构建。

papers.title: Analogical Trajectory Transfer
papers.abstract: We study analogical trajectory transfer, where the goal is to translate motion trajectories in one 3D environment to a semantically analogous location in another. Such a capacity would enable machines to perform analogical spatial reasoning, with applications in AR/VR co-presence, content creation, and robotics. However, even semantically similar scenes can still differ substantially in object placement, scale, and layout, so naively matching semantics leads to collisions or geometric distortions. Furthermore, finding where each trajectory point should transfer to has a large search space, as the mapping must preserve semantics and functionality without tearing the trajectory apart or causing collisions. Our key insight is to decompose the problem into spatially segregated subproblems and merge their solutions to produce semantically consistent and spatially coherent transfers. Specifically, we partition scenes into object-centric clusters and estimate cross-scene mappings via hierarchical smooth map prediction, using 3D foundation model features that encode contextual information from object and open-space arrangements. We then combinatorially assemble the per-cluster maps into an initial transfer and refine the result to remove collisions and distortions, yielding a spatially coherent trajectory. Our method does not require training, attains a fast runtime around 0.6 seconds, and outperforms baselines based on LLMs, VLMs, and scene graph matching. We further showcase applications in virtual co-presence, multi-trajectory transfer, camera transfer, and human-to-robot motion transfer, which indicates the broad applicability of our work to AR/VR and robotics.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的类比轨迹迁移方法，通过场景分解与层次化映射实现跨场景语义一致的轨迹迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法难以处理语义相似但布局、尺度不同的场景间的轨迹迁移，直接语义匹配会导致碰撞或几何畸变，且搜索空间大。
analysis.problem: 如何将3D环境中的运动轨迹迁移到另一个语义相似但几何布局不同的场景中的对应位置，同时保持语义一致性和空间连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义相似的场景在物体放置、尺度和布局上差异显著，直接语义匹配会导致碰撞或几何畸变；轨迹迁移的搜索空间大，映射需保持语义和功能而不撕裂轨迹或引起碰撞。
analysis.method: 将场景分解为以物体为中心的聚类，利用3D基础模型特征估计跨场景的层次化平滑映射，组合各聚类映射得到初始迁移，再通过后处理去除碰撞和畸变。
contributions: 提出类比轨迹迁移问题并给出无需训练的解决方案
设计场景分解与层次化映射方法，实现语义一致且空间连贯的轨迹迁移
在多个应用场景中展示有效性，包括虚拟共现、多轨迹迁移、相机迁移和人到机器人运动迁移
analysis.experiments: 在多个场景中与基于LLM、VLM和场景图匹配的基线方法比较，方法运行时间约0.6秒，性能优于基线。
limitations: 依赖3D基础模型特征的质量
可能不适用于高度动态或非刚性场景
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的类比轨迹迁移方法，通过场景分解与层次化映射实现跨场景语义一致的轨迹迁移。

papers.title: Dual-Latent Collaborative Decoding for Fidelity-Perception Balanced Image Compression
papers.abstract: Learned image compression (LIC) increasingly requires reconstructions that balance distortion fidelity and perceptual realism across a wide range of bitrates. However, most existing methods still rely on a single compressed latent representation to simultaneously carry structural details, semantic cues, and perceptual priors, requiring the same latent representation to serve multiple, potentially conflicting roles. This tension becomes evident across different latent paradigms: scalar-quantized (SQ) continuous latents provide rate-scalable fidelity but tend to lose perceptual details at low rates, while vector-quantized (VQ) discrete tokens preserve compact semantic cues but suffer from limited structural fidelity and bitrate scalability. To address this issue, we propose Mixture of Decoder Experts (MoDE), a dual-latent collaborative decoding framework that decomposes reconstruction responsibilities across complementary latent paradigms. Specifically, MoDE treats the SQ branch as a fidelity-oriented expert and the VQ branch as a perception-oriented expert, and coordinates them through two decoder-side modules: Expert-Specific Enhancement (ESE), which preserves branch-specific expert references, and Cross-Expert Modulation (CEM), which enables selective complementary transfer during reconstruction. The resulting framework supports selective cross-latent collaboration under a shared dual-stream bitstream and enables both fidelity-anchored and perception-anchored decoding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MoDE achieves a more favorable fidelity-perception balance than representative distortion-oriented, perception-oriented, generative, and dual-latent baselines across a wide bitrate range, highlighting decoder-side expert collaboration as an effective design for wide-range fidelity-perception balanced LIC.

analysis.tldr: 提出双潜码协作解码框架MoDE，通过分离保真度与感知专家实现率失真-感知平衡的图像压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有学习图像压缩方法依赖单一潜码同时承载结构、语义和感知信息，导致不同比特率下保真度与感知质量难以平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何设计双潜码协作机制，使SQ连续潜码（保真度导向）与VQ离散潜码（感知导向）互补，实现宽比特率范围的保真度-感知平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SQ连续潜码在低比特率下丢失感知细节，VQ离散潜码结构保真度有限且比特率可扩展性差。
analysis.method: 提出MoDE框架，包含保真度导向的SQ专家和感知导向的VQ专家，通过专家特定增强（ESE）保留分支参考，跨专家调制（CEM）实现选择性互补传输，支持共享双流码流下的保真度锚定或感知锚定解码。
contributions: 提出双潜码协作解码框架MoDE，首次将解码器端专家协作用于保真度-感知平衡图像压缩。
设计ESE和CEM模块，分别保留分支专家参考和实现跨专家选择性互补。
在宽比特率范围内优于多种代表性基线，验证了解码器端专家协作的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上与失真导向、感知导向、生成式和双潜码基线对比，MoDE在宽比特率范围内取得更优的保真度-感知平衡。
limitations: 双流码流可能增加存储和传输开销。
专家协作的泛化性可能受限于特定SQ/VQ组合。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双潜码协作解码框架MoDE，通过分离保真度与感知专家实现率失真-感知平衡的图像压缩。

papers.title: Delta Forcing: Trust Region Steering for Interactive Autoregressive Video Generation
papers.abstract: Interactive real-time autoregressive video generation is essential for applications such as content creation and world modeling, where visual content must adapt to dynamically evolving event conditions. A fundamental challenge lies in balancing reactivity and stability: models must respond promptly to new events while maintaining temporal coherence over long horizons. Existing approaches distill bidirectional models into autoregressive generators and further adapt them via streaming long tuning, yet often exhibit persistent drift after condition changes. We identify the cause as conditional bias, where the teacher may provide condition-aligned but trajectory-agnostic guidance, biasing generation toward locally valid yet globally inconsistent modes. Inspired by Trust Region Policy Optimization, we propose Delta Forcing, a simple yet effective framework that constrains unreliable teacher supervision within an adaptive trust region. Specifically, Delta Forcing estimates transition consistency from the latent delta between teacher and generator trajectories, and uses it to balance teacher supervision with a monotonic continuity objective. This suppress unreliable teacher-induced shifts while preserving responsiveness to new events. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Delta Forcing significantly improves consistency while maintaining event reactivity.

analysis.tldr: 提出Delta Forcing框架，通过自适应信任区域约束教师模型监督，提升交互式自回归视频生成的稳定性与一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 交互式实时自回归视频生成在内容创作和世界建模中至关重要，但现有方法在条件变化后常出现漂移，难以平衡反应性与稳定性。
analysis.problem: 解决自回归视频生成中教师模型的条件偏差导致的全局不一致问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出条件偏差：教师模型提供条件对齐但轨迹无关的指导，使生成偏向局部有效但全局不一致的模式。
analysis.method: Delta Forcing框架：估计教师与生成器轨迹之间的潜在差值（latent delta）以衡量过渡一致性，并基于此在自适应信任区域内平衡教师监督与单调连续性目标。
contributions: 识别并形式化了交互式自回归视频生成中的条件偏差问题。
提出Delta Forcing框架，通过信任区域约束提升长期一致性。
实验证明该方法在保持事件反应性的同时显著改善一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型质量，若教师本身有偏则效果受限。
信任区域的自适应阈值可能需要额外调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Delta Forcing框架，通过自适应信任区域约束教师模型监督，提升交互式自回归视频生成的稳定性与一致性。

papers.title: Learning with Semantic Priors: Stabilizing Point-Supervised Infrared Small Target Detection via Hierarchical Knowledge Distillation
papers.abstract: Single-frame Infrared Small Target Detection (ISTD) aims to localize weak targets under heavy background clutter, yet dense pixel-wise annotations are expensive. Point supervision with online label evolution reduces annotation cost; however, lightweight CNN detectors often lack sufficient semantics, leading to noisy pseudo-masks and unstable optimization. To address this, we propose a hierarchical VFM-driven knowledge distillation framework that uses a frozen Vision Foundation Model (VFM) during training. We formulate point-supervised learning as a bilevel optimization process: the inner loop adapts a VFM-embedded teacher on reweighted training samples, while the outer loop transfers validation-guided knowledge to a lightweight student to mitigate pseudo-label noise and training-set bias. We further introduce Semantic-Conditioned Affine Modulation (SCAM) to inject VFM semantics into CNN features at multiple layers. In addition, a dynamic collaborative learning strategy with cluster-level sample reweighting enhances robustness to imperfect pseudo-masks. Experiments on diverse challenging cases across multiple ISTD backbones demonstrate consistent improvements in detection accuracy and training stability. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 利用冻结视觉基础模型的分层知识蒸馏，稳定点监督红外小目标检测中的伪标签噪声与训练不稳定问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 红外小目标检测中密集像素标注成本高，点监督虽降低标注成本，但轻量CNN检测器语义不足，导致伪标签噪声大、优化不稳定。
analysis.problem: 点监督红外小目标检测中，轻量CNN因缺乏语义信息产生噪声伪标签，导致训练不稳定和检测精度下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出轻量CNN检测器缺乏足够语义，导致伪标签噪声和优化不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出分层VFM驱动知识蒸馏框架，将点监督学习建模为双层优化：内循环在重加权样本上适应VFM嵌入教师，外循环传递验证引导知识给学生；引入语义条件仿射调制（SCAM）注入VFM语义；动态协作学习与聚类级样本重加权增强鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出分层VFM驱动知识蒸馏框架，将点监督学习建模为双层优化以缓解伪标签噪声和训练集偏差。
引入语义条件仿射调制（SCAM）将VFM语义注入CNN多层特征。
设计动态协作学习策略与聚类级样本重加权，提升对不完美伪标签的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个ISTD骨干网络上的多样挑战性实验中，检测精度和训练稳定性均有一致提升。
limitations: 依赖冻结VFM，可能限制对特定场景的适应性。
双层优化计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用冻结视觉基础模型的分层知识蒸馏，稳定点监督红外小目标检测中的伪标签噪声与训练不稳定问题。

papers.title: AnyBand-Diff: A Unified Remote Sensing Image Generation and Band Repair Framework with Spectral Priors
papers.abstract: Existing diffusion models have made significant progress in generating realistic images. However, their direct adaptation to remote sensing imagery often disregards intrinsic physical laws. This oversight frequently leads to spectral distortion and radiometric inconsistency, severely limiting the scientific utility of generated data. To address this issue, this paper introduces AnyBand-Diff, a novel spectral-prior-guided diffusion framework tailored for robust spectral reconstruction. Specifically, we design a Masked Conditional Diffusion backbone integrated with a dual stochastic masking strategy, empowering the model to recover complete spectral information from arbitrary band subsets. Subsequently, to ensure radiometric fidelity, a Physics-Guided Sampling mechanism is proposed, leveraging gradients from a differentiable physical model to explicitly steer the denoising trajectory toward the manifold of physically plausible solutions. Furthermore, a Multi-Scale Physical Loss is formulated to enforce rigorous constraints across pixel, region, and global levels in a joint manner. Extensive experiments confirm the effectiveness of AnyBand-Diff in generating reliable imagery and achieving accurate spectral reconstruction, contributing to the advancement of physics-aware generative methods for Earth observation.

analysis.tldr: AnyBand-Diff 提出一种光谱先验引导的扩散框架，用于遥感图像生成与波段修复，解决光谱失真问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型直接应用于遥感图像时忽略物理规律，导致光谱失真和辐射不一致，限制了生成数据的科学用途。
analysis.problem: 如何生成物理上合理的遥感图像，并实现从任意波段子集恢复完整光谱信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计掩码条件扩散主干与双随机掩码策略，结合物理引导采样和多尺度物理损失，利用可微物理模型梯度引导去噪轨迹。
contributions: 提出 AnyBand-Diff，一种光谱先验引导的扩散框架，用于遥感图像生成与波段修复。
设计双随机掩码策略和物理引导采样机制，确保辐射保真度。

papers.title: IG-Diff: Complex Night Scene Restoration with Illumination-Guided Diffusion Model
papers.abstract: In nighttime circumstances, it is challenging for individuals and machines to perceive their surroundings. While prevailing image restoration methods adeptly handle singular forms of degradation, they falter when confronted with intricate nocturnal scenes, such as the concurrent presence of weather and low-light conditions. Compounding this challenge, the lack of paired data that encapsulates the coexistence of low-light situations and other forms of degradation hinders the development of a comprehensive end-to-end solution. In this work, we contribute complex nighttime scene datasets that simulate both illumination degradation and other forms of deterioration. To address the complexity of night degradation, we propose an integration of an illumination-guided module embedded in the diffusion model to guide the illumination restoration process. Our model can preserve texture fidelity while contending with the adversities posed by various degradation in low-light scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出光照引导扩散模型IG-Diff，解决夜间复杂场景下多种退化同时存在的图像恢复问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 夜间环境下人和机器感知困难，现有方法只能处理单一退化，无法应对低光照与天气等退化同时存在的复杂场景，且缺乏配对数据。
analysis.problem: 夜间复杂场景中多种退化（如低光照与天气）同时存在时的图像恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在扩散模型中嵌入光照引导模块，指导光照恢复过程，同时保持纹理保真度。
contributions: 构建了模拟光照退化与其他退化共存的复杂夜间场景数据集。
提出光照引导扩散模型IG-Diff，能处理多种退化并保持纹理保真度。

papers.title: InsightTok: Improving Text and Face Fidelity in Discrete Tokenization for Autoregressive Image Generation
papers.abstract: Text and faces are among the most perceptually salient and practically important patterns in visual generation, yet they remain challenging for autoregressive generators built on discrete tokenization. A central bottleneck is the tokenizer: aggressive downsampling and quantization often discard the fine-grained structures needed to preserve readable glyphs and distinctive facial features. We attribute this gap to standard discrete-tokenizer objectives being weakly aligned with text legibility and facial fidelity, as these objectives typically optimize generic reconstruction while compressing diverse content uniformly. To address this, we propose InsightTok, a simple yet effective discrete visual tokenization framework that enhances text and face fidelity through localized, content-aware perceptual losses. With a compact 16k codebook and a 16x downsampling rate, InsightTok significantly outperforms prior tokenizers in text and face reconstruction without compromising general reconstruction quality. These gains consistently transfer to autoregressive image generation in InsightAR, producing images with clearer text and more faithful facial details. Overall, our results highlight the potential of specialized supervision in tokenizer training for advancing discrete image generation.

analysis.tldr: 通过局部内容感知损失改进离散分词器，提升自回归图像生成中文本和面部保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本和面部是视觉生成中最具感知重要性的模式，但自回归生成器基于离散分词时，由于激进的下采样和量化，常丢失细粒度结构，导致可读字符和面部特征难以保持。
analysis.problem: 标准离散分词器目标与文本可读性和面部保真度弱对齐，因为其通常优化通用重建而均匀压缩多样内容。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标准离散分词器目标与文本可读性和面部保真度弱对齐，导致细粒度结构丢失。
analysis.method: 提出InsightTok，通过局部内容感知损失增强文本和面部保真度，使用紧凑16k码本和16x下采样率。
contributions: 提出InsightTok框架，通过局部内容感知损失提升离散分词中文本和面部重建质量。
在自回归图像生成中，InsightAR展示了更清晰的文本和更忠实的面部细节。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到在文本和面部重建上显著优于先前分词器，且不牺牲通用重建质量。
limitations: 可能仅针对文本和面部优化，对其他类别效果未知。
16k码本和16x下采样率可能限制其他场景的泛化。

papers.title: D2-CDIG: Controlled Diffusion Remote Sensing Image Generation with Dual Priors of DEM and Cloud-Fog
papers.abstract: Remote sensing image generation provides a reliable data foundation for remote sensing large models and downstream tasks. However, existing controllable remote sensing image generation methods typically rely on traditional techniques such as segmentation and edge detection, which do not fully leverage terrain or atmospheric conditions. As a result, the generated images often lack accuracy and naturalness when dealing with complex terrains and atmospheric phenomena. In this paper, we propose a novel remote sensing image generation framework, D2-CDIG, which integrates diffusion models with a dual-prior control mechanism. By incorporating both Digital Elevation Model (DEM) and cloud-fog information as dual prior knowledge, D2-CDIG precisely controls ground features and atmospheric phenomena within the generated images. Specifically, D2-CDIG decouples the terrain and atmospheric generation processes through independent control of ground and atmospheric branches. Additionally, a refined cloud-fog slider is introduced to flexibly adjust cloud thickness and distribution. During training, ground and atmospheric control signals are injected in layers to ensure a seamless transition within the images. Compared to traditional methods based on segmentation or edge detection, D2-CDIG shows significant improvements in image quality, detail richness, and realism. D2-CDIG offers a flexible and precise solution for remote sensing image generation, providing high-quality data for training large remote sensing models and downstream tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出D2-CDIG框架，利用DEM和云雾双先验控制扩散模型生成高保真遥感图像。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可控遥感图像生成方法依赖分割或边缘检测等传统技术，未充分利用地形或大气条件，导致复杂地形和大气现象下生成图像缺乏准确性和自然性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用地形（DEM）和大气（云雾）双先验知识，精确控制遥感图像中的地面特征和大气现象，提升生成图像的质量、细节丰富度和真实感。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出D2-CDIG框架，集成扩散模型与双先验控制机制：通过地面和大气分支独立控制地形与大气生成过程，引入云雾滑块灵活调整云雾厚度和分布，并在训练中分层注入控制信号确保图像无缝过渡。
contributions: 提出融合DEM和云雾双先验的遥感图像生成框架，实现地形和大气现象的精确控制。
设计地面与大气分支解耦生成及云雾滑块机制，提升生成图像的灵活性和真实感。

papers.title: TurboVGGT: Fast Visual Geometry Reconstruction with Adaptive Alternating Attention
papers.abstract: Recent feed-forward 3D reconstruction methods, such as visual geometry transformers, have substantially advanced the traditional per-scene optimization paradigm by enabling effective multi-view reconstruction in a single forward pass. However, most existing methods struggle to achieve a balance between reconstruction quality and computational efficiency, which limits their scalability and efficiency. Although some efficient visual geometry transformers have recently emerged, they typically use the same sparsity ratio across layers and frames and lack mechanisms to adaptively learn representative tokens to capture global relationships, leading to suboptimal performance. In this work, we propose TurboVGGT, a novel approach that employs an efficient visual geometry transformer with adaptive alternating attention for fast multi-view 3D reconstruction. Specifically, TurboVGGT employs an end-to-end trainable framework with adaptive sparse global attention guided by adaptive sparsity selection to capture global relationships across frames and frame attention to aggregate local details within each frame. In the adaptive sparse global attention, TurboVGGT adaptively learns representative tokens with varying sparsity levels for global geometry modeling, considering that token importance varies across frames, attention layers operate tokens at different levels of abstraction, and global dependencies rely on structurally informative regions. Extensive experiments on multiple 3D reconstruction benchmarks demonstrate that TurboVGGT achieves fast multi-view reconstruction while maintaining competitive reconstruction quality compared with state-of-the-art methods. Project page: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出TurboVGGT，通过自适应交替注意力机制实现快速高质量的多视图3D重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前馈3D重建方法在质量和效率之间难以平衡，且缺乏自适应学习代表性token的机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效的视觉几何Transformer，在保持重建质量的同时提升计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法使用固定稀疏率，无法自适应捕获全局关系，导致性能次优。
analysis.method: 采用端到端可训练框架，包含自适应稀疏全局注意力（根据token重要性自适应选择稀疏级别）和帧注意力（聚合局部细节）。
contributions: 提出TurboVGGT，一种高效视觉几何Transformer，实现快速多视图3D重建。
设计自适应交替注意力机制，包括自适应稀疏全局注意力和帧注意力，平衡全局与局部信息。
analysis.experiments: 在多个3D重建基准上，TurboVGGT在保持竞争性重建质量的同时实现快速重建。
limitations: 可能对极端稀疏视图或大尺度场景的泛化能力有限。
自适应稀疏机制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TurboVGGT，通过自适应交替注意力机制实现快速高质量的多视图3D重建。

papers.title: CoRDS: Coreset-based Representative and Diverse Selection for Streaming Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Streaming video understanding with large vision-language models (VLMs) requires a compact memory that can support future reasoning over an ever-growing visual history. A common solution is to compress the key-value (KV) cache, but existing streaming methods typically rely on local token-wise heuristics, such as recency, temporal redundancy, or saliency, which do not explicitly optimize whether the retained cache is representative of the accumulated history. We propose to view KV-cache compression as a coreset selection problem: rather than scoring tokens independently for retention, we select a small subset that covers the geometry of the accumulated visual cache. Our method operates in a joint KV representation and introduces a bicriteria objective that balances coverage in key and value spaces, preserving both retrieval structure and output-relevant information. To encourage a more diverse retained subset, we further introduce an orthogonality-driven diversity criterion that favors candidates contributing new directions beyond the current selection, and connect this criterion to log-determinant subset selection. Across four open-source VLMs and five long-video and streaming-video benchmarks, our method improves over heuristic streaming compression baselines under a fixed cache budget. These results highlight that representative coreset selection offers a more effective principle, than token-wise pruning, for memory-constrained streaming video understanding.

analysis.tldr: 将流式视频理解的KV缓存压缩建模为核心集选择问题，通过联合覆盖和多样性准则提升长视频理解性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式视频理解中，大型视觉语言模型需要紧凑的记忆来支持对不断增长的视觉历史进行推理，但现有方法依赖局部token级启发式（如时效性、冗余性、显著性），未显式优化保留缓存的代表性。
analysis.problem: 如何从累积的视觉KV缓存中选择一个紧凑且具有代表性的子集，以在固定缓存预算下支持流式视频理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将KV缓存压缩视为核心集选择问题，提出双准则目标：在键和值空间中平衡覆盖，并引入正交性驱动的多样性准则，通过log-行列式子集选择实现。
contributions: 首次将流式视频理解的KV缓存压缩形式化为核心集选择问题，提出联合覆盖和多样性的双准则目标。
引入正交性驱动的多样性准则，并连接至log-行列式子集选择，促进保留子集的多样性。
在四个开源VLM和五个长视频/流式视频基准上，方法优于启发式流式压缩基线。
analysis.experiments: 在四个开源视觉语言模型和五个长视频/流式视频基准上评估，与启发式流式压缩基线比较，显示改进。
limitations: 可能依赖KV表示的质量，对低质量表示效果有限。
多样性准则的计算开销可能较大，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将流式视频理解的KV缓存压缩建模为核心集选择问题，通过联合覆盖和多样性准则提升长视频理解性能。

papers.title: ICED: Concept-level Machine Unlearning via Interpretable Concept Decomposition
papers.abstract: Machine unlearning in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) is typically performed at the image or instance level, making it difficult to precisely remove target knowledge without affecting unrelated semantics. This issue is especially pronounced since a single image often contains multiple entangled concepts, including both target concepts to be forgotten and contextual information that should be preserved. In this paper, we propose an interpretable concept-level unlearning framework for VLMs, which constructs a compact task-specific concept vocabulary from the forgetting set using a multimodal large language model. In addition to modality alignment, visual representations are decomposed into sparse, nonnegative combinations of semantic concepts, providing an explicit interface for fine-grained knowledge manipulation. Based on this decomposition, our method formulates unlearning as concept-level optimization, where target concepts are selectively suppressed while intra-instance non-target semantics and global cross-modal knowledge are preserved. Extensive experiments across both in-domain and out-of-domain forgetting settings demonstrate that our method enables more comprehensive target forgetting, better preserves non-target knowledge within the same image, and maintains competitive model utility compared with existing VLM unlearning methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出概念级机器遗忘框架ICED，通过可解释概念分解实现VLM中细粒度知识移除。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM遗忘方法在图像或实例级别操作，难以精确移除目标知识而不影响无关语义，因为单张图像常包含多个纠缠概念。
analysis.problem: 如何在VLM中实现概念级别的精确遗忘，同时保留非目标语义和全局跨模态知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单张图像包含多个纠缠概念，实例级遗忘会误伤非目标语义。
analysis.method: 利用多模态大语言模型构建紧凑的任务特定概念词汇表，将视觉表示分解为稀疏非负的概念组合，并基于此进行概念级优化，选择性抑制目标概念。
contributions: 提出可解释概念级遗忘框架ICED，实现细粒度知识操作。
通过概念分解和优化，在域内和域外遗忘设置中实现更全面的目标遗忘，同时保留非目标知识和模型效用。
analysis.experiments: 在域内和域外遗忘设置下进行实验，与现有VLM遗忘方法比较，展示了更全面的目标遗忘和更好的非目标知识保留。
limitations: 依赖多模态大语言模型构建概念词汇，可能引入额外计算开销。
概念分解的稀疏性和非负性假设可能限制某些复杂场景的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概念级机器遗忘框架ICED，通过可解释概念分解实现VLM中细粒度知识移除。

papers.title: KVPO: ODE-Native GRPO for Autoregressive Video Alignment via KV Semantic Exploration
papers.abstract: Aligning streaming autoregressive (AR) video generators with human preferences is challenging. Existing reinforcement learning methods predominantly rely on noise-based exploration and SDE-based surrogate policies that are mismatched to the deterministic ODE dynamics of distilled AR models, and tend to perturb low-level appearance rather than the high-level semantic storyline progression critical for long-horizon coherence. To address these limitations, we present KVPO, an ODE-native online Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) framework for aligning streaming video generators. For diversity exploration, KVPO introduces a causal-semantic exploration paradigm that relocates the source of variation from stochastic noise to the historical KV cache. By stochastically routing historical KV entries, it constructs semantically diverse generation branches that remain strictly on the data manifold. For policy modeling, KVPO introduces a velocity-field surrogate policy based on Trajectory Velocity Energy (TVE), which quantifies branch likelihood in flow-matching velocity space and yields a reward-weighted contrastive objective fully consistent with the native ODE formulation. Experiments on multiple distilled AR video generators demonstrate consistent gains in visual quality, motion quality, and text-video alignment across both single-prompt short-video and multi-prompt long-video settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出ODE-native GRPO框架KVPO，通过KV缓存语义探索实现自回归视频生成器的偏好对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习方法依赖噪声探索和SDE代理策略，与蒸馏AR模型的确定性ODE动力学不匹配，且倾向于扰动低级外观而非高级语义故事线，难以保证长程连贯性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现自回归视频生成器与人类偏好的有效对齐，同时保持ODE原生一致性并探索语义级多样性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出KVPO框架，包含因果语义探索范式（通过随机路由历史KV条目构建语义多样生成分支）和基于轨迹速度能量（TVE）的速度场代理策略，实现与ODE一致的奖励加权对比学习。
contributions: 提出ODE-native GRPO框架KVPO，首次将KV缓存语义探索用于视频对齐。
设计因果语义探索范式，通过随机路由历史KV条目实现语义级多样性。
引入基于轨迹速度能量（TVE）的速度场代理策略，确保与ODE动力学一致。
analysis.experiments: 在多个蒸馏AR视频生成器上实验，在单提示短视频和多提示长视频设置中均取得视觉质量、运动质量和文本-视频对齐的一致提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定蒸馏AR模型架构。
长视频场景下的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ODE-native GRPO框架KVPO，通过KV缓存语义探索实现自回归视频生成器的偏好对齐。

papers.title: CreFlow: Corrective Reflow for Sparse-Reward Embodied Video Diffusion RL
papers.abstract: Video generation models trained on heterogeneous data with likelihood-surrogate objectives can produce visually plausible rollouts that violate physical constraints in embodied manipulation. Although reinforcement-learning post-training offers a natural route to adapting VGMs, existing video-RL rewards often reduce each rollout to a low-level visual metric, whereas manipulation video evaluation requires logic-based verification of whether the rollout satisfies a compositional task specification. To fill this gap, we introduce a compositional constraint-based reward model for post-training embodied video generation models, which automatically formulates task requirements as a composition of Linear Temporal Logic constraints, providing faithful rewards and localized error information in generated videos. To achieve effective improvement in high-dimensional video generation using these reward signals, we further propose CreFlow, a novel online RL framework with two key designs: i) a credit-aware NFT loss that confines the RL update to reward-relevant regions, preventing perturbations to unrelated regions during post-training; and ii) a corrective reflow loss that leverages within-group positive samples as an explicit estimate of the correction direction, stabilizing and accelerating training. Experiments show that CreFlow yields reward judgments better aligned with human and simulator success labels than existing methods and improves downstream execution success by 23.8 percentage points across eight bimanual manipulation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出CreFlow框架，通过组合约束奖励和矫正回流损失优化视频扩散模型的强化学习后训练，提升具身操作任务的成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型在具身操作中可能违反物理约束，而视频强化学习奖励通常基于低层视觉指标，缺乏对组合任务规范的逻辑验证。
analysis.problem: 如何为具身视频生成模型的后训练设计符合组合任务规范的奖励，并有效利用高维视频生成中的奖励信号进行强化学习优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CreFlow框架，包括：1) 基于线性时序逻辑的组合约束奖励模型，自动将任务需求转化为约束，提供忠实奖励和局部错误信息；2) 信用感知的NFT损失，将RL更新限制在奖励相关区域；3) 矫正回流损失，利用组内正样本作为矫正方向估计，稳定加速训练。
contributions: 提出组合约束奖励模型，用于后训练视频生成模型，提供忠实奖励和局部错误信息。
提出CreFlow在线RL框架，包含信用感知NFT损失和矫正回流损失，有效提升高维视频生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在八个双臂操作任务上，CreFlow的奖励判断比现有方法更符合人类和模拟器成功标签，下游执行成功率提升23.8个百分点。
limitations: 可能依赖任务规范的线性时序逻辑表达，对复杂任务建模有限。
实验仅在模拟环境中验证，真实机器人部署效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CreFlow框架，通过组合约束奖励和矫正回流损失优化视频扩散模型的强化学习后训练，提升具身操作任务的成功率。

papers.title: Diagnosing and Correcting Concept Omission in Multimodal Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Multimodal Diffusion Transformers (MM-DiTs) have achieved remarkable progress in text-to-image generation, yet they frequently suffer from concept omission, where specified objects or attributes fail to emerge in the generated image. By performing linear probing on text tokens, we demonstrate that text embeddings can distinguish a characteristic `omission signal' representing the absence of target concepts. Leveraging this insight, we propose Omission Signal Intervention (OSI), which amplifies the omission signal to actively catalyze the generation of missing concepts. Comprehensive experiments on FLUX.1-Dev and SD3.5-Medium demonstrate that OSI significantly alleviates concept omission even in extreme scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 通过线性探针发现文本嵌入中的“遗漏信号”，并提出信号干预方法缓解多模态扩散Transformer中的概念遗漏问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态扩散Transformer在文本到图像生成中常遗漏指定对象或属性，影响生成质量，现有方法未能有效诊断和纠正此问题。
analysis.problem: 解决多模态扩散Transformer生成图像时概念遗漏的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过线性探针发现文本嵌入中存在表征目标概念缺失的“遗漏信号”。
analysis.method: 提出遗漏信号干预（OSI），放大遗漏信号以主动催化缺失概念的生成。
contributions: 首次通过线性探针揭示多模态扩散Transformer中概念遗漏的文本信号特征。
提出OSI方法，有效缓解概念遗漏，在极端场景下仍表现显著。
analysis.experiments: 在FLUX.1-Dev和SD3.5-Medium上实验，OSI显著缓解概念遗漏。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定模型架构（MM-DiTs）。
未讨论对其他类型遗漏（如属性混淆）的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过线性探针发现文本嵌入中的“遗漏信号”，并提出信号干预方法缓解多模态扩散Transformer中的概念遗漏问题。

papers.title: PhyMotion: Structured 3D Motion Reward for Physics-Grounded Human Video Generation
papers.abstract: Generating realistic human motion is a central yet unsolved challenge in video generation. While reinforcement learning (RL)-based post-training has driven recent gains in general video quality, extending it to human motion remains bottlenecked by a reward signal that cannot reliably score motion realism. Existing video rewards primarily rely on 2D perceptual signals, without explicitly modeling the 3D body state, contact, and dynamics underlying articulated human motion, and often assign high scores to videos with floating bodies or physically implausible movements. To address this, we propose PhyMotion, a structured, fine-grained motion reward that grounds recovered 3D human trajectories in a physics simulator and evaluates motion quality along multiple dimensions of physical feasibility. Concretely, we recover SMPL body meshes from generated videos, retarget them onto a humanoid in the MuJoCo physics simulator, and evaluate the resulting motion along three axes: kinematic plausibility, contact and balance consistency, and dynamic feasibility. Each component provides a continuous and interpretable signal tied to a specific aspect of motion quality, allowing the reward to capture which aspects of motion are physically correct or violated. Experiments show that PhyMotion achieves stronger correlation with human judgments than existing reward formulations. These gains carry over to RL-based post-training, where optimizing PhyMotion leads to larger and more consistent improvements than optimizing existing rewards, improving motion realism across both autoregressive and bidirectional video generators under both automatic metrics and blind human evaluation (+68 Elo gain). Ablations show that the three axes provide complementary supervision signals, while the reward preserves overall video generation quality with only modest training overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化3D运动奖励PhyMotion，通过物理仿真评估人体运动真实性，显著提升视频生成中人体运动质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成中人体运动真实性不足，基于强化学习的后训练因缺乏可靠的运动真实性奖励信号而受限，现有2D感知奖励无法建模3D身体状态、接触和动力学，常对漂浮或物理不合理运动给出高分。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够准确评估生成视频中人体运动物理可行性的奖励信号，以指导强化学习后训练提升运动真实性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有2D奖励无法区分物理合理与不合理运动，导致强化学习优化方向错误。
analysis.method: 从生成视频恢复SMPL人体网格，重定向到MuJoCo物理仿真器中的人形机器人，沿运动学合理性、接触与平衡一致性、动态可行性三个维度评估运动质量，输出连续可解释的奖励信号。
contributions: 提出PhyMotion，一种结构化、细粒度的3D运动奖励，通过物理仿真评估人体运动的多维物理可行性。
实验证明PhyMotion与人类判断相关性更强，在强化学习后训练中带来更大且一致的改进，自动指标和盲人评估均提升（+68 Elo增益）。
analysis.experiments: 在自回归和双向视频生成器上评估，使用自动指标和盲人评估，消融实验验证三个维度互补，且仅带来适度训练开销。
limitations: 依赖SMPL恢复和物理仿真，可能受限于人体网格估计精度。
仅针对人体运动，未扩展到其他物体或复杂交互场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化3D运动奖励PhyMotion，通过物理仿真评估人体运动真实性，显著提升视频生成中人体运动质量。

papers.title: Image Restoration via Diffusion Models with Dynamic Resolution
papers.abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have exhibited remarkable efficacy in various image restoration tasks. However, existing approaches typically operate within the high-dimensional pixel space, resulting in high computational overhead. While methods based on latent DMs seek to alleviate this issue by utilizing the compressed latent space of a variational autoencoder, they require repeated encoder-decoder inference. This introduces significant additional computational burdens, often resulting in runtime performance that is even inferior to that of their pixel-space counterparts. To mitigate the computational inefficiency, this work proposes projecting data into lower-dimensional subspaces using dynamic resolution DMs to accelerate the inference process. We first fine-tune pre-trained DMs for dynamic resolution priors and adapt DPS and DAPS, which are two widely used pixel-space methods for general image restoration tasks, into the proposed framework, yielding methods we refer to as SubDPS and SubDAPS, respectively. Given the favorable inference speed and reconstruction fidelity of SubDAPS, we introduce an enhanced variant termed SubDAPS++ to further boost both reconstruction efficiency and quality. Empirical evaluations across diverse image datasets and various restoration tasks demonstrate that the proposed methods outperform recent DM-based approaches in the majority of experimental scenarios. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出动态分辨率扩散模型，通过投影到低维子空间加速图像修复，SubDAPS++在效率和保真度上优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型在像素空间计算开销大，潜在空间方法需重复编码-解码导致运行时性能甚至更差，亟需高效推理方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲重建质量的前提下，显著降低扩散模型在图像修复任务中的计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 微调预训练扩散模型以支持动态分辨率先验，将像素空间方法DPS和DAPS适配到低维子空间，提出SubDPS和SubDAPS，并进一步改进为SubDAPS++。
contributions: 提出动态分辨率扩散模型框架，通过低维子空间投影加速图像修复推理。
将DPS和DAPS适配到子空间，提出SubDPS和SubDAPS，并开发增强版SubDAPS++。
实验表明所提方法在多数场景下优于近期基于扩散模型的方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多种图像数据集和修复任务上评估，与近期基于扩散模型的方法对比，所提方法在多数实验场景中表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
动态分辨率策略的适用范围未明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态分辨率扩散模型，通过投影到低维子空间加速图像修复，SubDAPS++在效率和保真度上优于现有方法。

papers.title: Towards Real-Time Autonomous Navigation: Transformer-Based Catheter Tip Tracking in Fluoroscopy
papers.abstract: Purpose: Mechanical thrombectomy (MT) improves stroke outcomes, but is limited by a lack of local treatment access. Widespread distribution of reinforcement learning (RL)-based robotic systems can be used to alleviate this challenge through autonomous navigation, but current RL methods require live device tip coordinate tracking to function. This paper aims to develop and evaluate a real-time catheter tip tracking pipeline under fluoroscopy, addressing challenges such as low contrast, noise, and device occlusion. Methods: A multi-threaded pipeline was designed, incorporating frame reading, preprocessing, inference, and post-processing. Deep learning segmentation models, including U-Net, U-Net+Transformer, and SegFormer, were trained and benchmarked using two-class and three-class formulations. Post-processing involved two-step component filtering, one-pixel medial skeletonization, and greedy arc-length path following with contour fall-back. Results: On manually-labeled moderate complexity fluoroscopic video data, the two-class SegFormer achieved a mean absolute error of 4.44 mm, outperforming U-Net (4.60 mm), U-Net+Transformer (6.20 mm) and all three-class models (5.19-7.74 mm). On segmentation benchmarks, the system exceeded state-of-the-art CathAction results with improvements of up to +5% in Dice scores for three-segmentation. Conclusion: The results demonstrate that the proposed multi-threaded tracking framework maintains stable performance under challenging imaging conditions, outperforming prior benchmarks, while providing a reliable and efficient foundation for RL-based autonomous MT navigation.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Transformer的导管尖端实时跟踪管道，用于荧光透视下的自主导航，SegFormer模型在中等复杂度数据上达到4.44mm误差。
analysis.research_motivation: 机械取栓（MT）可改善卒中预后，但受限于本地治疗可及性；基于强化学习（RL）的机器人系统有望通过自主导航缓解此问题，但当前RL方法需要实时设备尖端坐标跟踪，而荧光透视图像存在低对比度、噪声和器械遮挡等挑战。
analysis.problem: 开发并评估一种在荧光透视下实时跟踪导管尖端的管道，以支持RL自主导航。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计多线程管道，包括帧读取、预处理、推理和后处理；训练并比较U-Net、U-Net+Transformer和SegFormer等深度学习分割模型，采用二类和三类公式；后处理包括两步组件过滤、单像素骨架化和贪心弧长路径跟踪与轮廓回退。
contributions: 提出一种多线程实时导管尖端跟踪管道，在荧光透视下稳定工作。
SegFormer二类模型在中等复杂度数据上达到4.44mm平均绝对误差，优于U-Net和U-Net+Transformer。
在分割基准上超越CathAction最新结果，Dice分数提升高达5%。
analysis.experiments: 在手动标注的中等复杂度荧光透视视频数据上评估，SegFormer二类模型平均绝对误差4.44mm，优于其他模型；分割基准上Dice分数提升高达5%。
limitations: 仅在中等复杂度数据上验证，未在高复杂度或真实临床场景中测试。
未讨论管道在极端遮挡或低帧率下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Transformer的导管尖端实时跟踪管道，用于荧光透视下的自主导航，SegFormer模型在中等复杂度数据上达到4.44mm误差。

papers.title: Generative Deep Learning for Computational Destaining and Restaining of Unregistered Digital Pathology Images
papers.abstract: Conditional generative adversarial networks (cGANs) have enabled high-fidelity computational staining and destaining of hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) in digital pathology whole-slide images (WSI). However, their ability to generalize to out-of-distribution WSI across institutions without retraining remains insufficiently characterized. Previously developed cGAN models trained on 102 registered prostate core biopsy WSIs from Brigham and Women's Hospital were evaluated on 82 spatially unregistered WSIs acquired at Stanford University. To mitigate domain shift without retraining, a preprocessing pipeline consisting of histogram-based stain normalization for H&E-stained WSIs and channel-wise intensity calibration for unstained WSIs was developed. Because image registration was intentionally omitted for real-world deployment conditions, the reported quantitative results are conservative lower bounds reflecting both model performance and limited spatial alignment. Under these conditions, virtual destaining achieved a Pearson correlation coefficient (PCC) of 0.854, structural similarity index measure (SSIM) of 0.699, and peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of 18.41 dB. H&E restaining from computationally destained outputs outperformed direct staining from ground-truth unstained inputs across all metrics (PCC: 0.798 vs. 0.715; SSIM: 0.756 vs. 0.718; PSNR: 20.08 vs. 18.51 dB), suggesting that preprocessing quality may be more limiting than model capacity. Qualitative pathological review indicated preservation of benign glandular structures while showing that malignant glands were often rendered with vessel-like morphologies. These findings support the feasibility of applying cGAN-based computational H&E staining and destaining generative models to external WSI datasets using preprocessing-based adaptation alone while defining specific morphological targets for future domain adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 基于cGAN的计算染色/脱色模型在未配准的外部病理WSI上通过预处理适应取得可行效果，但恶性腺体形态保留不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字病理学中，计算染色/脱色模型在不同机构间的泛化能力尚未充分表征，实际部署中图像配准难以保证，需要评估无重训练适应策略的可行性。
analysis.problem: 评估基于cGAN的H&E计算脱色和再染色模型在未配准、跨机构WSI上的泛化性能，并开发无需重训练的预处理适应方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用基于直方图的染色归一化（H&E）和通道强度校准（未染色）的预处理流程，对未配准的外部WSI进行域适应，然后应用预训练的cGAN模型进行虚拟脱色和再染色。
contributions: 首次系统评估cGAN计算染色/脱色模型在未配准跨机构WSI上的泛化能力，并给出保守性能下界。
提出仅基于预处理的域适应方法，无需重训练即可应用于外部数据集。
发现预处理质量比模型容量更关键，且恶性腺体形态保留存在局限。
analysis.experiments: 在82张斯坦福大学未配准的前列腺穿刺WSI上评估，使用PCC、SSIM、PSNR指标，并进行了病理学定性审查。
limitations: 未配准导致定量结果为保守下界，可能低估真实性能。
恶性腺体常呈现血管样形态，形态保留不足。
仅针对前列腺癌H&E染色，泛化到其他组织类型和染色方法需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于cGAN的计算染色/脱色模型在未配准的外部病理WSI上通过预处理适应取得可行效果，但恶性腺体形态保留不足。

papers.title: Implicit spatial-frequency fusion of hyperspectral and lidar data via kolmogorov-arnold networks
papers.abstract: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification is challenging in complex scenes due to spectral ambiguity, spatial heterogeneity, and the strong coupling between material properties and geometric structures. Although LiDAR provides complementary elevation information, most HSI-LiDAR fusion methods rely on CNNs or MLPs with fixed activation functions and linear weights. These methods struggle to model structural discontinuities in LiDAR data, intricate spectral features of HSI, and their interactions. In addition, fusion of the two modalities in both spatial and frequency domains with LiDAR guidance remains underexplored. To address these issues, we propose the Implicit Frequency-Geometry Fusion Network (IFGNet), which leverages Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) with learnable spline-based functions to adaptively capture highly nonlinear relationships between hyperspectral and LiDAR features. Furthermore, IFGNet introduces a LiDAR-guided implicit aggregation module in both spatial and frequency domains, enhancing geometry-aware spatial representations while capturing global structural patterns. Experiments on the Houston 2013 and MUUFL benchmarks demonstrate that IFGNet consistently outperforms existing fusion methods in overall accuracy, average accuracy, and Cohen's Kappa, while maintaining an efficient architecture.

analysis.tldr: 提出IFGNet，利用KAN网络和LiDAR引导的隐式空间-频率融合提升高光谱图像分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱图像分类在复杂场景中面临光谱模糊、空间异质性以及材料属性与几何结构强耦合等挑战，现有基于CNN或MLP的融合方法难以建模LiDAR数据的结构不连续性、HSI的精细光谱特征及其交互。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合高光谱和LiDAR数据，在空间和频率域中利用LiDAR引导实现几何感知的隐式聚合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出隐式频率-几何融合网络（IFGNet），使用KAN网络（可学习样条函数）自适应捕获HSI与LiDAR特征间的非线性关系，并引入LiDAR引导的隐式聚合模块在空间和频率域增强几何感知表示。
contributions: 首次将KAN网络应用于HSI-LiDAR融合分类，利用可学习样条函数建模非线性交互。
提出LiDAR引导的隐式空间-频率聚合模块，同时捕获几何结构和全局模式。
analysis.experiments: 在Houston 2013和MUUFL基准上，IFGNet在总体精度、平均精度和Cohen's Kappa上持续优于现有融合方法，且架构高效。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和传感器配置，泛化性需进一步验证。
KAN网络的计算开销和训练稳定性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IFGNet，利用KAN网络和LiDAR引导的隐式空间-频率融合提升高光谱图像分类性能。

papers.title: Automatic Landmark-Based Segmentation of Human Subcortical Structures in MRI
papers.abstract: Precise segmentation of brain structures in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is essential for reliable neuroimaging analysis, yet voxel-wise deep models often yield anatomically inconsistent results that diverge from expert-defined boundaries. In this research, we propose a landmark-guided 3D brain segmentation approach that explicitly mimics the manual segmentation protocol of the Harvard--Oxford Atlas. A Global-to-Local network automatically detects 16 landmarks representing key subcortical reference points. Then, a semantic segmentation model produces a coarse segmentation of 12 anatomical labels, each grouping multiple subcortical regions. Finally, a landmark-driven post-processing step separates these 12 labels into 26 distinct structures by enforcing local anatomical constraints. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvements in boundary accuracy. Overall, integrating learned landmarks aligns segmentations more closely with manual protocols.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于地标的3D脑分割方法，通过检测解剖地标并后处理提升边界准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有体素级深度模型在MRI脑结构分割中常产生解剖不一致的结果，偏离专家定义的边界，需要更符合手动分割协议的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何实现与专家手动分割协议一致的精确脑亚皮层结构分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出地标引导的3D分割方法：全局到局部网络检测16个地标，语义分割模型生成12个标签的粗分割，再通过地标驱动的后处理将12个标签分离为26个结构。
contributions: 提出一种模仿手动分割协议的地标引导分割框架。
通过地标后处理提升边界准确性，使分割更符合解剖约束。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖地标检测的准确性。
后处理步骤可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于地标的3D脑分割方法，通过检测解剖地标并后处理提升边界准确性。

papers.title: CoReDiT: Spatial Coherence-Guided Token Pruning and Reconstruction for Efficient Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) deliver remarkable image and video generation quality but incur high computational cost, limiting scalability and on-device deployment. We introduce CoReDiT, a structured token pruning framework for DiTs across vision tasks. CoReDiT uses a linear-time spatial coherence score to estimate local redundancy in the latent token lattice and skips high coherence (redundant) tokens in self-attention. To maintain a dense representation and avoid visual discontinuities, we reconstruct skipped attention outputs via coherence-guided aggregation of spatially neighboring retained tokens. We further introduce a progressive, block-adaptive pruning schedule that increases pruning gradually and allocates larger budgets to blocks and denoising steps with higher redundancy.
