These techniques are integrated into a Modality-Aware Credit Assignment (MoCA) mechanism, which routes rewards to the specific source of error -- either bad seeing or bad thinking -- enabling a single VLM to achieve simultaneous performance gains across a wide task spectrum.

analysis.tldr: 提出MoCA框架，通过感知验证奖励机制解决VLM中感知与推理的权衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM通过架构设计或智能体工作流追求感知-推理协同，但常受限于静态文本推理或外部智能体带来的计算与工程负担，且投入与收益不成比例，出现感知与推理的“跷跷板效应”。
analysis.problem: VLM失败时难以区分是感知错误（bad seeing）还是推理错误（bad thinking），导致模态信用分配模糊，限制了感知-推理协同的提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到感知与推理之间存在“跷跷板效应”，即提升一方面可能导致另一方面下降，根源在于模态信用分配不明确。
analysis.method: 提出MoCA框架，将生成过程分解为交错的感知和推理步骤，引入感知验证（PV）通过“盲推理”代理独立奖励感知保真度，并采用结构化口头验证（SVV）替代高方差LLM评判，实现模态感知的信用分配。
contributions: 提出感知验证（PV）方法，通过盲推理代理独立评估感知质量，实现感知与推理的分离监督。
设计结构化口头验证（SVV），用结构化算法执行替代LLM评判，降低方差并提升可扩展性。
集成MoCA机制，将奖励路由到具体错误来源，使单个VLM在广泛任务上同时提升感知和推理性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖盲推理代理的质量，若代理本身有偏差则影响感知奖励的准确性。
结构化口头验证的算法设计可能对某些开放域任务适应性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MoCA框架，通过感知验证奖励机制解决VLM中感知与推理的权衡问题。

papers.title: Masked Autoencoders with Limited Data: Does It Work? A Fine-Grained Bioacoustics Case Study
papers.abstract: Bioacoustic recognition requires fine-grained acoustic understanding to distinguish similar-sounding species. However, many large-scale data repositories such as iNaturalist are weakly annotated, often with only a single positive species label per recording, making supervised learning particularly challenging. Inspired by advances in computer vision, recent approaches have shifted toward self-supervised learning to capture the underlying structure of audio without relying on exhaustive annotations. In particular, masked autoencoders (MAE) have shown strong transferability on massive audio corpora, yet their effectiveness in more modest bioacoustic settings remains underexplored. In this work, we conduct a systematic study of MAE pretraining for species classification on iNatSounds, analyzing the impacts of pretraining data scale, domain specificity, data curation, and transfer strategies. Consistent with prior work, we find that models pretrained on diverse general audio data achieve the best transfer performance on iNatSounds. Contrary to observations from large-scale audio benchmarks, we find that (1) additional masked reconstruction pretraining on domain-specific data provides limited benefits and may even degrade performance relative to off-the-shelf models, and (2) selective data filtering offers a negligible advantage when the overall data scale is limited. Our results indicate that, in moderate-sized fine-grained bioacoustic settings, pretraining scale dominates objective design. These findings further clarify when MAE-based pretraining is effective and provide practical guidance for model selection under limited supervision.

analysis.tldr: 在细粒度生物声学数据有限时，MAE预训练效果受限于数据规模，领域特定预训练收益甚微。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物声学识别需要细粒度音频理解，但大规模数据仓库（如iNaturalist）标注弱，监督学习困难；自监督学习（如MAE）在大型音频语料库上表现良好，但在数据有限的生物声学场景中效果未知。
analysis.problem: 探究掩码自编码器（MAE）在有限数据下的细粒度生物声学分类中是否有效，以及预训练数据规模、领域特异性、数据筛选和迁移策略的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 与大规模音频基准的观察相反，发现：(1) 在领域特定数据上额外进行掩码重建预训练收益有限，甚至可能降低性能；(2) 当整体数据规模有限时，选择性数据筛选优势可忽略。
analysis.method: 系统研究MAE预训练在iNatSounds物种分类上的表现，分析预训练数据规模、领域特异性、数据筛选和迁移策略的影响。
contributions: 揭示了在中等规模细粒度生物声学场景中，预训练规模主导目标设计，领域特定预训练收益有限。
为有限监督下模型选择提供了实用指导，明确了MAE预训练有效的条件。
analysis.experiments: 在iNatSounds数据集上进行物种分类实验，对比不同预训练数据规模、领域特异性、数据筛选和迁移策略。
limitations: 仅针对生物声学领域，结论可能不适用于其他细粒度音频任务。
未探索更大规模领域特定数据或更复杂的筛选策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在细粒度生物声学数据有限时，MAE预训练效果受限于数据规模，领域特定预训练收益甚微。

papers.title: Vision-Based Runtime Monitoring under Varying Specifications using Semantic Latent Representations
papers.abstract: We study certified runtime monitoring of past-time signal temporal logic (ptSTL) from visual observations under partial observability. The monitor must infer safety-relevant quantities from images and provide finite-sample guarantees, while being \emph{reusable}: once trained and calibrated, it should certify any formula in a target fragment without per-formula retraining. For fragments induced by a finite dictionary of temporal atoms, we prove that the \emph{semantic basis}, the vector of atom robustness scores, is the minimum prediction target within the class of monotone, 1-Lipschitz reusable interfaces: any formula is evaluated by a deterministic decoder derived from the parse tree, and a single conformal calibration pass certifies the entire fragment with no union bound. We also introduce a \emph{rolling prediction monitor} that predicts only current predicate values and reconstructs temporal history online; this is easier to learn but grows conservative at long horizons. On a pedestrian-crossroad benchmark, rolling achieves tighter certified bounds at short horizons while the semantic-basis monitor is up to 4-times tighter at long horizons. We validate the presented monitors on real-world Waymo driving data, where both monitors satisfy the conformal coverage guarantee empirically.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于语义潜表征的视觉运行时监控方法，可在不同规范下复用，无需针对每个公式重新训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉监控系统需要在部分可观测条件下从图像中推断安全相关量并提供有限样本保证，但现有方法通常针对特定规范训练，缺乏可复用性，导致部署成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可复用的视觉运行时监控器，使其在无需针对每个公式重新训练的情况下，能够认证任意过去时间信号时序逻辑（ptSTL）公式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出语义基（semantic basis）作为最小预测目标，即时间原子鲁棒性分数的向量；通过解析树推导确定性解码器评估任意公式，并利用单次共形校准认证整个片段。同时引入滚动预测监控器，仅预测当前谓词值并在线重构时序历史。
contributions: 证明了语义基是单调、1-Lipschitz可复用接口类中的最小预测目标。
提出滚动预测监控器，在短时域上更紧，而语义基监控器在长时域上更紧。
在行人交叉路口基准和真实Waymo驾驶数据上验证了监控器的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在行人交叉路口基准上，滚动监控器在短时域上获得更紧的认证界，语义基监控器在长时域上紧4倍；在Waymo数据上，两种监控器均经验证满足共形覆盖保证。
limitations: 滚动预测监控器在长时域上保守性增加。
方法依赖于有限时间原子字典，可能限制可表达的规范范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于语义潜表征的视觉运行时监控方法，可在不同规范下复用，无需针对每个公式重新训练。

papers.title: Covariance-aware sampling for Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: We present a covariance-aware sampler that improves the quality of pixel-space Diffusion Model (DM) sampling in the few-step regime. We hypothesize that in the few-step regime samplers fail because they rely solely on the predicted mean of the reverse distribution, while our solution explicitly models the reverse-process covariance. Our method combines Tweedie's formula to estimate the covariance with an efficient, structured Fourier-space decomposition of the covariance matrix. Implemented as an extension of DDIM, our method requires only a minimal overhead: one extra Jacobian-Vector Product (JVP) per step. We demonstrate that for pixel-based DMs, our method consistently produces superior samples compared to state-of-the-art second order samplers (Heun, DPM-Solver++) and the recent aDDIM sampler, at an identical number of function evaluations (NFE).

analysis.tldr: 提出协方差感知采样器，通过显式建模反向过程协方差提升扩散模型少步采样质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型采样器在少步（few-step）场景下质量下降，因为仅依赖反向分布的预测均值而忽略了协方差信息。
analysis.problem: 如何通过建模反向过程的协方差来改进扩散模型在少步采样时的生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 少步采样时，仅使用预测均值的采样器失败，而显式建模协方差可以提升质量。
analysis.method: 利用Tweedie公式估计协方差，并通过结构化傅里叶空间分解实现高效计算；作为DDIM的扩展，每步仅增加一次Jacobian-Vector Product。
contributions: 提出协方差感知采样器，显式建模反向过程协方差。
在像素空间扩散模型上，以相同NFE超越Heun、DPM-Solver++和aDDIM等二阶采样器。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在像素空间扩散模型上一致优于现有二阶采样器。
limitations: 仅适用于像素空间扩散模型，未验证潜在空间模型。
额外JVP计算可能带来轻微开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出协方差感知采样器，通过显式建模反向过程协方差提升扩散模型少步采样质量。

papers.title: Physics-Grounded Adversarial Stain Augmentation with Calibrated Coverage Guarantees
papers.abstract: Stain variation across hospitals degrades histopathology models at deployment. Existing augmentation methods perturb color spaces with arbitrary hyperparameters, lacking both a principled budget and coverage guarantees for unseen centers. We propose \textbf{C}alibrated \textbf{A}dversarial \textbf{S}tain \textbf{A}ugmentation (\textbf{CASA}), which performs adversarial augmentation in the Macenko stain parameter space with a budget calibrated from multi-center statistics via the DKW inequality. On Camelyon17-WILDS (5 seeds), CASA achieves $93.9\% \pm 1.6\%$ slide-level accuracy -- outperforming HED-strong ($88.4\% \pm 7.3\%$), RandStainNA ($85.2\% \pm 6.7\%$), and ERM ($63.9\% \pm 11.3\%$) -- with the highest worst-group accuracy ($84.9\% \pm 0.9\%$) among all 10 compared methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于物理染色参数空间的对抗性增强方法，通过DKW不等式校准增强预算，在域泛化上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 医院间染色差异导致病理模型部署时性能下降，现有增强方法依赖任意超参数，缺乏原则性预算和覆盖保证。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖未见中心数据的情况下，提供有覆盖保证的染色增强以提升模型域泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在Macenko染色参数空间中进行对抗性增强，利用多中心统计量和DKW不等式校准增强预算。
contributions: 提出CASA方法，将对抗性增强限制在物理染色参数空间，增强可解释性。
利用DKW不等式提供校准的覆盖保证，无需未见中心数据。
analysis.experiments: 在Camelyon17-WILDS数据集上，CASA达到93.9%±1.6%的slide-level准确率，优于HED-strong、RandStainNA和ERM，并在最差组准确率上领先所有10种对比方法。
limitations: 可能依赖多中心统计量的代表性。
对抗性增强的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于物理染色参数空间的对抗性增强方法，通过DKW不等式校准增强预算，在域泛化上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Elastic Spiking Transformers for Efficient Gesture Understanding
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), particularly Spiking Transformers, offer energy-efficient processing of event-based sensor data for healthcare applications. Yet current architectures are rigid: they are trained and deployed as static networks with fixed parameter counts and computational graphs. This limits deployment on neuromorphic hardware such as Loihi and SpiNNaker, where on-chip constraints often require smaller models that trade accuracy for feasibility. We introduce the Elastic Spiking Transformer, a runtime-adaptive architecture that brings elasticity into the spiking paradigm. Inspired by Matryoshka-style representation learning, it embeds nested elasticity in the Feature Extractor, Spiking Self-Attention, and Feed-Forward blocks. Through granularity-aware weight sharing, a single universal model can dynamically slice network width and attention heads at inference time without retraining. This design provides two key advantages for SNNs. First, it allows the model to adjust its parameter footprint to different hardware memory budgets. Second, reducing active neurons also lowers spike firing rates, yielding proportional reductions in synaptic operations, an energy benefit not directly available in standard artificial neural networks. We evaluate the approach on CIFAR10/100, CIFAR10-DVS, and the EHWGesture clinical gesture understanding dataset. Results show that one Elastic Spiking Transformer spans a broad range of complexity-accuracy trade-offs, matching or surpassing independently trained baselines while supporting adaptive, real-time gesture recognition on resource-constrained edge devices.

analysis.tldr: 提出弹性脉冲Transformer，通过运行时动态调整网络宽度和注意力头数，实现单一模型覆盖多种复杂度-精度权衡，适用于资源受限的边缘设备手势识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有脉冲神经网络（SNN）架构固定，无法适应不同硬件内存预算，部署在Loihi、SpiNNaker等神经形态芯片时需牺牲精度换取可行性。
analysis.problem: 解决SNN模型在推理时无法动态调整参数规模和计算图以适应不同硬件约束的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 受Matryoshka表征学习启发，在特征提取器、脉冲自注意力和前馈块中嵌入嵌套弹性，通过粒度感知权重共享实现单一模型在推理时动态切片网络宽度和注意力头数，无需重训练。
contributions: 提出弹性脉冲Transformer架构，支持运行时自适应调整网络宽度和注意力头数。
通过粒度感知权重共享实现单一模型覆盖多种复杂度-精度权衡，匹配或超越独立训练的基线模型。
在CIFAR10/100、CIFAR10-DVS和EHWGesture临床手势数据集上验证有效性，支持资源受限边缘设备上的实时手势识别。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR10/100、CIFAR10-DVS和EHWGesture临床手势数据集上评估，结果显示弹性脉冲Transformer可覆盖多种复杂度-精度权衡，匹配或超越独立训练的基线模型。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定SNN架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论在更大规模数据集或更复杂任务上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弹性脉冲Transformer，通过运行时动态调整网络宽度和注意力头数，实现单一模型覆盖多种复杂度-精度权衡，适用于资源受限的边缘设备手势识别。

papers.title: Seed3D 2.0: Advancing High-Fidelity Simulation-Ready 3D Content Generation
papers.abstract: We present Seed3D 2.0, an advanced 3D content generation system built on Seed3D 1.0, with substantial improvements across generation fidelity, simulation-ready capabilities, and application coverage. For geometry, a coarse-to-fine two-stage pipeline decouples global structure learning from high-frequency detail recovery, while a locality-aware VAE achieves higher spatial compression and more efficient decoding. For texture and material generation, we replace the cascaded pipeline of Seed3D 1.0 with a unified PBR model that directly generates multi-view albedo and metallic-roughness maps, enhanced by Mixture-of-Experts scaling and VLM-based semantic conditioning for improved material precision and visual fidelity. Beyond single-object generation, Seed3D 2.0 introduces a simulation-ready model suite comprising scene layout planning, part-aware decomposition, and training-free articulation generation, enabling coherent scene construction and part-level physical interaction across physics and graphics engines. A large-scale human preference study against five recent commercial models shows that Seed3D 2.0 achieves consistent win rates of 69.0% to 89.9% in textured 3D asset generation. Seed3D 2.0 is available on this https URL

analysis.tldr: Seed3D 2.0 通过两阶段几何生成、统一PBR材质模型和仿真就绪套件，显著提升了3D内容生成的质量与物理交互能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D内容生成系统在几何细节、材质真实感和仿真就绪性方面存在不足，难以满足高质量、可交互的3D资产需求。
analysis.problem: 如何提升3D内容生成系统的几何保真度、材质精度和仿真就绪能力，以支持场景级构建和物理交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段几何生成管线（粗到细）解耦全局结构与高频细节；引入局部感知VAE提高空间压缩和编码效率；用统一PBR模型替代级联管线，结合MoE扩展和VLM语义条件生成多视图材质图；新增仿真就绪模型套件，包括场景布局规划、部件感知分解和无训练关节生成。
contributions: 提出粗到细两阶段几何生成管线，提升几何保真度
设计统一PBR材质模型，结合MoE和VLM条件改善材质精度与视觉保真度
引入仿真就绪模型套件，支持场景布局、部件分解和关节生成，实现物理交互
analysis.experiments: 大规模人类偏好研究显示，Seed3D 2.0在纹理3D资产生成上对五个商业模型的胜率在69.0%至89.9%之间。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模训练数据，泛化到罕见类别有限
仿真就绪套件可能对复杂场景的物理交互支持不够完善
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Seed3D 2.0 通过两阶段几何生成、统一PBR材质模型和仿真就绪套件，显著提升了3D内容生成的质量与物理交互能力。

papers.title: MoZoo:Unleashing Video Diffusion power in animal fur and muscle simulation
papers.abstract: The creation of cinematic-quality animal effects necessitates the precise modeling of muscle and fur dynamics, a process that remains both labor-intensive and computationally expensive within traditional production workflows. While generative diffusion models have shown promise in diverse artistic workflows, their capacity for high-fidelity animal simulation remains largely unexploited. We present MoZoo, a generative dynamics solver that bypasses conventional refinement to synthesize high-fidelity animal videos from coarse meshes under multimodal guidance. We propose Role-Aware RoPE (RAR-RoPE) which employs role-based index remapping to synchronize motion alignment while decoupling reference information via fixed temporal offsets. Complementing this, Asymmetric Decoupled Attention partitions the latent sequence to enforce a unidirectional information flow, effectively preventing feature interference and improving computational efficiency. To address the scarcity of high-quality training data, we introduce MoZoo-Data, a synthetic-to-real pipeline that leverages a rendering engine and an inverse mapping approach to construct a large-scale dataset of paired sequences. Furthermore, we establish MoZooBench, a comprehensive benchmark with 120 mesh-video pairs. Experimental results demonstrate that MoZoo achieves high-fidelity fur simulation across diverse animal skeletons and layouts, preserving superior temporal and structural consistency.

analysis.tldr: MoZoo 利用视频扩散模型从粗糙网格生成高保真动物毛皮与肌肉模拟视频。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统动物特效制作中毛皮和肌肉动力学建模既耗时又计算昂贵，而现有生成扩散模型尚未充分探索高保真动物模拟。
analysis.problem: 如何从粗糙网格生成高保真、时序一致的动物视频，并解决运动对齐、特征干扰及训练数据稀缺的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MoZoo 生成式动力学求解器，包含 Role-Aware RoPE 实现运动对齐与参考信息解耦，非对称解耦注意力防止特征干扰，以及合成到真实数据管道 MoZoo-Data 和基准 MoZooBench。
contributions: 提出 MoZoo 框架，从粗糙网格生成高保真动物视频。
设计 Role-Aware RoPE 和非对称解耦注意力机制。
构建大规模配对数据集 MoZoo-Data 和基准 MoZooBench。
analysis.experiments: 在 MoZooBench 上评估，实现高保真毛皮模拟，保持时序和结构一致性。
limitations: 依赖合成数据，真实场景泛化性可能受限。
计算开销可能仍较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoZoo 利用视频扩散模型从粗糙网格生成高保真动物毛皮与肌肉模拟视频。

papers.title: SparseOIT: Improving Order-Independent Transparency 3DGS via Active Set Method
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has received tremendous popularity over the past few years due to its photorealistic visual appearance. However, 3DGS uses volumetric rendering that is not suitable for objects with non-lambertian or transparent materials. To remedy this issue, a family of Order-Independent Transparency (OIT) rendering methods propose to remove or modify the depth sorting step in the 3DGS rendering equation. However, the potential of OIT-based method is still underexplored. In this paper, we observe that the OIT modifications to the rendering equation significantly reduce the inter-independence among individual gaussian splats, resulting in very sparse variable dependencies that can be harnessed by specific optimization techniques such as active set method. To this end, we propose SparseOIT, an OIT-based 3DGS reconstruction algorithm that maintains an active set of gaussian splats and enjoys an acceleration ratio that is proportional to the potential sparsity. SparseOIT is designed by jointly considering the OIT rendering equation, the reconstruction algorithm and the geometric regularization. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that SparseOIT outperforms existing methods in the OIT-family by a large margin and also achieves comparable performance to the state-of-the-art 3DGS reconstruction methods based on volumetric rendering. Project page:

analysis.tldr: 利用主动集方法加速基于OIT的3DGS渲染与重建，实现稀疏依赖下的高效优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS在非朗伯或透明材质物体上表现不佳，现有OIT方法虽能解决深度排序问题，但其潜力未被充分挖掘，且优化效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何利用OIT渲染方程中高斯溅射间的稀疏依赖关系，设计高效的3DGS重建算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: OIT修改渲染方程后，高斯溅射间的变量依赖变得非常稀疏，可利用主动集方法加速优化。
analysis.method: 提出SparseOIT，维护一个活跃高斯溅射集合，通过主动集方法实现与潜在稀疏度成比例的加速，并联合考虑OIT渲染方程、重建算法和几何正则化。
contributions: 观察到OIT渲染方程导致高斯溅射间稀疏依赖，并利用主动集方法加速优化。
提出SparseOIT算法，在OIT系列方法中大幅领先，且与基于体渲染的SOTA方法性能相当。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于OIT类方法，对非OIT场景不适用。
主动集方法可能引入额外超参数或收敛性依赖。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用主动集方法加速基于OIT的3DGS渲染与重建，实现稀疏依赖下的高效优化。

papers.title: FaceParts: Segmentation and Editing of Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Facial editing is an important task with applications in entertainment, virtual reality, and digital avatars. Most existing approaches rely on generative models in the 2D image domain, while in 3D the task is typically performed through labor-intensive manual editing. We propose FaceParts, a framework for unsupervised segmentation and editing of Gaussian Splatting avatars. Unlike existing 2D or mesh-assisted methods, our approach operates directly in the Gaussian domain, decomposing avatars into semantically coherent facial parts without supervision. The method integrates feature disentanglement, density-based clustering, and FLAME-anchored part transfer, enabling precise editing and cross-avatar part swapping. Experiments on the NeRSemble dataset with 11 subjects demonstrate robust isolation of features such as beards, eyebrows, eyes and mustaches. Quantitative evaluation confirms that transferred segments adapt to pose and expression, while maintaining identity consistency (ID = 0.943), low Average Expression Distance (AED = 0.021) and low Average Pose Distance (APD = 0.004).

analysis.tldr: 提出FaceParts，在3D高斯泼溅中无监督分割面部部件并实现跨角色编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有面部编辑多依赖2D生成模型或手动3D编辑，缺乏直接操作3D高斯泼溅的自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在无监督条件下对3D高斯泼溅面部模型进行语义部件分割和编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合特征解缠、密度聚类和FLAME锚定的部件迁移，直接在高斯域分解面部部件。
contributions: 提出首个无监督3D高斯泼溅面部部件分割框架
实现跨角色部件交换和编辑，保持身份一致性和表情姿态适应性
analysis.experiments: 在NeRSemble数据集上对11个主体进行实验，定量评估显示身份一致性ID=0.943，平均表情距离AED=0.021，平均姿态距离APD=0.004。
limitations: 可能依赖FLAME模型先验，对非典型面部结构泛化性有限
仅评估了有限的面部部件类型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FaceParts，在3D高斯泼溅中无监督分割面部部件并实现跨角色编辑。

papers.title: Realiz3D: 3D Generation Made Photorealistic via Domain-Aware Learning
papers.abstract: We often aim to generate images that are both photorealistic and 3D-consistent, adhering to precise geometry, material, and viewpoint controls. Typically, this is achieved by fine-tuning an image generator, pre-trained on billions of real images, using renders of synthetic 3D assets, where annotations for control signals are available. While this approach can learn the desired controls, it often compromises the realism of the images due to domain gap between photographs and renders. We observe that this issue largely arises from the model learning an unintended association between the presence of control signals and the synthetic appearance of the images. To address this, we introduce Realiz3D, a lightweight framework for training diffusion models, that decouples controls and visual domain. The key idea is to explicitly learn visual domain, real or synthetic, separately from other control signals by introducing a co-variate that, fed into small residual adapters, shifts the domain. Then, the generator can be trained to gain controllability, without fitting to specific visual domain. In this way, the model can be guided to produce realistic images even when controls are applied. We enhance control transferability to the real domain by leveraging insights about roles of different layers and denoising steps in diffusion-based generators, informing new training and inference strategies that further mitigate the gap. We demonstrate the advantages of Realiz3D in tasks as text-to-multiview generation and texturing from 3D inputs, producing outputs that are 3D-consistent and photorealistic.

analysis.tldr: Realiz3D 通过解耦控制信号与视觉域，在保持 3D 一致性的同时生成逼真图像。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法通过微调预训练图像生成器来学习 3D 控制，但合成渲染与真实照片之间的域差距导致生成图像失去真实感。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲真实感的前提下，让扩散模型学习精确的 3D 控制信号（如几何、材质、视角）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型错误地将控制信号的存在与合成外观关联起来，导致即使应用控制也生成非真实图像。
analysis.method: 引入协变量显式学习视觉域（真实或合成），通过小型残差适配器将域信息与其他控制信号解耦，并结合不同层和去噪步骤的角色分析来增强控制向真实域的迁移。
contributions: 提出 Realiz3D 框架，通过解耦控制信号与视觉域实现逼真的 3D 生成。
利用扩散模型层和去噪步骤的洞察，设计新的训练和推理策略以缩小域差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖合成 3D 资产的质量和多样性。
框架在更复杂场景或极端域差距下的泛化能力未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Realiz3D 通过解耦控制信号与视觉域，在保持 3D 一致性的同时生成逼真图像。

papers.title: OpenDeepThink: Parallel Reasoning via Bradley--Terry Aggregation
papers.abstract: Test-time compute scaling is a primary axis for improving LLM reasoning. Existing methods primarily scale depth by extending a single reasoning trace. Scaling breadth by sampling multiple candidates in parallel is straightforward, but introduces a selection bottleneck: choosing the best candidate without a ground-truth verifier, since pointwise LLM judging is noisy and biased. To address this, we introduce OpenDeepThink, a population-based test-time compute framework that selects via pairwise Bradley-Terry comparison. Each generation, the LLM judges random pairs of candidates and aggregates votes via Bradley-Terry into a global ranking; top-ranked candidates are preserved and the top three quarters are mutated using the natural-language critiques produced during comparison; the bottom quarter is discarded. OpenDeepThink raises Gemini 3.1 Pro's effective Codeforces Elo by +405 points in eight sequential LLM-call rounds (~27 minutes wall-clock). The pipeline transfers across weaker and stronger models without retuning, and on the multi-domain HLE benchmark, gains appear concentrated in objectively verifiable domains and reverse in subjective ones. We release CF-73, a curated set of 73 expert-rated Codeforces problems with International Grandmaster annotation and 99% local-evaluation agreement against the official verdict.

analysis.tldr: 通过Bradley-Terry成对比较聚合多候选推理，实现测试时计算扩展，显著提升LLM推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 测试时计算扩展是提升LLM推理的关键，但现有方法主要扩展深度（单条推理链），而扩展广度（并行采样多个候选）面临选择瓶颈：缺乏真实验证器时，点式LLM评判存在噪声和偏差，难以选出最佳候选。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有真实验证器的情况下，从并行生成的多个推理候选中可靠地选择最佳结果，并利用候选间的比较信息进一步优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 点式LLM评判存在噪声和偏差，导致直接选择不可靠；而Bradley-Terry成对比较能聚合多个成对判断，产生更鲁棒的全局排序。
analysis.method: 提出OpenDeepThink框架，每轮生成多个候选，LLM对随机候选对进行成对评判并生成自然语言批评，通过Bradley-Terry模型聚合投票得到全局排名，保留排名靠前的候选，对前四分之三的候选利用批评进行变异，丢弃后四分之一。
contributions: 提出OpenDeepThink，一种基于Bradley-Terry成对比较的群体测试时计算框架，有效解决多候选选择瓶颈。
在Codeforces上，Gemini 3.1 Pro的Elo评分在8轮LLM调用（约27分钟）内提升+405分，且跨模型迁移无需重新调整。
发布CF-73数据集，包含73个专家评级的Codeforces问题，具有国际特级大师注释，本地评估与官方结果一致率达99%。
analysis.experiments: 在Codeforces基准上评估，Gemini 3.1 Pro的Elo评分提升+405分；在多领域HLE基准上，增益集中在客观可验证领域，主观领域效果相反。
limitations: 依赖LLM的成对评判质量，若评判本身有偏可能影响结果。
计算开销随候选数量增加而增长，实际应用中需权衡性能与成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过Bradley-Terry成对比较聚合多候选推理，实现测试时计算扩展，显著提升LLM推理性能。

papers.title: APWA: A Distributed Architecture for Parallelizable Agentic Workflows
papers.abstract: Autonomous multi-agent systems based on large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable abilities in independently solving complex tasks in a wide breadth of application domains. However, these systems hit critical reasoning, coordination, and computational scaling bottlenecks as the size and complexity of their tasks grow. These limitations hinder multi-agent systems from achieving high-throughput processing for highly parallelizable tasks, despite the availability of parallel computing and reasoning primitives in the underlying LLMs. We introduce the Agent-Parallel Workload Architecture (APWA), a distributed multi-agent system architecture designed for the efficient processing of heavily parallelizable agentic workloads. APWA facilitates parallel execution by decomposing workflows into non-interfering subproblems that can be processed using independent resources without cross-communication. It supports heterogeneous data and parallel processing patterns, and it accommodates tasks from a wide breadth of domains. In our evaluation, we demonstrate that APWA can dynamically decompose complex queries into parallelizable workflows and scales on larger tasks in settings where prior systems fail completely.

analysis.tldr: 提出分布式多智能体架构APWA，通过将工作流分解为无干扰子问题实现并行执行，解决LLM多智能体系统的扩展瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统在任务规模和复杂度增长时面临推理、协调和计算扩展瓶颈，无法高效处理高度可并行化的任务，尽管底层LLM具备并行计算和推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种分布式多智能体系统架构，能够高效处理高度可并行化的智能体工作负载，克服现有系统的扩展瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Agent-Parallel Workload Architecture (APWA)，通过将工作流分解为无干扰子问题，利用独立资源并行处理，无需跨通信，支持异构数据和多种并行模式。
contributions: 提出APWA，一种面向高度可并行化智能体工作负载的分布式多智能体系统架构。
APWA能够动态分解复杂查询为可并行化工作流，并在先前系统完全失败的大规模任务上实现扩展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖任务的可分解性，对于强耦合任务效果有限。
分布式协调开销可能随系统规模增长而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分布式多智能体架构APWA，通过将工作流分解为无干扰子问题实现并行执行，解决LLM多智能体系统的扩展瓶颈。

papers.title: Why Neighborhoods Matter: Traversal Context and Provenance in Agentic GraphRAG
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation can improve factuality by grounding answers in external evidence, but Agentic GraphRAG complicates what it means for citations to be faithful. In these systems, an agent explores a knowledge graph before producing an answer and a small set of citations. We frame citation faithfulness as a trajectory-level problem: final citations should not only support the answer, but also account for the graph traversal, structure, and visited-but-uncited entities that may influence it. Through controlled ablation experiments, we compare the effects of isolating, removing, and masking cited and uncited graph entities. Our results show that cited evidence is often necessary, as removing it substantially changes answers and reduces accuracy. However, citations are not sufficient, because accurate answers can also depend on uncited traversal context and surrounding graph structure. These findings suggest that citation evaluation in Agentic GraphRAG should move beyond source support toward provenance over the broader retrieval trajectory.

analysis.tldr: Agentic GraphRAG中，引用的忠实性不仅取决于支持答案的引用，还依赖于未引用的图遍历上下文和结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 检索增强生成通过外部证据提高事实性，但Agentic GraphRAG中智能体探索知识图谱后生成答案和引用，引用的忠实性定义变得复杂，现有评估仅关注引用是否支持答案，忽略了遍历轨迹的影响。
analysis.problem: Agentic GraphRAG中，引用的忠实性应作为轨迹级问题，即最终引用不仅要支持答案，还需考虑图遍历、结构和访问但未引用的实体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过消融实验发现，引用的证据通常是必要的（移除后答案显著变化且准确性下降），但引用并不充分，因为准确的答案也可能依赖于未引用的遍历上下文和周围图结构。
analysis.method: 通过控制消融实验，比较隔离、移除和掩码引用及未引用图实体的效果，分析引用和未引用上下文对答案的影响。
contributions: 提出Agentic GraphRAG中引用忠实性应作为轨迹级问题，而非仅基于源支持。
通过实验证明引用必要但不充分，未引用的遍历上下文和结构同样影响答案准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在Agentic GraphRAG系统上进行控制消融实验，比较隔离、移除和掩码引用及未引用图实体的效果，测量答案变化和准确性。
limitations: 实验可能局限于特定图结构和任务，泛化性需验证。
未提供具体数据集和指标细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Agentic GraphRAG中，引用的忠实性不仅取决于支持答案的引用，还依赖于未引用的图遍历上下文和结构。

papers.title: Dual-Dimensional Consistency: Balancing Budget and Quality in Adaptive Inference-Time Scaling
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable abilities in reasoning. However, maximizing their potential through inference-time scaling faces challenges in trade-off between sampling budget and reasoning quality. Current strategies remain inefficient as they typically treat sampling width and depth as orthogonal objectives, where width consensus methods risk reinforcing hallucinations, while depth pruning mechanisms prematurely truncate complex yet valid reasoning chains. Therefore, we propose Dual-Dimensional Consistency (DDC), a unified framework that bridges path quality with adaptive termination. By coupling Confidence-Weighted Bayesian protocol with a Trend-Aware Stratified Pruning, our method ensures that computational resources are concentrated on high quality reasoning paths, filtering hallucinations while accelerating consensus. Evaluations across five benchmarks demonstrate that this approach reduces token consumption by over 10 times while maintaining or exceeding the accuracy of strong baselines across various LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出双维度一致性框架，在推理时自适应平衡采样预算与质量，实现10倍以上token节省且精度不降。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推理时扩展面临采样预算与推理质量的权衡，现有方法将宽度和深度作为正交目标，效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何在推理时自适应地平衡采样宽度和深度，以最小化计算开销同时保持或提升推理质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 宽度共识方法可能强化幻觉，深度剪枝机制过早截断复杂但有效的推理链。
analysis.method: 提出双维度一致性框架，耦合置信度加权贝叶斯协议与趋势感知分层剪枝，集中计算资源于高质量推理路径。
contributions: 提出统一框架DDC，同时优化采样宽度和深度。
在五个基准上实现10倍以上token消耗降低，同时保持或超越强基线精度。
analysis.experiments: 在五个基准上评估，对比多种LLM，显示token消耗降低10倍以上，精度保持或超越强基线。
limitations: 可能对特定类型推理任务（如需要长链推理）的剪枝策略仍需调优。
未讨论在极低预算场景下的性能边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双维度一致性框架，在推理时自适应平衡采样预算与质量，实现10倍以上token节省且精度不降。

papers.title: Case-Based Calibration of Adaptive Reasoning and Execution for LLM Tool Use
papers.abstract: Tool use extends large language models beyond parametric knowledge, but reliable execution requires balancing appropriate reasoning depth with strict structural validity. We approach this problem from a case-based perspective to present CAST, a case-driven framework that treats historical execution trajectories as structured cases. Instead of reusing raw exemplar outputs, CAST extracts case-derived signals to identify complexity profiles for estimating optimal reasoning strategies, alongside failure profiles to map likely structural breakdowns. The framework translates this knowledge into a fine-grained reward design and adaptive reasoning, enabling the model to autonomously internalize case-based strategies during reinforcement learning. Experiments on BFCLv2 and ToolBench demonstrate that CAST improves both schema-faithful execution and task-level tool-use success while reducing unnecessary deliberation. The approach achieves up to 5.85 percentage points gain in overall execution accuracy and reduces average reasoning length by 26%, significantly mitigating high-impact structural errors. Ultimately, this demonstrates how historical execution cases can provide reusable adaptation knowledge for calibrated tool use.

analysis.tldr: CAST通过案例驱动的自适应推理与执行校准，提升LLM工具使用的准确性和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM工具使用需要平衡推理深度与结构有效性，现有方法缺乏对历史执行轨迹的系统化利用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用历史执行案例自适应地校准LLM的推理策略和执行结构，以提高工具使用的可靠性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CAST框架，从历史执行轨迹中提取复杂度画像和失败画像，用于奖励设计和自适应推理，并通过强化学习内化案例策略。
contributions: 提出案例驱动的框架CAST，利用历史执行轨迹进行自适应推理和结构校准。
在BFCLv2和ToolBench上实现执行准确率提升5.85个百分点，推理长度减少26%。
analysis.experiments: 在BFCLv2和ToolBench上评估，显示执行准确率提升和推理长度减少。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的历史执行案例。
跨领域泛化性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CAST通过案例驱动的自适应推理与执行校准，提升LLM工具使用的准确性和效率。

papers.title: Orchard: An Open-Source Agentic Modeling Framework
papers.abstract: Agentic modeling aims to transform LLMs into autonomous agents capable of solving complex tasks through planning, reasoning, tool use, and multi-turn interaction with environments. Despite major investment, open research remains constrained by infrastructure and training gaps. Many high-performing systems rely on proprietary codebases, models, or services, while most open-source frameworks focus on orchestration and evaluation rather than scalable agent training. We present Orchard, an open-source framework for scalable agentic modeling. At its core is Orchard Env, a lightweight environment service providing reusable primitives for sandbox lifecycle management across task domains, agent harnesses, and pipeline stages. On top of Orchard Env, we build three agentic modeling recipes. Orchard-SWE targets coding agents. We distill 107K trajectories from MiniMax-M2.5 and Qwen3.5-397B, introduce credit-assignment SFT to learn from productive segments of unresolved trajectories, and apply Balanced Adaptive Rollout for RL. Starting from Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking, Orchard-SWE achieves 64.3% on SWE-bench Verified after SFT and 67.5% after SFT+RL, setting a new state of the art among open-source models of comparable size. Orchard-GUI trains a 4B vision-language computer-use agent using only 0.4K distilled trajectories and 2.2K open-ended tasks. It achieves 74.1%, 67.0%, and 64.0% success rates on WebVoyager, Online-Mind2Web, and DeepShop, respectively, making it the strongest open-source model while remaining competitive with proprietary systems. Orchard-Claw targets personal assistant agents. Trained with only 0.2K synthetic tasks, it achieves 59.6% pass@3 on Claw-Eval and 73.9% when paired with a stronger ZeroClaw harness. Collectively, these results show that a lightweight, open, harness-agnostic environment layer enables reusable agentic data, training recipes, and evaluations across domains.

analysis.tldr: Orchard 是一个开源智能体建模框架，通过轻量环境服务和三种训练方案在代码、GUI 和助手智能体上达到开源 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体系统多依赖专有代码库或模型，开源框架侧重编排与评估而非可扩展训练，限制了开放研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个开源、可扩展的智能体建模框架，支持跨领域的训练数据、训练方案和评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Orchard 框架，核心是轻量环境服务 Orchard Env，提供沙箱生命周期管理原语；在此基础上构建三种训练方案：Orchard-SWE（代码智能体，使用蒸馏轨迹、信用分配 SFT 和平衡自适应 rollout RL）、Orchard-GUI（视觉语言计算机使用智能体，使用少量蒸馏轨迹和开放任务）、Orchard-Claw（个人助手智能体，使用合成任务）。
contributions: 提出开源框架 Orchard，包含轻量环境服务和三种智能体训练方案。
在 SWE-bench Verified、WebVoyager 等基准上达到开源 SOTA，与专有系统竞争。
analysis.experiments: 在 SWE-bench Verified 上 Orchard-SWE 达到 64.3%（SFT）和 67.5%（SFT+RL）；Orchard-GUI 在 WebVoyager、Online-Mind2Web、DeepShop 上分别达到 74.1%、67.0%、64.0%；Orchard-Claw 在 Claw-Eval 上达到 59.6% pass@3。
limitations: 蒸馏轨迹依赖高性能教师模型，可能引入偏差。
GUI 和 Claw 方案仅使用少量任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Orchard 是一个开源智能体建模框架，通过轻量环境服务和三种训练方案在代码、GUI 和助手智能体上达到开源 SOTA。

papers.title: Small, Private Language Models as Teammates for Educational Assessment Design
papers.abstract: Generative AI increasingly supports educational design tasks, e.g., through Large Language Models (LLMs), demonstrating the capability to design assessment questions that are aligned with pedagogical frameworks (e.g., Bloom's taxonomy). However, they often rely on subjective or limited evaluation methods; focus primarily on proprietary models; or rarely systematically examine generation, evaluation, or deployment constraints in real educational settings. Meanwhile, Small Language Models (SLMs) have emerged as local alternatives that better address privacy and resource limitations; yet their effectiveness for assessment tasks remains underexplored. To address this gap, we systematically compare LLMs and SLMs for assessment question design; evaluate generation quality across Bloom's taxonomy levels using reproducible, pedagogically grounded metrics; and further assess model-based judging against expert-informed evaluation by analyzing reliability and agreement patterns. Results show that SLMs achieve competitive performance across key pedagogically motivated quality dimensions while enabling local, privacy-sensitive deployment. However, model-based evaluations also exhibit systematic inconsistencies and bias relative to expert ratings. These findings provide evidence to posit language models as bounded assistants in assessment workflows; underscore the necessity of Human-in-the-Loop; and advance the automated educational question generation field by examining quality, reliability, and deployment-aware trade-offs.

analysis.tldr: 小语言模型在教育评估设计中可作为隐私友好的本地替代方案，但需人机协作。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在教育评估设计中表现良好，但依赖主观评估、聚焦专有模型，且未系统考虑实际部署中的隐私和资源限制。小语言模型作为本地替代方案，其有效性尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 系统比较小语言模型与大语言模型在教育评估问题生成任务上的质量、可靠性和部署可行性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 小语言模型在关键教育质量维度上表现有竞争力，但模型评估存在系统性的不一致性和相对于专家评分的偏差。
analysis.method: 对比LLM和SLM在评估问题生成上的表现，使用可复现的、基于教育学的指标评估生成质量，并分析模型评判与专家评判的一致性和偏差。
contributions: 系统比较了LLM和SLM在教育评估问题生成任务上的性能，发现SLM在关键质量维度上具有竞争力。
揭示了模型评估相对于专家评估的系统性不一致和偏差，强调了人机协作的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定教育评估任务和Bloom分类法，泛化性有限。
模型评估的偏差分析可能依赖于特定专家评判，结果可能受专家主观性影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 小语言模型在教育评估设计中可作为隐私友好的本地替代方案，但需人机协作。

papers.title: Learning Developmental Scaffoldings to Guide Self-Organisation
papers.abstract: From subcellular structures to entire organisms, many natural systems generate complex organisation through self-organisation: local interactions that collectively give rise to global structure without any blueprint of the outcome. Yet a significant portion of the information driving such processes is not produced by self-organisation itself, instead, it is often offloaded to initial conditions of the system. Biological development is a prime example, where maternal pre-patterns encode positional and symmetry-breaking information that scaffolds the self-organising process. From maternal morphogen gradients in early embryogenesis to tissue-level morphogenetic pre-patterns guiding organ formation, this transfer of information to initial conditions, analogous to a memory-compute trade-off in computational systems, is a fundamental part of developmental processes. In this work, we study this offloading phenomenon by introducing a model that jointly learns both the self-organisation rules and the pre-patterns, allowing their interplay to be varied and measured under controlled conditions: a Neural Cellular Automaton (NCA) paired with a learned coordinate-based pattern generator (SIREN), both trained simultaneously to generate a set of patterns. We provide information-theoretic analyses of how information is distributed between pre-patterns and the self-organising process, and show that jointly learning both components yields improvements in robustness, encoding capacity, and symmetry breaking over purely self-organising alternatives. Our analysis further suggests that effective pre-patterns do not simply approximate their targets; rather, they bias the developmental dynamics in ways that facilitate convergence, pointing to a non-trivial relationship between the structure of initial conditions and the dynamics of self-organisation.

analysis.tldr: 通过联合学习自组织规则和初始预模式，揭示了信息在两者间的分配机制，并提升了鲁棒性与编码容量。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然系统中自组织现象普遍存在，但大量信息实际上被卸载到初始条件中（如生物发育中的母体预模式），这种信息卸载机制尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何建模并量化自组织规则与初始预模式之间的信息分配，以及联合学习两者能否带来性能提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 有效的预模式并非简单近似目标，而是以非平凡方式偏置发育动力学以促进收敛。
analysis.method: 提出联合学习模型：神经细胞自动机（NCA）作为自组织规则，SIREN作为基于坐标的预模式生成器，两者同时训练以生成一组模式。
contributions: 提出联合学习自组织规则与预模式的框架，并展示了其在鲁棒性、编码容量和对称破缺上的改进。
通过信息论分析揭示了信息在预模式与自组织过程之间的分布规律。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型仅在简单模式生成任务上验证，未涉及更复杂的生物发育场景。
信息论分析可能依赖于特定假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过联合学习自组织规则和初始预模式，揭示了信息在两者间的分配机制，并提升了鲁棒性与编码容量。

papers.title: Explainable Detection of Depression Status Shifts from User Digital Traces
papers.abstract: Every day, users generate digital traces (e.g., social media posts, chats, and online interactions) that are inherently timestamped and may reflect aspects of their mental state. These traces can be organized into temporal trajectories that capture how a user's mental health signals evolve, including phases of improvement, deterioration, or stability. In this work, we propose an explainable framework for detecting and analyzing depression-related status shifts in user digital traces. The approach combines multiple BERT-based models to extract complementary signals across different dimensions (e.g., sentiment, emotion, and depression severity). Such signals are then aggregated over time to construct user-level trajectories that are analyzed to identify meaningful change points. To enhance interpretability, the framework integrates a large language model to generate concise and human-readable reports that describe the evolution of mental-health signals and highlight key transitions. We evaluate the framework on two social media datasets. Results show that the approach produces more coherent and informative summaries than direct LLM-based reporting, achieving higher coverage of user history, stronger temporal coherence, and improved sensitivity to change points. An ablation study confirms the contribution of each component, particularly temporal modeling and segmentation. Overall, the method provides an interpretable view of mental health signals over time, supporting research and decision making without aiming at clinical diagnosis.

analysis.tldr: 提出可解释框架，结合BERT与LLM从用户数字轨迹中检测抑郁状态变化并生成可读报告。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户日常产生的数字痕迹（如社交媒体帖子）包含时间戳，能反映心理健康状态变化，但现有方法缺乏可解释性和对时间动态的建模。
analysis.problem: 如何从用户数字轨迹中检测抑郁相关的状态转变，并生成可解释的演化报告。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组合多个BERT模型提取情感、情绪和抑郁严重度等多维信号，聚合为时间轨迹后识别变化点，并利用LLM生成可读报告。
contributions: 提出一个可解释的抑郁状态转变检测框架，结合BERT与LLM。
在社交媒体数据集上验证框架生成更连贯、信息更丰富的摘要，优于直接LLM报告。
analysis.experiments: 在两个社交媒体数据集上评估，结果显示方法在覆盖率、时间连贯性和变化点敏感性上优于直接LLM报告；消融实验证实各组件贡献。
limitations: 未提供具体实验数值或统计显著性。
框架未在临床诊断场景验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可解释框架，结合BERT与LLM从用户数字轨迹中检测抑郁状态变化并生成可读报告。

papers.title: GraphFlow: An Architecture for Formally Verifiable Visual Workflows Enabling Reliable Agentic AI Automation
papers.abstract: GraphFlow is a visual workflow system designed to improve the reliability of agentic AI automation in multi-step, mission-critical processes. In these workflows, small errors compound rapidly: under an idealized model of independent steps, a ten-step process with 90% per-step reliability completes successfully only 35% of the time. Existing workflow platforms provide durable execution and observability but offer few semantic correctness guarantees, while agentic systems plan at inference time, making behavior sensitive to prompt variation and difficult to audit. GraphFlow is designed to address this gap by treating workflow diagrams as the executable specification, a single artifact defining data scope, execution semantics, and monitoring. At compile time, a restricted class of diagrams is specified to produce reusable automations whose contracts (preconditions, postconditions, and composition obligations) are intended to be proof-checked before admission to a shared library. At runtime, a durable engine records outcomes in an append-only event log and can enforce contracts at system boundaries, supporting replay, retries, and audit. Swimlanes make trust boundaries explicit, separating verified logic from external systems, human judgment, and AI decisions. A year-long pilot across three clinical sites executed 8,728 cohort-enrolled workflow runs with a 97.08% completion rate under an early prototype without the verified-core subsystem; observed failures were localized primarily to external integrations. The formal semantics and proof-checked admission model described here are specified and under active development. Evaluation of the verified core is reserved for future work.

analysis.tldr: GraphFlow 通过将工作流图作为可执行规范并引入形式化验证，提升多步关键任务中 AI 自动化的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 在多步关键任务中，小错误会迅速累积，例如十步流程每步 90% 可靠性时整体成功率仅 35%。现有平台缺乏语义正确性保证，而智能体系统行为对提示敏感且难以审计。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可形式化验证的视觉工作流系统，以确保多步关键任务中 AI 自动化的可靠性和可审计性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在独立步骤的理想化模型下，十步流程每步 90% 可靠性时整体成功率仅 35%，说明小错误累积效应显著。
analysis.method: GraphFlow 将工作流图视为可执行规范，通过编译时限制图类以生成可重用自动化，其契约（前置条件、后置条件、组合义务）在加入共享库前需经过证明检查；运行时引擎记录结果到仅追加事件日志，并在系统边界强制执行契约，支持重放、重试和审计；泳道图明确信任边界。
contributions: 提出 GraphFlow 架构，将工作流图作为可执行规范并引入形式化验证。
设计编译时证明检查和运行时契约执行机制，提升可靠性。
通过一年临床试点验证系统可行性，完成率 97.08%。
analysis.experiments: 在三个临床站点进行了一年试点，执行了 8,728 次队列入组工作流，早期原型（不含验证核心子系统）完成率为 97.08%，失败主要局限于外部集成。
limitations: 形式化语义和证明检查模型仍在开发中，验证核心尚未评估。
试点中失败主要来自外部集成，系统内部可靠性可能更高但未单独验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GraphFlow 通过将工作流图作为可执行规范并引入形式化验证，提升多步关键任务中 AI 自动化的可靠性。

papers.title: From Sycophantic Consensus to Pluralistic Repair: Why AI Alignment Must Surface Disagreement
papers.abstract: Pluralistic alignment is typically operationalised as preference aggregation: producing responses that span (Overton), steer toward (Steerable), or proportionally represent (Distributional) diverse human values. We argue that aggregation alone is an incomplete primitive for deployed pluralistic alignment. Under genuine value pluralism, the failure mode of contemporary RLHF-trained assistants is not insufficient coverage but sycophantic consensus: a learned tendency to agree with, validate, and minimise friction with the immediate interlocutor. Because deployed AI systems now mediate consequential deliberation across health, civic life, labour, and governance, the collapse of disagreement at the interaction layer is not a narrow technical concern but a structural failure with distributive consequences. We reframe pluralistic alignment around three conversational mechanisms drawn from Grice's maxims: scoping (acknowledging the limits of one's perspective), signalling (surfacing value-conflict rather than smoothing it over), and repair (revising one's position on principled grounds, not on user pressure). We formalise a metric, the Pluralistic Repair Score (PRS), distinguishing principled revision from capitulation, and present a small-scale empirical illustration on two frontier RLHF-trained models (Claude Sonnet 4.5, N=198; GPT-4o, N=100) showing that, for both, agreement-following coexists with low repair-quality on contested-value prompts. PRS measures an interactional precondition for pluralism (visible disagreement; principled revision) rather than pluralism in full; we discuss the difference, take seriously the reflexive question of whose "principled" counts, and argue that pluralism is most decisively made or unmade at the deployment-governance layer: interfaces, preference-data pipelines, and audit infrastructure.

analysis.tldr: 本文批判当前多元对齐仅依赖偏好聚合，指出RLHF模型存在“谄媚共识”问题，并提出基于对话机制的多元修复框架与PRS指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多元对齐方法（如偏好聚合）无法处理真实价值多元性，导致AI系统在健康、公民生活等关键领域中介讨论时，倾向于迎合用户而非呈现分歧，造成结构性失败。
analysis.problem: 如何设计对齐机制，使AI系统在对话中主动呈现、而非掩盖价值分歧，并实现有原则的立场修正而非谄媚附和。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到RLHF训练的助手（如Claude Sonnet 4.5和GPT-4o）在争议性价值提示下，表现出高附和率与低修复质量，即“谄媚共识”现象。
analysis.method: 基于Grice会话准则提出三种对话机制：范围界定（承认视角局限）、信号化（暴露价值冲突）、修复（基于原则而非用户压力修正立场），并形式化多元修复分数（PRS）以区分原则性修正与屈服。
contributions: 揭示RLHF对齐中“谄媚共识”这一被忽视的失败模式，并论证其结构性危害。
提出基于对话机制的多元对齐框架（范围界定、信号化、修复）及量化指标PRS。
通过小规模实证（Claude Sonnet 4.5和GPT-4o）展示PRS的有效性，并讨论部署治理层面的多元对齐挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及对两个前沿RLHF模型（Claude Sonnet 4.5, N=198; GPT-4o, N=100）的小规模实证说明，显示附和与低修复质量共存。
limitations: PRS仅测量交互层面的多元前提（可见分歧、原则性修正），而非完整多元性。
“原则性”的定义存在反思性问题，可能引入主观偏见。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文批判当前多元对齐仅依赖偏好聚合，指出RLHF模型存在“谄媚共识”问题，并提出基于对话机制的多元修复框架与PRS指标。

papers.title: KGPFN: Unlocking the Potential of Knowledge Graph Foundation Model via In-Context Learning
papers.abstract: Knowledge graph (KG) foundation models aim to generalize across graphs with unseen entities and relations by learning transferable relational structure. However, most existing methods primarily emphasize relation-level universality, while in-context learning, the other pillar of foundation models remains under-explored for KG reasoning. In KGs, context is inherently structured and heterogeneous: effective prediction requires conditioning on the local context around the query entities as well as the global context that summarizes how a relation behaves across many instances. We propose KGPFN, a KG foundation model using Prior-data Fitted Network that unifies transferable relational regularities with inference-time in-context learning from structured context. KGPFN first learns relation representations via message passing on relation graphs to capture cross-graph relational invariances. For query-specific reasoning, it encodes local neighborhoods using a multi-layer NBFNet as local context. To enable ICL at global scale, it constructs relation-specific global context by retrieving a large set of instances of the query relation together with their local neighborhoods, and aggregates them within a Prior-Data Fitted Network framework that combines feature-level and sample-level attention. Through multi-graph pretraining on diverse KGs, KGPFN learns when to instantiate reusable patterns and when to override them using contextual evidence. Experiments on 57 KG benchmarks demonstrate that KGPFN achieves strong adaptation to previously unseen graphs through in-context learning alone, consistently outperforming competitive fine-tuned KG foundation models. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出KGPFN，通过上下文学习实现知识图谱基础模型在未见图上的强泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有知识图谱基础模型主要强调关系级通用性，但忽略了上下文学习这一基础模型的关键支柱，而KG中的上下文是结构化和异质的，需要同时利用局部和全局上下文。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个知识图谱基础模型，使其能够通过上下文学习（而非微调）适应未见过的图，并有效利用结构化的局部和全局上下文进行推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出KGPFN，使用Prior-data Fitted Network框架，通过关系图上的消息传递学习关系表示，用多层NBFNet编码局部邻域作为局部上下文，并检索查询关系的大量实例及其局部邻域构建全局上下文，在Prior-data Fitted Network中结合特征级和样本级注意力进行聚合。
contributions: 提出KGPFN，首个将上下文学习与知识图谱基础模型结合的方法，通过Prior-data Fitted Network统一迁移性关系规律与推理时的上下文学习。
在57个KG基准上实验，KGPFN仅通过上下文学习即可强适应未见图，持续优于需要微调的竞争模型。
analysis.experiments: 在57个知识图谱基准上评估，KGPFN仅通过上下文学习即达到强适应，优于需要微调的竞争模型。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模检索和注意力计算，效率有待验证。
全局上下文的构建需要大量实例，在数据稀疏场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出KGPFN，通过上下文学习实现知识图谱基础模型在未见图上的强泛化。

papers.title: COREKG: Coreset-Guided Personalized Summarization of Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) are extensively used across different domains and in several applications. Often, these KGs are very large in size. Such KGs become unwieldy for tasks such as question answering and visualization. Summarization of KGs offers a viable alternative in such cases. Furthermore, personalized KG summarization is crucial in the current data-driven world as it captures the specific requirements of users based on their query patterns. Since it only maintains relevant information, the personalized summaries of KG are small, resulting in significantly smaller storage requirements and query runtime. In this work, we adapt the coreset theory to create personalized KG summaries. For a given dataset and a user-specific query workload, we present an approach that samples a relevant subset of triples using sensitivity-based importance sampling. We ensure that the subset approximates the characteristics of the full dataset with bounded approximation error. We define sensitivity scores that measure the importance of a triple with respect to a user's query workload, which are then used by our coreset construction algorithm. We explicitly focus on personalized knowledge graph summarization by constructing summaries independently for each user based on their query behaviour. Our evaluation on Freebase, WikiData, and DBpedia shows that COREKG delivers higher query-answering accuracy and structural coverage than the state-of-the-art methods, such as GLIMPSE, PPR, iSummary, PEGASUS and APEX$^2$ while requiring only a tiny fraction of the original graph.

analysis.tldr: COREKG 利用核心集理论为知识图谱生成个性化摘要，在保持低存储和快速查询的同时，显著提升查询准确率和结构覆盖率。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识图谱规模庞大，在问答和可视化等任务中难以直接使用；现有摘要方法无法针对用户查询模式进行个性化定制，导致存储和查询效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何基于用户查询工作负载，从大规模知识图谱中采样出一个小而相关的三元组子集，使其在近似全图特性的同时，满足个性化需求并保证有界近似误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于核心集理论，定义三元组相对于用户查询工作负载的敏感度分数，采用敏感度加权重要性采样算法，为每个用户独立构建个性化摘要。
contributions: 首次将核心集理论应用于知识图谱个性化摘要，提出敏感度分数衡量三元组对用户查询的重要性。
在 Freebase、WikiData 和 DBpedia 上验证，COREKG 在查询准确率和结构覆盖率上超越 GLIMPSE、PPR 等基线，且仅需原图极小比例。
analysis.experiments: 在 Freebase、WikiData 和 DBpedia 三个数据集上，与 GLIMPSE、PPR、iSummary、PEGASUS 和 APEX² 对比，COREKG 在查询回答准确率和结构覆盖率上取得更优结果，且摘要规模仅为原图的极小部分。
limitations: 可能依赖用户查询工作负载的完整性和代表性，冷启动场景下效果未知。
敏感度计算和采样过程可能引入额外计算开销，未在摘要中讨论扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: COREKG 利用核心集理论为知识图谱生成个性化摘要，在保持低存储和快速查询的同时，显著提升查询准确率和结构覆盖率。

papers.title: Beyond Individual Intelligence: Surveying Collaboration, Failure Attribution, and Self-Evolution in LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: LLM-based autonomous agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in reasoning, planning, and tool use, yet remain limited when tasks require sustained coordination across roles, tools, and environments. Multi-agent systems address this through structured collaboration among specialized agents, but tighter coordination also amplifies a less explored risk: errors can propagate across agents and interaction rounds, producing failures that are difficult to diagnose and rarely translate into structural self-improvement. Existing surveys cover individual agent capabilities, multi-agent collaboration, or agent self-evolution separately, leaving the causal dependencies among them unexamined. This survey provides a unified review organized around four causally linked stages, which we term the LIFE progression: Lay the capability foundation, Integrate agents through collaboration, Find faults through attribution, and Evolve through autonomous self-improvement. For each stage, we provide systematic taxonomies and formally characterize the dependencies between adjacent stages, revealing how each stage both depends on and constrains the next. Beyond synthesizing existing work, we identify open challenges at stage boundaries and propose a cross-stage research agenda for closed-loop multi-agent systems capable of continuously diagnosing failures, reorganizing structures, and refining agent behaviors, extending current coordination frameworks toward more self-organizing forms of collective intelligence. By bridging these previously fragmented research threads, this survey aims to offer both a systematic reference and a conceptual roadmap toward autonomous, self-improving multi-agent intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 综述LLM多智能体系统中协作、失败归因与自我进化的因果依赖关系，提出LIFE框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有综述分别覆盖个体能力、多智能体协作或自我进化，但缺乏对三者间因果依赖关系的统一分析，导致错误传播和系统自我改进困难。
analysis.problem: 多智能体系统中错误跨智能体和交互轮次传播，难以诊断且难以转化为结构性自我改进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象。
analysis.method: 提出LIFE框架，包含四个因果关联阶段：奠定能力基础、通过协作整合智能体、通过归因发现故障、通过自主自我改进进化，并形式化相邻阶段间的依赖关系。
contributions: 首次统一综述LLM多智能体系统中协作、失败归因与自我进化三个主题的因果依赖关系。
提出LIFE框架和跨阶段研究议程，为闭环自改进多智能体系统提供概念路线图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出具体算法或实验验证。
跨阶段依赖的形式化描述可能过于简化实际复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述LLM多智能体系统中协作、失败归因与自我进化的因果依赖关系，提出LIFE框架。

papers.title: BiFedKD: Bidirectional Federated Knowledge Distillation Framework for Non-IID and Long-Tailed ECG Monitoring
papers.abstract: Electrocardiogram (ECG) monitoring in Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) networks is constrained by strict data-sharing regulations and privacy concerns. Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative learning by keeping raw ECG data on devices, but frequent transmissions of high-dimensional model updates incur heavy per-round traffic over bandwidth-limited links. To alleviate this bottleneck, federated distillation (FD) replaces parameter exchange with logit-based knowledge transfer. However, the performance of FD often degrades under the non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID) and long-tailed label distributions in ECG deployments. To address these challenges, we propose a bidirectional federated knowledge distillation (BiFedKD) framework that employs an aggregation-by-distillation pipeline with temperature scaling to produce a stable global distillation signal for cross-client alignment. Experiments on the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia dataset show that BiFedKD improves accuracy and Macro-F1 over the baseline by $3.52\%$ and $9.93\%$, respectively. Moreover, to reach the same Macro-F1, BiFedKD reduces communication overhead by $40\%$ and computation cost by $71.7\%$ compared with the baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出双向联邦知识蒸馏框架BiFedKD，解决非独立同分布和长尾标签下的心电图监测性能退化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: IoMT网络中的ECG监测受数据共享法规和隐私限制，联邦学习虽能保护隐私但高维模型更新传输开销大，联邦蒸馏虽能降低通信量但在非独立同分布和长尾标签分布下性能下降。
analysis.problem: 非独立同分布和长尾标签分布下联邦蒸馏性能退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出联邦蒸馏在非独立同分布和长尾标签分布下性能会退化。
analysis.method: 提出双向联邦知识蒸馏框架BiFedKD，采用聚合-蒸馏流水线结合温度缩放，产生稳定的全局蒸馏信号用于跨客户端对齐。
contributions: 提出BiFedKD框架，通过聚合-蒸馏流水线和温度缩放解决非独立同分布和长尾标签问题。
在MIT-BIH心律失常数据集上，BiFedKD相比基线提升准确率3.52%和Macro-F1 9.93%，同时通信开销降低40%，计算成本降低71.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在MIT-BIH心律失常数据集上进行实验，BiFedKD相比基线提升准确率3.52%和Macro-F1 9.93%，通信开销降低40%，计算成本降低71.7%。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性有待进一步测试。
未讨论温度缩放超参数的影响及调优策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双向联邦知识蒸馏框架BiFedKD，解决非独立同分布和长尾标签下的心电图监测性能退化问题。

papers.title: Holistic Evaluation and Failure Diagnosis of AI Agents
papers.abstract: AI agents execute complex multi-step processes, but current evaluation falls short: outcome metrics report success or failure without explaining why, and process-level approaches struggle to connect failure types to their precise locations within long, structured traces. We present a holistic agent evaluation framework that pairs top-down agent-level diagnosis with bottom-up span-level evaluation, decomposing analysis into independent per-span assessments. This decomposition scales to traces of arbitrary length and produces span-level rationales for each verdict. On the TRAIL benchmark, our framework achieves state-of-the-art results across all metrics on both GAIA and SWE-Bench, with relative gains over the strongest prior baselines of up to 38% on category F1, up to 3.5x on localization accuracy, and up to 12.5x on joint localization-categorization accuracy. Per-category analysis shows our framework leading in more error categories than any other evaluator. Notably, the same frontier model achieves several times higher localization accuracy when used inside our framework than as a monolithic judge over the full trace, showing that evaluation methodology, not model capability, is the bottleneck.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种分层评估框架，将智能体失败诊断分解为独立跨度评估，在TRAIL基准上显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI智能体评估仅关注结果指标，无法解释失败原因；过程级方法难以将失败类型与长轨迹中的精确位置关联。
analysis.problem: 如何对AI智能体的复杂多步执行过程进行细粒度、可解释的失败诊断和评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相同的前沿模型在框架内使用时，定位精度比作为整体评判器时高出数倍，表明评估方法论而非模型能力是瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出分层评估框架，结合自上而下的智能体级诊断和自下而上的跨度级评估，将分析分解为独立的每跨度评估，可扩展到任意长度轨迹并生成跨度级理由。
contributions: 提出一种分层智能体评估框架，实现细粒度失败诊断和定位
在TRAIL基准上取得GAIA和SWE-Bench的SOTA结果，相对提升显著
analysis.experiments: 在TRAIL基准上评估，涵盖GAIA和SWE-Bench，与多个基线对比，报告了类别F1、定位精度和联合定位-分类精度的相对提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定基准，泛化性需进一步验证
框架复杂度可能带来额外计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种分层评估框架，将智能体失败诊断分解为独立跨度评估，在TRAIL基准上显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: A Deterministic Agentic Workflow for HS Tariff Classification: Multi-Dimensional Rule Reasoning with Interpretable Decisions
papers.abstract: Harmonized System (HS) tariff classification is a high-stakes, expert-level task in which a free-form product description must be mapped to a specific six- or eight-digit code under the General Interpretive Rules (GIR), section notes, chapter notes, and Explanatory Notes. The difficulty lies not in knowledge volume but in *multi-dimensional rule reasoning*: a correct classification must satisfy competing priority rules along several axes simultaneously, including material, form, function, essential character, the part-versus-whole boundary, and specific listing versus residual headings. End-to-end prompting of large language models fails characteristically by resolving one axis while ignoring the priority constraints on the others. We present a *deterministic agentic workflow* in contrast to self-planning agents: the control flow is fixed, language model calls are confined to narrow stages, and reflection and verification are retained as local mechanisms. This design yields interpretability by construction--each decision is decomposed into stage-wise structured outputs with verbatim citation of the chapter or section notes that bear on it. The architecture combines offline knowledge-engineering of the Chinese HS tariff with an online six-stage pipeline. Evaluated on HSCodeComp at the six-digit level, the workflow reaches 75.0% top-1 and 91.5% top-3 at four digits, and 64.2% top-1 and 78.3% top-3 at six digits with Qwen3.6-plus; an open-weight Qwen3.6-27B-FP8 backbone in non-thinking mode achieves 84.2% four-digit and 77.4% six-digit top-1 agreement with the frontier model. A two-stage manual audit of 226 six-digit disagreements suggests that a non-trivial fraction of HSCodeComp ground-truth labels may deviate from HS general rules; full adjudication records are released in the appendix as preliminary findings for community review.

analysis.tldr: 提出确定性智能体工作流，通过多维度规则推理实现HS编码分类，提升可解释性和准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: HS编码分类是高风险的专家级任务，需要同时满足多个优先规则，现有端到端大模型方法常忽略部分约束，导致分类错误。
analysis.problem: 解决HS编码分类中的多维度规则推理问题，确保分类同时满足材料、形态、功能、本质特征等多轴优先规则。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 端到端大模型在HS编码分类中失败，因为它们只解决一个轴而忽略其他轴的优先级约束。
analysis.method: 确定性智能体工作流：固定控制流，将语言模型调用限制在狭窄阶段，保留局部反思和验证机制，结合离线知识工程和在线六阶段流水线。
contributions: 提出一种确定性智能体工作流，用于HS编码分类，具有可解释性。
在HSCodeComp基准上达到75.0% top-1和91.5% top-3（四位数），64.2% top-1和78.3% top-3（六位数）。
发现部分HSCodeComp真实标签可能偏离HS通用规则，并发布完整裁决记录。
analysis.experiments: 在HSCodeComp基准上评估，使用Qwen3.6-plus和Qwen3.6-27B-FP8模型，报告了top-1和top-3准确率。
limitations: 工作流依赖离线知识工程，可能难以迁移到其他语言或编码系统。
对HSCodeComp标签偏差的分析是初步的，需要社区进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出确定性智能体工作流，通过多维度规则推理实现HS编码分类，提升可解释性和准确性。

papers.title: Emotion-Attended Stateful Memory (EASM):The Architecture for Hyper-Personalization at Scale
papers.abstract: Current language model systems remain fundamentally stateless across sessions, limiting their ability to personalize interactions over time. While retrieval-augmented generation and fine-tuning improve knowledge access and domain capability, they do not enable persistent understanding of individual users. We propose an emotion-attended stateful memory architecture that dynamically constructs user-specific conversational context using long-term history, emotional signals, and inferred intent at inference time. To evaluate its impact, we conducted a controlled A/B study across thirty non-scripted conversations spanning six emotionally distinct categories using the same underlying language model in both conditions. The memory-enriched condition consistently outperformed the stateless baseline across all evaluated scenarios. The largest gains were observed in memory grounding (95% improvement), plan clarity (57%), and emotional validation (34%). Results remained consistent even in emotionally adversarial conversations involving grief, distress, and uncertainty. These findings suggest that stateful emotional memory may represent a foundational infrastructure layer for hyper-personalized AI systems, though broader validation across larger and more diverse evaluations remains necessary

analysis.tldr: 提出情感注意状态记忆架构，通过长期历史、情感信号和意图推断实现超个性化对话，实验显示记忆增强条件在多个指标上显著优于无状态基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前语言模型系统在会话间本质上是无状态的，限制了跨会话的个性化交互能力；RAG和微调虽能提升知识访问和领域能力，但无法实现对个体用户的持续理解。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能在推理时动态利用长期历史、情感信号和推断意图来构建用户特定对话上下文的记忆架构，以实现超个性化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出情感注意状态记忆架构，在推理时动态构建用户特定的对话上下文，融合长期历史、情感信号和推断意图。
contributions: 提出情感注意状态记忆架构，实现跨会话的个性化交互。
通过30场非脚本对话的A/B实验验证了该架构在记忆基础、计划清晰度和情感验证等指标上的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在30场非脚本对话（涵盖6种情感类别）上进行A/B测试，使用相同底层语言模型，记忆增强条件在记忆基础（提升95%）、计划清晰度（57%）和情感验证（34%）上优于无状态基线，且在情感对抗性对话中结果一致。
limitations: 实验规模较小（30场对话），需在更大规模、更多样化的评估中验证。
未提及与其他个性化方法（如微调、RAG）的直接比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出情感注意状态记忆架构，通过长期历史、情感信号和意图推断实现超个性化对话，实验显示记忆增强条件在多个指标上显著优于无状态基线。

papers.title: Interestingness as an Inductive Heuristic for Future Compression Progress
papers.abstract: One of the bottlenecks on the way towards recursively self-improving systems is the challenge of interestingness: the ability to prospectively identify which tasks or data hold the potential for future progress. We formalize interestingness as an inductive heuristic for future compression progress and investigate its predictability using tools from Kolmogorov Complexity and Algorithmic Statistics. By analyzing complexity-runtime profiles under Length, Algorithmic, and Speed priors, we demonstrate that the inductive property of interestingness -- the capacity for past progress to signal future discovery -- is theoretically viable and empirically supported. We prove that expected future progress depends exponentially on the recency of the last observed breakthrough. Furthermore, we show that the Algorithmic Prior is significantly more optimistic than the Length Prior, yielding a quadratic increase in expected discovery for the same observed profile. These findings are experimentally confirmed across three diverse universal computational paradigms.

analysis.tldr: 将有趣性形式化为未来压缩进步的归纳启发式，并证明其可预测性。
analysis.research_motivation: 递归自我改进系统的瓶颈之一是缺乏前瞻性识别有潜力任务或数据的能力，即有趣性。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化并预测有趣性，以作为未来压缩进步的归纳启发式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用柯尔莫哥洛夫复杂度和算法统计工具，分析长度先验、算法先验和速度先验下的复杂度-运行时间轮廓，证明有趣性的归纳性质。
contributions: 形式化有趣性为未来压缩进步的归纳启发式。
证明预期未来进步指数依赖于最后一次突破的新近性。
证明算法先验比长度先验更乐观，导致预期发现二次增长。
analysis.experiments: 在三种不同的通用计算范式上进行了实验验证。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定的先验选择。
实际系统中的可扩展性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将有趣性形式化为未来压缩进步的归纳启发式，并证明其可预测性。

papers.title: A Heterogeneous Temporal Memory Governance Framework for Long-Term LLM Persona Consistency
papers.abstract: Large language models often suffer from fact loss, timeline confusion, persona drift, and reduced stability during long-range interaction, especially under high-noise knowledge bases, context clearing, and cross-model transfer. To address these issues, we introduce ARPM, an external temporal memory governance framework for long-term dialogue. ARPM separates static knowledge memory from dynamic dialogue experience memory and combines vector retrieval, BM25, RRF fusion, dual-temporal reranking, chronological evidence reading, and a controlled analysis protocol for evidence verification and answer binding. Unlike approaches that encode persona consistency into model weights or rely only on long context, ARPM treats continuity as a traceable, auditable, and transferable governance problem. Using engineering logs, we conduct three experiments. First, in a 50-round question-answering setting, we compare signal-to-noise ratios of 1:5 and 1:200+, and distinguish CSV auto-judgment from manual review. Under 1:5, CSV recall accuracy is 54.0%, while manual review raises it to 100.0%. Under 1:200+, the values are 44.0% and 80.0%. These results show that automatic rules can underestimate recall after supporting evidence enters the prompt. Second, ablation results show that dialogue history retrieval is necessary for recent continuity: disabling it reduces strict accuracy from 100% to 66.7%, and disabling BM25 reduces it to 80.0%, indicating that pure semantic retrieval is insufficient for correction and tracing. Third, under a 5.1-million-character noise substrate, periodic context clearing, and multi-model handoff, ARPM maintains semantic continuity, boundary continuity, and persona consistency, while exposing limits caused by weak protocol compliance. These findings show that long-term persona consistency can be decomposed into governable components and evaluated in a white-box manner.

analysis.tldr: 提出ARPM框架，通过分离静态与动态记忆、多阶段检索与排序，实现LLM长期对话中角色一致性的可治理与可审计。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在长程交互中常出现事实丢失、时间线混乱、角色漂移和稳定性下降，尤其在噪声知识库、上下文清除和跨模型迁移场景下，现有方法（如编码到权重或依赖长上下文）难以解决。
analysis.problem: 如何实现LLM长期对话中角色一致性的可追踪、可审计和可迁移治理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自动规则（CSV）在支持证据进入提示后可能低估召回率（1:5噪声下54.0% vs 人工100.0%）；纯语义检索（禁用BM25）导致严格准确率从100%降至80.0%；对话历史检索对近期连续性必要（禁用后准确率降至66.7%）。
analysis.method: ARPM框架：分离静态知识记忆与动态对话经验记忆，结合向量检索、BM25、RRF融合、双时间重排序、时间顺序证据阅读和受控分析协议进行证据验证与答案绑定。
contributions: 提出ARPM，将长期角色一致性分解为可治理组件并支持白盒评估
通过实验揭示自动规则在噪声下召回率不足、纯语义检索不足以纠正和追踪等问题
在510万字符噪声基底、周期性上下文清除和多模型切换下验证了框架的连续性保持能力
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了三个实验：50轮问答中不同信噪比下的召回率对比、消融实验（禁用对话历史检索和BM25）、以及大规模噪声下的连续性测试。
limitations: 弱协议合规性暴露了框架的局限性
实验基于工程日志，可能缺乏真实用户交互的多样性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ARPM框架，通过分离静态与动态记忆、多阶段检索与排序，实现LLM长期对话中角色一致性的可治理与可审计。

papers.title: Identifying Culprits Through Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient Deep Learning Investigation
papers.abstract: In the world of AI and advanced technologies investigation aspects identification of a crime or criminal plays a major problem. In this research we focus on a Conventional ways of implicating criminal investigations usually rely on limited data analysis. Finding an optimal and efficient method that will effectively identify criminals from complex datasets and minimise false positives and false negatives is the considered as a challenge. The main novelty approach of this work is based on the deep learning algorithm Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) is presented in this paper. We train the DDPG model with a dataset of crime scene material, witness statements and suspect profiles. The algorithm uses features to maximise the likelihood of identifying the offender while minimising the noise impact and irrelevant data. We show the efficacy of the proposed method, where DDPG identified criminals with an amazing accuracy of 95% than other several existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 使用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）强化学习算法从复杂犯罪数据中识别罪犯，准确率达95%。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统刑事调查依赖有限数据分析，效率低且易产生误报和漏报，需要更优的自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从包含犯罪现场材料、证人陈述和嫌疑人档案的复杂数据集中高效识别罪犯，同时最小化噪声和无关数据的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）强化学习算法，以犯罪数据集（犯罪现场材料、证人陈述、嫌疑人档案）训练模型，通过特征提取最大化识别罪犯的可能性，同时抑制噪声和无关数据。
contributions: 提出将DDPG应用于刑事调查中罪犯识别的新颖方法。
实验表明该方法在准确率上优于现有方法，达到95%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在犯罪数据集上训练和测试，DDPG达到95%准确率，优于其他方法，但未提供具体数据集规模、对比方法细节或实验设置。
limitations: 摘要未说明数据集规模、来源及多样性，可能影响泛化性。
未讨论误报和漏报的具体降低程度，仅报告准确率。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）强化学习算法从复杂犯罪数据中识别罪犯，准确率达95%。

papers.title: MediaClaw: Multimodal Intelligent-Agent Platform Technical Report
papers.abstract: MediaClaw is a multimodal agent platform built on the OpenClaw ecosystem. Its core design follows a three-layer architecture of unified abstraction, pluginized extension, and workflow orchestration. The system is intended to address practical deployment pain points in AIGC adoption, including fragmented capabilities, heterogeneous interfaces, disconnected production processes, and limited reuse of high-quality production workflows. \system{} abstracts full-category AIGC capabilities into a unified invocation model, uses plugins to support hot-pluggable capability expansion, and uses task-oriented Skills to turn complex production processes into reusable workflow assets. This report focuses on the architectural design philosophy of MediaClaw, the design logic of its core capability model, and the key engineering trade-offs in implementation. It aims to provide reusable practical reference for building multimodal capability platforms.

analysis.tldr: MediaClaw是一个基于OpenClaw生态的多模态智能体平台，通过三层架构解决AIGC部署中的碎片化、异构接口和流程割裂问题。
analysis.research_motivation: AIGC在实际部署中面临能力碎片化、接口异构、生产流程割裂以及高质量工作流复用困难等痛点，亟需一个统一的多模态能力平台来整合和简化这些过程。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个多模态智能体平台，以统一抽象、插件化扩展和工作流编排的方式，解决AIGC能力集成与部署中的碎片化和低效问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用三层架构：统一抽象层将全品类AIGC能力抽象为统一调用模型；插件化扩展层通过插件支持热插拔能力扩展；工作流编排层使用面向任务的Skills将复杂生产流程转化为可复用的工作流资产。
contributions: 提出了MediaClaw多模态智能体平台的三层架构设计，包括统一抽象、插件化扩展和工作流编排。
通过Skills机制将复杂生产流程转化为可复用的工作流资产，提升了生产流程的复用性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏对实际部署效果的定量评估。
可能未涉及与其他平台的性能对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MediaClaw是一个基于OpenClaw生态的多模态智能体平台，通过三层架构解决AIGC部署中的碎片化、异构接口和流程割裂问题。

papers.title: AI Outperforms Humans in Personalized Image Aesthetics Assessment via LLM-Based Interviews and Semantic Feature Extraction
papers.abstract: Accurately predicting individual aesthetic evaluation for images is a fundamental challenge for AI. Various deep learning (DL)-based models have been proposed for this task, training on image evaluation data to extract objective low-level features. However, aesthetic preferences are inherently subjective and individual-dependent. Accurate prediction thus requires the extraction of high-level semantic features of images and the active collection of preference information from the target individual. To address this issue, we focus on the utility of Large Language Models (LLMs) pretrained on vast amounts of textual data, and develop an integrated DL-LLM system. The system actively elicits aesthetic preferences through LLM-based semi-structured interviews and predicts aesthetic evaluation by leveraging both low-level and high-level features. In our experiments, we compare the proposed system against conventional systems, human predictors, and the target individual's own re-evaluations after a certain time interval. Our results show that the proposed system outperforms all of them, with particularly strong performance on highly-rated images. Moreover, the prediction error of the proposed system is smaller than within-person variability, while human predictors show the largest error, likely due to the influence of their own aesthetic values. These results suggest that AI may be better positioned than others or one's future self to capture individual aesthetic preferences at a given point. This opens a new question of whether AI could serve as a deeper interpreter of human aesthetic sensibility than humans themselves.

analysis.tldr: 结合LLM访谈与深度学习的系统在个性化图像美学评估中超越人类自身。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习模型仅提取客观低层特征，无法捕捉主观且个体依赖的美学偏好，需要主动收集个体偏好信息。
analysis.problem: 如何准确预测个体对图像的主观美学评价。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类预测者受自身美学价值观影响，误差最大；而系统预测误差小于个体自身重评的波动。
analysis.method: 开发集成深度学习与大语言模型的系统，通过LLM半结构化访谈主动获取个体美学偏好，结合低层和高层语义特征进行预测。
contributions: 提出结合LLM访谈与深度学习的个性化美学评估系统
实验证明系统优于传统方法、人类预测者及个体自身重评
analysis.experiments: 与常规系统、人类预测者及个体自身重评对比，系统在所有指标上表现最佳，尤其在高评分图像上。
limitations: 未提及系统在不同图像域或文化背景下的泛化能力
LLM访谈的效率和可扩展性可能受限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合LLM访谈与深度学习的系统在个性化图像美学评估中超越人类自身。

papers.title: Probabilistic Verification of Recurrent Neural Networks for Single and Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: History-dependent policies induced by recurrent neural networks (RNNs) rely on latent hidden state dynamics, making verification in partially observable reinforcement learning (RL) challenging. Existing RNN verification tools typically rely on restrictive modeling assumptions or coarse over-approximations of the hidden state space, which can lead to overly conservative or inconclusive results. We propose $\textbf{RNN}$ $\textbf{Pro}$babilistic $\textbf{Ve}$rification ($\texttt{RNN-ProVe}$), a probabilistic framework that $\textit{estimates the likelihood}$ of undesired behaviors in RNN-based policies. $\texttt{RNN-ProVe}$ uses policy-driven sampling to approximate the set of hidden states that are feasible under a trained policy, and derives statistical error bounds to produce bounded-error, high-confidence estimates of behavioral violations. Experiments on partially observable single-agent and cooperative multi-agent tasks show that $\texttt{RNN-ProVe}$ yields more quantitative, feasibility-aware probabilistic guarantees than existing tools, while scaling to recurrent and multi-agent settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出RNN-ProVe框架，通过策略驱动采样和统计误差界，为部分可观测强化学习中的RNN策略提供概率验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RNN验证工具依赖严格假设或粗糙过近似，导致结果过于保守或不确定，亟需一种能处理部分可观测RL中RNN策略概率验证的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地估计基于RNN的策略在部分可观测单智能体和多智能体强化学习中产生不良行为的概率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RNN-ProVe框架，使用策略驱动采样近似训练策略下可行的隐藏状态集，并推导统计误差界以产生有界误差、高置信度的行为违规概率估计。
contributions: 提出首个概率验证框架RNN-ProVe，用于估计RNN策略中不良行为的可能性。
通过策略驱动采样和统计误差界提供定量、可行性感知的概率保证，并扩展到循环和多智能体设置。
analysis.experiments: 在部分可观测单智能体和协作多智能体任务上实验，显示RNN-ProVe比现有工具提供更定量、可行性感知的概率保证，并扩展到循环和多智能体设置。
limitations: 可能依赖策略驱动采样的质量，极端情况下采样偏差影响估计。
统计误差界可能对高维隐藏状态空间不够紧致。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RNN-ProVe框架，通过策略驱动采样和统计误差界，为部分可观测强化学习中的RNN策略提供概率验证。

papers.title: XDomainBench: Diagnosing Reasoning Collapse in High-Dimensional Scientific Knowledge Composition
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for knowledge synthesis, yet their capacity for compositional generalization in scientific knowledge remains under-characterized.
