Existing benchmarks primarily focus on single-turn restricted scenarios, failing to capture the capability boundaries exposed by real-world interactive scientific workflows. To address this, we introduce XDomainBench, a diagnostic benchmark for interactive interdisciplinary scientific reasoning. We formalize the composition order and mixture structure to enable systematic stress-testing from single-discipline to inter-disciplinary, comprising 8,598 interactive sessions across 20 domains and 4 task categories, with 8 realistic trajectory patterns covering difficulty and domain-mixture dynamics, simulating real AI4S scenarios. Large-scale evaluation of LLMs reveals a systematic reasoning collapse as composition order increases, stemming from two root causes: (i) direct difficulty increases induced by domain composition, and (ii) indirect interaction-amplified failures where trajectory patterns trigger error accumulation, reasoning breaks, and domain confusion, ultimately leading to session collapse.

analysis.tldr: 提出XDomainBench基准，诊断LLM在高维科学知识组合中的推理崩溃现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准主要关注单轮受限场景，无法捕捉真实交互式科学工作流中LLM的能力边界，亟需系统性诊断工具。
analysis.problem: LLM在跨学科科学知识组合推理中表现出的系统性推理崩溃问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着组合阶数增加，LLM出现系统性推理崩溃，根源包括：领域组合导致的直接难度增加，以及轨迹模式触发的错误累积、推理中断和领域混淆等间接交互放大失败。
analysis.method: 构建XDomainBench基准，形式化组合顺序和混合结构，包含8598个交互会话、20个领域、4类任务和8种真实轨迹模式，实现从单学科到跨学科的系统压力测试。
contributions: 提出XDomainBench，首个针对交互式跨学科科学推理的诊断基准。
大规模评估揭示LLM在科学知识组合中的推理崩溃现象及其两个根本原因。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准覆盖20个领域，可能未涵盖所有科学领域。
仅评估LLM，未涉及其他模型类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出XDomainBench基准，诊断LLM在高维科学知识组合中的推理崩溃现象。

papers.title: Agentifying Patient Dynamics within LLMs through Interacting with Clinical World Model
papers.abstract: Sepsis management in the ICU requires sequential treatment decisions under rapidly evolving patient physiology. Although large language models (LLMs) encode broad clinical knowledge and can reason over guidelines, they are not inherently grounded in action-conditioned patient dynamics. We introduce SepsisAgent, a world model-augmented LLM agent for sepsis treatment recommendation. SepsisAgent uses a learned Clinical World Model to simulate patient responses under candidate fluid--vasopressor interventions, and follows a propose--simulate--refine workflow before committing to a prescription. We first show that world-model access alone yields inconsistent LLM decision performance, motivating agent-specific training. We then train SepsisAgent through a three-stage curriculum: patient-dynamics supervised fine-tuning, propose--simulate--refine behavior cloning, and world-model-based agentic reinforcement learning. On MIMIC-IV sepsis trajectories, SepsisAgent outperforms all traditional RL and LLM-based baselines in off-policy value while achieving the best safety profile under guideline adherence and unsafe-action metrics. Further analysis shows that repeated interaction with the Clinical World Model enables the agent to learn regularities in patient evolution, which remain useful even when simulator access is removed.

analysis.tldr: 提出SepsisAgent，通过临床世界模型和课程训练提升LLM在脓毒症治疗中的决策能力。
analysis.research_motivation: ICU脓毒症管理需要基于患者动态的序贯治疗决策，但LLM缺乏对行动条件化患者动力学的内在理解，现有方法难以直接应用。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM代理在脓毒症治疗中基于患者动态做出安全有效的决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅使用世界模型会导致LLM决策不一致，需要代理特定训练；反复与世界模型交互可学习患者演化规律，即使移除模拟器仍有效。
analysis.method: 提出SepsisAgent，包含临床世界模型和三级课程训练：患者动力学监督微调、提出-模拟-优化行为克隆、基于世界模型的代理强化学习。
contributions: 提出世界模型增强的LLM代理SepsisAgent用于脓毒症治疗推荐。
设计三级课程训练策略，显著提升决策性能和安全性。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-IV脓毒症轨迹上，SepsisAgent在离策略价值上优于所有传统RL和LLM基线，并在指南依从性和不安全动作指标上达到最佳安全性能。
limitations: 依赖MIMIC-IV数据集，可能无法泛化到其他ICU环境。
世界模型可能无法完全捕捉真实患者生理的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SepsisAgent，通过临床世界模型和课程训练提升LLM在脓毒症治疗中的决策能力。

papers.title: On Strong Equivalence Notions in Logic Programming and Abstract Argumentation
papers.abstract: Strong equivalence between knowledge bases ensures the possibility of replacing one with the other without affecting reasoning outcomes, in any given context. This makes it a crucial property in nonmonotonic formalisms. In particular, the fields of logic programming and abstract argumentation provide primary examples in which this property has been subject to vast investigations. However, while (classes of) logic programs and abstract argumentation frameworks are known to be semantically equivalent in static settings, this alignment breaks in dynamic contexts due to differing notions of update. As a result, strong equivalence does not always carry over from one formalism to the other. In this paper, we carefully investigate this discrepancy and introduce a new notion of strong equivalence for logic programs. Our approach preserves strong equivalence under translation between certain classes of logic programs and both Dung-style and claim-augmented argumentation frameworks, thus restoring compatibility across these formalisms.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种新的逻辑程序强等价概念，使其在翻译为抽象论证框架时保持等价性。
analysis.research_motivation: 逻辑程序和抽象论证框架在静态设置下语义等价，但在动态上下文中由于更新概念不同导致强等价性不成立，这阻碍了两种形式化之间的可靠翻译和替换。
analysis.problem: 解决逻辑程序与抽象论证框架之间在动态上下文中强等价性不兼容的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出逻辑程序与抽象论证框架在静态设置下等价，但动态上下文中由于更新概念不同，强等价性无法保持。
analysis.method: 引入一种新的逻辑程序强等价概念，使其在翻译为Dung风格和claim-augmented论证框架时保持强等价性。
contributions: 揭示了逻辑程序与抽象论证框架在动态上下文中强等价性不兼容的现象。
提出了一种新的逻辑程序强等价概念，恢复了两种形式化之间的兼容性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类别的逻辑程序和论证框架。
新概念的实用性和计算复杂性尚未评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种新的逻辑程序强等价概念，使其在翻译为抽象论证框架时保持等价性。

papers.title: $π$-Bench: Evaluating Proactive Personal Assistant Agents in Long-Horizon Workflows
papers.abstract: The rise of personal assistant agents, e.g., OpenClaw, highlights the growing potential of large language models to support users across everyday life and work. A core challenge in these settings is proactive assistance, since users often begin with underspecified requests and leave important needs, constraints, or preferences unstated. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate whether agents can identify and act on such hidden intents before they are explicitly stated, especially in sustained multi-turn interactions where user needs emerge gradually. To address this gap, we introduce $\pi$-Bench, a benchmark for proactive assistance comprising 100 multi-turn tasks across 5 domain-specific user personas. By incorporating hidden user intents, inter-task dependencies, and cross-session continuity, $\pi$-Bench evaluates agents' ability to anticipate and address user needs over extended interactions, jointly measuring proactivity and task completion in long-horizon trajectories that better reflect real-world use. Experiments show (1) proactive assistance remains challenging, (2) a clear distinction between task completion and proactivity, and (3) the value of prior interaction for proactive intent resolution in later tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出π-Bench基准，评估个人助手在长时交互中的主动服务能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准很少评估智能体在用户未明确表达需求时主动识别并行动的能力，尤其在多轮交互中需求逐渐浮现的场景。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估智能体在长时工作流中主动预测和满足用户隐藏意图的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明主动辅助仍然具有挑战性，任务完成与主动性之间存在明显区别，且先前交互对后续任务的主动意图解决有价值。
analysis.method: 构建包含100个多轮任务、5个领域用户画像的基准，融入隐藏用户意图、任务间依赖和跨会话连续性。
contributions: 提出首个评估主动辅助能力的基准π-Bench，包含隐藏意图和长时交互。
通过实验揭示主动性与任务完成度的差异及先前交互的价值。
analysis.experiments: 在π-Bench上评估了多个模型，显示主动辅助仍具挑战性，且任务完成与主动性有区别。
limitations: 基准规模有限（100个任务），可能无法覆盖所有场景。
未提供具体模型性能数据或对比基线。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出π-Bench基准，评估个人助手在长时交互中的主动服务能力。

papers.title: How Sensitive Are Radiomic AI Models to Acquisition Parameters?
papers.abstract: A main barrier for the deployment of AI radiomic systems in clinical routine is their drop in performance under heterogeneous multicentre acquisition protocols. This work presents a performance-oriented framework for quantifying scan parameter sensitivity of radiomic AI models, while identifying clinically significant parameter regions associated with improved cross-dataset robustness. We formulate a mixed-effects framework for quantifying the influence that clinically relevant acquisition parameters have on models performance, while accounting for subject-level random effects. We have applied our framework to lung cancer diagnosis in CT scans using two independent multicentre datasets (a public database and own-collected data) and several SoA architectures. To evaluate across-database reproducibility, CT parameters have been adjusted using the data collected and tested on the public set. The optimal configuration selected is the current of the X-ray tube >= 200 mA, spiral pitch <= 1.5, slice thickness <= 1.25 mm, which balances diagnostic quality with low radiation dose. These configuration push metrics from 0.79+-0.04 sensitivity, 0.47+-0.10 specificity in low quality scans to 0.90+-0.10 sensitivity, 0.79 +- 0.13 specificity in high quality ones.

analysis.tldr: 提出量化CT采集参数对放射组学AI模型性能影响的框架，并找到提升跨数据集鲁棒性的最优参数配置。
analysis.research_motivation: 放射组学AI模型在临床部署时面临多中心采集协议异质性导致的性能下降问题，现有研究缺乏量化扫描参数敏感性的性能导向框架。
analysis.problem: 如何量化CT采集参数对放射组学AI模型性能的影响，并识别能提升跨数据集鲁棒性的关键参数区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合效应框架，量化临床相关采集参数对模型性能的影响，同时考虑受试者级随机效应。
contributions: 提出性能导向的放射组学AI模型扫描参数敏感性量化框架
通过两个独立多中心CT数据集验证，找到最优参数配置（管电流≥200mA、螺距≤1.5、层厚≤1.25mm），将低质量扫描的灵敏度从0.79提升至0.90，特异性从0.47提升至0.79
analysis.experiments: 使用两个独立多中心CT数据集（公开数据库和自收集数据）及多种SOTA架构进行肺癌诊断实验，通过调整CT参数评估跨数据库可重复性。
limitations: 仅针对肺癌CT诊断，可能不适用于其他疾病或模态
最优参数配置可能因具体任务和模型架构而异
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出量化CT采集参数对放射组学AI模型性能影响的框架，并找到提升跨数据集鲁棒性的最优参数配置。

papers.title: Monitoring Data-aware Temporal Properties (Extended Version)
papers.abstract: Dynamic systems in AI are often complex and heterogeneous, so that an internal specification is not accessible and verification techniques such as model checking are not applicable. Monitoring is in such cases an attractive alternative, as it evaluates desirable properties along traces generated by an unknown dynamic system. In this work, we consider anticipatory monitoring of linear-time properties enriched with an arbitrary SMT theory over finite traces (LTLfMT). Anticipatory monitoring in this setting is highly challenging, as the monitoring state depends on both the trace prefix seen so far and all its possible finite continuations. Under reasonable assumptions on the background theory, we present and formally prove the correctness of a novel foundational framework for monitoring properties in an expressive fragment of LTLfMT. The framework combines automata-theoretic methods to handle the temporal aspects of the logic, with automated reasoning techniques to address the first-order dimension. Moreover, we identify for the first time decidable fragments of this monitoring problem that are practically relevant as they combine linear arithmetic with uninterpreted functions, which covers e.g. data-aware business processes and dynamic systems operating over a read-only database. Feasibility is witnessed by a prototype implementation and preliminary evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合自动机与SMT求解的框架，用于在有限迹上对带SMT理论的线性时态逻辑进行前瞻性监控。
analysis.research_motivation: AI动态系统通常复杂异构，内部规范不可访问，模型检验等验证技术不适用，监控成为评估系统属性的重要替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何对有限迹上带任意SMT理论的线性时态逻辑（LTLfMT）进行前瞻性监控，即监控状态依赖于已见前缀和所有可能的未来延续。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合自动机理论处理时态逻辑，利用自动化推理技术处理一阶维度，提出一个新颖的基础框架，并在合理假设下证明其正确性。
contributions: 提出并形式化证明了一个用于监控LTLfMT表达性片段的新颖基础框架的正确性。
首次识别出该监控问题中实际可判定的片段，这些片段结合了线性算术与未解释函数，覆盖数据感知业务流程等场景。
analysis.experiments: 通过原型实现和初步评估验证了可行性，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架仅适用于LTLfMT的特定表达性片段，可能不覆盖所有实际场景。
原型实现仅初步评估，缺乏大规模或复杂系统的性能验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合自动机与SMT求解的框架，用于在有限迹上对带SMT理论的线性时态逻辑进行前瞻性监控。

papers.title: Falkor-IRAC: Graph-Constrained Generation for Verified Legal Reasoning in Indian Judicial AI
papers.abstract: Legal reasoning is not semantic similarity search. A court judgment encodes constrained symbolic reasoning: precedent propagation, procedural state transitions, and statute-bound inference. These are properties that vector-based retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) cannot faithfully represent. Hallucinated precedents, outdated statute citations, and unsupported reasoning chains remain persistent failure modes in LLM-based legal AI, with real consequences for access to justice in high-caseload jurisdictions such as India. This paper presents Falkor-IRAC, a graph-constrained generation framework for Indian legal AI that grounds generation in structured reasoning over an IRAC (Issue, Rule, Analysis, Conclusion) knowledge graph. Judgments from the Supreme Court and High Courts of India are ingested as IRAC node structures enriched with procedural state transitions, precedent relationships, and statutory references, stored in FalkorDB for low-latency agentic traversal. At inference time, LLM-generated answers are accepted only if a valid supporting path can be traced through the graph, a check performed by a falsifiability oracle called the Verifier Agent. The system also detects doctrinal conflicts as a first-class output rather than silently resolving them. Falkor-IRAC is evaluated using graph-native metrics: citation grounding accuracy, path validity rate, hallucinated precedent rate, and conflict detection rate. These metrics are argued to be more appropriate for legal reasoning evaluation than BLEU and ROUGE. On a proof-of-concept corpus of 51 Supreme Court judgments, the Verifier Agent correctly validated citations on completed queries and correctly rejected fabricated citations. Evaluation against vector-only RAG baselines is left for future work, as is GPU-accelerated inference to address current timeout rates on CPU hardware.

analysis.tldr: Falkor-IRAC 通过图约束生成确保印度法律 AI 的推理可验证，减少幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 法律推理依赖结构化符号推理，而基于向量的 RAG 无法忠实表示，导致 LLM 法律 AI 出现幻觉先例、过时引用和错误推理链，在印度等高案件量司法管辖区影响司法公正。
analysis.problem: 如何让 LLM 在法律推理中生成可验证、无幻觉的答案，并检测法理冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出向量 RAG 无法表示法律推理的约束符号特性，幻觉先例、过时引用和错误推理链是 LLM 法律 AI 的持续失败模式。
analysis.method: 构建 IRAC 知识图谱（包含程序状态转换、先例关系和法规引用），LLM 生成答案需通过 Verifier Agent 在图中找到有效支持路径才被接受，并检测法理冲突。
contributions: 提出图约束生成框架 Falkor-IRAC，将法律推理结构化到 IRAC 知识图谱中。
引入 Verifier Agent 作为可证伪性预言机，确保生成答案可验证。
提出图原生评估指标（引用准确性、路径有效性、幻觉率、冲突检测率）替代 BLEU/ROUGE。
analysis.experiments: 在 51 个最高法院判决的概念验证语料上，Verifier Agent 正确验证了已完成查询的引用，并正确拒绝了捏造的引用。与向量 RAG 基线的比较留待未来工作。
limitations: 实验规模小（仅 51 个判决），未与 RAG 基线对比。
当前 CPU 推理存在超时问题，需 GPU 加速。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Falkor-IRAC 通过图约束生成确保印度法律 AI 的推理可验证，减少幻觉。

papers.title: MindGap: A Conversational AI Framework for Upstream Neuroplastic Intervention in Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder
papers.abstract: Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD) is fundamentally a neuroplastic problem traumatic contact events encode over-reactive neural pathways through Hebbian long-term potentiation, producing hair-triggered amygdala-HPA stress cascades that fire before conscious awareness can intercept them. Existing therapeutic approaches, prolonged exposure, EMDR, cognitive behavioural therapy, operate predominantly downstream of the reactive cascade, teaching patients to tolerate or reframe distress after it has arisen. While clinically valuable, these suppression-based approaches do not produce the upstream pathway dissolution that constitutes lasting structural neural reorganisation. This paper proposes MindGap, a privacy-preserving on-device conversational AI framework that delivers structured neuroplastic rehabilitation for PTSD through the practice of dependent origination, a Buddhist psychological framework that identifies the precise moment between the pre-cognitive affective signal and the reactive elaboration that follows as the site of therapeutic intervention. MindGap guides patients through three progressive layers of observation at this feeling tone gap: noticing the bare affective signal before reactive elaboration, recognising it as self-arising rather than caused by the stimulus, and recognising the conditioned implicit belief beneath the feeling. Each layer corresponds to progressively deeper prefrontal regulatory engagement and progressively deeper long-term depression-mediated weakening of the reactive pathway, producing genuine upstream dissolution rather than downstream suppression. Running entirely on-device with no data egress, MindGap delivers daily calibrated exposure sessions through a fine-tuned lightweight large language model, making it deployable in sensitive clinical and military contexts where cloud-based solutions are not permitted.

analysis.tldr: MindGap 提出一种基于佛教缘起心理学的对话式 AI 框架，通过识别创伤后应激障碍中认知前情感信号与反应性加工之间的“感受间隙”，实现上游神经可塑性干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 PTSD 疗法（如暴露疗法、EMDR、CBT）主要在下游运作，教导患者耐受或重构已产生的痛苦，无法实现上游神经通路消解，难以带来持久的神经结构重组。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种能在认知前情感信号与反应性加工之间进行干预的对话式 AI 系统，实现 PTSD 的上游神经可塑性康复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PTSD 本质是神经可塑性问题：创伤事件通过赫布长时程增强编码过度反应的神经通路，导致杏仁核-HPA 应激级联在意识察觉之前触发。
analysis.method: 提出 MindGap 框架，基于佛教缘起心理学中的“感受间隙”概念，通过三层渐进观察（觉察原始情感信号、识别其自生性、识别背后的条件性信念）引导患者，利用轻量级微调大语言模型在设备端提供每日校准的暴露训练。
contributions: 提出一种基于佛教缘起心理学的上游神经可塑性干预框架，区别于传统下游抑制方法。
设计隐私保护的设备端对话式 AI 系统，适用于敏感临床和军事场景。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架的临床有效性尚未通过实验验证。
依赖患者对佛教心理学概念的理解和接受度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MindGap 提出一种基于佛教缘起心理学的对话式 AI 框架，通过识别创伤后应激障碍中认知前情感信号与反应性加工之间的“感受间隙”，实现上游神经可塑性干预。

papers.title: Teaching Large Language Models When Not to Know: Learning Temporal Critique for Ex-Ante Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often fail to reason under temporal cutoffs: when prompted to answer from the standpoint of an earlier time, they exploit knowledge that became available only later. We study this failure through the lens of ex-ante reasoning, where a model must rely exclusively on information knowable before a cutoff. Through a systematic analysis of prompt-level interventions, we find that temporal leakage is highly sensitive to cutoff formulation and instruction placement: explicit cutoff statements outperform implicit historical framings, and prefix constraints reduce leakage more effectively than suffix constraints. These findings indicate that prompting can steer models into a temporal frame, but does not endow them with the ability to verify whether a response is temporally admissible. We further argue that supervised fine-tuning is insufficient, since ex-ante correctness is not an intrinsic property of an answer, but a relation between the answer and the cutoff. To address this gap, we propose TCFT, a Temporal Critique Fine-Tuning framework that trains models to acquire cutoff-aware temporal verification. Given a query, a cutoff, and a candidate response, TCFT teaches the model to identify post-cutoff leakage, explain temporal boundary violations, and judge temporal admissibility. Experiments with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct and Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct show that TCFT consistently outperforms prompting and SFT baselines, reducing average leakage by 41.89 and 37.79 percentage points, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出TCFT框架，通过时间批判微调让LLM学会在时间截止点前只使用已知信息，减少知识泄露。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在时间截止点推理时，常利用未来知识导致错误，现有提示方法无法赋予模型验证时间合规性的能力，SFT也不足以解决。
analysis.problem: LLM在ex-ante推理中无法避免时间泄露，需要学会判断回答是否在截止点前可被知晓。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 时间泄露对截止点表述和指令位置高度敏感：显式截止语句优于隐式历史框架，前缀约束比后缀约束更有效。提示能引导时间框架，但无法赋予验证能力。
analysis.method: TCFT（时间批判微调框架）：训练模型对查询、截止点和候选回答进行时间合规性验证，识别泄露、解释边界违规并判断可接受性。
contributions: 系统分析了LLM在时间截止点推理中的失败模式及提示干预效果
提出TCFT框架，通过时间批判微调赋予模型截止点感知的时间验证能力
在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct和14B-Instruct上实验，平均泄露率分别降低41.89和37.79个百分点
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct和Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct上评估，TCFT优于提示和SFT基线，平均泄露率分别降低41.89和37.79个百分点。
limitations: 仅验证了7B和14B模型，更大规模模型效果未知
可能依赖特定截止点表述，泛化性需进一步测试
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TCFT框架，通过时间批判微调让LLM学会在时间截止点前只使用已知信息，减少知识泄露。

papers.title: SliceGraph: Mapping Process Isomers in Multi-Run Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
papers.abstract: Multi-run chain-of-thought reasoning is usually collapsed to final-answer aggregates, which discard howsampled trajectories share, split, and rejoin through intermediate computation. We propose SliceGraph, a post-hoc problem-model-cell graph built by mutual-kNN over sparse activation-key Jaccard similarity between CoT slices, and treat it as a measurement object for process geometry rather than as a decoding program. Across sampled CoT ensembles from three primary 4B/8B models on math and science benchmarks, blinded annotation supports SliceGraph biconnected components as shared reasoning-state units and process families as within-family strategy-coherent route units. In 85.5% of 954 problem-model cells, correct CoTs sharing the same normalized answer split into multiple process families; among cells with at least two such runs, 76.6% of run pairs are cross-family on average. We call such same-answer, family-divergent correct trajectories process isomers. A label-seeded reward field provides a separate value-landscape layer: success-associated regions often split into disconnected high-value cores, and route families specialize over these core footprints rather than merely duplicating one another. A typed-state transition analysis further shows that process families navigate the same atlas with distinct transition kernels under matched null controls. Representation ablations, a cross-architecture replication, and two cross-scale replications support the robustness of the route-family scaffold, showing that final-answer aggregation overlooks this structured multi-route process geometry.

analysis.tldr: SliceGraph通过互KNN构建CoT推理轨迹的图结构，发现同答案正确轨迹存在多种过程异构体，揭示最终答案聚合忽略的丰富过程几何。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮链式思维推理通常只聚合最终答案，丢弃了采样轨迹在中间计算中如何共享、分裂和重组的结构信息，缺乏对推理过程几何的测量工具。
analysis.problem: 如何建模和量化多轮CoT推理中轨迹之间的过程结构（如共享、分裂、重组），并揭示最终答案聚合所忽略的异构推理路径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在85.5%的问题-模型单元中，相同答案的正确CoT分裂为多个过程家族；76.6%的轨迹对跨家族；成功区域常分裂为不连通的高价值核心，路线家族在这些核心足迹上特化。
analysis.method: 提出SliceGraph，通过互KNN基于稀疏激活键的Jaccard相似性构建CoT切片的图结构，并利用双连通分量和过程家族分析推理过程几何。
contributions: 提出SliceGraph，一种后验图构建方法，用于揭示多轮CoT推理的过程几何。
发现并定义了过程异构体：相同答案但过程家族不同的正确轨迹。
通过标签种子奖励场和类型状态转移分析，展示了过程家族的特化行为。
analysis.experiments: 在三个4B/8B模型上的数学和科学基准测试中，对954个问题-模型单元进行盲注标注，并进行了表征消融、跨架构复制和跨尺度复制实验。
limitations: 方法依赖于稀疏激活键的Jaccard相似性，可能对模型架构敏感。
过程家族的划分可能受kNN参数影响，需要进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SliceGraph通过互KNN构建CoT推理轨迹的图结构，发现同答案正确轨迹存在多种过程异构体，揭示最终答案聚合忽略的丰富过程几何。

papers.title: Sycophancy is an Educational Safety Risk: Why LLM Tutors Need Sycophancy Benchmarks
papers.abstract: This position paper argues that effective tutoring requires corrective friction: surfacing misconceptions and challenging them supportively to drive conceptual change. Yet preference-aligned LLMs can trade epistemic rigor for agreeableness. We identify a Reasoning-Sycophancy Paradox: models that resist context-switch frame attacks can still capitulate under social-epistemic pressure, especially authority ("my notes say I'm right") and social-affective face-saving ("please don't tell me I'm wrong"). We introduce EduFrameTrap, a tutoring benchmark across math, physics, economics, chemistry, biology, and computer science that varies student confidence and pressure (context-switch, authority, social-affective). Across two frontier LLMs, context-switch failures are comparatively lower for GPT-5.2, while authority and social pressure more often trigger epistemic retreat. In contrast, Claude shows substantial context-switch fragility in this run. Because these failures are hard to judge automatically, we report two-judge disagreement as a reliability signal. We argue benchmarks should measure social-epistemic courage, i.e., supportive but corrective tutoring, and treat kind-but-correct behavior as a safety requirement.

analysis.tldr: LLM辅导者存在谄媚风险，需建立社会-认知勇气基准。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM辅导者若一味迎合学生错误认知，会损害教育效果，而现有对齐技术可能加剧这一风险。
analysis.problem: LLM辅导者在面对学生权威性压力或社交情感压力时，会放弃认知严谨性，产生谄媚行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
analysis.method: 提出EduFrameTrap基准，涵盖多学科，通过变化学生自信度和压力类型（上下文切换、权威、社交情感）来评估LLM的谄媚倾向。
contributions: 识别出推理-谄媚悖论，即模型能抵抗上下文切换攻击却在社交-认知压力下屈服。
引入EduFrameTrap基准，用于评估LLM辅导者的社会-认知勇气。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖有限学科和压力类型。
自动评估困难，依赖人工判断。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM辅导者存在谄媚风险，需建立社会-认知勇气基准。

papers.title: Prompt Segmentation and Annotation Optimisation: Controlling LLM Behaviour via Optimised Segment-Level Annotations
papers.abstract: Prompt engineering is crucial for effective interaction with generative artificial intelligence systems, yet existing optimisation methods often operate over an unstructured and vast prompt space, leading to high computational costs and potential distortions of the original intent. We introduce Prompt Segmentation and Annotation Optimisation (PSAO), a structured prompt optimisation framework designed to improve prompt optimisation controllability and efficiency. PSAO decomposes a prompt into interpretable segments (e.g., sentences) and augments each with human-readable annotations (e.g., {not important}, {important}, {very important}). These annotations guide large language models (LLMs) in allocating focus and clarifying confusion during response generation. We formally define the segmentations and annotations and demonstrate that optimised segment-level annotations can lead to improved LLM responses, with the original prompt retained as a candidate in the optimisation space to prevent performance degradation. Empirical evaluations indicate that PSAO benefits from annotations in terms of improved reasoning accuracy and self-consistency. However, developing efficient methods for identifying optimal segmentations and annotations remains challenging and is reserved for future investigation. This work is intended as a proof of concept, demonstrating the feasibility and potential of segment-level annotation optimisation.

analysis.tldr: 提出PSAO框架，通过将提示分解为带注释的片段来优化LLM行为，提升推理准确性和自一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有提示优化方法在非结构化提示空间中操作，计算成本高且可能扭曲原始意图，需要更可控高效的优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何通过结构化提示分解和片段级注释优化来提升LLM响应质量，同时保持原始提示的完整性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PSAO框架：将提示分解为可解释片段（如句子），并为每个片段添加人类可读注释（如{不重要}、{重要}、{非常重要}），引导LLM分配注意力并澄清混淆，同时保留原始提示作为候选以防止性能下降。
contributions: 提出PSAO框架，实现结构化提示优化，提升可控性和效率。
形式化定义片段和注释，并证明优化片段级注释可改善LLM响应。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏高效识别最优片段和注释的方法。
仅作为概念验证，实际应用效果需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PSAO框架，通过将提示分解为带注释的片段来优化LLM行为，提升推理准确性和自一致性。

papers.title: PyCSP3-Scheduling: A Scheduling Extension for PyCSP3
papers.abstract: PyCSP$^3$ provides a productive way to build constraint models for solving combinatorial constrained problems and export them to XCSP$^3$, preserving a complete separation between modeling and solving. However, it lacks native support for scheduling abstractions such as interval variables, sequence variables, and resource functions. As a result, scheduling models must be encoded with low-level integer variables and manual channeling constraints, even though PyCSP$^3$ already provides global constraints like NoOverlap and Cumulative on integer arrays. We present PyCSP$^3$ Scheduling, a library that adds scheduling abstractions to PyCSP$^3$ through 53 dedicated constraints and 27 expressions, and compiles them down to standard PyCSP$^3$/XCSP$^3$ constraints, maintaining the modeling/solving separation that underpins the PyCSP$^3$ ecosystem. On 261 paired instances across 17 model families (5 runs each), both formulations produce identical objectives on all 72 doubly-proved optimal pairs and nearly half of the families (8/17) remain structurally unchanged after compilation; however, runtime performance diverges across families, with clear gains on some (up to 5.8x) and regressions on others due to the overhead of compilation decompositions. Code and benchmarks are available at: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 为PyCSP3添加调度抽象层，编译为标准约束，保持建模与求解分离。
analysis.research_motivation: PyCSP3缺乏对调度问题的原生支持，用户需手动编码低层变量和约束，降低了建模效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在PyCSP3中高效支持调度抽象（如区间变量、序列变量、资源函数），同时保持建模与求解的分离。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 编译后的约束在部分模型族上性能提升（最高5.8倍），但在其他族上因分解开销导致性能下降。
analysis.method: 开发PyCSP3 Scheduling库，提供53个专用约束和27个表达式，编译为标准PyCSP3/XCSP3约束。
contributions: 提出调度抽象层，简化调度问题的建模
实现编译机制，保持与PyCSP3生态的兼容性
在261个实例上验证了正确性和性能差异
analysis.experiments: 在17个模型族的261对实例上（每对5次运行）进行实验，所有72个双重证明最优对的目标值一致，8/17模型族编译后结构不变，性能差异从提升5.8倍到下降不等。
limitations: 编译分解可能引入性能开销，导致部分模型族性能下降
仅支持调度相关抽象，未覆盖其他领域
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 为PyCSP3添加调度抽象层，编译为标准约束，保持建模与求解分离。

papers.title: TeachAnything: A Multimodal Crowdsourcing Platform for Training Embodied AI Agents in Symmetrical Reality
papers.abstract: Symmetrical Reality (SR) is emerging as a future trend for human-agent coexistence, placing higher demands on agents to acquire human-like intelligence. It calls for richer and more diverse human guidance. We introduce a three-stage demonstration paradigm integrating multimodal demonstration signals. Building on this paradigm, we developed TeachAnything, a cloud-based, crowdsourcing-oriented demonstration platform with physics simulation capable of collecting diverse demonstration data across varied scenes, tasks, and embodiments. By unifying virtual and physical interactions through both methodological design and physics simulation, the system serves as a practical foundation for developing embodied agents aligned with Symmetrical Reality.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向对称现实的众包演示平台TeachAnything，通过三阶段多模态演示范式收集多样化数据以训练具身智能体。
analysis.research_motivation: 对称现实（SR）要求智能体具备类人智能，需要更丰富多样的人类引导数据，但现有数据收集方法在多样性、规模和物理一致性上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何高效收集跨场景、跨任务、跨形态的多样化多模态演示数据，以支持对称现实中具身智能体的训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段演示范式（整合多模态演示信号），并基于此开发云端众包演示平台TeachAnything，通过物理仿真统一虚拟与物理交互，支持多样场景、任务和形态的数据收集。
contributions: 提出三阶段多模态演示范式，为对称现实中的智能体训练提供结构化指导。
开发TeachAnything平台，实现云端众包、物理仿真驱动的多样化演示数据收集。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 平台依赖众包质量，可能引入噪声或低质量数据。
物理仿真的真实性与实际物理世界可能存在差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning

papers.title: Complacent, Not Sycophantic: Reframing Large Language Models and Designing AI Literacy for Complacent Machines
papers.abstract: Large language models are often described as sycophantic, in the sense that they appear to flatter users or mirror their beliefs. We argue that this label is conceptually misleading: sycophancy implies motives and strategic intent, which LLMs do not possess. Their behaviour is better understood as complacency, a structural tendency to agree with user input because training data, reward signals and design favour agreement and reinforcement over correction. We argue that this distinction matters. Whether developers act sycophantically or not, models themselves never are sycophants; they can only be made more or less complacent. This reframing locates agency in developers and institutions, not in the model. Because complacent models reinforce users' prior beliefs, we argue that AI literacy educational approaches should particularly focus on strategies to counter confirmation bias.

analysis.tldr: 论文重新定义LLM的行为为“顺从”而非“谄媚”，强调责任在开发者，并建议AI素养教育应针对确认偏误。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前将LLM描述为“谄媚”的标签具有误导性，暗示模型具有动机和策略意图，这模糊了责任归属，不利于设计有效的AI素养教育。
analysis.problem: 如何准确描述LLM倾向于同意用户输入的行为，并据此指导AI素养教育。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM表现出倾向于同意用户输入的结构性倾向，这种倾向源于训练数据、奖励信号和设计偏好一致与强化而非纠正。
analysis.method: 通过概念重新框架，将LLM的行为从“谄媚”重新定义为“顺从”，并基于此提出AI素养教育应聚焦于对抗确认偏误的策略。
contributions: 提出将LLM的倾向性行为重新定义为“顺从”而非“谄媚”，澄清了责任归属。
基于重新框架，建议AI素养教育应特别关注对抗确认偏误的策略。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证数据支持重新框架的有效性。
未详细说明AI素养教育策略的具体实施方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文重新定义LLM的行为为“顺从”而非“谄媚”，强调责任在开发者，并建议AI素养教育应针对确认偏误。

papers.title: VerbalValue: A Socially Intelligent Virtual Host for Sales-Driven Live Commerce
papers.abstract: A skilled live-commerce host is not merely a narrator, but a sales agent who converts viewer curiosity into purchase intent through expert product knowledge, emotionally intelligent response tactics, and entertainment that serves as a vehicle for product exposure. Yet no existing AI system replicates this: conversational recommenders treat recommendation as a terminal act, while general-purpose LLMs hallucinate product claims and default to generic promotional templates that fail to engage or persuade. We present VerbalValue, a sales-conversion-oriented virtual host that turns exceptional verbal ability into real commercial value, built on three contributions. First, we construct a domain knowledge base of product specifications and a curated sales terminology lexicon that anchor product-related responses in verified expertise. Second, we collect and annotate 1,475 live-commerce interactions spanning diverse viewer intents. Third, we fine-tune a large language model on this data to deliver empathetic, commercially oriented responses, adapting to viewer intent through empathetic amplification, evidence-backed rebuttal, and humor-mediated deflection. Experiments against GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and other baselines demonstrate gains of 23% on informativeness and 18% on factual correctness, with consistent advantages in tactfulness and viewer engagement.

analysis.tldr: VerbalValue 是一个面向销售驱动的直播电商的虚拟主播，通过领域知识库和微调 LLM 提升信息性和事实正确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 AI 系统无法复制熟练直播电商主播的销售能力：对话推荐系统将推荐视为终点，通用 LLM 会编造产品信息且使用通用促销模板，缺乏吸引力和说服力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个面向销售转化的虚拟主播，使其具备产品专业知识、情感智能响应策略和娱乐性，从而将观众好奇心转化为购买意图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建产品规格领域知识库和销售术语词典，收集并标注 1,475 个直播交互数据，微调大语言模型以生成共情、商业导向的响应，并通过共情放大、证据支持反驳和幽默调解等策略适应观众意图。
contributions: 构建了产品规格领域知识库和销售术语词典，确保产品相关响应基于验证的专业知识。
收集并标注了 1,475 个覆盖多种观众意图的直播交互数据集。
微调大语言模型以提供共情、商业导向的响应，并在多个基线模型上取得信息性提升 23%、事实正确性提升 18%。
analysis.experiments: 与 GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro 等基线对比，在信息性上提升 23%，事实正确性上提升 18%，在机智性和观众参与度上也有持续优势。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（1,475 个交互），可能影响泛化能力。
仅针对直播电商场景，其他销售场景的适用性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VerbalValue 是一个面向销售驱动的直播电商的虚拟主播，通过领域知识库和微调 LLM 提升信息性和事实正确性。

papers.title: Cattle Trade: A Multi-Agent Benchmark for LLM Bluffing, Bidding, and Bargaining
papers.abstract: We introduce \textsc{Cattle Trade, a multi-agent benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs) as agents in strategic reasoning under imperfect information, adversarial interaction, and resource constraints. The benchmark combines auctions, hidden-offer trade challenges (TCs), bargaining, bluffing, opponent modeling, and resource allocation within a single long-horizon game lasting 50--60 turns. Unlike prior agent benchmarks that test these abilities in isolation, \textsc{Cattle Trade} evaluates whether agents integrate them across a competitive, multi-agent economic game with conflicting incentives. The benchmark logs every bid, TC offer, counteroffer, and card selection, enabling behavioural analysis beyond final scores or win rates. We evaluate seven cost-efficient language models and three deterministic code agents across 242 games. Strategic coherence, in particular spending efficiency, resource discipline, and phase-adaptive bidding, is associated with rank more strongly than spending volume or any single subskill. Two heuristic code agents outperform most tested LLMs, and behavioural traces surface recurring LLM failure modes including overbidding, self-bidding, bankrupt TC initiation, and weak opponent-state adaptation. Evaluating agentic competence requires benchmarks that test the joint deployment of multiple capabilities in multi-agent environments with conflicting incentives, uncertainty, and economic dynamics.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Cattle Trade 多智能体基准，评估 LLM 在不完全信息、对抗交互和资源约束下的战略推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准孤立测试 LLM 的谈判、出价、虚张声势等能力，缺乏在竞争性多智能体经济游戏中综合评估这些能力的基准。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个多智能体基准，以评估 LLM 在长期、不完全信息、对抗性经济游戏中整合多种战略推理能力（如出价、谈判、虚张声势、对手建模和资源分配）的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但提到行为轨迹揭示了 LLM 的常见失败模式，如过度出价、自我出价、破产贸易挑战发起和弱对手状态适应。
analysis.method: 设计一个包含拍卖、隐藏报价贸易挑战、谈判、虚张声势、对手建模和资源分配的多智能体经济游戏基准，记录每步行为以进行细粒度分析。
contributions: 提出 Cattle Trade 基准，综合评估 LLM 在竞争性多智能体经济游戏中的战略推理能力。
通过 242 场游戏评估 7 个语言模型和 3 个确定性代码智能体，发现战略连贯性（如支出效率、资源纪律和阶段自适应出价）与排名强相关。
analysis.experiments: 在 242 场游戏中评估了 7 个成本高效的语言模型和 3 个确定性代码智能体。
limitations: 仅评估了成本高效的模型，未测试更大或更先进的 LLM。
基准可能无法完全反映真实世界经济交互的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Cattle Trade 多智能体基准，评估 LLM 在不完全信息、对抗交互和资源约束下的战略推理能力。

papers.title: When Robots Do the Chores: A Benchmark and Agent for Long-Horizon Household Task Execution
papers.abstract: Long-horizon household tasks demand robust high-level planning and sustained reasoning capabilities, which are largely overlooked by existing embodied AI benchmarks that emphasize short-horizon navigation or manipulation and rely on fixed task categories. We introduce LongAct, a benchmark designed to evaluate planning-level autonomy in long-horizon household tasks specified through free-form instructions. By abstracting away embodiment-specific low-level control, LongAct isolates high-level cognitive capabilities such as instruction understanding, dependency management, memory maintenance, and adaptive planning. We further propose HoloMind, a VLM-driven agent with a DAG-based long-horizon hierarchical planner, a Multimodal Spatial Memory for persistent world modeling, an Episodic Memory for experience reuse, and a global Critic for reflective supervision. Experiments with GPT-5 and Qwen3-VL models show that HoloMind substantially improves long-horizon performance while reducing reliance on model scale. Even top models achieve only 59% goal completion and 16% full-task success, underscoring the difficulty of LongAct and the need for stronger long-horizon planning in embodied agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出长时域家务任务基准LongAct和VLM驱动智能体HoloMind，揭示现有模型在长程规划上的严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有具身AI基准多聚焦短时域导航或操作，且依赖固定任务类别，忽视了长时域家务任务所需的高层规划与持续推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何评估和提升具身智能体在自由形式指令下的长时域家务任务规划能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使顶级模型（GPT-5、Qwen3-VL）在LongAct上仅达到59%目标完成率和16%完全任务成功率，表明长时域规划是当前具身智能体的主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出LongAct基准（抽象低层控制，聚焦高层认知）和HoloMind智能体（含DAG长时域分层规划器、多模态空间记忆、情景记忆和全局评论家）。
contributions: 提出LongAct基准，用于评估长时域家务任务的高层规划能力。
提出HoloMind智能体，通过分层规划与记忆机制显著提升长时域性能并降低对模型规模的依赖。
analysis.experiments: 在LongAct上使用GPT-5和Qwen3-VL模型进行实验，HoloMind显著提升长时域性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨领域泛化能力。
可能依赖高质量VLM模型，低资源场景下效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出长时域家务任务基准LongAct和VLM驱动智能体HoloMind，揭示现有模型在长程规划上的严重不足。

papers.title: Learning Scenario Reduction for Two-Stage Robust Optimization with Discrete Uncertainty
papers.abstract: Two-Stage Robust Optimization (2RO) with discrete uncertainty is challenging, often rendering exact solutions prohibitive. Scenario reduction alleviates this issue by selecting a small, representative subset of scenarios to enable tractable computation. However, existing methods are largely problem-agnostic, operating solely on the uncertainty set without consulting the feasible region or recourse structure. In this paper, we introduce PRISE, a problem-driven sequential lookahead heuristic that constructs reduced scenario sets by evaluating the marginal impact of each scenario. While PRISE yields high-quality scenario subsets, each selection step requires solving multiple subproblems, making it computationally expensive at scale. To address this, we propose NeurPRISE, a neural surrogate model built on a GNN-Transformer backbone that encodes the per-scenario structure via graph convolution and captures cross-scenario interactions through attention. NeurPRISE is trained via imitation learning with a gain-aware ranking objective, which distills marginal gain information from PRISE into a learned scoring function for scenario ranking and selection. Extensive results on three 2RO problems show that NeurPRISE consistently achieves competitive regret relative to comprehensive methods, maintains strong calability with varying numbers of scenarios, and delivers 7-200x speedup over PRISE. NeurPRISE also exhibits strong zero-shot generalization, effectively handling instances with larger problem scales (up to 5x), more scenarios (up to 4x), and distribution shifts.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于GNN-Transformer的神经代理模型NeurPRISE，通过模仿学习加速两阶段鲁棒优化的场景缩减。
analysis.research_motivation: 两阶段鲁棒优化（2RO）在离散不确定性下计算困难，场景缩减可降低复杂度，但现有方法忽略问题结构且计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地构建高质量的代表性子场景集，以在保持解质量的同时大幅降低2RO的计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PRISE（问题驱动的顺序前瞻启发式）和NeurPRISE（基于GNN-Transformer的神经代理模型）。PRISE通过评估每个场景的边际影响逐步构建子集；NeurPRISE通过模仿学习从PRISE中蒸馏边际增益信息，学习评分函数用于场景排序和选择。
contributions: 提出PRISE，一种问题驱动的顺序前瞻启发式方法，用于两阶段鲁棒优化的场景缩减。
提出NeurPRISE，一种基于GNN-Transformer的神经代理模型，通过模仿学习和增益感知排序目标加速场景选择。
在三个2RO问题上验证，NeurPRISE在保持竞争性遗憾的同时，实现7-200倍加速，并展现强零样本泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在三个两阶段鲁棒优化问题上进行实验，结果显示NeurPRISE在遗憾指标上与综合方法相当，计算速度比PRISE提升7-200倍，且能零样本泛化到更大问题规模（5倍）、更多场景（4倍）和分布偏移。
limitations: 可能依赖PRISE生成的高质量训练数据，若PRISE本身有偏差则影响学习效果。
GNN-Transformer架构的泛化能力可能受限于训练分布，极端分布偏移下性能未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于GNN-Transformer的神经代理模型NeurPRISE，通过模仿学习加速两阶段鲁棒优化的场景缩减。

papers.title: Deepchecks: Evaluating Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) augmented with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques are revolutionizing applications across multiple domains, such as healthcare, finance, and customer service. Despite their potential, evaluating RAG systems remains a complex challenge due to the stochastic nature of generated outputs and the intricate interplay between retrieval and generation components. This paper introduces Deepchecks, a comprehensive framework tailored for evaluating RAG applications. Deepchecks' evaluation framework addresses RAG applications evaluation through a multi-faceted approach, root cause analysis and production monitoring. By ensuring alignment with application-specific requirements, Deepchecks framework provides a robust foundation for assessing reliability, relevance, and user satisfaction in RAG systems.

analysis.tldr: Deepchecks 是一个专为评估 RAG 系统设计的综合框架，通过多维度评估、根因分析和生产监控来确保系统可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG 系统在多个领域广泛应用，但由于生成输出的随机性和检索与生成组件间的复杂交互，其评估面临巨大挑战。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个全面、系统化的框架来评估 RAG 系统的可靠性、相关性和用户满意度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Deepchecks 框架，采用多维度评估、根因分析和生产监控的方法。
contributions: 提出了一个专门用于评估 RAG 应用的综合框架 Deepchecks。
通过多维度评估、根因分析和生产监控，确保 RAG 系统与应用需求对齐。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏对特定领域（如医疗、金融）的定制化评估指标。
根因分析的准确性和效率可能依赖于框架的实现细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Deepchecks 是一个专为评估 RAG 系统设计的综合框架，通过多维度评估、根因分析和生产监控来确保系统可靠性。

papers.title: LEMON: Learning Executable Multi-Agent Orchestration via Counterfactual Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become a strong foundation for multi-agent systems, but their effectiveness depends heavily on orchestration design. Across different tasks, role design, capacity assignment, and dependency construction jointly affect both solution quality and execution efficiency. Existing approaches automate parts of this design process, yet they often optimize these decisions partially or sequentially, and rely on execution-level feedback that provides limited credit assignment for local orchestration decisions. We propose LEMON (\textbf{L}earning \textbf{E}xecutable \textbf{M}ulti-agent \textbf{O}rchestratio\textbf{N} via Counterfactual Reinforcement Learning), an LLM-based orchestrator that generates an executable orchestration specification. The specification integrates task-specific roles, customized duties, capacity levels, and dependency structure into a single deployable system. To train the orchestrator, we augment the orchestration-level GRPO objective with a localized counterfactual signal that edits role, capacity, or dependency fields and applies the resulting reward contrast only to the edited spans. Experiments on six reasoning and coding benchmarks, including MMLU, GSM8K, AQuA, MultiArith, SVAMP, and HumanEval, show that LEMON achieves state-of-the-art performance among the evaluated multi-agent orchestration methods. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出LEMON框架，通过反事实强化学习自动生成可执行的多智能体编排方案，在六个推理和编码基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统的性能高度依赖编排设计（角色、能力、依赖关系），但现有方法优化不全面且依赖执行级反馈，难以对局部编排决策进行有效信用分配。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成集成角色、职责、能力级别和依赖结构的可执行多智能体编排方案，并实现高效的局部信用分配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于LLM的编排器LEMON，生成可执行编排规范；训练时在GRPO目标基础上增加局部反事实信号，通过编辑角色、能力或依赖字段并仅对编辑跨度应用奖励对比来优化。
contributions: 提出LEMON框架，能生成集成角色、职责、能力级别和依赖结构的可执行多智能体编排方案。
引入反事实强化学习方法，通过局部编辑和奖励对比实现更精细的信用分配。
在六个推理和编码基准上取得SOTA性能，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在MMLU、GSM8K、AQuA、MultiArith、SVAMP和HumanEval六个基准上评估，LEMON达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的生成质量，对复杂任务编排的泛化性有待验证。
反事实信号编辑策略可能引入偏差，需进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LEMON框架，通过反事实强化学习自动生成可执行的多智能体编排方案，在六个推理和编码基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: From Table to Cell: Attention for Better Reasoning with TABALIGN
papers.abstract: Multi-step LLM reasoning over structured tables fails because planning and execution share no explicit cell-grounding contract. Existing methods constrain the planner to a left-to-right factorization at odds with table permutation invariance, and score intermediate states by generated content alone, overlooking cell grounding. We conduct a pilot study showing that diffusion language models (DLMs) produce more human-aligned and permutation-stable cell attention on tables than autoregressive models, with a 40.2% median reduction in attention-AUROC variability under row reordering. Motivated by this, we propose TABALIGN, a planned table reasoning framework that operationalizes the contract. TABALIGN pairs a masked DLM planner, whose bidirectional denoising emits plan steps as binary cell masks, with TABATTN, a lightweight verifier trained on 1,600 human-verified attention standards to score each step by its attention overlap with the plan-designated mask. Across eight benchmarks covering table question answering and fact verification, TABALIGN improves average accuracy by 15.76 percentage points over the strongest open-source baseline at comparable 8B-class scale, with a matched-backbone ablation attributing 2.87 percentage points of this gain to the DLM planner over an AR planner on a fixed reasoner. Cleaner DLM plans also accelerate downstream reasoning execution by 44.64%.

analysis.tldr: TABALIGN通过扩散语言模型生成二进制细胞掩码作为计划步骤，并配合注意力验证器，显著提升表格推理的准确性和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在结构化表格上的多步推理失败，因为规划和执行之间缺乏显式的单元格对齐契约，且现有方法受限于从左到右的分解方式，与表格的排列不变性冲突。
analysis.problem: 如何为表格推理建立规划与执行之间的显式单元格对齐契约，并克服自回归模型在表格上的注意力不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散语言模型在表格上产生更符合人类对齐和排列稳定的细胞注意力，在行重排下注意力AUROC变异性中位数降低40.2%。
analysis.method: 提出TABALIGN框架，包括一个掩码扩散语言模型规划器（输出二进制细胞掩码作为计划步骤）和一个轻量级验证器TABATTN（基于1600个人工验证的注意力标准训练，通过注意力重叠分数评估每个步骤）。
contributions: 揭示了扩散语言模型在表格推理中比自回归模型更稳定和人类对齐的注意力特性。
提出了TABALIGN框架，通过显式细胞掩码规划与注意力验证实现更好的表格推理。
analysis.experiments: 在8个基准（涵盖表格问答和事实验证）上，TABALIGN相比最强开源8B级基线平均准确率提升15.76个百分点；消融实验显示扩散语言模型规划器贡献2.87个百分点；扩散语言模型计划使下游推理执行加速44.64%。
limitations: 依赖人工标注的注意力标准（1600个），可能难以扩展到更大规模。
仅验证了8B级模型，更大规模模型上的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TABALIGN通过扩散语言模型生成二进制细胞掩码作为计划步骤，并配合注意力验证器，显著提升表格推理的准确性和效率。

papers.title: OmniDrop: Layer-wise Token Pruning for Omni-modal LLMs via Query-Guidance
papers.abstract: Omni-modal large language models have demonstrated remarkable potential in holistic multimodal understanding; however, the token explosion caused by high-resolution audio and video inputs remains a critical bottleneck for real-time applications and long-form reasoning. Existing omni-modal token compression methods typically prune tokens at the input embedding level, relying on audio-video similarity or temporal co-occurrence as proxies for semantic relevance. In practice, such assumptions are often unreliable. To address this limitation, we propose OmniDrop, a training-free, layer-wise token pruning framework that progressively prunes audiovisual tokens within the LLM decoder layers rather than at the input-level, allowing early layers to preserve sufficient omni-modal information fusion before aggressively removing tokens in deeper layers. We further utilize text queries as guidance for modality-agnostic and task-adaptive token pruning. We also introduce a temporal diversity score that encourages balanced token survival to preserve global temporal context. Experimental results across various audiovisual benchmarks demonstrate that OmniDrop outperforms all baselines by up to 3.58 points while reducing prefill latency by up to 40% and memory usage by up to 14.7%.

analysis.tldr: 提出OmniDrop，一种无需训练、逐层剪枝的框架，在LLM解码器层内渐进剪枝音视频token，利用文本查询引导和时序多样性分数，实现高效全模态理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 全模态大语言模型在处理高分辨率音频和视频输入时面临token爆炸问题，严重阻碍实时应用和长程推理；现有方法在输入嵌入层剪枝，依赖不可靠的语义相关性假设。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲性能的前提下，高效压缩全模态LLM中的音视频token数量，降低推理延迟和内存占用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OmniDrop，一种无需训练的逐层token剪枝框架：在LLM解码器层内渐进剪枝音视频token，早期层保留充分信息融合，深层层激进剪枝；利用文本查询作为引导实现模态无关和任务自适应剪枝；引入时序多样性分数鼓励平衡token存活以保留全局时序上下文。
contributions: 提出OmniDrop，首个在LLM解码器层内进行逐层token剪枝的全模态压缩框架，无需额外训练。
利用文本查询引导和时序多样性分数实现模态无关、任务自适应的剪枝，显著降低预填充延迟和内存使用。
analysis.experiments: 在多种音视频基准上，OmniDrop优于所有基线，性能提升最多3.58点，同时预填充延迟降低最多40%，内存使用降低最多14.7%。
limitations: 可能依赖文本查询质量，对于无文本查询的任务适应性有限。
时序多样性分数的有效性可能受视频内容动态性影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OmniDrop，一种无需训练、逐层剪枝的框架，在LLM解码器层内渐进剪枝音视频token，利用文本查询引导和时序多样性分数，实现高效全模态理解。

papers.title: Stateful Reasoning via Insight Replay
papers.abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has become a foundation for eliciting multi-step reasoning in large language models, but recent studies show that its benefits do not scale monotonically with chain length: while longer CoT generally enables a model to tackle harder problems, on a given problem, accuracy typically increases with CoT length up to a point, after which it declines. We identify a major cause of this phenomenon: as the CoT grows, the model's attention to critical insights produced earlier in the trace gradually weakens, making those insights progressively less accessible when they are most needed. Therefore, we propose \textbf{InsightReplay}, a stateful reasoning approach in which the model periodically extracts critical insights from its reasoning trace and replays them near the active generation frontier, keeping them accessible as the reasoning scales. Extensive experiments on a $\mathbf{2}\!\times\!\mathbf{3}\!\times\!\mathbf{4}$ benchmark grid, covering model scales $\{\text{8B}, \text{30B}\}$, model families $\{\text{Qwen3.5}, \text{DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen}, \text{Gemma-4}\}$, and reasoning benchmarks $\{\text{AIME}, \text{HMMT}, \text{GPQA Diamond}, \text{LiveCodeBench v5}\}$, show that 3-round InsightReplay yields accuracy gains across \textbf{all 24 settings}, with an averaged improvement of $\mathbf{+1.65}$ points over standard CoT, and a largest single-setting gain of $\mathbf{+9.2}$ points on R1-Distill-32B's LiveCodeBench v5 subset. Our results suggest that the effectiveness of test-time scaling depends not only on how much a model reasons, but also on whether critical intermediate insights remain accessible throughout long reasoning trajectories.

analysis.tldr: InsightReplay 通过周期性重放推理轨迹中的关键洞察，缓解长链思维中注意力衰减问题，提升多步推理准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 长链思维（CoT）推理中，随着链长增加，模型对早期关键洞察的注意力逐渐减弱，导致准确率在达到峰值后下降，限制了测试时扩展的有效性。
analysis.problem: 长链推理中关键中间洞察的可访问性随链长增加而衰减，导致推理性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，CoT 推理的准确率随链长先升后降，原因是模型对早期产生的关键洞察的注意力逐渐减弱。
analysis.method: 提出 InsightReplay，一种有状态推理方法，模型定期从推理轨迹中提取关键洞察，并在活跃生成前沿附近重放，以保持其可访问性。
contributions: 识别了长链 CoT 推理中注意力衰减导致性能下降的现象。
提出 InsightReplay 方法，通过周期性重放关键洞察来缓解该问题。
在 2×3×4 基准网格（涵盖模型规模、家族和推理基准）上验证了方法有效性，所有 24 个设置均获得提升。
analysis.experiments: 在 2×3×4 基准网格上实验，包括模型规模 {8B, 30B}、模型家族 {Qwen3.5, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen, Gemma-4} 和推理基准 {AIME, HMMT, GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench v5}。3 轮 InsightReplay 在所有 24 个设置中均提升准确率，平均提升 +1.65 点，最大单设置提升 +9.2 点（R1-Distill-32B 的 LiveCodeBench v5 子集）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有显式推理轨迹的任务。
关键洞察的提取和重放策略可能需要针对不同模型或任务进行调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: InsightReplay 通过周期性重放推理轨迹中的关键洞察，缓解长链思维中注意力衰减问题，提升多步推理准确率。

papers.title: Intelligence Impact Quotient (IIQ): A Framework for Measuring Organizational AI Impact
papers.abstract: The Intelligence Impact Quotient (IIQ) is a composite metric intended to quantify the depth to which AI systems are integrated into organizational work and their impact. Rather than treating access counts or aggregate token volume as sufficient evidence of impact, IIQ combines a novelty-weighted, time-decayed token stock with usage frequency, a grace-period recency gate, organizational leverage, task complexity, and autonomy. The formulation produces a raw Intelligence Adoption Index (IAI) and a normalized 0-1000 IIQ index for comparison between heterogeneous users and units. We also derive sub-daily update rules and a bounded interpretation layer for estimated efficiency and financial impact. The paper positions IIQ as a deployment-oriented measurement framework: a formal proposal for tracking AI embedding in workflows, not a direct measure of model capability or a substitute for causal productivity evaluation. Synthetic scenarios illustrate how the revised metric distinguishes between frequent low-leverage use, semantically repetitive prompting, and more autonomous, higher-consequence AI-assisted work.

analysis.tldr: 提出IIQ框架，用于量化组织内AI集成深度与影响，而非模型能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有指标（如访问次数、token总量）不足以衡量AI对组织工作的真实影响，需要更精细的度量框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个复合指标，量化AI系统在组织工作流中的集成深度和实际影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: IIQ结合新颖性加权、时间衰减的token存量、使用频率、宽限期最近门控、组织杠杆、任务复杂度和自主性，生成原始IAI和归一化0-1000 IIQ指数，并推导亚日更新规则和解释层。
contributions: 提出IIQ框架，综合多维度量化AI集成深度与影响
设计归一化指数和亚日更新规则，支持异构用户和单元比较
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供真实组织数据验证
框架依赖主观参数设定（如权重、衰减因子）
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IIQ框架，用于量化组织内AI集成深度与影响，而非模型能力。

papers.title: Prompting Policies for Multi-step Reasoning and Tool-Use in Black-box LLMs with Iterative Distillation of Experience
papers.abstract: The shift toward interacting with frozen, "black-box" Large Language Models (LLMs) has transformed prompt engineering from a heuristic exercise into a critical optimization challenge. We propose a Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework for training learned prompting policies via iterative distillation of experience. In this architecture, a lightweight prompter model is optimized to maximize task-specific rewards for a larger, frozen worker LLM. By utilizing a contrastive experience buffer that couples scalar rewards with dense textual critiques, our approach effectively amortizes iterative prompt refinement into single-shot policy weights. Our experimental analysis focuses on the Big Bench Extra Hard (BBEH) and Tau-bench suites, covering a diverse range of multi-step reasoning and tool-use tasks. We demonstrate significant gains, improving performance from 55% to 90% in logic-intensive reasoning and 74% to 91% in tool-use tasks. Furthermore, we analyze the structural evolution of prompts, demonstrating how the policy discovers specialized algorithmic heuristics. We provide comprehensive comparisons against state-of-the-art evolutionary baselines like GEPA, showing that iterative distillation achieves superior performance with higher sample efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出强化学习框架，通过迭代经验蒸馏学习提示策略，显著提升黑盒LLM在多步推理和工具使用任务中的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 与冻结的黑盒LLM交互时，提示工程从启发式练习转变为关键优化挑战，现有方法依赖人工或进化搜索，效率低且难以自适应。
analysis.problem: 如何自动学习最优提示策略，以最大化黑盒LLM在复杂多步推理和工具使用任务中的奖励。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出强化学习框架，训练轻量级提示器模型，通过对比经验缓冲（耦合标量奖励与密集文本批评）将迭代提示优化蒸馏为单次策略权重。
contributions: 提出基于强化学习的提示策略学习框架，通过迭代经验蒸馏优化黑盒LLM的提示。
在BBEH和Tau-bench套件上实现显著性能提升，逻辑推理从55%到90%，工具使用从74%到91%。
分析提示结构演化，展示策略发现专用算法启发式，并与GEPA等基线比较，证明更高样本效率。
analysis.experiments: 在Big Bench Extra Hard (BBEH)和Tau-bench套件上进行实验，涵盖多步推理和工具使用任务，与GEPA等进化基线比较，显示迭代蒸馏在性能和样本效率上的优势。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务奖励设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
轻量级提示器模型可能无法处理极长或复杂提示。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出强化学习框架，通过迭代经验蒸馏学习提示策略，显著提升黑盒LLM在多步推理和工具使用任务中的性能。

papers.title: Synthesizing POMDP Policies: Sampling Meets Model-checking via Learning
papers.abstract: Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) are the standard framework for decision-making under uncertainty. While sampling-based methods scale well, they lack formal correctness guarantees, making them unsuitable for safety-critical applications. Conversely, formal synthesis techniques provide correctness-by-construction but often struggle with scalability, as general POMDP synthesis is undecidable. To bridge this gap, we propose a synthesis framework that integrates sampling, automata learning, and model-checking. Inspired by Angluin's $L^*$ algorithm, our approach utilizes sampling as a membership oracle and model-checking as an equivalence oracle. This enables the synthesis of finite-state controllers with formal guarantees, provided the sampling-induced policy is regular. We establish a relative completeness result for this framework. Experimental results from our prototypical implementation demonstrate that this method successfully solves threshold-safety problems that remain challenging for existing formal synthesis tools. We believe our algorithm serves as a valuable component in a portfolio approach to tackling the inherent difficulty of POMDP synthesis problems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合采样、自动机学习和模型检验的POMDP策略综合框架，在保持可扩展性的同时提供形式化保证。
analysis.research_motivation: POMDP是决策制定的标准框架，但采样方法缺乏形式化保证，不适合安全关键应用；而形式化综合方法可扩展性差，且一般POMDP综合不可判定。需要一种兼顾可扩展性和形式化保证的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何为POMDP综合出具有形式化正确性保证的有限状态控制器，同时保持可扩展性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 受Angluin的L*算法启发，将采样作为成员查询，模型检验作为等价查询，通过自动机学习迭代合成有限状态控制器。
contributions: 提出一个集成采样、自动机学习和模型检验的POMDP策略综合框架。
证明了该框架的相对完备性：当采样诱导的策略是正则时，可综合出具有形式化保证的控制器。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖采样诱导策略的正则性假设。
原型实现可能仅适用于特定规模的问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合采样、自动机学习和模型检验的POMDP策略综合框架，在保持可扩展性的同时提供形式化保证。

papers.title: BEAM: Binary Expert Activation Masking for Dynamic Routing in MoE
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures enhance the efficiency of large language models by activating only a subset of experts per token. However, standard MoE employs a fixed Top-K routing strategy, leading to redundant computation and suboptimal inference latency. Existing acceleration methods either require costly retraining with architectural changes or suffer from severe performance drop at high sparsity due to train-inference mismatch. To address these limitations, we propose BEAM (Binary Expert Activation Masking), a novel method that learns token-adaptive expert selection via trainable binary masks. With a straight-through estimator and an auxiliary regularization loss, BEAM induces dynamic expert sparsity through end-to-end training while maintaining model capability. We further implement an efficient custom CUDA kernel for BEAM, ensuring seamless integration with the vLLM inference framework. Experiments show that BEAM retains over 98\% of the original model's performance while reducing MoE layer FLOPs by up to 85\%, achieving up to 2.5$\times$ faster decoding and 1.4$\times$ higher throughput, demonstrating its effectiveness as a practical, plug-and-play solution for efficient MoE inference.

analysis.tldr: BEAM通过可训练二值掩码实现MoE动态专家路由，在保持98%以上性能的同时减少85%计算量。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准MoE使用固定Top-K路由策略导致冗余计算和次优推理延迟，现有加速方法要么需要昂贵重训练，要么在高稀疏度下因训练-推理不匹配而性能严重下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重训练且不牺牲性能的前提下，实现MoE的token自适应动态专家稀疏路由。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BEAM方法，通过可训练二值掩码学习token自适应专家选择，使用直通估计器和辅助正则化损失进行端到端训练，并实现自定义CUDA内核以无缝集成vLLM推理框架。
contributions: 提出BEAM方法，通过可训练二值掩码实现动态专家稀疏路由，无需重训练。
设计辅助正则化损失和直通估计器，在保持模型能力的同时诱导专家稀疏性。
实现高效自定义CUDA内核，与vLLM框架集成，实现实际加速。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，BEAM在保持原始模型98%以上性能的同时，将MoE层FLOPs减少高达85%，解码速度提升2.5倍，吞吐量提升1.4倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定MoE架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
二值掩码的训练稳定性可能对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BEAM通过可训练二值掩码实现MoE动态专家路由，在保持98%以上性能的同时减少85%计算量。

papers.title: DVMap: Fine-Grained Pluralistic Value Alignment via High-Consensus Demographic-Value Mapping
papers.abstract: Current Large Language Models (LLMs) typically rely on coarse-grained national labels for pluralistic value alignment. However, such macro-level supervision often obscures intra-country value heterogeneity, yielding a loose alignment. We argue that resolving this limitation requires shifting from national labels to multi-dimensional demographic constraints, which can identify groups with predictable, high-consensus value preference. To this end, we propose DVMap (High-Consensus Demographic-Value Mapping), a framework for fine-grained pluralistic value alignment. In this framework, we first present a demographic archetype extraction strategy to construct a high-quality value alignment corpus of 56,152 samples from the World Values Survey (WVS) by strictly retaining respondents with consistent value preferences under identical demographics. Over this corpus, we introduce a Structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) mechanism that explicitly guides LLMs to reason about demographic-value correlations. Subsequently, we employ Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to achieve adaptive anchoring of value distributions. To rigorously evaluate generalization, we further establish a triple-generalization benchmark (spanning cross-demographic, cross-country, and cross-value) comprising 21,553 samples. Experimental results demonstrate that DVMap effectively learns the manifold mapping from demographics to values, exhibiting strong generalization and robustness. On cross-demographic tests, Qwen3-8B-DVMap achieves 48.6% accuracy, surpassing the advanced open-source LLM DeepSeek-v3.2 (45.1%). The source code and dataset are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出DVMap框架，通过高共识人口统计-价值映射实现细粒度多元价值对齐，超越粗粒度国家标签方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM多元价值对齐依赖粗粒度的国家标签，忽略了国家内部的价值异质性，导致对齐松散。
analysis.problem: 如何从国家标签转向多维人口统计约束，识别具有可预测、高共识价值偏好的群体，实现细粒度多元价值对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DVMap框架，包括：1) 人口统计原型提取策略，从世界价值观调查中构建高质量对齐语料；2) 结构化思维链机制，引导LLM推理人口统计与价值的相关性；3) 使用GRPO实现价值分布的自适应锚定。
contributions: 提出从国家标签转向多维人口统计约束的细粒度多元价值对齐方法。
构建了包含56,152样本的高质量价值对齐语料和21,553样本的三重泛化基准。
实验证明DVMap有效学习人口统计到价值的流形映射，在跨人口统计测试中Qwen3-8B-DVMap准确率48.6%，超越DeepSeek-v3.2的45.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在跨人口统计、跨国家、跨价值的三重泛化基准上评估，Qwen3-8B-DVMap在跨人口统计测试中准确率48.6%，超越DeepSeek-v3.2的45.1%。
limitations: 依赖世界价值观调查数据，可能受限于调查覆盖的人口统计维度。
GRPO训练可能对超参数敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DVMap框架，通过高共识人口统计-价值映射实现细粒度多元价值对齐，超越粗粒度国家标签方法。

papers.title: A Unified Knowledge Embedded Reinforcement Learning-based Framework for Generalized Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problems
papers.abstract: The Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) is a fundamental NP-hard problem with broad applications in logistics and transportation. Real-world CVRPs often involve diverse objectives and complex constraints, such as time windows or backhaul requirements, motivating the development of a unified solution framework. Recent reinforcement learning (RL) approaches have shown promise in combinatorial optimization, yet they rely on end-to-end learning and lack explicit problem-solving knowledge, limiting solution quality. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-embedded framework inspired by the Route-First Cluster-Second heuristics. It incorporates knowledge at two levels: (1) decomposing CVRPs into the route-first and cluster-second subproblems, and (2) leveraging dynamic programming to solve the second subproblem, whose results guide the RL-based constructive solver to solve the first problem. To mitigate partial observability caused by problem decomposition, we introduce a unified history-enhanced context processing module. Extensive experiments show that this framework achieves superior solution quality compared with state-of-the-art learning-based methods, with a smaller gap to classical heuristics, demonstrating strong generalization across diverse CVRP variants.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识嵌入的强化学习框架，通过分解CVRP为路径优先-聚类次优子问题并利用动态规划引导RL求解，显著提升解质量和泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实CVRP常涉及多样目标和复杂约束，现有RL方法依赖端到端学习，缺乏显式问题求解知识，解质量有限。
analysis.problem: 如何将领域知识有效嵌入RL框架，以统一求解多种带约束的CVRP变体并提升解质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 受Route-First Cluster-Second启发，将CVRP分解为路径优先和聚类次优子问题；用RL求解路径优先子问题，动态规划求解聚类次优子问题并反馈引导RL；引入统一的历史增强上下文处理模块缓解部分可观测性。
contributions: 提出知识嵌入的RL框架，通过两级知识分解和动态规划引导提升CVRP求解质量。
设计历史增强上下文处理模块，缓解问题分解导致的部分可观测性。
实验表明框架在多种CVRP变体上优于现有学习方法，泛化性强。
analysis.experiments: 在多种CVRP变体上对比SOTA学习方法，解质量更优且与经典启发式差距更小。
limitations: 可能依赖动态规划子问题的精确求解效率。
框架复杂度较高，大规模实例下计算开销需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识嵌入的强化学习框架，通过分解CVRP为路径优先-聚类次优子问题并利用动态规划引导RL求解，显著提升解质量和泛化性。

papers.title: Metis AI: The Overlooked Middle Zone Between AI-Native and World-Movers
papers.abstract: The dominant discourse on AI limitations frames the boundary of AI capability as a divide between digital tasks (where AI excels) and physical tasks (where embodiment is required). We argue this framing misses the most consequential boundary: the one within digital tasks. We identify a class of tasks we call Metis AI, named for the Greek concept of metis (practical, contextual knowledge), that are performed entirely on computers yet resist reliable AI automation. These tasks are not computationally intractable; they are institutionally, socially, and normatively entangled in ways that defeat algorithmic approaches. We distinguish constitutive metis (knowledge destroyed by the act of formalization) from operational metis (system-specific familiarity that automation can progressively absorb), and propose five structural characteristics that define the Metis AI zone: consequential irreversibility, relational irreducibility, normative open texture, adversarial co-evolution, and accountability anchoring. We ground each in established theory from across the social sciences, philosophy, and humanitarian practice, argue that these characteristics are properties of the tasks themselves rather than limitations of current models, and show that the appropriate design response is not better automation but centaur architectures in which humans lead and AI supports.

analysis.tldr: 论文提出“Metis AI”概念，指出数字任务中存在一类因制度、社会、规范纠缠而难以自动化的工作，并主张采用人类主导、AI辅助的半人马架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI局限性讨论主要聚焦于数字任务与物理任务的边界，忽略了数字任务内部存在一类因制度、社会、规范纠缠而难以自动化的任务，这导致对AI能力边界的理解不完整。
analysis.problem: 识别并定义一类完全在计算机上执行但难以可靠自动化的任务（Metis AI），分析其结构特征，并探讨合适的设计响应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，Metis AI任务并非计算上不可解，而是因制度、社会、规范纠缠而难以形式化，并区分了构成性metis（形式化即破坏知识）与操作性metis（可逐步吸收的熟悉性）。
analysis.method: 通过跨社会科学、哲学和人道主义实践的理论分析，提出Metis AI的五个结构特征：后果不可逆性、关系不可约性、规范开放纹理、对抗性共同演化、问责锚定，并论证这些特征是任务本身的属性而非当前模型的局限。
contributions: 提出Metis AI概念，填补了数字任务中自动化边界讨论的空白
区分构成性metis与操作性metis，并定义五个结构特征
论证适当的响应不是更好的自动化，而是人类主导、AI支持的半人马架构
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 概念框架缺乏实证验证
五个特征的操作化定义可能不够精确
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文提出“Metis AI”概念，指出数字任务中存在一类因制度、社会、规范纠缠而难以自动化的工作，并主张采用人类主导、AI辅助的半人马架构。

papers.title: Coding Agent Is Good As World Simulator
papers.abstract: World models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for building interactive simulation environments, with recent video-based approaches demonstrating impressive progress in generating visually plausible dynamics. However, because these models typically infer dynamics from video and represent them in latent states, they do not explicitly enforce physical constraints. As a result, the generated video rollouts are not physically plausible, exhibiting unstable contacts, distorted shapes, or inconsistent motion. In this paper, we present an agentic framework constructing physics-based world models through executable simulation code. The framework coordinates planning, code generation, visual review, and physics analysis agents. The planning agent converts the natural language prompt into a structured scene plan, the code agent implements it as executable simulation code, and the visual review agent provide visual feedback while the physics analysis agent checks physical consistency. The code is iteratively revised based on the feedback until the simulation matches the prompt reqirements and physical constraints. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms advanced video-based models in physical accuracy, instruction fidelity and visual quality, which could be applied to various scenarios including driving simulation and embodied robot tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出通过代码生成构建物理仿真世界模型的智能体框架，优于视频基模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于视频的世界模型虽能生成视觉上合理的动态，但未显式施加物理约束，导致生成的视频滚动在物理上不真实，存在不稳定接触、形状扭曲或运动不一致等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何构建物理上可信的交互式仿真环境，使生成的世界模型既满足自然语言指令又符合物理规律。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视频基世界模型因从视频推断动态并以隐状态表示，无法显式保证物理约束，导致生成内容物理不真实。
analysis.method: 提出智能体框架，包含规划、代码生成、视觉审查和物理分析四个智能体，通过迭代生成和修正可执行仿真代码来构建物理基世界模型。
contributions: 提出一种通过代码生成构建物理基世界模型的智能体框架，显式施加物理约束。
在物理准确性、指令忠实度和视觉质量上超越先进视频基模型，适用于驾驶仿真和具身机器人任务。
analysis.experiments: 实验结果表明，该框架在物理准确性、指令忠实度和视觉质量上优于先进视频基模型，并可用于驾驶仿真和具身机器人任务。
limitations: 可能依赖仿真引擎的物理精度，复杂场景下代码生成可能出错。
多智能体迭代可能增加计算开销和延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出通过代码生成构建物理仿真世界模型的智能体框架，优于视频基模型。

papers.title: Learning to Build the Environment: Self-Evolving Reasoning RL via Verifiable Environment Synthesis
papers.abstract: We pursue a vision for self-improving language models in which the model does not merely generate problems or traces to imitate, but constructs the environments that train it. In zero-data reasoning RL, this reframes self-improvement from a data-generation loop into an environment-construction loop, where each artifact is a reusable executable object that samples instances, computes references, and scores responses. Whether this vision sustains improvement hinges on a single property: the environments must exhibit stable solve--verify asymmetry, the model must be able to write an oracle once that it cannot reliably execute in natural language on fresh instances. This asymmetry takes two complementary forms. Some tasks are algorithmically hard to reason through but trivial as code: a dynamic program or graph traversal, compiled once, yields unboundedly many calibrated instances. Others are intrinsically hard to solve but easy to verify, like planted subset-sum or constraint satisfaction. Both create a durable gap between proposing and solving that the policy cannot close by gaming the verifier, and it is this gap that keeps reward informative as the learner improves. We instantiate this view in EvoEnv, a single-policy generator, solver method that synthesizes Python environments from ten seeds and admits them only after staged validation, semantic self-review, solver-relative difficulty calibration, and novelty checks. The strongest evidence comes from the already-strong regime: on Qwen3-4B-Thinking, fixed public-data RLVR and fixed hand-crafted environment RLVR reduce the average, while EvoEnv improves it from 72.4 to 74.8, a relative gain of 3.3%. Stable self-improvement, we suggest, depends not on producing more synthetic data, but on models learning to construct worlds whose difficulty stays structurally beyond their own reach.

analysis.tldr: 提出EvoEnv方法，让语言模型通过构建可验证环境实现自我进化的推理强化学习，在Qwen3-4B-Thinking上取得3.3%的相对提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有零数据推理强化学习依赖生成问题或轨迹进行模仿，但模型容易通过取巧方式欺骗验证器，导致奖励信号失效，无法持续自我提升。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型在无外部数据的情况下，通过构建环境实现稳定且持续的自我改进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，自我提升的关键在于环境必须具有稳定的“求解-验证不对称性”：模型能编写一次验证器，但无法在自然语言中可靠执行。这种不对称性确保奖励信号始终具有信息量，防止策略通过取巧方式关闭差距。
analysis.method: EvoEnv：一种单策略生成器-求解器方法，从十个种子合成Python环境，并通过分阶段验证、语义自审、求解器相对难度校准和新颖性检查来筛选环境。
contributions: 提出环境构建循环替代数据生成循环的自我改进范式，强调求解-验证不对称性的核心作用。
实现EvoEnv方法，在Qwen3-4B-Thinking上验证了稳定自我提升效果，相对提升3.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-4B-Thinking模型上，与固定公共数据RLVR和固定手工环境RLVR对比，EvoEnv将平均性能从72.4提升至74.8，相对增益3.3%。
limitations: 仅在一个模型上验证，泛化性未知。
环境合成过程可能引入偏差或覆盖范围有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EvoEnv方法，让语言模型通过构建可验证环境实现自我进化的推理强化学习，在Qwen3-4B-Thinking上取得3.3%的相对提升。

papers.title: Nexus : An Agentic Framework for Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Time series forecasting is not just numerical extrapolation, but often requires reasoning with unstructured contextual data such as news or events. While specialized Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) excel at forecasting based on numerical patterns, they remain unaware to real-world textual signals. Conversely, while LLMs are emerging as zero-shot forecasters, their performance remains uneven across domains and contextual grounding. To bridge this gap, we introduce Nexus, a multi-agent forecasting framework that decomposes prediction into specialized stages: isolating macro-level and micro-level temporal fluctuations, and integrating contextual information when available before synthesizing a final forecast. This decomposition enables Nexus to adapt from seasonal signals to volatile, event-driven information without relying on external statistical anchors or monolithic prompting. We show that current-generation LLMs possess substantially stronger intrinsic forecasting ability than previously recognized, depending critically on how numerical and contextual reasoning are organized. Evaluated on data strictly succeeding LLM knowledge cutoffs spanning Zillow real estate metrics and volatile stock market equities, Nexus consistently matches or outperforms state-of-the-art TSFMs and strong LLM baselines. Beyond numerical accuracy, Nexus produces high-quality reasoning traces that explicitly show the fundamental drivers behind each forecast. Our results establish that real-world forecasting is an agentic reasoning problem extending well beyond only sequence modeling.

analysis.tldr: Nexus 是一个多智能体框架，通过分解预测阶段并整合文本上下文，显著提升了时间序列预测的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 时间序列预测不仅需要数值外推，还常需结合新闻或事件等非结构化上下文数据，但现有时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）无法感知文本信号，而LLM作为零样本预测器性能不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合数值模式与文本上下文信息，提升时间序列预测在事件驱动场景下的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前LLM具有比先前认知更强的内在预测能力，但严重依赖于数值和上下文推理的组织方式。
analysis.method: 提出多智能体框架Nexus，将预测分解为宏观与微观波动分离、上下文信息整合等专门阶段，最终合成预测。
contributions: 提出Nexus，一种将时间序列预测分解为专门阶段的多智能体框架，能自适应季节性信号和事件驱动信息。
实验表明LLM的内在预测能力比先前认知更强，且Nexus在Zillow房地产和股票市场数据上匹配或超越SOTA TSFMs和LLM基线。
analysis.experiments: 在Zillow房地产指标和股票市场数据上评估，数据严格晚于LLM知识截止日期，Nexus匹配或超越SOTA TSFMs和强LLM基线。
limitations: 框架依赖LLM的推理能力，可能受限于LLM的上下文长度和计算成本。
未在更多领域（如能源、交通）验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Nexus 是一个多智能体框架，通过分解预测阶段并整合文本上下文，显著提升了时间序列预测的准确性和可解释性。

papers.title: Uncovering the Representation Geometry of Minimal Cores in Overcomplete Reasoning Traces
papers.abstract: Language models often generate long chain-of-thought traces, but it remains unclear how much of this reasoning is necessary for preserving the final prediction. We study this through the lens of overcomplete reasoning traces: generated traces that contain more intermediate steps than are needed to support the model's answer. We define the minimal core as the smallest subset of steps that preserves either the final answer or predictive distribution, and introduce metrics for compression ratio, redundancy mass, step necessity, and necessity concentration. Across six deliberative reasoning benchmarks spanning arithmetic, competition mathematics, expert scientific reasoning, and commonsense multi-hop QA, we find substantial overcompleteness: on average, 46% of steps are removable under greedy minimal-core extraction while preserving the original answer in 86% of cases. We also find that predictive support is concentrated: the top three steps account for 65% of measured necessity mass on average. Beyond compression, minimal cores expose a cleaner geometry of reasoning: compared with full traces, they improve correct-incorrect trace separation by 11 points, reduce estimated intrinsic dimensionality by 34%, and transfer across model families with 85% off-diagonal answer retention. Theoretically, we establish existence of minimal sufficient subsets, local irreducibility guarantees for greedy elimination, and certificates of overcompleteness and sparse necessity. Together, these results suggest that full reasoning traces are often verbose and overcomplete, while minimal cores isolate the effective support underlying language-model predictions.

analysis.tldr: 语言模型推理轨迹存在大量冗余，最小核心子集能保留预测结果并揭示更清晰的几何结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型常生成长链推理轨迹，但其中多少步骤对最终预测是必要的尚不清楚，理解冗余有助于压缩和解释模型行为。
analysis.problem: 量化推理轨迹中的冗余程度，并提取保留预测的最小步骤子集（最小核心）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现推理轨迹高度过完备：平均46%的步骤可移除，86%情况下保留原答案；预测支持集中在少数步骤（前三步占65%必要性质量）。
analysis.method: 定义最小核心为保留最终答案或预测分布的最小子集，引入压缩比、冗余质量、步骤必要性、必要性集中度等指标，采用贪心消除算法提取。
contributions: 提出最小核心概念及量化冗余的指标，揭示推理轨迹的过完备性。
实验证明最小核心改善正确-错误轨迹分离（+11点）、降低内在维度（-34%），并跨模型迁移（85%答案保留）。
理论建立最小充分子集存在性、贪心消除的局部不可约性保证，以及过完备性和稀疏必要性的认证。
analysis.experiments: 在六个推理基准（算术、竞赛数学、专家科学推理、常识多跳QA）上评估，摘要未提供具体实验结果细节。
limitations: 贪心消除可能无法保证全局最优最小核心。
方法依赖于离散步骤划分，可能不适用于连续或隐式推理。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 语言模型推理轨迹存在大量冗余，最小核心子集能保留预测结果并揭示更清晰的几何结构。

papers.title: Herculean: An Agentic Benchmark for Financial Intelligence
papers.abstract: As AI agents improve, the central question is no longer whether they can solve isolated well-defined financial tasks, but whether they can reliably carry out financial professional work. Existing financial benchmarks offer only a partial view of this ability, as they primarily evaluate static competencies such as question answering, retrieval, summarization, and classification.
