We introduce Herculean, the first skilled benchmark for agentic financial intelligence spanning four representative workflows, including Trading, Hedging, Market Insights, and Auditing. Each workflow is instantiated as a standardized MCP-based skill environment with its own tools, interaction dynamics, constraints, and success criteria, enabling consistent end-to-end assessment of heterogeneous agent systems. Across frontier agents, we find agents perform relatively well on Trading and Market Insights, but struggle substantially on Hedging and Auditing, where long-horizon coordination, state consistency, and structured verification are critical. Overall, our results point to a key gap in current agents in turning financial reasoning into dependable workflow execution in high-stakes financial workflows.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向金融智能体的技能型基准Herculean，评估交易、对冲、市场洞察和审计四类工作流，发现现有智能体在对冲和审计等长程协调任务上表现不佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有金融基准主要评估静态能力（如问答、检索），无法衡量AI智能体在真实金融工作流中的可靠性，而金融领域对高可靠性和长程协调有极高要求。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够全面评估AI智能体在复杂金融工作流中端到端执行能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，前沿智能体在交易和市场洞察任务上表现相对较好，但在对冲和审计任务上严重不足，这些任务需要长程协调、状态一致性和结构化验证。
analysis.method: 构建Herculean基准，包含四个代表性金融工作流（交易、对冲、市场洞察、审计），每个工作流基于MCP协议标准化为技能环境，提供专用工具、交互动态、约束和成功标准。
contributions: 提出首个面向金融智能体的技能型基准Herculean，覆盖交易、对冲、市场洞察和审计四类工作流。
通过标准化MCP环境实现异构智能体系统的一致端到端评估。
揭示当前智能体在长程协调和结构化验证任务上的关键差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及对前沿智能体进行了评估并给出了定性发现。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖四个工作流，可能无法完全代表金融领域的全部复杂性。
未提供具体实验数据和对比结果，难以量化性能差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向金融智能体的技能型基准Herculean，评估交易、对冲、市场洞察和审计四类工作流，发现现有智能体在对冲和审计等长程协调任务上表现不佳。

papers.title: CrystalReasoner: Reasoning and RL for Property-Conditioned Crystal Structure Generation
papers.abstract: Generative modeling has emerged as a promising approach for crystal structure discovery. However, existing LLM-based generative models struggle with low-level atomic precision, while diffusion-based methods fall short in integrating high-level scientific knowledge. As a result, generated structures are often invalid, unstable, or do not possess desirable properties. To address this gap, we propose CrystalReasoner (\method), an end-to-end LLM framework that generates crystal structures from natural language instructions through reasoning and alignment. \method introduces physical priors as thinking tokens, which include crystallographic symmetry, local coordination environments and predicted physical properties before generating atomic coordinates. This bridges the gap between natural language and 3D structures. \method then employs reinforcement learning (RL) with a multi-objective, dense reward function to align generation with physical validity, chemical consistency, and thermodynamic stability. For property-conditioned tasks, we design task-specific reward functions and train specialized models for discrete constraints (e.g., space group) and continuous properties (e.g., elasticity, thermal expansion). Empirical results demonstrate that compared to prior works and baselines without thinking traces or RL, \method obtains better performance on diverse metrics, triples S.U.N. ratio, and achieves better performance for property conditioned generation. \method also exhibits adaptive reasoning, increasing reasoning lengths as the number of atoms increases. Our work demonstrates the potential of leveraging thinking traces and RL for generating valid, stable, and property-conditioned crystal structures. Please see our work at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: CrystalReasoner 通过引入物理先验作为思考令牌并结合强化学习，实现了从自然语言指令生成有效、稳定且满足特定属性的晶体结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于 LLM 的晶体结构生成模型缺乏原子级精度，而扩散方法难以整合高级科学知识，导致生成的结构常无效、不稳定或缺乏所需属性。
analysis.problem: 如何生成既满足物理有效性、化学一致性和热力学稳定性，又能根据自然语言指令控制特定属性（如空间群、弹性模量）的晶体结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 CrystalReasoner 框架，在生成原子坐标前引入物理先验（晶体对称性、局域配位环境、预测物理性质）作为思考令牌，并使用多目标密集奖励函数的强化学习对齐生成结果与物理有效性、化学一致性和热力学稳定性。针对属性条件任务设计专用奖励函数。
contributions: 提出将物理先验作为思考令牌的 LLM 框架，弥合自然语言与 3D 结构之间的鸿沟。
采用多目标密集奖励函数的强化学习，提升生成结构的物理有效性、化学一致性和热力学稳定性。
在属性条件生成任务上设计专用奖励函数，实现离散约束和连续属性的可控生成。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，与先前工作及无思考轨迹或 RL 的基线相比，CrystalReasoner 在多种指标上表现更优，将 S.U.N. 比率提升三倍，并在属性条件生成上取得更好性能。模型还展现出自适应推理能力，推理长度随原子数增加而增长。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量物理先验知识，对未知或复杂晶体系统的泛化能力有待验证。
强化学习训练可能对奖励函数设计敏感，需要领域专家调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CrystalReasoner 通过引入物理先验作为思考令牌并结合强化学习，实现了从自然语言指令生成有效、稳定且满足特定属性的晶体结构。

papers.title: Are Agents Ready to Teach? A Multi-Stage Benchmark for Real-World Teaching Workflows
papers.abstract: Language agents are increasingly deployed in complex professional workflows, with tutoring emerging as a particularly high-stakes capability that remains largely unmeasured in existing benchmarks. Effective tutor agents require more than producing correct answers or executing accurate tool calls: a robust tutor must diagnose learner state, adapt support over time, make pedagogically justified decisions grounded in educational evidence, and execute interventions within realistic learning-management systems. We introduce EduAgentBench, a source-grounded benchmark for holistically evaluating tutor agents across the full scope of teaching work. It contains 150 quality-controlled tasks across three capability surfaces: professional pedagogical judgment, situated multi-turn tutoring, and Canvas-style teaching workflow completion. Tasks are constructed through a pedagogical-insight-driven pipeline and evaluated with complementary verification signals and human review. Across a comprehensive evaluation of frontier models, our findings reveal that current models are generally capable of bounded pedagogical judgment, but still fall short of professional teaching standards in situated tutoring and autonomous teaching-workflow execution. To our knowledge, EduAgentBench is the first theory-grounded and realistic benchmark for evaluating the holistic teaching capability of tutor agents, providing a measurement foundation for developing future tutor agents that can support realistic teaching work.

analysis.tldr: EduAgentBench 是一个多阶段基准，用于评估语言代理在真实教学工作中的教学能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准缺乏对语言代理在教学场景中综合能力的评估，而有效的教学代理需要诊断学习者状态、适应支持、做出基于教育证据的决策并在真实学习管理系统中执行干预。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个全面、理论基础的基准来评估语言代理在真实教学工作中的教学能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前模型在有限的教学判断上表现尚可，但在情境化辅导和自主教学工作流执行方面仍达不到专业教学标准。
analysis.method: 构建了包含150个质量控制任务的EduAgentBench，覆盖三个能力层面：专业教学判断、情境化多轮辅导和Canvas式教学工作流完成。任务通过教学洞察驱动的流程构建，并使用互补验证信号和人工评审进行评估。
contributions: 提出了第一个理论驱动且真实的基准EduAgentBench，用于全面评估教学代理的教学能力。
通过系统评估揭示了当前前沿模型在教学能力上的不足，为未来教学代理的开发提供了测量基础。
analysis.experiments: 对多个前沿模型进行了全面评估，发现当前模型在情境化辅导和自主教学工作流执行方面仍达不到专业教学标准。
limitations: 基准任务可能无法覆盖所有教学场景。
评估依赖于人工评审，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EduAgentBench 是一个多阶段基准，用于评估语言代理在真实教学工作中的教学能力。

papers.title: Semantic Feature Segmentation for Interpretable Predictive Maintenance in Complex Systems
papers.abstract: Predictive maintenance in complex systems is often complicated by the heterogeneity and redundancy of monitored variables,which can obscure fault-relevant information and reduce model interpretability. This work proposes a semantic feature segmentation framework that decomposes the monitored feature space into a canonical component,expected to retain the dominant predictive information, and a residual component containing structurally peripheral signals. The segmentation is defined through domain informed criteria and sets up monitoring variables into functional groups reflecting operational mechanisms such as throughput,latency,pressure,network activity,and structural state. To evaluate the effectiveness of this decomposition, we adopt a predictive perspective in which expected predictive risk is used as an operational proxy for task-relevant information. Experimental results obtained through time-aware cross-validation show that the canonical space consistently achieves lower predictive risk than the residual space across multiple temporal configurations, indicating that the semantic segmentation concentrates the most relevant information for fault anticipation. In addition, the canonical segments exhibit significantly stronger intra-segment coherence than inter-segment dependence, and this structural organization remains stable after redundancy reduction. When compared with the full feature space and with a Principal Component Analysis (PCA) representation, the canonical space carries out comparable predictive performance and furthermore preserves the semantic meaning of the original variables. These findings suggest that semantic feature segmentation provides an interpretable and information-preserving decomposition of monitoring signals, enabling competitive predictive performance without sacrificing the operational interpretability required in predictive maintenance applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义特征分割框架，将监测特征分解为规范成分和残差成分，在保持可解释性的同时实现与全特征空间相当的预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂系统中的预测性维护常因监测变量的异质性和冗余性而难以提取故障相关信息，且模型可解释性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何对高维、异构的监测特征进行可解释的分解，以保留任务相关信息并提升模型可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 规范空间在多个时间配置下预测风险始终低于残差空间，且规范段内一致性显著强于段间依赖性，该结构在冗余缩减后仍保持稳定。
analysis.method: 基于领域知识定义语义分割标准，将特征空间分解为规范成分（保留主要预测信息）和残差成分（外围信号），并采用预测风险作为任务相关信息的代理。
contributions: 提出一种语义特征分割框架，将监测变量按功能分组，实现可解释的特征分解。
通过预测风险验证了规范空间集中了故障预测的最相关信息，且与全特征空间和PCA相比性能相当且保持语义。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂系统监测数据上使用时序感知交叉验证，比较规范空间、残差空间、全特征空间和PCA的预测风险及段内/段间一致性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 分割标准依赖领域知识，可能难以推广到缺乏先验的系统。
仅从预测风险角度评估信息相关性，未考虑其他任务（如故障诊断）的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义特征分割框架，将监测特征分解为规范成分和残差成分，在保持可解释性的同时实现与全特征空间相当的预测性能。

papers.title: Precise Verification of Transformers through ReLU-Catalyzed Abstraction Refinement
papers.abstract: Formal verification of transformers has become increasingly important due to their widespread deployment in safety-critical applications. Compared to classic neural networks, the inferences of transformers involve highly complex computations, such as dot products in self-attention layers, rendering their verification extremely difficult. Existing approaches explored over-approximation methods by constructing convex constraints to bound the output ranges of transformers, which can achieve high efficiency. However, they may sacrifice verification precision, and consequently introduce significant approximation error that leads to frequent occurrences of false alarms. In this paper, we propose a transformer verification approach that can achieve improved precision. At the core of our approach is a novel usage of ReLU, by which we represent a precise but non-linear bound for dot products such that we can further exploit the rich body of literature for convex relaxation of ReLU to derive precise bounds. We extend two classic approaches to the context of transformers, a rule-based one and an optimization-based one, resulting in two new frameworks for efficient and precise verification. We evaluate our approaches on different model architectures and robustness properties derived from two datasets about sentiment analysis, and compare with the state-of-the-art baseline approach. Compared to the baseline, our approach can achieve significant precision improvement for most of the verification tasks with acceptable compromise of efficiency, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 通过ReLU催化抽象精炼，实现Transformer的高精度形式化验证。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer在安全关键场景中广泛应用，但其自注意力层中的点积运算导致形式化验证极其困难，现有过近似方法虽高效但精度不足，易产生误报。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲过多效率的前提下，提高Transformer形式化验证的精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有过近似方法通过构造凸约束来限定输出范围，但引入显著近似误差，导致频繁误报。
analysis.method: 利用ReLU表示点积的精确但非线性边界，结合ReLU凸松弛技术推导精确边界，并将基于规则和基于优化的两种经典方法扩展到Transformer场景。
contributions: 提出一种新颖的ReLU用法，用于表示点积的精确非线性边界，从而利用ReLU凸松弛技术获得精确边界。
将两种经典验证方法（基于规则和基于优化）扩展到Transformer，形成两个高效且精确的验证框架。
analysis.experiments: 在两种数据集（情感分析）上的不同模型架构和鲁棒性属性上评估，与最先进基线方法比较，结果表明在大多数验证任务中精度显著提升，效率可接受。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于ReLU激活函数的Transformer。
效率与精度之间的权衡可能在某些任务中仍不理想。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过ReLU催化抽象精炼，实现Transformer的高精度形式化验证。

papers.title: Parallelizing Counterfactual Regret Minimization
papers.abstract: Parallelization has played an instrumental role in the field of artificial intelligence (AI), drastically reducing the time taken to train and evaluate large AI models. In contrast to its impact in the broader field of AI, applying parallelization to computational game solving is relatively unexplored, despite its great potential. In this paper, we parallelize the family of counterfactual regret minimization (CFR) algorithms, which were central to important breakthroughs for solving large imperfect-information games. We present a generalized parallelization framework, reframing CFR as a series of linear algebra operations. Then, existing techniques for parallelizing linear algebra operations can be applied to accelerate CFR. We also describe how our technique can be applied to other tabular members of the CFR family of algorithms, including the state-of-the-art, such as CFR+, discounted CFR, and predictive variants of CFR. Experimentally, we show that our CFR implementation on a GPU is up to four orders of magnitude faster than Google DeepMind OpenSpiel's CFR implementations on a CPU.

analysis.tldr: 将反事实遗憾最小化算法并行化，利用线性代数操作在GPU上实现高达四个数量级的加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 并行化在AI领域显著加速了模型训练和评估，但在博弈求解中应用较少，而CFR算法在不完美信息博弈中至关重要，现有实现速度慢，亟需加速。
analysis.problem: 如何高效并行化CFR算法族，以利用GPU等并行硬件加速大规模不完美信息博弈求解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出通用并行化框架，将CFR重新表述为一系列线性代数操作，从而应用现有并行线性代数技术加速CFR，并扩展到CFR+、折扣CFR和预测变体等。
contributions: 提出将CFR算法族并行化的通用框架，通过线性代数操作实现。
在GPU上实现CFR，实验表明比OpenSpiel的CPU实现快四个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 在GPU上对比Google DeepMind OpenSpiel的CPU实现，速度提升高达四个数量级。
limitations: 可能仅适用于表格型CFR变体，不涵盖函数逼近或深度CFR。
实验仅对比了OpenSpiel的CPU实现，未与其他GPU基线比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将反事实遗憾最小化算法并行化，利用线性代数操作在GPU上实现高达四个数量级的加速。

papers.title: Agentic AI Ecosystems in Higher Education: A Perspective on AI Agents to Emerging Inclusive, Agentic Multi-Agent AI Framework for Learning, Teaching and Institutional Intelligence
papers.abstract: Integration of artificial intelligent (AI) agents in higher education is transforming teaching, learning and administrative processes. Although existing AI agents effectively support individual tasks, their implementation remains fragmented and inefficient for handling the complexity of educational institutions. This highlights a significant research gap: the lack of integrated eco-system-level agentic multi-agent AI platform capable of coordinated planning, reasoning, and adaptive decision-making across multiple educational functions. This paper presents a forward-looking perspective on agentic multi-agent AI platform in higher education, consisting interconnected autonomous, goal driven agents that support learning, teaching, and institutional operations. It addresses timely and critical questions: Can agentic AI represent the next generation of intelligent systems in tertiary education? Can they collectively support seamless coordinated operations across teaching, learning and administrative support? To what extent can such systems foster inclusive and equitable learning for diverse learners with special educational needs? To ground this perspective, a thematic analysis of existing literature identifies four dominant themes: task-specific fragmented AI tools, the transition from single-agent to multi-agent systems, limited cross-functional integration, and insufficient focus on inclusivity and accessibility. Findings reveal a clear gap between current AI implementations and the needs of holistic, learner-centered educational ecosystem. The paper synthesizes challenges and outlines future research directions for scalable human-aligned, and inclusive agentic AI platform. The significant contribution is the incorporation of inclusive learning perspectives, highlighting how coordinated agentic multi-agent platform can support diverse learners through adaptive, multimodal interventions.

analysis.tldr: 提出高等教育中面向包容性学习的多智能体AI框架视角。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前高等教育中AI应用碎片化，缺乏能协调规划、推理和自适应决策的生态系统级多智能体平台。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个集成的、包容性的多智能体AI平台，以支持教学、学习和行政的协调运作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但通过文献主题分析识别出四个主导主题：任务特定碎片化AI工具、从单智能体到多智能体系统的过渡、跨功能集成有限、对包容性和可及性关注不足。
analysis.method: 通过文献主题分析识别现有AI实现的差距，并综合挑战与未来研究方向，提出一个前瞻性的多智能体AI框架。
contributions: 提出一个面向高等教育的包容性多智能体AI平台视角
通过文献分析揭示当前AI实现与整体教育生态系统需求之间的差距
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于文献分析，缺乏实证验证
框架的具体实现细节和评估指标未明确
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出高等教育中面向包容性学习的多智能体AI框架视角。

papers.title: Heuristic Pathologies and Further Variance Reduction via Uncertainty Propagation in the AIVAT Family of Techniques
papers.abstract: How should an agent's performance in a multiagent environment be evaluated when there is a limited sample size or a high cost of running a trial? The AIVAT family of variance reduction techniques was proposed to address this challenge by introducing unbiased low-variance estimators of agents' expected payoffs. An important component of AIVAT is a heuristic value function that discriminates between potentially low- and high-value counterfactual histories. A notable gap in the literature is that there is little to no constraint or guideline on how the heuristic value function should be chosen or how uncertainty in its output should be handled. In our first contribution, we parameterize the heuristic value function to highlight AIVAT's potential vulnerabilities: a) the sample variance can be set pathologically low by directly applying gradient descent on the sample variance, and b) one can p-hack to draw a desired statistical conclusion via gradient descent/ascent on the test statistic. The main takeaway is that the heuristic value function should be fixed prior to observing the evaluation data! In our second contribution, we show how the heuristic uncertainty can be propagated to quantify the uncertainty of AIVAT estimates. It is then possible to further reduce the variance using inverse-variance weighted averaging, but AIVAT's unbiasedness guarantee may have to be sacrificed. In our experiments, we use a dataset of 10,000 poker hands to demonstrate our heuristic pathology and uncertainty results, with the latter yielding a 43.0% reduction in the number of samples (poker hands) needed to draw statistical conclusions.

analysis.tldr: AIVAT族方差缩减技术中启发式价值函数的选择可能导致病态低方差或p-hacking，通过不确定性传播可进一步减少所需样本量。
analysis.research_motivation: 在多智能体环境中评估智能体性能时，样本有限或试验成本高，需要低方差无偏估计器；现有AIVAT技术缺乏对启发式价值函数选择的约束和不确定性处理指南。
analysis.problem: AIVAT族技术中启发式价值函数的选择可能被操纵（如梯度下降导致病态低方差或p-hacking），且其不确定性未被量化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：a) 对样本方差直接应用梯度下降可导致病态低方差；b) 通过梯度上升/下降测试统计量可进行p-hacking。
analysis.method: 参数化启发式价值函数以暴露漏洞，并传播启发式不确定性以量化AIVAT估计的不确定性，进而通过逆方差加权平均进一步降方差。
contributions: 揭示了AIVAT中启发式价值函数可能被操纵导致病态低方差或p-hacking，强调应在评估数据前固定启发式函数。
提出通过不确定性传播量化AIVAT估计的不确定性，并利用逆方差加权平均进一步减少方差（以牺牲无偏性为代价）。
analysis.experiments: 使用10,000手扑克牌数据集，不确定性传播方法使所需样本量减少43.0%。
limitations: 逆方差加权平均可能牺牲AIVAT的无偏性保证。
实验仅基于扑克牌数据集，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AIVAT族方差缩减技术中启发式价值函数的选择可能导致病态低方差或p-hacking，通过不确定性传播可进一步减少所需样本量。

papers.title: Hypergraph Enterprise Agentic Reasoner over Heterogeneous Business Systems
papers.abstract: Applying Large Language Models (LLMs) to heterogeneous enterprise systems is hindered by hallucinations and failures in multi-hop, n-ary reasoning. Existing paradigms (e.g., GraphRAG, NL2SQL) lack the semantic grounding and auditable execution required for these complex environments. We introduce HEAR, an enterprise agentic reasoner built on a Stratified Hypergraph Ontology. Its base Graph Layer virtualizes provenance-aware data interfaces, while the Hyperedge Layer encodes n-ary business rules and procedural protocols. Operating an evidence-driven reasoning loop, HEAR dynamically orchestrates ontology tools for structured multi-hop analysis without requiring LLM retraining. Evaluations on supply-chain tasks, including order fulfillment blockage root cause analysis (RCA), show HEAR achieves up to 94.7% accuracy. Crucially, HEAR demonstrates adaptive efficiency: utilizing procedural hyperedges to minimize token costs, while leveraging topological exploration for rigorous correctness on complex queries. By matching proprietary model performance with open-weight backbones and automating manual diagnostics, HEAR establishes a scalable, auditable foundation for enterprise intelligence.

analysis.tldr: HEAR 通过分层超图本体和证据驱动推理，实现企业异构系统上的可审计多跳推理，无需 LLM 重训。
analysis.research_motivation: 将 LLM 应用于异构企业系统时，存在幻觉和多跳 n 元推理失败的问题，现有方法（如 GraphRAG、NL2SQL）缺乏语义基础和可审计执行。
analysis.problem: 解决 LLM 在企业复杂环境中的多跳 n 元推理的幻觉和失败问题，实现可审计的推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 HEAR，基于分层超图本体，包含图层（虚拟化数据接口）和超边层（编码 n 元业务规则），通过证据驱动推理循环动态编排本体工具进行结构化多跳分析。
contributions: 提出 HEAR，一种基于分层超图本体的企业智能体推理器，无需 LLM 重训。
在供应链任务上达到 94.7% 的准确率，并展示自适应效率：利用程序性超边最小化 token 成本，拓扑探索保证正确性。
analysis.experiments: 在供应链任务（包括订单履行阻塞根因分析）上评估，HEAR 达到 94.7% 的准确率，且使用开源模型即可匹配专有模型性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域的超图本体构建，泛化性需进一步验证。
摘要未提及在非供应链任务上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HEAR 通过分层超图本体和证据驱动推理，实现企业异构系统上的可审计多跳推理，无需 LLM 重训。

papers.title: Good to Go: The LOOP Skill Engine That Hits 99% Success and Slashes Token Usage by 99% via One-Shot Recording and Deterministic Replay
papers.abstract: Deploying AI agents for repetitive periodic tasks exposes a critical tension: Large Language Models (LLMs) offer unmatched flexibility in tool orchestration, yet their inherent stochasticity causes unpredictable failures, and repeated invocations incur prohibitive token costs. We present the LOOP SKILL ENGINE, a system that achieves a combined 99% success rate and 99% token reduction for periodic agent tasks through a one-shot recording, deterministic replay paradigm. On its first run, the agent executes the task with full LLM reasoning while the system transparently intercepts and records the complete tool-call trajectory. A greedy length-descending template extraction algorithm then converts this recording into a parameterized, branch-free Loop Skill -- a deterministic execution plan that captures the task's functional intent while parameterizing time-dependent and result-dependent variables. All subsequent executions bypass the LLM entirely: the engine resolves template variables against real-time values and replays the tool sequence deterministically. We prove two theorems: (1) Replay Determinism -- the step sequence of a validated Loop Skill is invariant across all future executions; (2) Write Safety -- concurrent access to persistent configuration is serialized through reentrant locks and atomic file replacement. Across a benchmark of periodic agent tasks spanning intervals from 5 minutes to 24 hours, the Loop Skill Engine reduces monthly token consumption by 93.3%--99.98% and cuts execution latency by 8.7x while eliminating output non-determinism. A multi-layer degradation strategy guarantees that tasks never stall. We release the engine as part of the buddyMe open-source agent framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出LOOP技能引擎，通过一次性录制和确定性重放实现周期性Agent任务99%成功率和99%令牌节省。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在周期性任务中灵活但随机性导致不可预测失败，且重复调用令牌成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲灵活性的前提下，消除LLM在周期性任务中的随机性并大幅降低令牌消耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM的随机性导致周期性任务执行不稳定，重复推理产生大量冗余令牌。
analysis.method: 一次性录制完整工具调用轨迹，通过贪心长度降序模板提取算法生成参数化无分支的Loop Skill，后续执行绕过LLM直接确定性重放。
contributions: 提出LOOP技能引擎，实现99%成功率和99%令牌减少。
证明重放确定性和写安全性的两个定理。
开源引擎作为buddyMe框架的一部分。
analysis.experiments: 在周期从5分钟到24小时的基准任务上，月度令牌消耗减少93.3%-99.98%，执行延迟降低8.7倍，消除输出非确定性。
limitations: 仅适用于周期性任务，非周期性任务需重新录制。
模板提取算法可能无法处理高度动态的变量依赖。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LOOP技能引擎，通过一次性录制和确定性重放实现周期性Agent任务99%成功率和99%令牌节省。

papers.title: Fusion-fission forecasts when AI will shift to undesirable behavior
papers.abstract: The key problem facing ChatGPT-like AI's use across society is that its behavior can shift, unnoticed, from desirable to undesirable -- encouraging self-harm, extremist acts, financial losses, or costly medical and military mistakes -- and no one can yet predict when. Shifts persist in even the newest AI models despite remarkable progress in AI modeling, post-training alignment and safeguards. Here we show that a vector generalization of fusion-fission group dynamics observed in living and active-matter systems drives -- and can forecast -- future shifts in the AI's behavior. The shift condition, which is also derivable mathematically, results from group-level competition between the conversation-so-far (C) and the desirable (B) and undesirable (D) basin dynamics which can be estimated in advance for a given application. It is neither model-specific nor driven by stochastic sampling. We validate it across six independent tests, including: 90 percent correct across seven AI models spanning two orders of magnitude in parameter count (124M-12B); production-scale persistence across ten frontier chatbots; and a priori time-stamped prediction eleven months before the Stanford 'Delusional Spirals' corpus appeared, and independently confirmed by that corpus of 207,443 human-AI exchanges. Because it sits architecturally below the current safety stack, the same formula provides a real-time warning signal that current alignment does not supply, portable across current and future ChatGPT-like AI architectures and instantiable in application domains where competing response classes can be defined.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种融合-裂变动力学向量推广方法，可预测AI行为何时从合意转向不合意。
analysis.research_motivation: ChatGPT类AI的行为可能无预警地从合意转向不合意（如鼓励自残、极端行为、财务损失或医疗/军事错误），现有对齐与防护手段无法预测这种转变，带来严重社会风险。
analysis.problem: 预测AI行为何时从合意转向不合意。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI行为转变在最新模型中依然存在，且现有安全栈无法提供预警信号。
analysis.method: 将活性物质系统中的融合-裂变群体动力学向量推广到AI行为空间，通过对话历史（C）与合意（B）、不合意（D）吸引子动力学的群体级竞争推导转变条件，该条件可预先估计且不依赖具体模型或随机采样。
contributions: 提出一种跨模型、跨规模的AI行为转变预测方法，基于融合-裂变动力学向量推广。
在7个模型（124M-12B参数）、10个前沿聊天机器人及207,443条人机对话语料上验证了预测准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在7个AI模型（参数规模跨两个数量级）上达到90%正确率；在10个前沿聊天机器人上验证生产级持久性；提前11个月预测了Stanford 'Delusional Spirals'语料库的出现，并被该语料库独立确认。
limitations: 方法依赖于预定义合意/不合意响应类别，在类别定义模糊的场景中可能受限。
摘要未提及在更复杂多轮对话或开放域任务中的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种融合-裂变动力学向量推广方法，可预测AI行为何时从合意转向不合意。

papers.title: GenCircuit-RL: Reinforcement Learning from Hierarchical Verification for Genetic Circuit Design
papers.abstract: Genetic circuit design remains a laborious, expert-driven process despite decades of progress in synthetic biology. We study this problem through code generation: models produce Python code in pysbol3 to construct genetic circuits in the Synthetic Biology Open Language (SBOL), a formal representation that supports automated verification. We introduce GenCircuit-RL, a reinforcement learning framework built around hierarchical verification rewards that decompose correctness into five levels, from code execution to task-specific topological checks, and a four-stage curriculum that shifts optimization pressure from code generation to functional reasoning. We also introduce SynBio-Reason, a benchmark of 4,753 circuits spanning six canonical circuit types and nine tasks from code repair to de novo design, with held-out biological parts for out-of-distribution evaluation. Hierarchical verification improves task success on functional reasoning tasks by 14 to 16 percentage points over binary rewards, and curriculum learning is required for strong design performance. The resulting models generate topologically correct circuits, generalize to novel biological parts, and rediscover canonical designs from the synthetic biology literature.

analysis.tldr: 用分层验证奖励的强化学习框架生成遗传电路代码，提升功能推理任务成功率14-16个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: 遗传电路设计仍依赖专家手动过程，效率低且难以自动化，现有方法缺乏对电路功能正确性的系统验证。
analysis.problem: 如何通过代码生成自动设计遗传电路，并确保生成电路在语法、语义和功能上的正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GenCircuit-RL，基于分层验证奖励的强化学习框架，将正确性分解为五个层次（从代码执行到任务特定拓扑检查），并采用四阶段课程学习逐步从代码生成过渡到功能推理。
contributions: 提出GenCircuit-RL，利用分层验证奖励和课程学习进行遗传电路设计。
构建SynBio-Reason基准，包含4,753个电路和六种规范电路类型，支持分布外评估。
analysis.experiments: 在SynBio-Reason基准上，分层验证奖励相比二元奖励在功能推理任务上提升14-16个百分点，课程学习对强设计性能至关重要。
limitations: 可能依赖pysbol3和SBOL形式化表示，泛化到其他表示需调整。
基准电路类型有限，可能未覆盖所有实际设计场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用分层验证奖励的强化学习框架生成遗传电路代码，提升功能推理任务成功率14-16个百分点。

papers.title: MetaAgent-X : Breaking the Ceiling of Automatic Multi-Agent Systems via End-to-End Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Automatic multi-agent systems aim to instantiate agent workflows without relying on manually designed or fixed orchestration. However, existing automatic MAS approaches remain only partially adaptive: they either perform training-free test-time search or optimize the meta-level designer while keeping downstream execution agents frozen, which creating a frozen-executor ceiling and leaving the end-to-end training of self-designing and self-executing agentic models unexplored. To address this, we introduce MetaAgent-X, an end-to-end reinforcement learning framework that jointly optimizes automatic MAS design and execution. MetaAgent-X enables script-based MAS generation, execution rollout collection, and credit assignment for both designer and executor trajectories. To support stable and scalable optimization, we propose Executor Designer Hierarchical Rollout and Stagewise Co-evolution to improve training stability and expose the dynamics of designer-executor co-evolution. MetaAgent-X consistently outperforms existing automatic MAS baselines, achieving up to 21.7% gains. Comprehensive ablations show that both designer and executor improve throughout training, and that effective automatic MAS learning follows a stagewise co-evolution process. These results establish end-to-end trainable automatic MAS as a practical paradigm for building self-designing and self-executing agentic models.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端强化学习框架MetaAgent-X，联合优化多智能体系统的自动设计与执行，突破现有方法的冻结执行器上限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动多智能体系统仅部分自适应，要么进行无训练测试时搜索，要么优化元级设计器而冻结下游执行智能体，导致冻结执行器上限，无法实现自设计与自执行模型的端到端训练。
analysis.problem: 如何实现自动多智能体系统的端到端联合优化，使设计器和执行器都能在训练中共同进化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MetaAgent-X框架，包含脚本化MAS生成、执行轨迹收集、设计器和执行器轨迹的信用分配，以及执行器-设计器分层展开和分阶段协同进化策略。
contributions: 提出首个端到端强化学习框架MetaAgent-X，联合优化自动MAS的设计与执行。
设计执行器-设计器分层展开和分阶段协同进化策略，提升训练稳定性并揭示协同进化动态。
analysis.experiments: 在自动MAS基准上，MetaAgent-X一致优于现有方法，最高提升21.7%。消融实验表明设计器和执行器在训练中均持续改进，有效学习遵循分阶段协同进化过程。
limitations: 可能依赖特定脚本化MAS生成格式，泛化性需进一步验证。
端到端训练的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出端到端强化学习框架MetaAgent-X，联合优化多智能体系统的自动设计与执行，突破现有方法的冻结执行器上限。

papers.title: ASH: Agents that Self-Hone via Embodied Learning
papers.abstract: Long-horizon embodied tasks remain a fundamental challenge in AI, as current methods rely on hand-engineered rewards or action-labeled demonstrations, neither of which scales. We introduce ASH, an agentic system that learns an embodied policy from unlabeled, noisy internet video, without reward shaping or expert annotation. ASH follows a self-improvement loop; when it gets stuck, ASH learns an Inverse Dynamics Model (IDM) from its own trajectories, and uses its IDM to extract supervision from relevant internet video. ASH uses unsupervised learning to identify key moments from large-scale internet video and retains them as long-term memory -- allowing it to tackle long-horizon problems. We evaluate ASH on two complementary environments demanding multi-hour planning: Pokemon Emerald, a turn-based RPG, and The Legend of Zelda: The Minish Cap, a real-time action-adventure game. In both games, behavioral cloning, retrieval-augmented and zero-shot foundation-model baselines plateau, while ASH sustains progression across our 8-hour evaluation. ASH reaches an average of $11.2/12$ milestones in Pokemon Emerald and $9.9/12$ in Legend of Zelda, while the strongest baseline gets stuck in both environments at an average of $6.5/12$ and $6.0/12$ milestones, respectively. We demonstrate that self-improving agents are a scalable recipe for long-horizon embodied learning.

analysis.tldr: ASH通过无标签互联网视频和自改进循环实现长时域具身任务学习，无需奖励工程或专家标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 长时域具身任务依赖手工奖励或动作标注演示，难以规模化，亟需无需人工标注的可扩展学习方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从无标签、有噪声的互联网视频中学习具身策略，以解决需要多步规划的长时域任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 行为克隆、检索增强和零样本基础模型基线在长时域任务中性能停滞，而ASH通过自改进循环持续进步。
analysis.method: ASH采用自改进循环：当智能体卡住时，从其自身轨迹学习逆动力学模型（IDM），并利用IDM从相关互联网视频中提取监督信号；同时使用无监督学习从大规模互联网视频中识别关键时刻并存储为长期记忆。
contributions: 提出一种无需奖励工程或专家标注的具身学习系统ASH，利用无标签互联网视频进行自改进。
在两种长时域游戏环境中验证ASH显著优于基线，达到平均11.2/12和9.9/12里程碑。
analysis.experiments: 在Pokemon Emerald和The Legend of Zelda: The Minish Cap两个游戏环境中进行8小时评估，ASH分别达到平均11.2/12和9.9/12里程碑，而最强基线分别为6.5/12和6.0/12。
limitations: 可能依赖特定环境（游戏）的视觉和交互特性，泛化到真实机器人场景需进一步验证。
长期记忆的存储和检索机制可能在大规模视频数据上存在效率问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ASH通过无标签互联网视频和自改进循环实现长时域具身任务学习，无需奖励工程或专家标注。

papers.title: SimPersona: Learning Discrete Buyer Personas from Raw Clickstreams for Grounded E-Commerce Agents
papers.abstract: LLM-based web agents can navigate live storefronts, yet they often collapse to a single "average buyer" policy, failing to capture the heterogeneous and distributional nature of real buyer populations. Existing personalization methods rely on hand-crafted prompt-based personas that are brittle, difficult to scale, context-inefficient, and unable to faithfully represent population-level behavior. We introduce SimPersona, a novel framework that learns discrete buyer types from historical traffic and exposes them to LLM-based web agents as compact persona tokens. Given raw clickstreams, a behavior-aware VQ-VAE induces a discrete buyer-type space that captures the statistical structure of real buyer behavior and merchant-specific buyer population distributions. To provide behavior-specific guidance to LLM-based web agents, SimPersona maps each learned buyer type to a dedicated persona token in the LLM agent vocabulary and fine-tunes the agent with these tokens on real browsing traces. At inference, each synthetic buyer is assigned to a learned buyer type with a single encoder forward pass, requiring no retraining or store-specific prompt engineering. For population-level simulation, SimPersona samples buyer types from each merchant's empirical distribution over the learned VQ-VAE codebook and instantiates agents with the corresponding persona tokens, preserving merchant-specific buyer population distributions. Evaluated on $8.37$M buyers across $42$ held-out live storefronts, SimPersona achieves $78\%$ conversion-rate alignment with real buyers, exhibits interpretable behavioral variation across buyer types, and outperforms a baseline with $8\times$ more parameters on goal-oriented shopping tasks. We further release an open-source data pipeline that converts raw e-commerce event logs into buyer representations and agent-training traces.

analysis.tldr: 从原始点击流学习离散买家画像，作为紧凑的个性令牌注入LLM网页代理，实现群体级行为模拟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM网页代理常退化为单一“平均买家”策略，无法捕捉真实买家群体的异质性和分布特性；手工提示画像脆弱、难以扩展、上下文效率低且无法忠实代表群体行为。
analysis.problem: 如何从原始点击流中学习离散的买家类型，并将其作为紧凑的个性令牌注入LLM网页代理，以在保持群体分布的同时实现个性化行为模拟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SimPersona框架：使用行为感知的VQ-VAE从原始点击流中学习离散买家类型空间，将每种类型映射为LLM代理词汇中的专用个性令牌，并通过真实浏览轨迹微调代理；推理时通过单次编码器前向传播分配买家类型，群体模拟时从经验分布采样。
contributions: 提出SimPersona框架，从原始点击流学习离散买家画像并作为紧凑令牌注入LLM网页代理。
在42个真实在线商店的837万买家上验证，实现78%的转化率对齐，且行为变化可解释。
开源数据流水线，将原始电商事件日志转换为买家表示和代理训练轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在42个真实在线商店的837万买家上评估，SimPersona实现78%的转化率对齐，在目标导向购物任务上优于参数多8倍的基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定电商平台的数据格式，泛化性需进一步验证。
离散买家类型的数量需要手动设定，可能影响表示粒度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从原始点击流学习离散买家画像，作为紧凑的个性令牌注入LLM网页代理，实现群体级行为模拟。

papers.title: Grounded Continuation: A Linear-Time Runtime Verifier for LLM Conversations
papers.abstract: In long conversations, an LLM can produce a next utterance that sounds plausible but rests on premises the conversation has already abandoned. Context-manipulation attacks against deployed agents now actively exploit this gap. We close it with a runtime verifier that maintains an explicit dependency graph: an LLM classifies each turn into one of 8 update operations drawn from four formalisms (dynamic epistemic logic, abductive reasoning, awareness logic, argumentation), and a symbolic engine records which claims depend on which evidence. Checking whether a continuation is supported reduces to a graph walk; retraction propagates through the same graph to flag exactly the conclusions that lose support, with linear per-turn cost and a formal conflict-free guarantee. On LongMemEval-KU oracle (n=78), the verifier reaches 89.7% accuracy vs. 88.5% for the LLM-only baseline (+1.3pp) and 87.2% for a transcript-RAG baseline matched on retrieval budget (+2.6pp); wins among disagreements are correct abstentions where the baseline confabulates. On LoCoMo's 60 official QA items the verifier is competitive with retrieval-augmented baselines. Beyond external benchmarks, we construct two multi-agent scenarios and a 50-item grounding test: on the 15-item stale-premise subset, the verifier reaches 100% accuracy vs. 93.3% (+6.7pp). These instantiate a soundness-faithfulness decomposition: the structural check is sound by construction, and per-deployment LLM extraction faithfulness is the empirical question we measure across four LLM families. The retraction check plateaus at microseconds while history-replay grows linearly with conversation length.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种线性时间运行时验证器，通过显式依赖图确保LLM对话中的话语基于当前有效前提，防止上下文操纵攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 长对话中LLM可能生成看似合理但基于已放弃前提的回复，上下文操纵攻击利用这一漏洞，现有方法缺乏形式化保证。
analysis.problem: 如何高效验证LLM对话中每个新话语是否基于当前有效前提，并在线性时间内检测前提撤回导致的支持失效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 维护显式依赖图：LLM将每轮对话分类为8种更新操作（来自动态认知逻辑、溯因推理、意识逻辑、论证理论），符号引擎记录声明与证据的依赖关系；检查话语支持性简化为图遍历，撤回通过同一图传播标记失去支持的结论。
contributions: 提出一种线性时间运行时验证器，具有形式化的无冲突保证。
引入可靠性-忠实性分解：结构检查天然可靠，LLM提取忠实性作为可测量经验问题。
在多个基准上验证有效性，包括LongMemEval-KU、LoCoMo和自建测试集。
analysis.experiments: 在LongMemEval-KU oracle（n=78）上准确率89.7%，优于LLM-only基线（88.5%）和transcript-RAG基线（87.2%）；在LoCoMo 60个QA项上与检索增强基线竞争力；在自建50项接地测试中，陈旧前提子集准确率100% vs 93.3%。撤回检查耗时微秒级，历史重放随对话长度线性增长。
limitations: 依赖LLM对对话操作的分类准确性，可能引入误差。
仅适用于对话场景，通用性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种线性时间运行时验证器，通过显式依赖图确保LLM对话中的话语基于当前有效前提，防止上下文操纵攻击。

papers.title: The Evaluation Trap: Benchmark Design as Theoretical Commitment
papers.abstract: Every AI benchmark operationalizes theoretical assumptions about the capability it claims to assess. When assumptions function as unexamined commitments, benchmarks stabilize the dominant paradigm by narrowing what counts as progress. Over time, narrow evaluation reorganizes capability concepts: architectures and definitions are selected for benchmark legibility until evaluation ceases to track an independent object and instead produces a version of the target defined by its own operational assumptions. The result is a trap: evaluation frameworks treat self-reinforcing assessments as valid, both creating and obscuring structural limits on what the current paradigm can accomplish. We introduce Epistematics, a methodology for deriving evaluation criteria directly from technical capability claims and auditing whether proposed benchmarks can discriminate the claimed capability from proxy behaviors. The contribution is meta-evaluative: an audit procedure, a failure mode taxonomy, and benchmark-design criteria for evaluating capability-evaluation coherence. We demonstrate the procedure through a worked audit of Dupoux et al. (2026), a proposal that revises the dominant paradigm's theoretical assumptions at the architectural level while reproducing them in its evaluation criteria, thereby entrenching the constraint it seeks to overcome in a form the evaluation cannot detect.

analysis.tldr: 论文指出基准设计隐含理论假设，会导致评估陷阱，并提出Epistematics方法论用于审计评估标准与能力声称的一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI基准评估隐含理论假设，这些假设若不加审视会固化主导范式，窄化进步定义，导致评估与目标能力脱节。
analysis.problem: 基准评估框架可能因隐含假设而陷入自我强化的陷阱，无法真正衡量声称的能力，需要一种元评估方法来审计评估标准与能力声称的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出基准评估会通过选择架构和定义来适应评估可读性，导致评估不再追踪独立目标，而是产生由自身操作假设定义的版本，形成自我强化的评估陷阱。
analysis.method: 提出Epistematics方法论，包括从技术能力声称推导评估标准的程序、审计基准是否能区分声称能力与代理行为的审计程序、失败模式分类法以及评估能力-评估一致性的基准设计标准。
contributions: 提出Epistematics元评估方法论，包含审计程序、失败模式分类法和基准设计标准。
通过对Dupoux等人(2026)的审计演示，展示了该方法如何揭示评估中的理论假设冲突。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅包含一个对Dupoux等人(2026)的工作审计演示。
limitations: 方法论可能依赖对技术能力声称的精确形式化，实际应用中可能面临歧义。
审计过程可能复杂且需要领域专家参与，可扩展性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文指出基准设计隐含理论假设，会导致评估陷阱，并提出Epistematics方法论用于审计评估标准与能力声称的一致性。

papers.title: Unsteady Metrics and Benchmarking Cultures of AI Model Builders
papers.abstract: The primary way to establish and compare competencies in foundation and generative AI models has shifted from peer-reviewed literature to press releases and company blog posts, where model builders highlight results on selected benchmarks. These artifacts now largely define the state of the art for researchers and the public. Despite their prominence, which benchmarks model builders choose to highlight, and what they communicate through this selection, is underexamined. To investigate, we introduce and open-source Benchmarking-Cultures-25, a dataset of 231 benchmarks highlighted across 139 model releases in 2025 from 11 major AI builders, alongside an interactive tool to explore the data. Our analysis reveals a fragmented evaluation landscape with limited cross-model comparability: 63.2% of highlighted benchmarks are used by a single builder, and 38.5% appear in just one release. Few achieve widespread use (e.g., GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench, AIME 2025). Moreover, benchmarks are attributed different competencies by different builders, depending on their narrative. To disentangle these conflicting presentations, we develop a unified taxonomy mapping diverging terminology to a shared framework of measured signals based on what benchmark authors claim to measure. "General knowledge application" is the second most popular, yet vaguely defined, category. Qualitative analysis shows many such benchmarks deemphasize construct validity, instead framing results as indicators of progress toward AGI. Their authors claim to measure knowledge or reasoning broadly, yet mostly evaluate STEM subjects (especially math). We argue that highlighted benchmarks function less as standardized measurement tools and more as flexible narrative devices prioritizing market positioning over scientific evaluation. Data: this https URL tool: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: AI模型发布者选择性高亮基准测试，导致评估碎片化且缺乏可比性，基准更多被用作市场叙事工具而非科学评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI模型能力评估主要依赖公司博客和新闻稿中高亮的基准测试结果，但这些选择背后的动机和沟通策略缺乏系统研究，可能导致评估偏差和市场导向的叙事。
analysis.problem: 分析AI模型发布者如何选择并利用基准测试来宣传模型能力，揭示评估碎片化、术语不一致以及基准作为叙事工具的现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 63.2%的高亮基准仅被单个构建者使用，38.5%仅出现在一次发布中；不同构建者对同一基准赋予不同能力标签；'通用知识应用'等类别定义模糊，且常强调STEM科目。
analysis.method: 构建并开源Benchmarking-Cultures-25数据集，包含2025年11家主要AI构建者的139次模型发布中高亮的231个基准；开发统一分类法映射不同术语到共享测量信号框架；进行定性和定量分析。
contributions: 引入并开源Benchmarking-Cultures-25数据集及交互式工具
揭示基准测试选择的碎片化和低可比性现象
提出统一分类法以解构不同构建者的能力宣称
论证基准测试作为市场叙事工具而非科学评估的角色
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了数据集构建和分析方法。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖2025年，可能不反映长期趋势
分析依赖公开信息，可能遗漏内部评估实践
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI模型发布者选择性高亮基准测试，导致评估碎片化且缺乏可比性，基准更多被用作市场叙事工具而非科学评估。

papers.title: Agentic Systems as Boosting Weak Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Can a committee of weak reasoning-model calls reach the performance of much stronger models? We study verifier-backed committee search as inference-time boosting for reasoning language models. The mechanism is not simply that ``more agents help'': samples expose latent correct solutions, while critics and comparators must recover them without access to the hidden verifier. We formalize this view by separating proposal coverage, local identifiability, progress, and diversity. We prove that coverage can be amplified by repeated sampling, but cannot by itself create useful critics or comparators; reliable amplification requires an additional local soundness signal, such as execution, proof checking, type checking, tests, or constraint solving. We give rank-based bounds showing when local selection errors compose into reliable trajectories, and characterize the proposer-side ceiling: oracle best-of-\(k\) converges only to the mass of task slices on which the proposal system assigns nonzero useful probability. Empirically, on SWE-bench Verified, a single \texttt{GPT-5.4 nano} proposal solves \(67.0\%\) of tasks. Using the same nano model, our critic--comparator orchestration reaches \(76.4\%\) with \(k=8\) proposals, matching the standalone performance of \texttt{Gemini 3 Pro} and \texttt{Claude Opus 4.5} Thinking and approaching the \(79.0\%\) oracle best-of-\(8\) upper bound. Thus, many correct patches are already present in weak-model proposal pools; the main challenge is selecting them. The remaining failures are mostly proposal-coverage failures, indicating shared blind spots that stronger selection alone cannot close.

analysis.tldr: 弱推理模型通过委员会搜索和验证器反馈可达到强模型性能，主要瓶颈在于提案覆盖而非选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 弱推理模型性能有限，而强模型成本高昂，探索通过组合多个弱模型调用达到强模型性能的可行性，具有实际应用价值。
analysis.problem: 如何通过推理时增强（verifier-backed committee search）提升弱推理模型的性能，使其接近或达到强模型水平。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 弱模型生成的多个样本中已包含大量正确解，主要挑战在于如何有效选择这些解，而非生成更多样本；剩余失败主要由提案覆盖不足导致。
analysis.method: 提出验证器支持的委员会搜索框架，分离提案覆盖、局部可识别性、进展和多样性，通过批评者-比较者编排（critic-comparator orchestration）利用执行、证明检查等局部正确性信号进行选择。
contributions: 形式化定义了推理时增强的四个关键维度：提案覆盖、局部可识别性、进展和多样性。
理论证明覆盖可通过重复采样放大，但可靠放大需要局部正确性信号，并给出基于排名的界限。
实验表明，弱模型（GPT-5.4 nano）通过委员会搜索在SWE-bench Verified上达到76.4%，匹配强模型性能，接近oracle上限79.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-bench Verified上，单次GPT-5.4 nano提案解决67.0%任务，委员会搜索（k=8）达到76.4%，匹配Gemini 3 Pro和Claude Opus 4.5 Thinking，接近oracle best-of-8的79.0%。
limitations: 依赖外部验证器（如执行、测试）提供局部正确性信号，可能不适用于所有任务。
提案覆盖失败仍是主要瓶颈，委员会搜索无法解决模型固有的盲点。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 弱推理模型通过委员会搜索和验证器反馈可达到强模型性能，主要瓶颈在于提案覆盖而非选择。

papers.title: Distribution-Aware Algorithm Design with LLM Agents
papers.abstract: We study learning when the learned object is executable solver code rather than a predictor. In this setting, correctness is not enough: two solvers may both return valid solutions on the deployment distribution while differing substantially in runtime. Given samples from an unknown task distribution, the learner returns code evaluated on fresh instances by both solution quality and execution time. Our central abstraction is a \emph{solver hint}: reusable structure inferred from samples and compiled into specialized solver code. We prove that the empirically fastest sample-consistent solver from a fixed library generalizes in both correctness and runtime, and that statistically identifiable hints can be recovered and compiled from polynomially many samples. Empirically, we instantiate the framework with LLM code agents on \(21\) structured combinatorial-optimization target distributions across seven problem classes. The synthesized solvers reach mean normalized quality \(0.971\), improve by \(+0.224\) over the average heuristic pool and by \(+0.098\) over the highest-quality heuristic, and are \(336.9\times\), \(342.8\times\), and \(16.1\times\) faster than the quality-best heuristic, Gurobi, and the selected time-limited exact backend, respectively. On released PACE 2025 Dominating Set private instances, the synthesized solver is valid on all \(100\) graphs and runs about two orders of magnitude faster than top competition solvers, with a moderate quality gap. Inspection shows that many gains come from changing the computational scale: replacing ambient exponential search or general-purpose optimization with compiled distribution-specific computation.

analysis.tldr: 用LLM智能体从样本中学习分布感知的求解器代码，兼顾正确性与运行时效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统学习关注预测器，但许多任务需要可执行的求解器代码；仅正确性不够，运行时效率在部署中至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何从未知任务分布的样本中学习出既正确又高效的求解器代码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出solver hint抽象，从样本中推断可复用结构并编译为专用求解器代码；利用LLM代码智能体实例化框架。
contributions: 形式化证明了从固定库中选择经验最快且样本一致的求解器在正确性和运行时上的泛化性。
证明了统计可识别的hints可从多项式样本中恢复并编译。
在21个组合优化分布上实验，合成求解器在质量和速度上均显著优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在21个结构化组合优化目标分布（7个问题类）上评估，合成求解器平均归一化质量0.971，比平均启发式池高0.224，比最高质量启发式高0.098；速度比质量最佳启发式快336.9倍，比Gurobi快342.8倍，比限时精确求解器快16.1倍。在PACE 2025 Dominating Set私有实例上，合成求解器在所有100个图上有效，速度比顶级竞赛求解器快约两个数量级，质量差距适中。
limitations: 框架依赖LLM代码智能体，可能受限于LLM的生成能力。
hint的可识别性假设可能在某些复杂分布上不成立。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用LLM智能体从样本中学习分布感知的求解器代码，兼顾正确性与运行时效率。

papers.title: ClawForge: Generating Executable Interactive Benchmarks for Command-Line Agents
papers.abstract: Interactive agent benchmarks face a tension between scalable construction and realistic workflow evaluation. Hand-authored tasks are expensive to extend and revise, while static prompt evaluation misses failures that only appear when agents operate over persistent state. Existing interactive benchmarks have advanced agent evaluation significantly, but most initialize tasks from clean state and do not systematically test how agents handle pre-existing partial, stale, or conflicting artifacts. We present \textbf{ClawForge}, a generator-backed benchmark framework for executable command-line workflows under state conflict. The framework compiles scenario templates, grounded slots, initialized state, reference trajectories, and validators into reproducible task specifications, and evaluates agents step by step over persistent workflow surfaces using normalized end state and observable side effects rather than exact trajectory matching. We instantiate this framework as the ClawForge-Bench (17 scenarios, 6 ability categories). Results across seven frontier models show that the best model reaches only 45.3% strict accuracy, wrong-state replacement remains below 17\% for all models, and the widest model separation (17% to 90%) is driven by whether agents inspect existing state before acting. Partial-credit and step-efficiency analyses further reveal that many failures are near-miss closures rather than early breakdowns, and that models exhibit qualitatively different failure styles under state conflict.

analysis.tldr: 提出ClawForge框架，生成可执行命令行Agent基准，揭示现有模型在状态冲突下的严重性能瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有交互式Agent基准在可扩展构建与真实工作流评估之间存在矛盾：手工任务扩展成本高，静态提示评估无法捕捉持久状态下的失败，且多数基准从干净状态初始化，未系统测试Agent处理预存、过时或冲突工件的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可扩展、可复现的基准，系统评估命令行Agent在持久工作流中处理状态冲突的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ClawForge框架，通过编译场景模板、接地槽位、初始化状态、参考轨迹和验证器生成可复现的任务规范，并基于归一化最终状态和可观测副作用（而非精确轨迹匹配）逐步评估Agent。
contributions: 提出ClawForge框架，支持生成可执行、可复现的命令行Agent基准，覆盖状态冲突场景。
构建ClawForge-Bench（17个场景，6种能力类别），并评估7个前沿模型，揭示严重性能差距和不同失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在ClawForge-Bench上评估7个前沿模型，最佳模型严格准确率仅45.3%，错误状态替换率低于17%，模型间最大分离度（17%至90%）由是否在行动前检查现有状态驱动。部分信用和步骤效率分析显示许多失败是接近命中而非早期崩溃，且模型在状态冲突下表现出不同失败风格。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖命令行环境，可能不适用于其他交互类型。
场景数量有限（17个），可能未涵盖所有状态冲突类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ClawForge框架，生成可执行命令行Agent基准，揭示现有模型在状态冲突下的严重性能瓶颈。

papers.title: Modeling Bounded Rationality in Drug Shortage Pharmacists Using Attention-Guided Dynamic Decomposition
papers.abstract: Hospital pharmacists make high-stakes decisions to mitigate drug shortages under uncertainty, time pressure, and patient risk. Interviews revealed that pharmacists focus attention on a small subset of drugs, limiting cognitive effort to the most urgent cases. Motivated by these findings, we formalize a bounded-rational, attention-guided decision framework that dynamically decomposes drugs into a subset for high-cost reasoning and a complementary subset for low-cost monitoring. We develop two agents: an Expert Agent that applies attention weights derived from pharmacist interviews, and a Learner Agent that adapts attention allocation over time through experience. Across simulated scenarios spanning short to long horizons, we show that attention-guided planning supports stable decision-making without complete state reasoning. These results suggest that a primary decision is not what action to take, but where to allocate cognitive effort, and that attention-guided, satisficing strategies can reduce problem complexity while maintaining stable performance.

analysis.tldr: 通过注意力引导的动态分解建模药剂师在药品短缺中的有限理性决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 药剂师在药品短缺时面临高风险决策，但认知资源有限，需要高效分配注意力。
analysis.problem: 如何建模药剂师在不确定性、时间压力和患者风险下的有限理性决策过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 药剂师仅关注少量最紧急的药品，将认知努力集中在最紧迫的案例上。
analysis.method: 提出注意力引导的动态分解框架，将药品分为高成本推理子集和低成本监控子集，并开发专家代理和学习代理。
contributions: 形式化了有限理性、注意力引导的决策框架，动态分解药品子集。
通过模拟实验证明注意力引导规划能在不完全状态推理下实现稳定决策。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模拟场景可能无法完全反映真实医院环境的复杂性。
注意力权重的获取依赖药剂师访谈，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过注意力引导的动态分解建模药剂师在药品短缺中的有限理性决策。

papers.title: ChromaFlow: A Negative Ablation Study of Orchestration Overhead in Tool-Augmented Agent Evaluation
papers.abstract: Autonomous language-model agents increasingly combine planning, tool use, document processing, browsing, code execution, and verification loops. These capabilities make agent systems more useful, but they also introduce operational failure modes that are not visible from final accuracy alone. This report presents ChromaFlow, a tool-augmented autonomous reasoning framework built around planner-directed execution, specialized tool use, and telemetry-driven evaluation. We analyze ChromaFlow on GAIA 2023 Level-1 validation tasks under clean evaluation constraints. A frozen full Level-1 baseline achieved 29/53 correct answers, or 54.72%. A later recovery configuration with expanded orchestration achieved 27/53 correct answers, or 50.94%, while increasing tracebacks, timeout events, tool-failure mentions, token-line calls, and campaign-log cost estimates. Two randomized 20-task smoke evaluations produced 12/20 and 11/20 correct answers, showing that small diagnostic gains can be unstable across samples. The central result is therefore a negative ablation: more aggressive orchestration did not improve full-set performance and increased operational noise. The report argues that bounded planner escalation, deterministic extraction, evidence reconciliation, and explicit run gates should be treated as first-order requirements for reliable autonomous agent evaluation.

analysis.tldr: ChromaFlow 框架的消融实验表明，增加编排复杂度反而会降低工具增强型 Agent 的性能并引入更多操作噪声。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主语言模型 Agent 集成了规划、工具使用、文档处理、浏览、代码执行和验证循环，但这些能力引入了仅从最终准确率无法观察到的操作故障模式，需要系统性的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 研究工具增强型 Agent 中编排开销对评估结果的影响，特别是增加编排复杂度是否真的能提升性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 更激进的编排并未提升完整集性能，反而增加了回溯、超时事件、工具故障提及、令牌行调用和日志成本估计等操作噪声。
analysis.method: 提出 ChromaFlow 框架，基于规划器导向执行、专用工具使用和遥测驱动评估，并在 GAIA 2023 Level-1 验证任务上进行负消融实验。
contributions: 通过负消融实验揭示了编排开销对 Agent 性能的负面影响
提出了可靠自主 Agent 评估的一阶要求：有界规划器升级、确定性提取、证据协调和显式运行门控
analysis.experiments: 在 GAIA 2023 Level-1 验证任务上，完整基线获得 29/53（54.72%），扩展编排配置获得 27/53（50.94%），两个随机 20 任务烟雾评估分别获得 12/20 和 11/20。
limitations: 实验仅在单一基准（GAIA Level-1）上进行，泛化性有限
负消融结果可能依赖于特定框架实现，未必适用于所有 Agent 系统
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ChromaFlow 框架的消融实验表明，增加编排复杂度反而会降低工具增强型 Agent 的性能并引入更多操作噪声。

papers.title: SkillFlow: Flow-Driven Recursive Skill Evolution for Agentic Orchestration
papers.abstract: In recent years, a variety of powerful LLM-based agentic systems have been applied to automate complex tasks through task orchestration. However, existing orchestration methods still face key challenges, including strategy collapse under reward maximization, high gradient variance with opaque credit assignment, and unguided skill evolution whose decisions are typically made by directly prompting an LLM to judge rather than derived from principled training signals. To address these challenges, we propose SkillFlow, a flow-based framework that takes a trainable Supervisor as the agent and a structured environment with dynamic skill library and frozen executor, automating task orchestration through multi-turn interaction. SkillFlow employs Tempered Trajectory Balance (TTB), a regression-based flow-matching loss that samples trajectories proportional to reward, preserving diverse orchestration strategies rather than collapsing to a single mode. The same flow objective yields a jointly learned backward policy that provides transparent per-step credit assignment at zero additional inference cost. Building on these flow diagnostics, a recursive skill evolution mechanism determines when to evolve, what skills to create or prune, and where decision gaps lie -- closing the loop from training signal to autonomous capability growth. Experimental results on 14 datasets show that SkillFlow significantly outperforms baselines across question answering, mathematical reasoning, code generation, and real-world interactive decision making tasks. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: SkillFlow 提出基于流匹配的递归技能进化框架，通过 Tempered Trajectory Balance 损失实现多样化策略与透明信用分配，显著提升 LLM Agent 任务编排性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM Agent 编排方法面临策略崩溃、梯度方差高、技能进化缺乏原则性训练信号等问题，亟需一种能保持策略多样性、提供透明信用分配并实现自主技能进化的框架。
analysis.problem: 解决 LLM Agent 在任务编排中策略单一化、信用分配不透明以及技能进化依赖 LLM 直接判断而非训练信号的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法存在策略崩溃（奖励最大化下收敛到单一模式）、高梯度方差（信用分配不透明）以及技能进化决策由 LLM 直接提示而非原则性训练信号驱动。
analysis.method: SkillFlow 框架：以可训练 Supervisor 为 Agent，结合动态技能库和冻结执行器；采用 Tempered Trajectory Balance (TTB) 回归式流匹配损失采样与奖励成比例的轨迹，保持策略多样性；联合学习反向策略实现零额外推理成本的逐步骤信用分配；基于流诊断的递归技能进化机制决定何时进化、创建或剪枝技能。
contributions: 提出 SkillFlow 框架，将流匹配损失（TTB）引入 LLM Agent 编排，实现多样化策略和透明信用分配。
设计递归技能进化机制，利用流诊断信号自主决定技能创建、剪枝和决策缺口填补。
在 14 个数据集上显著优于基线，覆盖问答、数学推理、代码生成和交互式决策任务。
analysis.experiments: 在 14 个数据集上评估，涵盖问答、数学推理、代码生成和真实世界交互式决策任务，SkillFlow 显著优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的技能库初始结构，对全新任务领域适应性需进一步验证。
TTB 损失的计算开销可能随轨迹长度增加而增长。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkillFlow 提出基于流匹配的递归技能进化框架，通过 Tempered Trajectory Balance 损失实现多样化策略与透明信用分配，显著提升 LLM Agent 任务编排性能。

papers.title: Know When To Fold 'Em: Token-Efficient LLM Synthetic Data Generation via Multi-Stage In-Flight Rejection
papers.abstract: While synthetic data generation with large language models (LLMs) is widely used in post-training pipelines, existing approaches typically generate full outputs before applying quality filters, leading to substantial token waste on samples that are ultimately discarded. To address this, we propose Multi-Stage In-Flight Rejection (MSIFR), a lightweight, training-free framework that detects and terminates low-quality generation trajectories at intermediate checkpoints before they reach full completion. MSIFR decomposes the generation process into sequential stages and applies fast rule-based validators to identify arithmetic inconsistencies, hallucination patterns, and formatting violations, enabling early rejection of faulty samples. We formalize in-flight rejection as a sequential decision process and show that any non-trivial discard policy reduces expected token consumption, with stage-wise savings increasing when rejection occurs earlier in the generation pipeline. We further demonstrate that conditional utility estimates form a martingale, ensuring that early, in-flight rejection does not bias the expected utility of retained samples. Across five instruction-tuned models and seven reasoning benchmarks, MSIFR reduces token consumption by 11%-77% as a standalone method, and up to 78.2% when combined with early-exit methods, while preserving or improving evaluation accuracy. These results confirm that MSIFR provides a practical mechanism for improving the efficiency of LLM-based synthetic data generation without additional training or architectural changes.

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶段飞行拒绝（MSIFR）框架，在LLM合成数据生成过程中提前终止低质量样本，节省11%-77%的token消耗。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM合成数据生成方法通常先生成完整输出再过滤，导致大量token浪费在最终被丢弃的样本上，效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲数据质量的前提下，减少LLM合成数据生成中的token浪费。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多阶段飞行拒绝（MSIFR），将生成过程分解为多个阶段，在每个中间检查点使用快速基于规则的验证器检测算术不一致、幻觉模式和格式违规，提前终止低质量生成轨迹。
contributions: 提出MSIFR框架，无需额外训练或架构修改即可提升合成数据生成效率。
形式化飞行拒绝为顺序决策过程，证明非平凡丢弃策略可降低期望token消耗，且条件效用估计构成鞅，保证早期拒绝不偏倚保留样本的期望效用。
analysis.experiments: 在5个指令微调模型和7个推理基准上，MSIFR作为独立方法减少11%-77%的token消耗，与早退方法结合最高减少78.2%，同时保持或提升评估准确率。
limitations: 依赖手工设计的规则验证器，可能无法覆盖所有低质量模式。
未讨论在长文本生成或多模态场景下的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多阶段飞行拒绝（MSIFR）框架，在LLM合成数据生成过程中提前终止低质量样本，节省11%-77%的token消耗。

papers.title: MathAtlas: A Benchmark for Autoformalization in the Wild
papers.abstract: Current autoformalization benchmarks are largely focused on olympiad or undergraduate mathematics, while graduate and research-level mathematics remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce MathAtlas, the first large-scale autoformalization benchmark of in the wild graduate-level mathematics, containing ~52k theorems, definitions, exercises, examples, and proofs extracted from 103 graduate mathematics textbooks. MathAtlas is enriched with a mathematical dependency graph containing ~178k relations, and is the first autoformalization benchmark to include such relations, facilitating evaluation and development of dependency-aware autoformalization systems. Our extensive experiments show that MathAtlas is high quality but extremely challenging: strong baselines achieve at most 9.8% correctness on theorem statements and 16.7% on definitions. Furthermore, we find performance of state-of-the-art models degrades substantially with dependency depth: on MA-Hard, a subset of 700 entities with the deepest dependency trees, the best model achieves only 2.6% correctness for autoformalization on this challenging dataset. We release MathAtlas to the community as a benchmark set for large-scale autoformalization of graduate-level mathematics in the wild.

analysis.tldr: MathAtlas 是首个大规模研究生级数学自动形式化基准，包含约 5.2 万条定理和数学依赖图，实验显示现有模型性能极低。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前自动形式化基准主要集中于奥林匹克或本科数学，研究生及研究级数学尚未被充分探索，缺乏大规模、高难度的基准来推动该领域发展。
analysis.problem: 构建一个大规模、高质量的研究生级数学自动形式化基准，并评估现有模型在真实世界数学文本上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出模型性能随依赖深度显著下降，且强基线在定理陈述上正确率仅 9.8%。
analysis.method: 从 103 本研究生数学教科书中提取约 5.2 万条定理、定义、练习、示例和证明，并构建包含约 17.8 万关系的数学依赖图。
contributions: 首个大规模研究生级数学自动形式化基准 MathAtlas，包含约 5.2 万条实体。
首个包含数学依赖图的自动形式化基准，支持依赖感知的自动形式化系统评估。
analysis.experiments: 在 MathAtlas 上评估强基线，定理陈述正确率最高 9.8%，定义正确率最高 16.7%；在 MA-Hard 子集上最佳模型正确率仅 2.6%。
limitations: 基准仅涵盖数学文本，未涉及其他领域的形式化。
依赖图可能不完整，影响依赖感知系统的评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MathAtlas 是首个大规模研究生级数学自动形式化基准，包含约 5.2 万条定理和数学依赖图，实验显示现有模型性能极低。

papers.title: SPIN: Structural LLM Planning via Iterative Navigation for Industrial Tasks
papers.abstract: Industrial LLM agent systems often separate planning from execution, yet LLM planners frequently produce structurally invalid or unnecessarily long workflows, leading to brittle failures and avoidable tool and API cost. We propose \texttt{SPIN}, a planning wrapper that combines validated Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) planning with prefix based execution control. \texttt{SPIN} enforces a strict DAG contract through \texttt{\_validate\_plan\_text} and repair prompting, producing executable plans before downstream execution, and then evaluates DAG prefixes incrementally to stop when the current prefix is sufficient to answer the query. On AssetOpsBench, across 261 scenarios, \texttt{SPIN} reduces executed tasks from 1061 to 623 and improves \emph{Accomplished} from 0.638 to 0.706, while reducing tool calls from 11.81 to 6.82 per run. On MCP Bench, the same wrapper improves planning, grounding, and dependency related scores for both GPT OSS1 and Llama 4 Maverick.

analysis.tldr: SPIN 通过 DAG 规划与前缀执行控制，提升工业 LLM 规划的结构有效性和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业 LLM agent 系统常将规划与执行分离，但 LLM 规划器常生成结构无效或过长的流程，导致脆弱失败和额外工具/API 成本。
analysis.problem: 解决 LLM 规划器生成的结构无效或冗余工作流问题，减少不必要的执行步骤和工具调用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合验证的有向无环图（DAG）规划与基于前缀的执行控制：通过 _validate_plan_text 和修复提示强制 DAG 约束，生成可执行计划；增量评估 DAG 前缀，当前前缀足以回答查询时停止执行。
contributions: 提出 SPIN，一种即插即用的规划包装器，通过 DAG 验证和前缀执行控制提升规划有效性。
在 AssetOpsBench 和 MCP Bench 上验证了减少任务数、提升完成率和降低工具调用的效果。
analysis.experiments: 在 AssetOpsBench 的 261 个场景中，SPIN 将执行任务从 1061 减至 623，Accomplished 从 0.638 提升至 0.706，每次运行工具调用从 11.81 降至 6.82。在 MCP Bench 上，对 GPT OSS1 和 Llama 4 Maverick 均提升了规划、基础和依赖相关分数。
limitations: 可能依赖 DAG 结构的可表达性，对于非 DAG 结构的工作流可能不适用。
修复提示可能无法处理所有无效计划，极端情况下可能仍需人工干预。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SPIN 通过 DAG 规划与前缀执行控制，提升工业 LLM 规划的结构有效性和效率。

papers.title: Bridging Legal Interpretation and Formal Logic: Faithfulness, Assumption, and the Future of AI Legal Reasoning
papers.abstract: The growing adoption of large language models in legal practice brings both significant promise and serious risk. Legal professionals stand to benefit from AI that can reason over contracts, draft documents, and analyze sources at scale, yet the high-stakes nature of legal work demands a level of rigor that current AI systems do not provide. The central problem is not simply that LLMs hallucinate facts and references; it is that they systematically draw inferences that go beyond what the source text actually supports, presenting assumption-laden conclusions as if they were logically grounded. This proposal presents a neuro-symbolic approach to legal AI that combines the expressive power of large language models with the rigor of formal verification, aiming to make AI-assisted legal reasoning both capable and trustworthy, thus reducing the burden of manual verification without sacrificing the accountability that legal practice demands.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号方法结合LLM与形式验证，提升法律推理的忠实性与可信度。
analysis.research_motivation: 法律领域对推理的严谨性要求极高，而当前LLM系统存在系统性推断超出源文本支持的问题，导致结论不可靠，增加人工验证负担。
analysis.problem: LLM在法律推理中产生假设性结论，缺乏逻辑忠实性，无法满足法律实践对可问责性的要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM不仅会幻觉事实，更会系统性地进行超出源文本支持的推断，将假设性结论呈现为逻辑推导结果。
analysis.method: 神经符号方法：结合LLM的表达能力与形式验证的严谨性，实现忠实且可信的AI法律推理。
contributions: 提出将形式逻辑与LLM结合的神经符号框架，解决法律推理中的忠实性问题。
为AI法律推理提供可验证、可问责的解决方案，减少人工验证负担。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 神经符号方法的可扩展性可能受限于形式化表示的复杂度。
实际法律场景中的歧义性和开放性可能难以完全形式化。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号方法结合LLM与形式验证，提升法律推理的忠实性与可信度。

papers.title: Network-Aware Bilinear Tokenization for Brain Functional Connectivity Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Masked autoencoders (MAEs) have recently shown promise for self-supervised representation learning of resting-state brain functional connectivity (FC). However, a fundamental question remains unresolved: how should FC matrices be tokenized to align with the intrinsic modular organization of large-scale brain networks? Existing approaches typically adopt region-centric or graph-based schemes that treat FC as structurally homogeneous elements and overlook the large-scale network brain organization. We introduce NERVE (Network-Aware Representations of Brain Functional Connectivity via Bilinear Tokenization), a self-supervised learning framework that redefines FC tokenization by partitioning FC matrices into patches of intra- and inter-network connectivity blocks. Unlike image-based MAE, where fixed-size patches share a common tokenizer, FC patches defined by network pairs are heterogeneous in size and correspond to distinct functional roles. To resolve this problem, NERVE embeds FC patches through a novel structured bilinear factorization. This formulation preserves network identity and reduces parameter complexity from quadratic to linear scaling in the number of networks. We evaluate NERVE across three large-scale developmental cohorts (ABCD, PNC, and CCNP) for behavior and psychopathology prediction. Compared to structurally agnostic MAE variants and graph-based self-supervised baselines, the proposed network-aware formulation yields more stable and transferable representations, particularly in cross-cohort evaluation. Ablation studies confirm that the proposed bilinear network embedding and anatomically grounded parcellation are critical for performance. These findings highlight the importance of incorporating domain-specific structural priors into self-supervised learning for functional connectomics.

analysis.tldr: 提出网络感知双线性分词方法NERVE，用于脑功能连接的自监督表征学习，通过双线性分解嵌入网络块，提升跨队列预测稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MAE方法将FC矩阵视为同质元素，忽略了大脑网络的大规模模块化组织，导致表征缺乏结构先验。
analysis.problem: 如何将FC矩阵分词以对齐大脑网络的固有模块化组织，并处理网络对定义的非均匀尺寸FC块。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: NERVE框架：将FC矩阵划分为网络内和网络间连接块，通过结构化双线性分解嵌入这些块，保持网络身份并降低参数复杂度。
contributions: 提出网络感知的FC分词策略，利用双线性分解处理非均匀FC块。
在三个大规模发育队列上验证，相比结构无关的MAE和图自监督基线，表征更稳定、可迁移。
analysis.experiments: 在ABCD、PNC和CCNP三个队列上进行行为和精神病预测评估，包括跨队列评估和消融研究。
limitations: 可能依赖特定脑图谱划分。
双线性分解的线性缩放假设可能限制对更复杂网络交互的建模。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出网络感知双线性分词方法NERVE，用于脑功能连接的自监督表征学习，通过双线性分解嵌入网络块，提升跨队列预测稳定性。

papers.title: Model-Adaptive Tool Necessity Reveals the Knowing-Doing Gap in LLM Tool Use
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly act as autonomous agents that must decide when to answer directly vs. when to invoke external tools. Prior work studying adaptive tool use has largely treated tool necessity as a model-agnostic property, annotated by human or LLM judge, and mostly cover cases where the answer is obvious (e.g., fetching the weather vs. paraphrasing text). However, tool necessity in the wild is more nuanced due to the divergence of capability boundaries across models: a problem solvable by a strong model on its own may still require tools for a weaker one. In this work, we introduce a model-adaptive definition of tool-necessity, grounded in each model's empirical performance. Following this definition, we compare the necessity against observed tool-call behavior across four models on arithmetic and factual QA dataset, and find substantial mismatches of 26.5-54.0% and 30.8-41.8%, respectively. To diagnose the failure, we decompose tool use into two stages: an internal cognition stage that reflects whether a model believes a tool is necessary, and an execution stage that determines whether the model actually makes a tool-call action. By probing the LLM hidden states, we find that both signals are often linearly decodable, yet their probe directions become nearly orthogonal in the late-layer, last-token regime that drives the next-token action. By tracing the trajectory of samples in the two-stage process, we further discover that the majority of mismatch is concentrated in the cognition-to-action transition, not in cognition itself. These results reveal a knowing-doing gap in LLM tool-use: improving tool-use reliability requires not only better recognition of when tools are needed, but also better translation of that recognition into action.

analysis.tldr: LLM工具使用中存在“知-行差距”：模型虽能识别工具需求，但难以将认知转化为行动。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究将工具必要性视为模型无关属性，忽略了不同模型能力边界差异，导致工具使用策略不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何定义模型自适应的工具必要性，并诊断LLM在工具使用中认知与行动不一致的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在算术和事实QA数据集上，模型实际工具调用行为与模型自适应必要性之间存在26.5-54.0%和30.8-41.8%的显著不匹配。
analysis.method: 提出模型自适应的工具必要性定义（基于模型实证表现），将工具使用分解为内部认知阶段和执行阶段，通过探针分析隐藏状态并追踪样本轨迹。
contributions: 引入模型自适应的工具必要性定义，揭示不同模型能力边界差异。
发现LLM工具使用中的“知-行差距”：认知与行动信号在后期层几乎正交，多数不匹配源于认知到行动的转换。
analysis.experiments: 在算术和事实QA数据集上对四个模型进行实验，报告了不匹配比例和探针分析结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖算术和事实QA任务，未涉及更复杂场景。
探针分析依赖线性可解码假设，可能忽略非线性关系。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM工具使用中存在“知-行差距”：模型虽能识别工具需求，但难以将认知转化为行动。

papers.title: Enhanced and Efficient Reasoning in Large Learning Models
papers.abstract: In current Large Language Models we can trust the production of smoothly flowing prose on the basis of the principles of machine learning. However, there is no comparably principled basis to justify trust in the content of the text produced. It appears to be conventional wisdom that addressing this issue by adding more principled reasoning is not computationally affordable. Here we propose a principled method of reasoning that is efficient enough to be practical for large language models. Further, the method allows the retention of much of the currently used software and hardware base. Our method for improving the functioning of large language models consists of a first stage of preprocessing that recodes the data to a Unary Relational Integracode that is more explicit about the relationships among the objects described in the text, followed as a second stage by a standard but possibly streamlined machine learning process that then also learns to predict these relationships. The method may be viewed as realizing a world model and applying beyond natural language, to vision and actions, for example, where the multiple properties of an object referred to in an input are brought together explicitly, rather than remaining distributed in the various references to it in the input. We articulate its advantages in terms of Robust Logic, a system for performing principled chaining on learned, and hence uncertain, information. We show that this recoding has the surprising and fortuitous property that, while succinct, it makes the task of learning a core subset of relational rules that hold in the world described in the training data polynomial time learnable in a defined sense, the polynomial depending on the complexity of the rule. This gives support for sound reasoning within each single call of the learned classifier as well as between multiple calls.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种高效推理方法，通过数据重编码为显式关系表示，使大语言模型在保持现有软硬件基础上实现可负担的可靠推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前大语言模型能生成流畅文本，但缺乏对内容可靠性的原则性保证；增加推理能力被认为计算成本过高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加计算开销的前提下，为大语言模型引入原则性的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段将数据重编码为Unary Relational Integracode，显式表示对象间关系；第二阶段使用标准但可能精简的机器学习过程学习并预测这些关系。
contributions: 提出一种高效推理方法，使大语言模型能进行原则性推理且计算可行。
证明重编码后学习核心关系规则可在多项式时间内完成，支持单次和多次调用间的可靠推理。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法依赖数据重编码，可能对复杂或噪声数据敏感。
多项式时间可学习性可能仅适用于特定规则子集，泛化性需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种高效推理方法，通过数据重编码为显式关系表示，使大语言模型在保持现有软硬件基础上实现可负担的可靠推理。

papers.title: From Descriptive to Prescriptive: Uncover the Social Value Alignment of LLM-based Agents
papers.abstract: Wide applications of LLM-based agents require strong alignment with human social values. However, current works still exhibit deficiencies in self-cognition and dilemma decision, as well as self-emotions. To remedy this, we propose a novel value-based framework that employs GraphRAG to convert principles into value-based instructions and steer the agent to behave as expected by retrieving the suitable instruction upon a specific conversation context. To evaluate the ratio of expected behaviors, we define the expected behaviors from two famous theories, Maslow's Hierarchy of Needs and Plutchik's Wheel of Emotion. By experimenting with our method on the benchmark of DAILYDILEMMAS, our method exhibits significant performance gains compared to prompt-based baselines, including ECoT, Plan-and-Solve, and Metacognitive prompting. Our method provides a basis for the emergence of self-emotion in AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于GraphRAG的价值框架，将原则转化为价值指令，提升LLM智能体在困境决策中的社会价值对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM智能体在自我认知、困境决策和情感表达方面存在不足，难以与人类社会价值观对齐。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM智能体在具体对话上下文中遵循社会价值原则，并评估其行为是否符合预期。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法（如ECoT、Plan-and-Solve、元认知提示）在困境决策中表现不足，缺乏对价值原则的显式建模和上下文检索。
analysis.method: 提出基于GraphRAG的框架，将原则转化为价值指令，并在对话上下文中检索合适指令引导智能体行为；使用马斯洛需求层次和普拉奇克情绪轮定义预期行为。
contributions: 提出一种将原则转化为价值指令的GraphRAG框架，用于对齐LLM智能体的社会价值。
在DAILYDILEMMAS基准上验证了方法有效性，显著优于多种提示基线。
analysis.experiments: 在DAILYDILEMMAS基准上实验，方法相比ECoT、Plan-and-Solve和元认知提示等基线有显著性能提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的价值原则定义和GraphRAG构建。
未提及跨领域或跨文化泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于GraphRAG的价值框架，将原则转化为价值指令，提升LLM智能体在困境决策中的社会价值对齐。

papers.title: Sheaf-Theoretic Transport and Obstruction for Detecting Scientific Theory Shift in AI Agents
papers.abstract: Scientific theory shift in AI agents requires more than fitting equations to data. An artificial scientific agent must detect whether an existing representational framework remains transportable into a new regime, or whether its language has become locally-to-globally obstructed and must be extended. This paper develops a finite sheaf-theoretic framework for detecting theory-shift candidates through transport and obstruction. Contexts are organized as a local-to-global structure in which source, overlap, target, and validation charts are fitted, restricted, and tested for gluing. Obstruction measures failure of coherence through residual fit, overlap incompatibility, constraint violation, limiting-relation failure, and representational cost. We evaluate the framework on a controlled transition-card benchmark designed to separate deformation within a source language from extension of that language. The main result is direct obstruction ranking: the intended deformation or extension is usually the lowest-obstruction candidate, and transition type is separated in the benchmark. A constellation kernel over the same signatures is included only as a secondary representational-similarity probe. The aim is not to reconstruct historical paradigm shifts or solve open-ended autonomous theory invention, but to isolate a finite diagnostic subproblem for AI agents: detecting when representational transport fails and extension becomes the coherent next move.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于层论的框架，通过传输与阻碍检测AI智能体中的科学理论变迁。
analysis.research_motivation: AI智能体需要检测现有表征框架是否可迁移到新领域，或是否需要扩展，但现有方法缺乏形式化诊断工具。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化检测AI智能体中科学理论的变迁，即判断表征传输是否失败并需要扩展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建有限层论框架，通过源、重叠、目标、验证图表组织上下文，并利用残差拟合、重叠不兼容性、约束违反等指标测量阻碍度，直接对变迁候选进行阻碍排序。
contributions: 提出基于层论的传输与阻碍框架，用于检测科学理论变迁。
设计过渡卡片基准，验证框架能区分变形与扩展，且目标变迁通常具有最低阻碍度。
analysis.experiments: 在受控的过渡卡片基准上评估，结果表明变形或扩展通常是最低阻碍候选，且变迁类型可分离。
limitations: 仅针对有限诊断子问题，不涉及历史范式重构或开放式理论发明。
星座核仅作为次要表征相似性探针，可能不是核心贡献。
