papers.title: Viverra: Text-to-Code with Guarantees
papers.abstract: A fundamental limitation of Text-to-Code is that no guarantee can be obtained about the correctness of the generated code. Therefore, to ensure its correctness, the generated code still has to be reviewed, tested, and maintained by developers. However, parsing through LLM-generated code can be tedious and time-consuming, potentially negating the productivity gains promised by AI-coding tools. To address this challenge, we present Viverra, a system that automatically produces formally verified annotations alongside generated code to aid user's understanding of the generated program. Given a natural-language task description, Viverra prompts an LLM to synthesize a C program together with candidate assertions expressing safety and correctness properties. It then verifies those assertions in a compositional and best-effort manner via a portfolio of bounded model checkers. Evaluation on 18 diverse programming tasks suggests that Viverra can efficiently generate code with verified assertions, and that these assertions improve users' performance on code-comprehension tasks in a user study with more than 400 participants.

analysis.tldr: Viverra系统通过自动生成形式化验证的断言来提升文本到代码生成的可信度。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到代码生成缺乏正确性保证，开发者仍需审查和测试代码，可能抵消AI编码工具的生产力提升。
analysis.problem: 如何为LLM生成的代码自动提供正确性保证，以帮助用户理解程序。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Viverra系统：提示LLM合成C程序及候选断言（表达安全性和正确性属性），然后通过有界模型检查器组合进行组合式、尽力而为的验证。
contributions: 提出Viverra系统，自动为生成的代码生成形式化验证的断言。
通过用户研究（400+参与者）证明断言能提升代码理解任务的表现。
analysis.experiments: 在18个多样化编程任务上评估，显示Viverra能高效生成带验证断言的代码；用户研究（400+参与者）表明断言提升代码理解性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于C语言和特定验证工具。
验证是尽力而为的，可能无法保证所有断言正确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Viverra系统通过自动生成形式化验证的断言来提升文本到代码生成的可信度。

papers.title: Not All Symbols Are Equal: Importance-Aware Constellation Design for Semantic Communication
papers.abstract: Semantic communication systems for goal-oriented transmission must protect task-relevant information not only through source compression but also via physical layer mapping. Existing approaches decouple constellation design and semantic encoding, exposing critical symbols to channel errors at the same rate as irrelevant ones. Contrary to this, in this paper, a joint semantic-physical layer framework is proposed, which is composed of a vector quantized-variational autoencoder that extracts discrete latent concepts, a semantic criticality indicator (SCI) that scores each concept by task relevance, and a deep reinforcement learning agent that dynamically selects the transmission subset based on instantaneous channel conditions. At the physical layer, a learned semantic-aware M -QAM constellation assigns symbol positions according to joint co-occurrence statistics and SCI scores, departing from the uniform spacing and Gray coding of standard M -QAM which minimizes average BER without regard for semantic content. We introduce a novel semantic symbol vulnerability (SSV) metric and a semantic protection probability (SPP) to quantify the exposure of task-critical symbols to decoding errors, and prove that any Gray-coded constellation is strictly suboptimal in SCI-Weighted SSV whenever the source exhibits non-uniform semantic importance and co-occurrence statistics. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed constellation achieves near 100% SPP across modulation orders from 4-QAM to 1024-QAM versus 50% for standard constellations at high spectral efficiency, a 21:1 compression ratio with semantic quality above 0.9, generalizing across MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and FSDD without modification.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义感知星座设计，通过强化学习动态选择传输子集，实现近100%语义保护概率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语义通信系统将星座设计与语义编码解耦，导致关键符号与无关符号以相同速率暴露于信道错误，缺乏对任务相关信息的差异化保护。
analysis.problem: 如何联合优化语义编码与物理层星座映射，使关键语义符号获得更高保护，提升目标导向传输效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准Gray编码星座在语义重要性非均匀且存在共现统计时，在SCI加权SSV指标上严格次优。
analysis.method: 提出联合语义-物理层框架：VQ-VAE提取离散潜在概念，语义关键性指标(SCI)评分，深度强化学习根据信道条件动态选择传输子集，语义感知M-QAM星座根据共现统计和SCI分配符号位置。
contributions: 提出语义感知星座设计，联合优化语义编码与物理层映射
引入语义符号脆弱性(SSV)和语义保护概率(SPP)量化关键符号暴露
证明Gray编码星座在非均匀语义重要性下严格次优
实现高压缩比(21:1)且语义质量>0.9，跨数据集泛化
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST、FSDD数据集上，从4-QAM到1024-QAM调制阶数下，所提星座实现近100% SPP，标准星座仅50%；压缩比21:1时语义质量>0.9。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务和数据集，泛化性需进一步验证
强化学习训练复杂度较高，实时性可能受限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义感知星座设计，通过强化学习动态选择传输子集，实现近100%语义保护概率。

papers.title: Slot-MPC: Goal-Conditioned Model Predictive Control with Object-Centric Representations
papers.abstract: Predictive world models enable agents to model scene dynamics and reason about the consequences of their actions. Inspired by human perception, object-centric world models capture scene dynamics using object-level representations, which can be used for downstream applications such as action planning. However, most object-centric world models and reinforcement learning (RL) approaches learn reactive policies that are fixed at inference time, limiting generalization to novel situations. We propose Slot-MPC, an object-centric world modeling framework that enables planning through Model Predictive Control (MPC). Slot-MPC leverages vision encoders to learn slot-based representations, which encode individual objects in the scene, and uses these structured representations to learn an action-conditioned object-centric dynamics model. At inference time, the learned dynamics model enables action planning via MPC, allowing agents to adapt to previously unseen situations. Since the learned world model is differentiable, we can use gradient-based MPC to directly optimize actions, which is computationally more efficient than relying on gradient-free, sampling-based MPC methods. Experiments on simulated robotic manipulation tasks show that Slot-MPC improves both task performance and planning efficiency compared to non-object-centric world model baselines. In the considered offline setting with limited state-action coverage, we find that gradient-based MPC performs better than gradient-free, sampling-based MPC. Our results demonstrate that explicitly structured, object-centric representations provide a strong inductive bias for controllable and generalizable decision-making. Code and additional results are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: Slot-MPC 利用目标中心表示和可微世界模型实现高效模型预测控制，提升机器人操作任务的泛化性和规划效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有目标中心世界模型和强化学习方法通常学习固定反应策略，难以泛化到新场景；而模型预测控制（MPC）虽能在线规划，但传统采样方法计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何利用目标中心表示构建可微世界模型，实现高效且泛化的在线动作规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在离线设置且状态-动作覆盖有限时，基于梯度的 MPC 优于无梯度的采样 MPC。
analysis.method: 提出 Slot-MPC 框架：使用视觉编码器学习基于槽（slot）的目标中心表示，学习动作条件的目标中心动力学模型，并通过可微模型进行梯度优化 MPC 实现动作规划。
contributions: 提出 Slot-MPC，将目标中心表示与可微 MPC 结合，实现高效在线规划。
实验证明目标中心表示提供了强归纳偏置，提升任务性能和规划效率。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟机器人操作任务上评估，与无目标中心世界模型基线对比，Slot-MPC 在任务性能和规划效率上均有提升。
limitations: 仅在模拟环境中验证，未涉及真实机器人场景。
依赖离线数据集，在线学习或探索场景未探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Slot-MPC 利用目标中心表示和可微世界模型实现高效模型预测控制，提升机器人操作任务的泛化性和规划效率。

papers.title: Critic-Driven Voronoi-Quantization for Distilling Deep RL Policies to Explainable Models
papers.abstract: Despite many successful attempts at explaining Deep Reinforcement Learning policies using distillation, it remains difficult to balance the performance-interpretability trade-off and select a fitting surrogate model. In addition to this, traditional distillation only minimizes the distance between the behavior of the original and the surrogate policy while other RL-specific components such as action value are disregarded. To solve this, we introduce a new model-agnostic method called Critic-Driven Voronoi State Partitioning, which partitions a black box control policy into regions where a simple class of model can be optimized using gradient descent. By exploiting the critic value network of the original policy, we iteratively introduce new subpolicies in regions with insufficient value, standing in for a measure of policy complexity. The partitioning, a Voronoi quantizer, uses nearest neighbor lookups to assign a linear function to each point in the state space resulting in a cell-like diagram. We validate our approach on several well known benchmarks and proof that this distillation approaches the original policy using a reasonable sized set of linear functions.

analysis.tldr: 利用评论家网络进行Voronoi状态分区，将深度强化学习策略蒸馏为可解释的线性模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度强化学习策略的可解释性蒸馏面临性能-可解释性权衡难题，且传统蒸馏忽略动作价值等强化学习特有组件。
analysis.problem: 如何将黑盒深度强化学习策略蒸馏为可解释模型，同时保持性能并利用强化学习特有信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Critic-Driven Voronoi State Partitioning方法，利用原始策略的评论家价值网络迭代地在价值不足区域引入子策略，通过Voronoi量化器将状态空间划分为细胞状区域，每个区域分配一个线性函数。
contributions: 提出一种模型无关的蒸馏方法，利用评论家网络指导状态分区。
证明该方法可以用合理大小的线性函数集逼近原始策略。
analysis.experiments: 在多个知名基准上验证，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖评论家网络的准确性。
线性函数集的大小可能随任务复杂度增长。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用评论家网络进行Voronoi状态分区，将深度强化学习策略蒸馏为可解释的线性模型。

papers.title: REALM: Retrospective Encoder Alignment for LFP Modeling
papers.abstract: Spike activity has been the dominant neural signal for behavior decoding due to its high spatial and temporal resolution. However, as brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) move toward high channel counts and wireless operation, the high sampling frequency of spike signals becomes a bottleneck due to high power and bandwidth requirements. Local field potentials (LFPs) represent a different spatial-temporal scale of brain activity compared to spikes, offering key advantages including improved long-term stability, reduced energy consumption, and lower bandwidth requirement. Despite these benefits, LFP-based decoding models typically show reduced accuracy and often rely on non-causal architectures that are unsuitable for real-time deployment. To address these challenges, we propose REALM: a retrospective distillation framework that enables causal LFP decoding. Inspired by offline-to-online distillation strategies in speech recognition, REALM transfers representational knowledge from a pretrained multi-session bidirectional LFP model to a causal version for real-time deployment. We first pretrain a bidirectional Mamba-2 teacher model using a masked autoencoding objective. We then distill this teacher model into a compact student model via a combined objective of representation alignment and task supervision. REALM consistently outperforms both causal and non-causal LFP-based SOTA methods for behavior decoding. Notably, our REALM improves decoding performance while achieving a $2\times$ reduction in parameter count and a $10\times$ reduction in training time. These results demonstrate that retrospective distillation effectively bridges the gap between offline and real-time neural decoding. REALM shows that LFP-only models can achieve competitive decoding performance without reliance on spike signals, offering a practical and scalable alternative for next-generation wireless implantable BCIs.

analysis.tldr: 提出REALM框架，通过回顾式蒸馏将非因果LFP模型转化为因果模型，实现高效实时行为解码。
analysis.research_motivation: 尖峰信号高采样率导致功耗和带宽瓶颈，而LFP虽具有长期稳定性和低能耗优势，但解码精度较低且现有方法多为非因果架构，不适合实时部署。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LFP信号实现高精度、低资源消耗的因果行为解码模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先预训练双向Mamba-2教师模型（掩码自编码），再通过表示对齐和任务监督联合目标蒸馏为紧凑因果学生模型。
contributions: 提出REALM回顾式蒸馏框架，首次实现因果LFP解码且性能优于非因果方法。
在参数减少2倍、训练时间减少10倍的同时提升解码性能。
analysis.experiments: 在行为解码任务上，REALM一致优于现有因果和非因果LFP方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练教师模型的质量。
未在多种脑区或更大规模数据上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出REALM框架，通过回顾式蒸馏将非因果LFP模型转化为因果模型，实现高效实时行为解码。

papers.title: Towards In-Depth Root Cause Localization for Microservices with Multi-Agent Recursion-of-Thought
papers.abstract: As modern microservice systems grow increasingly complex due to dynamic interactions and evolving runtime environments, they experience failures with rising frequency. Ensuring system reliability therefore critically depends on accurate root cause localization (RCL). While numerous traditional machine learning and deep learning approaches have been explored for this task, they often suffer from limited interpretability and poor transferability across deployments. More recently, large language model (LLM)-based methods have been proposed to address these issues. However, existing LLM-based approaches still face two fundamental limitations: context explosion, which dilutes critical evidence and degrades localization accuracy, and serial reasoning structures, which hinder deep causal exploration and impair inference efficiency. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive study of both how human SREs perform root cause localization in practice and why existing LLM-based methods fall short. Motivated by these findings, we introduce RCLAgent, an in-depth root cause localization framework for microservice systems that realizes multi-agent recursion-of-thought with parallel reasoning. RCLAgent decomposes the diagnostic process along the trace graph by assigning each span to a Dedicated Agent and organizing agents recursively and in parallel according to the graph topology, with the final diagnosis obtained by synthesizing the Root-Level Diagnosis Report and the Global Evidence Graph. Extensive experiments on multiple public benchmarks demonstrate that RCLAgent consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both localization accuracy and inference efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体递归思维框架RCLAgent，通过并行推理和证据图合成提升微服务根因定位的准确性与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 微服务系统动态复杂，故障频发，现有方法（传统ML/DL可解释性差、迁移性弱；LLM方法存在上下文爆炸和串行推理限制）难以实现高效准确的根因定位。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM-based根因定位方法中上下文爆炸导致关键证据稀释、串行推理阻碍深度因果探索和推理效率低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：1）传统方法可解释性和迁移性差；2）LLM方法存在上下文爆炸和串行推理结构两大局限；3）人类SRE的实践表明需要并行和递归的推理方式。
analysis.method: RCLAgent框架：沿trace图将每个span分配给专用智能体，根据图拓扑递归并行组织智能体，通过合成根级诊断报告和全局证据图得到最终诊断。
contributions: 提出多智能体递归思维框架RCLAgent，实现并行推理以缓解上下文爆炸和串行推理限制
在多个公开基准上验证了RCLAgent在定位精度和推理效率上均优于现有方法
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开基准上进行实验，RCLAgent在定位精度和推理效率上一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖trace图的质量和完整性
多智能体协作的通信开销可能成为瓶颈
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体递归思维框架RCLAgent，通过并行推理和证据图合成提升微服务根因定位的准确性与效率。

papers.title: Do Coding Agents Understand Least-Privilege Authorization?
papers.abstract: As coding agents gain access to shells, repositories, and user files, least-privilege authorization becomes a prerequisite for safe deployment: an agent should receive enough authority to complete the task, without unnecessary authority that exposes sensitive this http URL study whether current models can infer this boundary themselves, we first introduce permission-boundary inference, where a model maps a task instruction and terminal environment to a file-level read/write/execute policy, and AuthBench, a benchmark of 120 realistic terminal tasks with human-reviewed permission labels and executable validators for utility and attack this http URL shows that authorization is not a simple conservative-versus-permissive calibration problem: frontier models often omit permissions required by the execution chain while also granting unused or sensitive this http URL inference-time reasoning does not resolve this mismatch. Instead, each model moves toward a model-specific authorization attractor: more reasoning makes it more consistent in its own failure mode, whether broad-but-exposed or this http URL suggests that direct policy generation is the bottleneck, because a single generation must both discover all necessary accesses and reject all unnecessary this http URL therefore propose Sufficiency-Tightness Decomposition, which first generates a coverage-oriented policy by forward-simulating the task and then audits each granted entry for grounding and this http URL tested models, this decomposition improves sensitive-task success by up to 15.8% on tightness-biased models while reducing attack success across all evaluated models.

analysis.tldr: 编码代理在权限推断中存在授权吸引子现象，分解为充分性与紧致性可提升安全任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 编码代理需要最小权限授权以确保安全部署，但当前模型难以自主推断任务所需的权限边界，导致过度授权或遗漏必要权限。
analysis.problem: 研究编码代理能否理解最小权限授权，即从任务指令和终端环境推断文件级读写执行策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 授权不是简单的保守与宽松校准问题：前沿模型常遗漏执行链所需的权限，同时授予未使用或敏感的权限；推理时推理不能解决此不匹配，每个模型趋向于模型特定的授权吸引子，更多推理使其在自身失败模式上更一致。
analysis.method: 提出充分性-紧致性分解（Sufficiency-Tightness Decomposition）：首先生成覆盖导向的策略（通过前向模拟任务），然后审计每个授予的条目以验证其依据和必要性。
contributions: 引入权限边界推断任务和AuthBench基准（120个真实终端任务，含人工审核的权限标签和可执行验证器）。
发现授权吸引子现象：推理增强使模型在自身失败模式上更一致。
提出充分性-紧致性分解方法，在紧致性偏置模型上敏感任务成功率提升高达15.8%，并降低所有评估模型的攻击成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型上测试，分解方法在紧致性偏置模型上敏感任务成功率提升高达15.8%，并降低所有评估模型的攻击成功率。
limitations: 仅针对文件级读写执行策略，未涉及更细粒度的权限控制。
基准任务数量有限（120个），可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 编码代理在权限推断中存在授权吸引子现象，分解为充分性与紧致性可提升安全任务成功率。

papers.title: Exploitation of Hidden Context in Dynamic Movement Forecasting: A Neural Network Journey from Recurrent to Graph Neural Networks and General Purpose Transformers
papers.abstract: Forecasting within signal processing pipelines is crucial for mitigating delays, particularly in predicting the dynamic movements of objects such as NBA players. This task poses significant challenges due to the inherently interactive and unpredictable nature of sports, where abrupt changes in velocity and direction are prevalent. Traditional approaches, including (S)ARIMA(X), Kalman filters (KF), and Particle filters (PF), often struggle to model the non-linear dynamics present in such scenarios. Machine learning (ML) methods, such as long short-term memory (LSTM) networks, graph neural networks (GNNs), and Transformers, offer greater flexibility and accuracy but frequently fail to explicitly capture the interplay between temporal dependencies and contextual interactions, which are critical in chaotic sports environments. In this paper, we evaluate these models and assess their strengths and weaknesses. Experimental results reveal key performance trade-offs across input history length, generalizability, and the ability to incorporate contextual information. ML-based methods demonstrated substantial improvements over linear models across forecast horizons of up to 2s. Among the tested architectures, our hybrid LSTM augmented with contextual information achieved the lowest final displacement error (FDE) of 1.51m, outperforming temporal convolutional neural network (TCNN), graph attention network (GAT), and Transformers, while also requiring less data and training time compared to GAT and Transformers. Our findings indicate that no single architecture excels across all metrics, emphasizing the need for task-specific considerations in trajectory prediction for fast-paced, dynamic environments such as NBA gameplay.

analysis.tldr: 混合LSTM结合上下文信息在NBA球员运动预测中优于GNN和Transformer，但无单一架构全面领先。
analysis.research_motivation: 信号处理中的延迟问题需要准确预测动态运动，但传统方法难以建模非线性动力学，现有ML方法未能显式捕捉时间依赖与上下文交互的耦合。
analysis.problem: 在快速变化的体育场景（如NBA）中，如何有效利用隐藏上下文信息进行动态运动轨迹预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ML方法在2秒预测范围内显著优于线性模型；混合LSTM+上下文在FDE上最优（1.51m），且数据与训练时间需求低于GAT和Transformer；无单一架构在所有指标上占优。
analysis.method: 评估LSTM、GNN、Transformer等模型，并提出一种混合LSTM架构，通过显式注入上下文信息（如球员交互）增强预测。
contributions: 系统评估了从RNN到GNN和Transformer的多种模型在NBA球员运动预测中的性能
提出一种混合LSTM+上下文方法，在FDE上达到1.51m，优于TCNN、GAT和Transformer
analysis.experiments: 在NBA球员运动数据上评估，预测时域达2秒，比较了输入历史长度、泛化性和上下文信息整合能力。
limitations: 仅在单一体育场景（NBA）验证，泛化性未知
混合LSTM+上下文在长时域预测上的表现未明确说明
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 混合LSTM结合上下文信息在NBA球员运动预测中优于GNN和Transformer，但无单一架构全面领先。

papers.title: IFPV: An Integrated Multi-Agent Framework for Generative Operational Planning and High-Fidelity Plan Verification
papers.abstract: Operational plan generation and verification are critical for modern complex and rapidly changing battlefield environments, yet traditional generation and verification methods still respectively face the challenges of generation infeasibility and verification insufficiency. To alleviate these limitations, we propose an Integrated Multi-Agent Framework for Generative Operational Planning and High-Fidelity Plan Verification (IFPV). IFPV consists of two tightly coupled modules: Multi-Perspective Hierarchical Agents (MPHA) for generative operational planning and an Adversarial Cognitive Simulation Engine (ACSE) for high-fidelity adversarial plan verification. MPHA decomposes commander intent into executable multi-platform tactical action sequences through the collaboration of Pathfinder, Analyst, and Planner agents. ACSE introduces an opponent equipped with a customized world model, which predicts the future evolution of mission-critical platforms and conducts dynamic counteractions against candidate plans. Simulation experiments in the Asymmetric Combat Tactic Simulator (ACTS) show that IFPV improves mission success by 19.4% and reduces operational cost by 41.7% compared with a single-step large language model (LLM) planning baseline. Compared with a traditional rule-based validator, ACSE increases the average suppression rate by 31.8%, indicating that the proposed verification environment is stricter and more discriminative in revealing the latent vulnerabilities of candidate plans. The code for IFPV can be found at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体框架IFPV，通过分层生成与对抗验证提升作战规划可行性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代战场环境复杂多变，传统作战规划生成方法存在不可行性，验证方法存在不充分性，亟需集成生成与验证的框架。
analysis.problem: 作战规划生成与验证中，生成方案不可行且验证不够严格，难以揭示潜在漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单步LLM规划基线成功率低、成本高；传统基于规则的验证器抑制率低，区分度不足。
analysis.method: IFPV框架包含多视角分层智能体（MPHA）用于生成作战规划，以及对抗认知仿真引擎（ACSE）用于高保真对抗验证。MPHA通过Pathfinder、Analyst和Planner智能体协作将指挥官意图分解为可执行的多平台战术动作序列；ACSE引入配备定制世界模型的对手，预测关键平台未来演化并对候选计划进行动态对抗。
contributions: 提出集成生成与验证的多智能体框架IFPV，解决规划不可行与验证不充分问题。
设计MPHA实现分层协作规划生成，ACSE实现高保真对抗验证，显著提升任务成功率和验证严格性。
analysis.experiments: 在非对称作战战术模拟器（ACTS）中进行仿真实验，与单步LLM规划基线相比，IFPV将任务成功率提升19.4%，作战成本降低41.7%；与传统基于规则的验证器相比，ACSE将平均抑制率提升31.8%。
limitations: 实验仅在特定模拟器（ACTS）中进行，泛化性未知。
框架依赖定制世界模型，构建成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体框架IFPV，通过分层生成与对抗验证提升作战规划可行性。

papers.title: XFP: Quality-Targeted Adaptive Codebook Quantization with Sparse Outlier Separation for LLM Inference
papers.abstract: We introduce XFP, a dynamic weight quantizer for LLM inference that inverts the conventional workflow: the operator specifies reconstruction quality floors on per-channel cosine similarity (one strict floor for attention and shared experts, one lazy floor for routed-expert MoE); XFP determines codebook size, outlier budget, and packing per layer automatically -- no Hessian, no calibration data, no manual bit-width selection. Each weight matrix is decomposed into a sparse fp16 outlier residual and a dense sub-byte index tensor into a per-group learned codebook. Two storage modes share one auto-select frontend and one fused decode kernel: V2 (per-channel Lloyd) and V2a (shared library of L=32 codebooks per layer). On Qwen3.5-122B-A10B under V2, XFP reaches 138 tok/s single-stream decode on workstation hardware (RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell, TP=2) at 94.49% GSM8K strict-match (3 seeds, n=3957), and is 49% faster than Marlin INT4 at TP=1. For models that do not fit in the target memory envelope, we present the H-Process: a quality-driven iteration over the two cosine thresholds that finds the operating point at which the model just fits while still producing sensible output. Three constraints define its search space: the operator-set thresholds, an OOM boundary at quantize-on-load, and a garbage boundary in generation (cosine similarity steers; benches verify). On Qwen3.5-397B-A17B (512 routed experts/layer), the H-Process fits the full expert population into 2x96 GB at ~3.4 effective bits and delivers 100.9 tok/s long-output decode at 66.72% GSM8K strict-match on the full 1319-problem set (single seed at submission; multi-seed evaluation in progress), exceeding INT4 with routed-expert pruning on memory, throughput, and accuracy simultaneously.

analysis.tldr: XFP 是一种面向 LLM 推理的动态权重量化器，通过稀疏异常值分离和自适应码本实现高质量、高吞吐的量化，无需校准数据或手动选位宽。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 推理中权重量化通常需要手动选择位宽、校准数据或 Hessian 信息，且难以同时兼顾质量、吞吐和内存约束，尤其对于 MoE 模型。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖校准数据和手动调参的情况下，实现 LLM 权重的自适应量化，同时保证重建质量和推理吞吐？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: XFP 将权重矩阵分解为稀疏 fp16 异常值残差和密集的子字节索引张量（指向每组的可学习码本），通过用户指定的余弦相似度质量阈值自动确定码本大小、异常值预算和打包方式，支持 V2（每通道 Lloyd）和 V2a（共享码本库）两种存储模式，并引入 H-Process 迭代搜索满足内存约束的操作点。
contributions: 提出 XFP 动态量化器，反转传统流程，由质量阈值驱动自动配置，无需校准数据或手动位宽选择。
设计稀疏异常值分离与自适应码本机制，在低比特下保持高精度。
提出 H-Process 迭代搜索流程，在内存约束下找到可行量化方案。
在 Qwen3.5-122B-A10B 和 Qwen3.5-397B-A17B 上验证了高吞吐和高精度。
analysis.experiments: 在 Qwen3.5-122B-A10B 上，V2 模式在 RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell (TP=2) 上达到 138 tok/s 单流解码，GSM8K 严格匹配 94.49%（3 种子，n=3957），TP=1 时比 Marlin INT4 快 49%。在 Qwen3.5-397B-A17B 上，H-Process 将模型装入 2×96 GB，有效位宽约 3.4，长输出解码 100.9 tok/s，GSM8K 严格匹配 66.72%（全 1319 题，单种子）。
limitations: H-Process 的搜索空间依赖于用户设定的阈值，可能需手动调整。
多种子评估仍在进行中，部分结果可能未完全稳定。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: XFP 是一种面向 LLM 推理的动态权重量化器，通过稀疏异常值分离和自适应码本实现高质量、高吞吐的量化，无需校准数据或手动选位宽。

papers.title: GPart: End-to-End Isometric Fine-Tuning via Global Parameter Partitioning
papers.abstract: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) has become the dominant paradigm for parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) of large language models (LLMs). However, its bilinear structure introduces a critical limitation: the mapping from trainable parameters to weight updates is not distance-preserving, distorting the optimization landscape. Methods that project a low-dimensional vector into LoRA's parameter space, such as Uni-LoRA, improve parameter efficiency, but the subsequent bilinear LoRA map breaks end-to-end isometry, leaving the core distance-preservation problem unresolved. We propose GPart (Global Partition fine-tuning), a highly parameter-efficient fine-tuning method which removes the low-rank bottleneck entirely. Our method uses a single isometric partition matrix to map a $d$-dimensional trainable vector directly into the full weight space of the model. The result is an extremely minimal fine-tuning pipeline: one random projection, end-to-end isometric, with a single clean hyperparameter ($d$) and storage cost of $d+1$ values (the trainable vector plus a random seed). GPart builds on the theoretical premise that effective fine-tuning can emerge from random low-dimensional subspaces of the full weight space, without imposing low-rank matrix structure. We empirically demonstrate the superior or comparable performance of GPart to existing PEFT methods on natural language understanding, computer vision tasks, and mathematical reasoning. Overall, GPart achieves state-of-the-art efficiency and performance by removing structural constraints, offering a straightforward and elegant path to PEFT.

analysis.tldr: GPart 通过全局等距参数划分，在保持端到端等距性的同时实现极简参数高效微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 PEFT 方法如 LoRA 的双线性结构破坏了参数到权重更新的距离保持性，导致优化景观扭曲；而 Uni-LoRA 等方法虽提升了参数效率，但后续双线性映射仍无法解决等距性问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种参数高效微调方法，在去除低秩瓶颈的同时保持端到端等距性，从而避免优化景观扭曲。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LoRA 的双线性映射不是距离保持的，这扭曲了优化景观；Uni-LoRA 投影后的双线性映射仍破坏等距性。
analysis.method: GPart 使用单个等距划分矩阵，将 d 维可训练向量直接映射到完整权重空间，实现端到端等距微调，仅需一个随机投影、一个超参数 d，存储成本为 d+1 个值。
contributions: 提出 GPart，一种去除低秩瓶颈的等距微调方法，实现端到端距离保持。
理论论证有效微调可从全权重空间的随机低维子空间涌现，无需低秩矩阵结构。
在自然语言理解、计算机视觉和数学推理任务上达到或超越现有 PEFT 方法的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在自然语言理解、计算机视觉和数学推理任务上进行了实验，GPart 性能优于或可比于现有 PEFT 方法。
limitations: 可能对随机投影的种子选择敏感。
在极低维度下性能可能下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GPart 通过全局等距参数划分，在保持端到端等距性的同时实现极简参数高效微调。

papers.title: Beyond AI as Assistants: Toward Autonomous Discovery in Cosmology
papers.abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) agents are pushing AI beyond tools toward autonomous scientific discovery. We discuss two complementary agentic systems for cosmology: \texttt{CMBEvolve}, which targets tasks with explicit quantitative objectives through LLM-guided code evolution and tree search, and \texttt{CosmoEvolve}, which targets open-ended scientific workflows through a virtual multi-agent research laboratory. As preliminary demonstrations, we apply \texttt{CMBEvolve} to out-of-distribution detection in weak-lensing maps, where it iteratively improves the benchmark score through code evolution, and \texttt{CosmoEvolve} to autonomous ACT DR6 data analysis, where it identifies non-trivial pair- and scale-dependent behaviour and produces analysis-grade diagnostics. These examples show how cosmology can provide both controlled benchmark tasks and realistic open-ended research problems for the development of AI scientist systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种AI智能体系统（CMBEvolve和CosmoEvolve），推动宇宙学从辅助工具迈向自主科学发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI在科学领域主要作为辅助工具，缺乏自主发现能力；宇宙学中存在大量需要自动化探索的复杂任务，现有方法难以兼顾定量优化与开放研究。
analysis.problem: 如何设计AI智能体系统，使其既能处理具有明确量化目标的宇宙学任务，又能应对开放式的科学工作流。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两个互补系统：CMBEvolve通过LLM引导的代码进化和树搜索处理定量任务；CosmoEvolve通过虚拟多智能体研究实验室处理开放式科学工作流。
contributions: 提出CMBEvolve系统，利用LLM代码进化和树搜索优化宇宙学定量任务。
提出CosmoEvolve系统，构建虚拟多智能体实验室实现开放式科学发现。
在弱引力透镜异常检测和ACT DR6数据分析中展示初步效果。
analysis.experiments: 在弱引力透镜异常检测中，CMBEvolve通过代码进化迭代提升基准分数；CosmoEvolve在ACT DR6数据分析中识别出非平凡的对依赖和尺度依赖行为，并生成分析级诊断。
limitations: 仅提供初步演示，缺乏大规模系统性评估。
系统在开放研究中的泛化能力尚未充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种AI智能体系统（CMBEvolve和CosmoEvolve），推动宇宙学从辅助工具迈向自主科学发现。

papers.title: Graphs of Research: Citation Evolution Graphs as Supervision for Research Idea Generation
papers.abstract: Research idea generation is the innovation-driving step of automated scientific research. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have shown potential for automating idea generation at scale. However, existing methods mainly condition LLMs on eliciting idea generation through static retrieval of relevant literature or complex prompt engineering, without discarding the structural relations among references. We propose Graphs of Research (GoR), a supervised fine-tuning method that extracts a 2-hop reference neighborhood for each seed paper, derives the relations among those references from citation position, frequency, predecessor links, and publication time, and organizes them into a paper-evolution directed acyclic graph (DAG). We construct an automated extraction pipeline that draws data from five major ML/NLP venues, comprising 498/50/50 train/validation/test seed papers and approximately 7,600 cited references. Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M is fine-tuned on a structured-text prompt that includes the citation graph, edge signals, reference information, and task definition to predict the idea for the seed paper. Across head-to-head LLM-judge tournaments against gpt-4o-driven baselines, GoR-SFT achieves SOTA, demonstrating the effectiveness of citation-evolution graphs as supervision signal for LLM-based idea generation. We hope that this reduces the barrier for citation evolution graphs as a supervision, accelerating automated scientific innovation.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Graphs of Research (GoR) 方法，利用论文引用演化图监督微调 LLM，提升研究想法生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究想法生成方法主要依赖静态文献检索或复杂提示工程，忽略了参考文献间的结构关系，限制了 LLM 生成创新想法的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用引用演化图的结构信息作为监督信号，提升 LLM 生成研究想法的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GoR 方法：为每篇种子论文提取 2 跳引用邻域，根据引用位置、频率、前驱链接和发表时间推导引用间关系，构建论文演化有向无环图 (DAG)；然后使用结构化文本提示（包含引用图、边信号、参考文献信息和任务定义）对 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M 进行监督微调，预测种子论文的想法。
contributions: 提出 GoR 方法，首次将引用演化图作为监督信号用于 LLM 研究想法生成。
构建自动化提取管道，从五大 ML/NLP 会议收集 498/50/50 训练/验证/测试种子论文及约 7,600 篇参考文献。
在 LLM 裁判锦标赛中，GoR-SFT 达到 SOTA，验证了引用演化图的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在头对头 LLM 裁判锦标赛中，与 gpt-4o 驱动的基线对比，GoR-SFT 达到 SOTA。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅使用 Qwen2.5-7B 模型，未探索更大模型或不同架构。
数据集规模有限，可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Graphs of Research (GoR) 方法，利用论文引用演化图监督微调 LLM，提升研究想法生成质量。

papers.title: Known By Their Actions: Fingerprinting LLM Browser Agents via UI Traces
papers.abstract: As LLM-based agents increasingly browse the web on users' behalf, a natural question arises: can websites passively identify which underlying model powers an agent? Doing so would represent a significant security risk, enabling targeted attacks tailored to known model vulnerabilities. Across 14 frontier LLMs and four web environments spanning information retrieval and shopping tasks, we show that an agent's actions and interaction timings, captured via a passive JavaScript tracker, are sufficient to identify the underlying model with up to 96\% F1. We formalise this attack surface by demonstrating that classifiers trained on agent actions generalise across model sizes and families. We further show that strong classifiers can be trained from few interaction traces and that agent identity can be inferred early within an episode. Injecting randomised timing delays between actions substantially degrades classifier performance, but does not provide robust protection: a classifier retrained on delayed traces largely recovers performance. We release our harness and a labelled corpus of agent traces \href{ this https URL }{here}.

analysis.tldr: 通过被动追踪LLM浏览器代理的UI交互痕迹，可高精度识别其底层模型，构成安全风险。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM代理代表用户浏览网页时，网站可能被动识别代理背后的模型，从而针对已知漏洞发起攻击，带来严重安全威胁。
analysis.problem: 研究LLM浏览器代理的UI交互痕迹是否足以唯一识别其底层模型，并评估该攻击面的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 代理的动作和交互时序（通过被动JavaScript追踪器捕获）足以高精度识别底层模型，且分类器可跨模型规模和系列泛化；随机延迟注入可降低但无法完全消除分类性能。
analysis.method: 在14个前沿LLM和4个Web环境（信息检索和购物任务）中，使用被动JavaScript追踪器捕获代理的动作和交互时序，训练分类器识别底层模型。
contributions: 形式化并实证了通过UI痕迹识别LLM浏览器代理的攻击面。
展示了分类器可跨模型规模和系列泛化，且少量交互痕迹即可训练强分类器。
分析了随机延迟注入的防御效果及其局限性。
发布了实验框架和标注的代理痕迹语料库。
analysis.experiments: 在14个前沿LLM和4个Web环境（信息检索和购物任务）中，分类器F1最高达96%，且泛化至未见模型；少量痕迹即可训练；随机延迟注入后分类器性能下降但重新训练后恢复。
limitations: 仅针对特定Web环境和任务类型，可能不适用于其他场景。
随机延迟注入作为防御手段效果有限，需探索更鲁棒的防御机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过被动追踪LLM浏览器代理的UI交互痕迹，可高精度识别其底层模型，构成安全风险。

papers.title: Beyond What to Select: A Plug-and-play Oscillatory Data-Volume Scheduling for Efficient Model Training
papers.abstract: Data selection accelerates training by identifying representative training data while preserving model performance. However, existing methods mainly focus on designing sample-importance criteria, i.e., deciding what to select, while typically fixing the selected data volume as the target ratio throughout training. Thus, they are often dynamic in sample identity but static in data volume. In this work, we revisit data selection from an optimization perspective and show that selected-data training induces an implicit regularization effect modulated by the instantaneous selection ratio. This reveals a key trade-off: lower ratios amplify selection-induced regularization, whereas higher ratios preserve data coverage and optimization fidelity. Motivated by this insight, we propose PODS, a Plug-and-play Oscillatory Data-volume Scheduling framework. Rather than introducing another sample-scoring metric, PODS serves as a lightweight module that dynamically schedules how much data to select over training. Under the target selection ratio, PODS alternates between low-ratio regularization phases and high-ratio recovery phases to exploit selection-induced regularization without sacrificing optimization stability. With its lightweight, ratio-level, and task-agnostic design, PODS is compatible with existing static and dynamic selection methods and broadly applicable across training paradigms. Experiments across various datasets, architectures, and tasks show that PODS consistently improves the efficiency-generalization trade-off, e.g., reducing ImageNet-1k training cost by 50% with improved accuracy and accelerating LLM instruction tuning by over 2x without performance degradation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种即插即用的振荡数据量调度方法PODS，通过动态调整每轮选择的数据量来提升训练效率与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据选择方法主要关注样本重要性标准（选什么），但固定选择比例，忽略了选择比例对训练动态的影响，导致效率与泛化之间的权衡受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入新评分指标的前提下，通过动态调度每轮选择的数据量来优化训练效率与泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从优化视角发现，选择数据训练会引入隐式正则化效应，其强度由瞬时选择比例调节：低比例放大正则化，高比例保持数据覆盖和优化保真度。
analysis.method: 提出PODS，一种即插即用的振荡数据量调度框架，在目标选择比例下交替进行低比例正则化阶段和高比例恢复阶段，以利用选择诱导的正则化而不牺牲优化稳定性。
contributions: 从优化角度揭示数据选择比例对训练动态的隐式正则化效应，并指出低比例与高比例之间的权衡。
提出PODS，一种轻量级、比例级、任务无关的振荡调度方法，兼容现有静态和动态选择方法。
在多个数据集、架构和任务上验证PODS能一致提升效率-泛化权衡，如ImageNet-1k训练成本降低50%且精度提升，LLM指令微调加速2倍以上且性能无损。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-1k、LLM指令微调等多种任务上实验，显示PODS能显著提升训练效率与泛化性能。
limitations: 未讨论PODS在极端低比例或高比例下的鲁棒性。
可能需要对不同任务调整振荡幅度和频率等超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种即插即用的振荡数据量调度方法PODS，通过动态调整每轮选择的数据量来提升训练效率与泛化能力。

papers.title: Streaming Speech-to-Text Translation with a SpeechLLM
papers.abstract: Normally, a system that translates speech into text consists of separate modules for speech recognition and text-to-text translation. Combining those tasks into a SpeechLLM promises to exploit paralinguistic information in the speech and to reduce cascaded errors. But existing SpeechLLM systems are slow since they do not work in a real streaming fashion: they wait for a complete utterance of audio before outputting a translation, or output tokens at fixed intervals, which is not suitable for real applications. This work proposes an LLM-based architecture for real streaming speech-to-text translation. The LLM learns not just to emit output tokens, but also to decide whether it has seen enough audio to do so. The system is trained using automatic alignments of the input speech and the output text. In experiments on different language pairs, the system achieves a translation quality close to the non-streaming baseline, but with a latency of only 1-2 seconds.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于LLM的流式语音翻译架构，让模型自主决定何时输出翻译，实现1-2秒低延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统级联式语音翻译系统存在错误累积，而现有SpeechLLM无法真正流式处理，要么等待完整音频要么固定间隔输出，不适合实时应用。
analysis.problem: 如何让SpeechLLM在流式场景下实现低延迟且高质量的语音到文本翻译。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于LLM的架构，模型不仅学习输出翻译token，还学习判断何时已收集足够音频进行输出；训练时使用输入语音与输出文本的自动对齐。
contributions: 提出一种真正流式的SpeechLLM架构，模型自主决定输出时机
在多种语言对上实现接近非流式基线的翻译质量，延迟仅1-2秒
analysis.experiments: 在不同语言对上进行了实验，翻译质量接近非流式基线，延迟1-2秒。
limitations: 可能依赖自动对齐质量
未提及在更复杂场景（如噪声环境）下的表现
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于LLM的流式语音翻译架构，让模型自主决定何时输出翻译，实现1-2秒低延迟。

papers.title: Compositional Sparsity as an Inductive Bias for Neural Architecture Design
papers.abstract: Identifying the structural priors that enable Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to overcome the curse of dimensionality is a fundamental challenge in machine learning theory. Existing literature suggests that effective high-dimensional learning is driven by compositional sparsity, where target functions decompose into constituents supported on low-dimensional variable subsets. To investigate this hypothesis, we combine Information Filtering Networks (IFNs), which extract sparse dependency structures via constrained information maximisation, with Homological Neural Networks (HNNs), which map the inferred topology into fixed-wiring sparse neural graphs. We formalise the design principles underlying this construction and present an interpretable pipeline in which abstraction emerges through hierarchical composition. HNNs are orders of magnitude sparser than standard DNNs and require only minimal hyperparameter tuning. On synthetic tasks with known sparse hierarchies, HNNs recover the underlying compositional structure and remain stable in regimes where dense alternatives degrade as dimensionality increases. Across a broad suite of real-world datasets, HNNs consistently match or outperform dense baselines while using far fewer parameters, exhibiting lower variance and showing reduced sensitivity to hyperparameters.

analysis.tldr: 通过组合稀疏性作为归纳偏置，设计出极稀疏且性能优异的神经网络架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络在高维学习中面临维度灾难，现有理论认为组合稀疏性是有效学习的关键，但缺乏将其直接转化为架构设计的系统方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将组合稀疏性作为归纳偏置，设计出稀疏、可解释且性能不降的神经网络架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合信息过滤网络（IFN）提取稀疏依赖结构，再通过同调神经网络（HNN）将推断的拓扑映射为固定连接的稀疏神经图，形成可解释的分层组合管道。
contributions: 形式化了基于组合稀疏性的神经网络设计原则，提出可解释的层次组合管道。
HNN在合成和真实数据集上以极稀疏结构匹配或超越密集基线，且参数少、方差低、超参数敏感度低。
analysis.experiments: 在合成任务（已知稀疏层次）和多个真实世界数据集上评估，HNN恢复组合结构，性能匹配或超越密集基线，且参数少、方差低。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有固有稀疏层次的任务。
IFN和HNN的联合训练或扩展性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过组合稀疏性作为归纳偏置，设计出极稀疏且性能优异的神经网络架构。

papers.title: Cognitive-Uncertainty Guided Knowledge Distillation for Accurate Classification of Student Misconceptions
papers.abstract: Accurately identifying student misconceptions is crucial for personalized education but faces three challenges: (1) data scarcity with long-tail distribution, where authentic student reasoning is difficult to synthesize; (2) fuzzy boundaries between error categories with high annotation noise; (3) deployment parado-large models overlook unconventional approaches due to pretraining bias and cannot be deployed on edge, while small models overfit to noise. Unlike traditional methods that increase diversity through large-scale data synthesis, we propose a two-stage knowledge distillation framework that mines high-value samples from existing data. The first stage performs standard distillation to transfer task capabilities. The second stage introduces a dual-layer marginal selection mechanism based on cognitive uncertainty, identifying four types of critical samples based on teacher model uncertainty and confidence differences. For different data subsets, we design difficulty-adaptive mechanism to balance hard/soft label contributions, enabling student models to inherit inter-class relationships from teacher soft labels while distinguishing ambiguous error types. Experiments show that with augmented training on only 10.30% of filtered samples, we achieve MAP@3 of 0.9585 (+17.8%) on the MAP-Charting dataset, and using only a 4B parameter model, we attain 84.38% accuracy on cross-topic tests of middle school algebra misconception benchmarks, significantly outperforming sota LLM (67.73%) and standard fine-tuned 72B models (81.25%). Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出认知不确定性引导的知识蒸馏框架，仅用10.30%的筛选样本和4B模型，在错误分类任务上超越72B模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 学生错误概念分类面临数据稀缺、长尾分布、标注噪声大以及大模型部署困难等问题，传统方法依赖大规模数据合成，成本高且效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在数据稀缺和标注噪声条件下，利用小模型准确分类学生错误概念，同时避免大模型的预训练偏见和小模型的过拟合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大模型因预训练偏见忽略非常规方法，小模型易过拟合噪声；错误类别间边界模糊，标注噪声高。
analysis.method: 两阶段知识蒸馏框架：第一阶段标准蒸馏迁移任务能力；第二阶段基于认知不确定性设计双层边际选择机制，识别四类关键样本，并采用难度自适应机制平衡硬/软标签贡献。
contributions: 提出认知不确定性引导的知识蒸馏框架，有效利用少量高价值样本提升学生模型性能。
设计双层边际选择机制和难度自适应机制，解决错误分类中的模糊边界和噪声问题。
在真实数据集上仅用10.30%样本和4B模型超越72B模型，代码开源。
analysis.experiments: 在MAP-Charting数据集上，仅用10.30%筛选样本，MAP@3达0.9585（+17.8%）；在中学代数错误概念基准上，4B模型准确率84.38%，超越SOTA LLM（67.73%）和标准微调72B模型（81.25%）。
limitations: 方法依赖教师模型的质量，教师模型偏差可能影响筛选效果。
仅针对教育领域错误分类，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出认知不确定性引导的知识蒸馏框架，仅用10.30%的筛选样本和4B模型，在错误分类任务上超越72B模型。

papers.title: EVA: Editing for Versatile Alignment against Jailbreaks
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities but remain vulnerable to jailbreaking attacks, where adversaries exploit textual or visual triggers to bypass safety guardrails. Recent defenses typically rely on safety fine-tuning or external filters to reduce the model's likelihood of producing harmful content. While effective to some extent, these methods often incur significant computational overheads and suffer from the safety utility trade-off, degrading the model's performance on benign tasks. To address these challenges, we propose EVA (Editing for Versatile Alignment against Jailbreaks), a novel framework that pioneers the application of direct model editing for safety alignment. EVA reframes safety alignment as a precise knowledge correction task. Instead of retraining massive parameters, EVA identifies and surgically edits specific neurons responsible for the model's susceptibility to harmful instructions, while leaving the vast majority of the model unchanged. By localizing the updates, EVA effectively neutralizes harmful behaviors without compromising the model's general reasoning capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EVA outperforms baselines in mitigating jailbreaks across both LLMs and VLMs, offering a precise and efficient solution for post-deployment safety alignment.

analysis.tldr: EVA通过直接编辑模型神经元实现高效安全对齐，抵御越狱攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有防御方法（安全微调、外部过滤器）计算开销大且存在安全-效用权衡，损害良性任务性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲模型通用能力的前提下，高效且精确地消除LLM/VLM对有害指令的易感性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将安全对齐重构为知识修正任务，定位并编辑与有害行为相关的特定神经元，保持其余参数不变。
contributions: 首次将直接模型编辑应用于安全对齐，提出EVA框架。
在LLM和VLM上均有效缓解越狱攻击，且不损害通用推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 在LLM和VLM上实验，EVA优于基线方法，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖神经元定位的准确性。
对未知攻击类型的泛化能力未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EVA通过直接编辑模型神经元实现高效安全对齐，抵御越狱攻击。

papers.title: Non-linear Interventions on Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Intervention is one of the most representative and widely used methods for understanding the internal representations of large language models (LLMs). However, existing intervention methods are confined to linear interventions grounded in the Linear Representation Hypothesis, leaving features encoded along non-linear manifolds beyond their reach. In this work, we introduce a general formulation of intervention that extends naturally to non-linearly represented features, together with a learning procedure that further enables intervention on implicit features lacking a direct output signature. We validate our framework on refusal bypass steering, where it steers the model more precisely than linear baselines by intervening on a non-linear feature governing refusal.

analysis.tldr: 提出非线性干预框架，通过学习隐式特征实现比线性基线更精确的模型操控。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有干预方法受限于线性表示假设，无法处理非线性流形编码的特征，限制了模型理解和操控的精度。
analysis.problem: 如何对大型语言模型中非线性表示的特征进行有效干预，并扩展到缺乏直接输出签名的隐式特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种通用的非线性干预公式，并设计学习过程以干预隐式特征。
contributions: 提出可处理非线性表示特征的一般化干预框架
引入学习过程实现对隐式特征的干预
在拒绝绕过操控任务上验证了比线性基线更精确的干预效果
analysis.experiments: 在拒绝绕过操控任务上验证，与线性基线比较，显示更精确的干预效果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的非线性特征
学习过程可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非线性干预框架，通过学习隐式特征实现比线性基线更精确的模型操控。

papers.title: Mechanical Enforcement for LLM Governance:Evidence of Governance-Task Decoupling in Financial Decision Systems
authors: José Manuel de la Chica Rodríguez
papers.abstract: Large language models in regulated financial workflows are governed by natural-language policies that the same model interprets, creating a principal--agent failure: outputs can appear compliant without being compliant. Existing evaluation measures task accuracy but not whether governance constrains behaviour at the decision rationale level -- where regulated decisions must be auditable. We introduce five governance metrics that quantify policy compliance at the rationale level and apply them in a synthetic banking domain to compare text-only governance against mechanical enforcement: four primitives operating outside the model's interpretive loop. Under text-only governance, 27% of deferrals carry no decision-relevant information. Mechanical enforcement reduces this rate by 73%, more than doubles deferral information content, and raises task accuracy from MCC~$0.43$ to $0.88$. The improvement is driven by architectural separation: LLM-generated rationales under mechanical enforcement show comparable CDL to text-only governance -- the gain comes from removing clear-cut decisions from the model's control. A causal ablation confirms that each primitive is individually necessary. Our central finding is a governance-task decoupling: under structural stress, text-only governance degrades on both dimensions simultaneously, whereas mechanical enforcement preserves governance quality even as task performance drops. This implies that governance and task evaluation are distinct axes: accuracy is not a sufficient proxy for governance in regulated AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出机械执行机制，通过将治理与任务解耦，显著提升LLM在金融决策中的合规性。
analysis.research_motivation: 在受监管的金融工作流中，LLM受自然语言政策约束，但模型自身解释政策会导致委托-代理失败：输出看似合规实则不然。现有评估仅关注任务准确性，无法衡量治理是否在决策理由层面约束行为，而受监管决策必须可审计。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM在金融决策中治理与任务耦合导致的合规性不足问题，即文本治理下模型输出可能表面合规但决策理由缺乏信息量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本治理下27%的延迟决策不包含决策相关信息；机械执行可将此比例降低73%，延迟信息量翻倍，任务准确率从MCC 0.43提升至0.88。
analysis.method: 提出机械执行机制，包含四种在模型解释循环之外运行的原语，实现治理与任务解耦；并引入五种治理指标量化理由层面的政策合规性。
contributions: 提出治理-任务解耦概念，证明准确率不能作为受监管AI系统中治理的充分代理。
设计机械执行机制，通过架构分离显著提升合规性和任务性能。
引入五种理由层面的治理指标，为评估LLM合规性提供新工具。
analysis.experiments: 在合成银行领域进行实验，对比文本治理与机械执行，并进行了因果消融实验验证每个原语的必要性。
limitations: 实验基于合成银行领域，真实金融场景的复杂性可能带来额外挑战。
机械执行原语的设计可能依赖特定领域知识，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出机械执行机制，通过将治理与任务解耦，显著提升LLM在金融决策中的合规性。

papers.title: Addressing Terminal Constraints in Data-Driven Demand Response Scheduling
papers.abstract: Electrified chemical processes are incentivized by exposure to time-varying electricity markets to operate flexibly, but participating in demand response schemes can require satisfying terminal constraints over long horizons. Specifically, terminal constraints may be required when computing optimal schedules in order to preserve dynamic stability. Model-based optimization methods are computationally costly, and data-driven scheduling via reinforcement learning (RL) faces severe credit-assignment challenges. We integrate Goal-Space Planning (GSP) with Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG), using learned temporally abstract models over discrete subgoals to propagate value across extended horizons. Using a simulated air separation benchmark, we demonstrate the proposed approach improves sample efficiency over standard DDPG while satisfying terminal storage constraints, mitigating myopic control behavior.

analysis.tldr: 将目标空间规划与DDPG结合，解决数据驱动需求响应调度中的终端约束问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 电气化化学过程在参与需求响应方案时需满足长时域终端约束以保持动态稳定性，但基于模型的优化方法计算成本高，而数据驱动的强化学习面临严重的信用分配挑战。
analysis.problem: 在数据驱动的需求响应调度中，如何高效地满足长时域终端约束并缓解短视控制行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将目标空间规划（GSP）与深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）结合，利用学习到的离散子目标上的时间抽象模型在扩展时域上传播价值。
contributions: 提出一种集成GSP与DDPG的方法，用于处理需求响应调度中的终端约束。
在模拟空分基准上验证了该方法相比标准DDPG提高了样本效率并满足终端存储约束。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟空分基准上进行实验，结果表明所提方法相比标准DDPG提高了样本效率并满足终端存储约束。
limitations: 仅在模拟环境中验证，未在真实化学过程中测试。
方法依赖离散子目标的设计，可能不适用于所有终端约束场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将目标空间规划与DDPG结合，解决数据驱动需求响应调度中的终端约束问题。

papers.title: TAPIOCA: Why Task- Aware Pruning Improves OOD model Capability
papers.abstract: Recent work has promoted task-aware layer pruning as a way to improve model performance on particular tasks, as shown by TALE. In this paper, we investigate when such improvements occur and why. We show first that, across controlled polynomial regression tasks and large language models, such pruning yields no benefit on in-distribution (ID) data but consistently improves out-of-distribution (OOD) accuracy. We further show empirically that OOD inputs induce layerwise norm and pairwise-distance profiles that deviate from the corresponding ID profiles. This leads to a geometric explanation of task-aware pruning: each task induces a task-adapted geometry, characterized empirically by the representation profiles observed on ID inputs. OOD inputs can introduce a distorted version of the task-adapted geometry. Task-aware pruning identifies layers that create or amplify this distortion; by removing them, it shifts OOD representational norms and pairwise distances toward those observed on the adapted distribution. This realigns OOD inputs with the model's task-adapted geometry and improves performance. We provide causal evidence through controlled distribution shifts and residual-scaling interventions, and demonstrate consistent behavior across model scales.

analysis.tldr: 任务感知剪枝通过移除放大OOD几何失真的层来提升OOD性能，但对ID数据无益。
analysis.research_motivation: 任务感知层剪枝被证明能提升特定任务性能，但其改进发生的条件和原因尚不明确，理解其机制有助于设计更有效的剪枝策略。
analysis.problem: 探究任务感知剪枝何时以及为何能提升模型性能，特别是其对分布外（OOD）数据的影响机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: OOD输入会导致层范数和成对距离分布偏离ID分布，形成扭曲的任务适应几何；任务感知剪枝通过移除放大这种扭曲的层，使OOD表征向ID分布对齐。
analysis.method: 通过控制多项式回归和大语言模型实验，分析剪枝对ID/OOD性能的影响；利用层范数和成对距离剖面刻画几何特征；通过残差缩放干预提供因果证据。
contributions: 发现任务感知剪枝对ID数据无益但持续提升OOD精度。
提出几何解释：剪枝移除放大OOD几何失真的层，使OOD表征重新对齐任务适应几何。
通过控制分布偏移和残差缩放干预提供因果证据，并在不同规模模型上验证一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在控制多项式回归任务和多种规模的大语言模型上进行实验，通过分布偏移和残差缩放干预验证因果性。
limitations: 仅验证了多项式回归和LLM场景，其他架构或任务可能不适用。
几何解释依赖于层范数和成对距离，可能无法捕捉所有失真模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 任务感知剪枝通过移除放大OOD几何失真的层来提升OOD性能，但对ID数据无益。

papers.title: NeuroAtlas: Benchmarking Foundation Models for Clinical EEG and Brain-Computer Interfaces
papers.abstract: Foundation models (FMs) promise to extract unified representations that generalize across downstream tasks. They have emerged across fields, including electroencephalography (EEG), but it is less clear how effective they are in this particular field. Published evaluations differ in datasets, in the EEG-specific preprocessing that might influence reported results, and in the reported metrics, frequently obscuring the clinical relevance in EEG. We introduce NeuroAtlas, the largest EEG benchmark to date: 42 datasets and 260k hours covering clinical EEG (epilepsy, sleep medicine, brain age estimation) and brain-computer interfaces, and include multiple datasets per task along with bespoke clinical evaluation metrics. Besides evaluating EEG-FMs with respect to supervised baselines, we present results from generic time-series FMs. We report three findings. First, EEG-specific FMs do not consistently outperform time-series FMs, which have neither EEG-focused architectures nor been pretrained on EEG. Second, standard machine learning metrics are insufficient to assess clinical utility: thus, we thoroughly evaluate more appropriate measures such as the quality of event-level decision-making, hypnogram-derived features, and the brain-age gap in the domains of epilepsy, sleep, and brain age, respectively. Third, model rankings and performance can vary substantially within domains. We conclude that pretrained models perform largely on par, with only narrow advantages for a few, and that current models do not yet deliver on the promise of an out-of-the-box unified EEG model. NeuroAtlas exposes this gap and provides the datasets and metrics for the next generation of unified EEG FMs.

analysis.tldr: NeuroAtlas 是迄今最大的 EEG 基准，评估了基础模型在临床 EEG 和 BCI 上的表现，发现 EEG 专用模型并不一致优于通用时间序列模型，且标准指标不足以评估临床效用。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础模型在 EEG 领域的有效性尚不明确，现有评估在数据集、预处理和指标上存在差异，常掩盖临床相关性。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一、大规模、临床相关的 EEG 基准来系统评估基础模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: EEG 专用基础模型并不一致优于通用时间序列模型；标准机器学习指标不足以评估临床效用；模型排名和性能在领域内变化很大。
analysis.method: 构建包含 42 个数据集、26 万小时 EEG 数据的基准 NeuroAtlas，涵盖临床 EEG（癫痫、睡眠医学、脑龄估计）和 BCI，并引入定制临床评估指标。
contributions: 构建了迄今最大的 EEG 基准 NeuroAtlas，包含 42 个数据集和 260k 小时数据。
系统评估了 EEG 基础模型和通用时间序列模型，发现 EEG 专用模型并无一致优势。
引入临床相关评估指标，揭示标准 ML 指标的不足。
analysis.experiments: 在 42 个数据集上评估了 EEG 基础模型和通用时间序列模型，并与监督基线对比。
limitations: 未提供具体模型架构和训练细节。
基准主要覆盖临床 EEG 和 BCI，可能不涵盖所有 EEG 应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NeuroAtlas 是迄今最大的 EEG 基准，评估了基础模型在临床 EEG 和 BCI 上的表现，发现 EEG 专用模型并不一致优于通用时间序列模型，且标准指标不足以评估临床效用。

papers.title: Spontaneous symmetry breaking and Goldstone modes for deep information propagation
papers.abstract: In physical systems, whenever a continuous symmetry is spontaneously broken, the system possesses excitations called Goldstone modes, which allow coherent information propagation over long distances and times. In this work, we study deep neural networks whose internal layers are equivariant under a continuous symmetry and may therefore support analogous Goldstone-like degrees of freedom. We demonstrate, both analytically and empirically, that these degrees of freedom enable coherent signal propagation across depth and recurrent iterations, providing a mechanism for stable information flow without relying on architectural stabilizers such as residual connections or normalization. In feedforward networks, this results in improved trainability and representational diversity across layers. In recurrent settings, we demonstrate the same mechanism is valuable for long-term memory by propagating information over recurrent iterations, thereby improving performance of RNNs and GRUs on long-sequence modeling tasks.

analysis.tldr: 利用连续对称性自发破缺产生的Goldstone模式实现深度神经网络中的长程信息传播。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络中信息随深度衰减是训练困难的核心问题，现有方法依赖残差连接或归一化等架构技巧，但缺乏物理机制层面的理解。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖残差连接或归一化的情况下，实现深度神经网络中的稳定长程信息传播。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 连续对称性自发破缺后产生的Goldstone模式能够支持长距离相干信息传播，这一物理现象在深度神经网络中同样存在。
analysis.method: 设计具有连续对称性的网络层（如旋转对称），通过对称性自发破缺产生Goldstone模式，使信息在深度和循环迭代中相干传播。
contributions: 首次将Goldstone模式概念引入深度神经网络，揭示对称性破缺与信息传播的关联。
在无残差连接或归一化的前馈网络中实现稳定信号传播，提升可训练性和表征多样性。
在循环网络中将该机制用于长程记忆，改进RNN和GRU在长序列建模上的性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有连续对称性的网络架构，通用性待验证。
对称性破缺的引入方式可能增加设计复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用连续对称性自发破缺产生的Goldstone模式实现深度神经网络中的长程信息传播。

papers.title: AI-assisted cultural heritage dissemination: Comparing NMT and glossary-augmented LLM translation in rock art documents
papers.abstract: Cultural heritage institutions increasingly disseminate research and interpretive materials globally, but multilingual dissemination is constrained by limited budgets and staffing. In terminology-dense domains such as rock art, translation quality depends on accurate, consistent specialised terms, and small lexical errors can mislead non-specialists and reduce reuse. We compare three English MT setups for a Spanish academic rock art text, focusing on simple, operationally feasible interventions rather than complex model-side modifications: (1) DeepL as a strong NMT baseline, (2) Gemini-Simple (LLM with a basic prompt), and (3) Gemini-RAG (the same LLM with glossary-augmented prompting via term-pair retrieval). Using PEARMUT, we conduct a human evaluation via (i) multi-way Direct Assessment (0--100) and (ii) targeted terminology auditing with a restricted MQM taxonomy. Gemini-RAG yields the highest exact-match terminology accuracy (81.4\%), versus Gemini-Simple (69.1\%) and DeepL (64.4\%), while preserving overall quality (mean DA 85.3 Gemini-RAG vs. 85.2 Gemini-Simple), outperforming DeepL (80.3). These results show that glossary-augmented prompting is a low-overhead way to improve terminology control in cultural-heritage translation if institutions maintain minimal terminology resources and lightweight evaluation procedures.

analysis.tldr: 在岩画文档翻译中，术语增强的LLM提示比NMT基线在术语准确性上更优，且整体质量相当。
analysis.research_motivation: 文化遗产机构全球传播研究材料受限于多语言翻译的预算和人力，尤其在术语密集的岩画领域，小错误会误导非专家并降低复用性。
analysis.problem: 如何通过简单、操作可行的干预（而非复杂模型修改）提升文化遗产文档翻译的术语准确性和整体质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 比较三种英译设置：DeepL（强NMT基线）、Gemini-Simple（基础提示的LLM）、Gemini-RAG（通过术语对检索增强提示的LLM），并使用PEARMUT进行人工评估。
contributions: 提出术语增强提示（Gemini-RAG）作为低开销方法，在岩画文档翻译中实现81.4%的术语准确率，优于NMT基线（64.4%）和基础LLM（69.1%）。
通过多路直接评估和受限MQM术语审计，证明术语增强提示在保持整体质量的同时提升术语控制。
analysis.experiments: 使用PEARMUT进行人工评估，包括多路直接评估（0-100）和受限MQM术语审计。Gemini-RAG术语准确率81.4%，平均DA 85.3；Gemini-Simple术语准确率69.1%，平均DA 85.2；DeepL术语准确率64.4%，平均DA 80.3。
limitations: 仅针对西班牙语学术岩画文本，可能不适用于其他语言或领域。
依赖机构维护的术语资源，资源匮乏时效果可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在岩画文档翻译中，术语增强的LLM提示比NMT基线在术语准确性上更优，且整体质量相当。

papers.title: Agentic Design of Compositional Descriptors via Autoresearch for Materials Science Applications
papers.abstract: Autoresearch offers a flexible paradigm for automating scientific tasks, in which an AI agent proposes, implements, evaluates, and refines candidate solutions against a quantitative objective. Here, we use composition-based materials-property prediction to test whether such agents can perform a task beyond model selection and hyperparameter optimization: the design of input descriptors. We introduce Automat, an autoresearch framework where a coding agent based on a large language model generates composition-only descriptors for chemical compounds and evaluates them using a random forest workflow. The agent is restricted to information derivable from chemical formulas and iteratively proposes, implements, and tests chemically motivated descriptor strategies. We apply Automat, with OpenAI Codex using GPT-5.5 as the coding agent, to the prediction of experimental band gaps in inorganic materials and Curie temperatures in ferromagnetic compounds. In both tasks, Automat improves over fractional-composition, Magpie, and combined fractional-composition/Magpie baselines, while producing descriptor families that are chemically interpretable. These results provide a demonstration that autoresearch agents can generate competitive, task-specific materials descriptors without manual feature engineering during the run. They also reveal current limitations, including descriptor redundancy, sensitivity to greedy feature expansion, and the need for explicit complexity control, descriptor pruning, and more sophisticated search strategies.

analysis.tldr: 提出Automat框架，让LLM驱动的编码代理自动设计材料科学中的成分描述符，提升预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 材料科学中手动设计特征描述符耗时且依赖领域知识，自动化的模型选择和超参数优化已较成熟，但自动设计输入描述符仍具挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何让AI代理自动生成并优化用于材料性质预测的成分描述符，避免手动特征工程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Automat框架：基于LLM的编码代理（使用OpenAI Codex/GPT-5.5）迭代提出、实现、评估和精炼仅从化学式推导的描述符，通过随机森林工作流进行性能评估。
contributions: 提出Automat框架，实现描述符的自动化设计，超越模型选择和超参数优化。
在带隙和居里温度预测任务上，Automat优于分数成分、Magpie等基线，且描述符具有化学可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在无机材料实验带隙和铁磁化合物居里温度两个任务上，与分数成分、Magpie及组合基线对比，Automat取得改进。
limitations: 描述符冗余
对贪婪特征扩展敏感
需要显式复杂度控制、描述符剪枝和更复杂的搜索策略
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Automat框架，让LLM驱动的编码代理自动设计材料科学中的成分描述符，提升预测性能。

papers.title: An Amortized Efficiency Threshold for Comparing Neural and Heuristic Solvers in Combinatorial Optimization
papers.abstract: A common critique of neural combinatorial-optimization solvers is that they are less energy-efficient than CPU metaheuristics, given the operational energy cost of training them on GPUs. This paper examines the inferential step from "training is expensive" to "neural solvers are net-inefficient", which is where the critique actually goes wrong. Training the network costs a large fixed amount of GPU energy; running the metaheuristic costs a small amount of CPU energy on every instance, repeated as long as the solver is deployed. The two are not commensurable until a deployment volume is fixed. We define the Amortized Efficiency Threshold (AET) as the deployment volume above which a neural solver breaks even with a heuristic baseline in total energy or carbon, under an explicit constraint on solution quality. We show that the cumulative-energy ratio between the two solvers tends to a constant strictly below one whenever the network wins per-instance, and that this limit does not depend on how the training cost was measured. An embodied-carbon term amortizes hardware fabrication symmetrically on both sides. We instantiate the framework on the Multi-Task VRP (MTVRP) environment at n=20 customers across 19 problem variants and five training seeds, with HGS via PyVRP as the heuristic baseline. The measured crossover sits near $1.58 \times 10^5$ deployed instances; the per-instance ratio is 0.41, reflecting the moderate size of the instances tested. The contribution is the framework, the open instrumentation, and the measurement protocol; structural convergence of the ratio at larger problem sizes is left to future empirical work.

analysis.tldr: 提出摊销效率阈值（AET）框架，证明神经组合优化求解器在足够多的部署实例下能比启发式方法更节能。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经组合优化求解器常被批评训练能耗高，但忽略了部署阶段能耗的累积效应，需要统一比较框架。
analysis.problem: 如何公平比较神经求解器与启发式求解器在总能耗或碳排放上的效率，并确定神经求解器何时能实现净效率优势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练能耗是固定大额成本，而启发式方法每次实例消耗少量CPU能量，两者不可直接比较，需考虑部署量。
analysis.method: 定义摊销效率阈值（AET），即神经求解器在总能耗或碳排上与启发式基线持平所需的部署实例数，并证明当神经求解器每实例能耗更低时，累积能耗比趋于小于1的常数。
contributions: 提出AET框架，统一比较神经与启发式求解器的能耗/碳排放效率。
在MTVRP环境（n=20）上实测AET约为1.58×10^5实例，每实例能耗比为0.41。
开源框架、测量协议和实验数据。
analysis.experiments: 在Multi-Task VRP环境（n=20，19个问题变体，5个训练种子）上，以HGS（PyVRP）为启发式基线，测量AET和每实例能耗比。
limitations: 实验仅针对小规模问题（n=20），更大规模问题的收敛性未验证。
未考虑不同硬件、训练策略或启发式变体的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出摊销效率阈值（AET）框架，证明神经组合优化求解器在足够多的部署实例下能比启发式方法更节能。

papers.title: In-IDE Toolkit for Developers of AI-Based Features
papers.abstract: AI-enabled features built on LLMs and agentic workflows are difficult to test, debug, and reproduce, especially for product-focused software engineers without a machine learning background. We present the AI Toolkit plugin for JetBrains IDEs, which brings tracing and evaluation directly into the Run/Debug loop. A mixed methods study with practitioners presents three consistent needs: (1) make evaluation regular and repeatable, (2) expose traces at the moment of execution, and (3) minimize setup and context switching. Guided by these needs, the AI Toolkit introduces an IDE-native workflow: run-triggered trace capture; immediate, hierarchical inspection; one-click "Add to Dataset" from traces; and unit-test-like evaluations with pluggable metrics. The first release in PyCharm shows promising early signals - strong conversion when promoted at Run, sustained usage among those who capture traces, and low churn - suggesting that IDE-native observability lowers activation energy and helps developers adopt disciplined practices. We detail the design and implementation of the AI Agents Debugger and AI Evaluation, report initial adoption telemetry, and outline next steps to broaden framework coverage and scale evaluations. Together, these results indicate that integrating AI observability and evaluation into everyday IDE workflows can make modern AI development accessible to non-ML specialists while preserving software-engineering practices.

analysis.tldr: JetBrains IDE 的 AI Toolkit 插件将 LLM 追踪与评估集成到 Run/Debug 循环中，降低非 ML 工程师使用 AI 功能的门槛。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于 LLM 和 Agent 的 AI 功能难以测试、调试和复现，尤其对没有 ML 背景的软件工程师而言，现有工具缺乏 IDE 原生支持，导致开发效率低、实践不规范。
analysis.problem: 如何为产品型软件工程师提供 IDE 原生的 AI 可观测性和评估工具，降低 AI 功能开发中的测试、调试和评估门槛。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 混合方法研究发现从业者三个一致需求：评估需常规化可重复、执行时暴露追踪、最小化设置和上下文切换。
analysis.method: 开发 JetBrains IDE 插件 AI Toolkit，包含运行触发的追踪捕获、分层检查、一键添加数据集、单元测试式评估等功能。
contributions: 提出 IDE 原生 AI 可观测性工作流，将追踪和评估嵌入 Run/Debug 循环
通过混合方法研究总结从业者三个核心需求，并据此设计工具
在 PyCharm 中发布并报告早期采用数据，显示低流失率和持续使用
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告早期信号：Run 提示转化率高、追踪用户持续使用、流失率低。
limitations: 早期数据仅来自 PyCharm，可能不适用于其他 IDE 或语言
未提供定量评估效果（如缺陷发现率、开发时间节省）
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: JetBrains IDE 的 AI Toolkit 插件将 LLM 追踪与评估集成到 Run/Debug 循环中，降低非 ML 工程师使用 AI 功能的门槛。

papers.title: One Step to the Side: Why Defenses Against Malicious Finetuning Fail Under Adaptive Adversaries
papers.abstract: Model providers increasingly release open weights or allow users to fine-tune foundation models through APIs. Although these models are safety-aligned before release, their safeguards can often be removed by fine-tuning on harmful data. Recent defenses aim to make models robust to such malicious fine-tuning, but they are largely evaluated only against fixed attacks that do not account for the defense. We show that these robustness claims are incomplete. Surveying 15 recent defenses, we identify several defense mechanisms and show that they share a single weakness: they obscure or misdirect the path to harmful behavior without removing the behavior itself. We then develop a unified adaptive attack that breaks defenses across all defense mechanisms. Our results show that current approaches do not provide robust security; they mainly stop the attacks they were designed against. We hope that our unified adaptive adversary for this domain will help future researchers and practitioners stress-test new defenses before deployment.

analysis.tldr: 现有防御恶意微调的方法在自适应攻击下均失效，因为它们只隐藏而非移除有害行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 模型提供者开放权重或允许API微调，但安全对齐的模型可通过微调被破坏，现有防御评估不充分，未考虑自适应攻击。
analysis.problem: 现有防御恶意微调的方法在自适应攻击下是否真正鲁棒？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 防御机制共享一个弱点：它们掩盖或误导通往有害行为的路径，而不移除行为本身。
analysis.method: 开发统一的自适应攻击，针对15种近期防御的机制进行攻击。
contributions: 识别出15种防御共享的弱点：掩盖而非移除有害行为。
提出统一的自适应攻击，可突破所有防御机制。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有可能的防御机制。
自适应攻击可能被更强大的防御所抵御。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 现有防御恶意微调的方法在自适应攻击下均失效，因为它们只隐藏而非移除有害行为。

papers.title: Fast Rates for Inverse Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: We establish novel structural and statistical results for entropy-regularized min-max inverse reinforcement learning (Min-Max-IRL) with linear reward classes in finite-horizon MDPs with Borel state and action spaces. On the structural side, we show that maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) and Min-Max-IRL are equivalent at the population level, and at the empirical level under deterministic dynamics. On the statistical side, exploiting pseudo-self-concordance of the Min-Max-IRL loss, we prove that both the trajectory-level KL divergence and the squared parameter error in the Hessian norm decay at the fast rate $\mathcal{O}(n^{-1})$, where $n$ is the number of expert trajectories. Our guarantees apply under misspecification and require no exploration assumptions. We further extend reward-identifiability results to general Borel spaces and derive novel results on the derivatives of the soft-optimal value function with respect to reward parameters.

analysis.tldr: 逆强化学习在熵正则化Min-Max框架下实现O(n^{-1})快速收敛率。
analysis.research_motivation: 逆强化学习（IRL）从专家演示中推断奖励函数，但现有方法的统计收敛率较慢或依赖强假设，限制了其实际应用。
analysis.problem: 在线性奖励类、有限时域MDP中，建立熵正则化Min-Max-IRL的结构等价性和快速统计收敛率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用伪自和谐性分析Min-Max-IRL损失，证明MLE与Min-Max-IRL在总体和确定性动力学下等价，并推导轨迹级KL散度和参数误差的O(n^{-1})收敛率。
contributions: 证明MLE与Min-Max-IRL在总体和确定性动力学下的等价性。
建立轨迹级KL散度和Hessian范数下参数误差的O(n^{-1})快速收敛率，允许模型误设且无需探索假设。
将奖励可识别性结果推广到一般Borel空间，并推导软最优值函数对奖励参数的导数新结果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果限于线性奖励类和有限时域MDP。
未讨论实际算法实现或大规模实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 逆强化学习在熵正则化Min-Max框架下实现O(n^{-1})快速收敛率。

papers.title: Angel or Demon: Investigating the Plasticity Interventions' Impact on Backdoor Threats in Deep Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Extensive research has highlighted the severe threats posed by backdoor attacks to deep reinforcement learning (DRL). However, prior studies primarily focus on vanilla scenarios, while plasticity interventions have emerged as indispensable built-in components of modern DRL agents. Despite their effectiveness in mitigating plasticity loss, the impact of these interventions on DRL backdoor vulnerabilities remains underexplored, and this lack of systematic investigation poses risks in practical DRL deployments. To bridge this gap, we empirically study 14,664 cases integrating representative interventions and attack scenarios. We find that only one intervention (i.e., SAM) exacerbates backdoor threats, while other interventions mitigate them. Pathological analysis identifies that the exacerbation is attributed to backdoor gradient amplification, while the mitigation stems from activation pathway disruption and representation space compression. From these findings, we derive two novel insights: (1) a conceptual framework SCC for robust backdoor injection that deconstructs the mechanistic interplay between interventions and backdoors in DRL, and (2) abnormal loss landscape sharpness as a key indicator for DRL backdoor detection.

analysis.tldr: 系统研究深度强化学习中塑性干预对后门威胁的影响，发现多数干预可缓解后门，仅SAM会加剧威胁。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代DRL智能体普遍使用塑性干预来缓解塑性损失，但这些干预对后门攻击脆弱性的影响尚不清楚，缺乏系统研究可能导致实际部署中的安全风险。
analysis.problem: 探究塑性干预（如SAM、正则化等）如何影响DRL中的后门攻击威胁，并揭示其内在机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过14,664个案例实验发现，除SAM外的大多数塑性干预能缓解后门威胁；病理分析表明，加剧源于后门梯度放大，缓解源于激活路径破坏和表示空间压缩。
analysis.method: 大规模实证研究，整合代表性干预和后门攻击场景，进行病理分析并推导概念框架SCC和检测指标。
contributions: 首次系统研究塑性干预对DRL后门威胁的影响，覆盖14,664个案例。
揭示干预影响后门的两种机制：后门梯度放大（加剧）和激活路径破坏/表示空间压缩（缓解）。
提出概念框架SCC用于鲁棒后门注入，并发现异常损失景观锐度可作为后门检测指标。
analysis.experiments: 在14,664个案例中整合了代表性干预和后门攻击场景，进行了病理分析。
limitations: 实验可能局限于特定干预和后门攻击类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
提出的检测指标可能仅在特定条件下有效。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统研究深度强化学习中塑性干预对后门威胁的影响，发现多数干预可缓解后门，仅SAM会加剧威胁。

papers.title: Resolving Action Bottleneck: Agentic Reinforcement Learning Informed by Token-Level Energy
papers.abstract: Agentic reinforcement learning trains large language models using multi-turn trajectories that interleave long reasoning traces with short environment-facing actions. Common policy-gradient methods, such as PPO and GRPO, treat each token in a trajectory equally, leading to uniform credit assignment. In this paper, we critically demonstrate that such uniform credit assignment largely misallocates token-level training signals. From an energy-based modeling perspective, we show that token-level training signals, quantified by their correlations with reward variance of different rollouts sampled from a given prompt, concentrate sharply on action tokens rather than reasoning tokens, even though action tokens account for only a small fraction of the trajectory. We refer to this phenomenon as the Action Bottleneck. Motivated by this observation, we propose an embarrassingly simple token reweighting approach, ActFocus, that downweights gradients on reasoning tokens, along with an additional energy-based redistribution mechanism that further increases the weights on action tokens with higher uncertainty. Across four environments and different model sizes, ActFocus consistently outperforms PPO and GRPO, yielding final-step gains of up to 65.2 and 63.7 percentage points, respectively, without any additional runtime or memory cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出ActFocus方法，通过token级能量重加权解决强化学习中动作令牌的瓶颈问题，显著提升策略梯度方法性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有策略梯度方法（如PPO、GRPO）在智能体强化学习中对轨迹中所有令牌平等分配信用，导致训练信号在推理令牌和动作令牌之间分配不均，限制了学习效率。
analysis.problem: 解决多轮轨迹中令牌级训练信号分配不均的问题，特别是动作令牌（仅占轨迹小部分）承担了大部分与奖励方差相关的信号，而推理令牌被过度加权。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从能量建模视角发现，令牌级训练信号与不同轨迹奖励方差的相关性高度集中在动作令牌上，形成“动作瓶颈”现象。
analysis.method: 提出ActFocus方法，包含两个组件：1）对推理令牌梯度进行降权；2）基于能量的重分配机制，对不确定性更高的动作令牌增加权重。
contributions: 首次从能量建模角度揭示动作瓶颈现象，证明令牌级训练信号集中在动作令牌上。
提出ActFocus方法，一种简单有效的令牌重加权策略，无需额外运行时或内存成本。
analysis.experiments: 在四个环境和不同模型规模上，ActFocus一致优于PPO和GRPO，最终步数提升分别高达65.2和63.7个百分点。
limitations: 方法依赖于奖励方差计算，可能对噪声敏感。
未在更复杂或长轨迹场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ActFocus方法，通过token级能量重加权解决强化学习中动作令牌的瓶颈问题，显著提升策略梯度方法性能。

papers.title: Break-the-Beat! Controllable MIDI-to-Drum Audio Synthesis
papers.abstract: Current methods for creating drum loop audio in digital music production, such as using one-shot samples or resampling, often demand non-trivial efforts of creators. While recent generative models achieve high fidelity and adhere to text, they lack the specific control needed for such a task. Existing symbolic-to-audio research often focuses on single, tonal instruments, leaving the challenge of polyphonic, percussive drum synthesis unaddressed. We address this gap by introducing ``Break-the-Beat!,'' a model capable of rendering a drum MIDI with the timbre of a reference audio. It is built by fine-tuning a pre-trained text-to-audio model with our proposed content encoder and a effective hybrid conditioning mechanism. To enable this, we construct a new dataset of paired target-reference drum audio from existing drum audio datasets. Experiments demonstrate that our model generates high-quality drum audio that follows high-resolution drum MIDI, achieving strong performance across metrics of audio quality, rhythmic alignment, and beat continuity. This offer producers a new, controllable tool for creative production. Demo page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 通过微调预训练文本到音频模型，实现可控的MIDI到鼓音频合成，支持参考音色和节奏对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字音乐制作中创建鼓循环音频的传统方法（如单次采样或重采样）需要大量人工努力，而现有生成模型虽能生成高保真音频但缺乏对鼓合成所需的精细控制，且现有符号到音频研究多聚焦于单音调乐器，未解决多音打击乐鼓合成问题。
analysis.problem: 如何实现从鼓MIDI到高质量鼓音频的可控合成，同时支持参考音频的音色迁移和精确节奏对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过微调预训练的文本到音频模型，引入内容编码器和混合条件机制，并构建配对的目标-参考鼓音频数据集。
contributions: 提出Break-the-Beat!模型，实现从鼓MIDI到鼓音频的可控合成，支持参考音色和节奏对齐。
构建了配对的鼓音频数据集，用于训练内容编码器和混合条件机制。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明模型能生成高质量鼓音频，遵循高分辨率鼓MIDI，在音频质量、节奏对齐和节拍连续性指标上表现强劲。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练文本到音频模型的质量和泛化能力。
数据集规模或多样性可能限制对罕见鼓音色的合成效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过微调预训练文本到音频模型，实现可控的MIDI到鼓音频合成，支持参考音色和节奏对齐。

papers.title: Efficient Multi-objective Prompt Optimization via Pure-exploration Bandits
papers.abstract: Prompt engineering has become central to eliciting the capabilities of large language models (LLMs). At its core lies prompt selection -- efficiently identifying the most effective prompts. However, most prior investigations overlook a key challenge: the inherently multi-faceted nature of prompt performance, which cannot be captured by a single metric. To fill this gap, we study the multi-objective prompt selection problem under two practical settings: Pareto prompt set recovery and best feasible prompt identification. Casting the problem into the pure-exploration bandits framework, we adapt provably efficient algorithms from multi-objective bandits and further introduce a novel design for best feasible arm identification in structured bandits, with theoretical guarantees on the identification error in the linear case. Extensive experiments across multiple LLMs show that the bandit-based approaches yield significant improvements over baselines, establishing a principled and efficient framework for multi-objective prompt optimization.

analysis.tldr: 将多目标提示优化建模为纯探索赌博机问题，提出高效算法以恢复帕累托最优集或识别最佳可行提示。
analysis.research_motivation: 提示工程中，提示性能是多方面的，单一指标无法全面衡量，现有方法忽略了这一关键挑战。
analysis.problem: 多目标提示选择问题：在两种实际设置（帕累托提示集恢复和最佳可行提示识别）下高效优化提示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将问题转化为纯探索赌博机框架，改编多目标赌博机中的高效算法，并针对结构化赌博机中的最佳可行臂识别提出新设计，在线性情况下提供理论保证。
contributions: 首次将多目标提示选择问题形式化为帕累托集恢复和最佳可行提示识别两种设置。
