analysis.method: 提出混合策略优化（HPO），通过混合梯度估计器结合路径梯度（通过可微模拟器反向传播）和得分函数梯度，在平滑区域保持无偏性；同时将动作不连续问题重新表述为混合形式以扩展适用性。
contributions: 提出HPO算法，在混合离散-连续动作空间中结合路径梯度和得分函数梯度，实现无偏且高效的策略优化。
理论分析表明混合梯度的交叉项在离散最优响应附近可忽略，从而允许近似解耦更新，降低方差。
analysis.experiments: 在库存控制和切换线性二次调节器问题上，HPO显著优于PPO，且性能差距随连续动作维度增加而扩大。
limitations: 依赖可微模拟器，在完全不可微的环境中可能受限。
理论分析仅针对离散最优响应附近，一般情况下的收敛性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合梯度策略优化方法HPO，结合路径梯度和得分函数梯度，解决混合离散-连续动作空间中的信用分配问题。

papers.title: Web Agents Should Adopt the Plan-Then-Execute Paradigm
papers.abstract: ReAct has become the default architecture across LLM agents, and many existing web agents follow this paradigm. We argue that it is the wrong default for web agents. Instead, web agents should default to plan-then-execute: commit to a task-specific program before observing runtime web content, then execute it. The reason is that web content mixes inputs from many parties. An e-commerce product page may combine a seller's listing, customer reviews and sponsored advertisements. Under ReAct, all of this content flows into the model when deciding on the next action, creating a direct path for prompt injections to steer the agent's control flow. Plan-then-execute changes this boundary: untrusted data may influence values or branches inside a predefined execution graph, but it cannot redefine the user task or cause the model to synthesize new actions at runtime. We analyze WebArena, a popular web agent benchmark, and find that all tasks are compatible with plan-then-execute, while 80% can be completed with a purely programmatic plan, without any runtime LLM subroutine. We identify the main barrier to adopting plan-then-execute on the web: For it to work well, tools must map cleanly to semantic actions, with effects known before execution, so agents have enough information to plan. The web does not naturally expose that interface. Browser tools such as click, type, and scroll have page-dependent meanings. Planning at this layer is near-sighted: the agent can only see actions on the current page, and later actions appear only after it acts. Closing this gap requires typed interfaces that turn website interactions from clicks and keystrokes to task-level operations. This is an infrastructure problem, not a modeling problem. Web tasks do not need reactivity by default; they need typed, complete, auditable website APIs.

analysis.tldr: 提出Web智能体应采用先规划后执行范式替代ReAct，以消除提示注入风险。
analysis.research_motivation: ReAct范式下，Web内容（含广告、评论等不可信数据）直接流入模型决策流，导致提示注入攻击可劫持智能体控制流，威胁任务安全。
analysis.problem: 如何设计Web智能体架构，使其在利用Web内容时避免不可信数据影响任务定义和动作生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: WebArena中所有任务均兼容先规划后执行，80%可纯程序化完成无需运行时LLM子程序；但当前浏览器工具（点击、输入等）语义依赖页面上下文，无法支持高层规划。
analysis.method: 采用先规划后执行范式：在观察运行时Web内容前，先提交任务特定程序，然后执行该程序；不可信数据仅影响预定义执行图内的值或分支，不能重新定义任务或合成新动作。
contributions: 论证ReAct不是Web智能体的默认架构，先规划后执行更安全且与现有基准兼容。
识别采用先规划后执行的主要障碍：浏览器工具缺乏类型化接口，需将网站交互从点击/按键提升为任务级操作。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 需要网站提供类型化API，当前Web基础设施不支持。
纯程序化计划可能无法处理所有动态页面变化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Web智能体应采用先规划后执行范式替代ReAct，以消除提示注入风险。

papers.title: MetaMoE: Diversity-Aware Proxy Selection for Privacy-Preserving Mixture-of-Experts Unification
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale capacity by combining specialized experts, but most existing approaches assume centralized access to training data. In practice, data are distributed across clients and cannot be shared due to privacy constraints, making unified MoE training challenging. We propose MetaMoE, a privacy-preserving framework that unifies independently trained, domain-specialized experts into a single MoE using public proxy data as surrogates for inaccessible private data. Central to MetaMoE is diversity-aware proxy selection, which selects client-domain-relevant and diverse samples from public data to effectively approximate private data distributions and supervise router learning. These proxies are further used to align expert training, improving expert coordination at unification time, while a context-aware router enhances expert selection across heterogeneous inputs. Experiments on computer vision and natural language processing benchmarks demonstrate that MetaMoE consistently outperforms recent privacy-preserving MoE unification methods. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出MetaMoE，利用多样性感知的代理数据选择实现隐私保护的混合专家模型统一。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MoE模型假设集中式数据访问，但实际数据分布在各客户端且因隐私限制无法共享，导致统一训练困难。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护隐私的前提下，将独立训练的领域专家模型统一为单个MoE模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用公共代理数据作为私有数据的替代，通过多样性感知的代理选择（选择与客户端领域相关且多样的样本）来近似私有数据分布并监督路由器学习；同时利用代理对齐专家训练，并采用上下文感知路由器增强异构输入的专家选择。
contributions: 提出MetaMoE，一个隐私保护的MoE统一框架，利用公共代理数据替代私有数据。
引入多样性感知的代理选择策略，有效近似私有数据分布。
在CV和NLP基准上验证了方法优于现有隐私保护MoE统一方法。
analysis.experiments: 在计算机视觉和自然语言处理基准上进行了实验，结果表明MetaMoE持续优于最近的隐私保护MoE统一方法。
limitations: 依赖公共代理数据的质量和相关性。
可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MetaMoE，利用多样性感知的代理数据选择实现隐私保护的混合专家模型统一。

papers.title: Watermarking Game-Playing Agents in Perfect-Information Extensive-Form Games
papers.abstract: Watermarking techniques for large language models (LLMs), which encode hidden information in the output so its source can be verified, have gained significant attention in recent days, thanks to their potential capability to detect accidental or deliberate misuse. Similar challenges involving model misuse also exist in the context of game-playing, such as when detecting the unauthorized use of AI tools in gaming platforms (e.g., cheating in online chess). In this paper, we initiate the study of how game-playing strategies can be watermarked. We show how the KGW watermark for LLMs can be adapted to watermark game-playing agents in perfect-information extensive-form games. The watermark can then be detected using a statistical test. We show that the degradation in the quality of the watermarked strategy profile, quantified by the expected utility, can be bounded, but there is a tradeoff between detectability and quality. In our experiments, we bootstrap the watermarking framework to various chess engines and demonstrate that a) the impact of the watermark on the quality of the strategy is negligible and b) the watermark can be detected with just a handful of games.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM水印技术KGW适配到完美信息扩展式博弈中，实现游戏策略的水印嵌入与检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 游戏AI的滥用（如在线象棋作弊）难以检测，现有水印技术主要针对LLM输出文本，缺乏对博弈策略的水印方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在完美信息扩展式博弈中为智能体策略嵌入可检测水印，同时最小化对策略质量的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 水印的可检测性与策略质量之间存在权衡，但实验表明对棋力影响可忽略。
analysis.method: 将KGW水印从LLM输出分布适配到博弈策略分布，通过统计检验检测水印。
contributions: 首次提出博弈策略水印的概念和方法
理论证明了水印对期望效用的影响有界
在多个象棋引擎上验证了水印的可行性和低影响
analysis.experiments: 在多个象棋引擎上实验，显示水印对策略质量影响可忽略，且仅需少量对局即可检测水印。
limitations: 仅适用于完美信息扩展式博弈
水印检测需要统计检验，可能受对局数量影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将LLM水印技术KGW适配到完美信息扩展式博弈中，实现游戏策略的水印嵌入与检测。

papers.title: Dynamics of the Transformer Residual Stream: Coupling Spectral Geometry to Network Topology
papers.abstract: Large language models are remarkably capable, yet how computation propagates through their layers remains poorly understood. A growing line of work treats depth as discrete time and the residual stream as a dynamical system, where each layer's nonlinear update has a local linear description. However, previous analyses have relied on scalar summaries or approximate linearizations, leaving the full spectral geometry of trained LLMs unknown. We perform full Jacobian eigendecomposition across three production--scale LLMs and show that training installs a monotonic spectral gradient through depth -- from non-normal, rotation-dominated early layers to near--symmetric late layers -- together with a cumulative low-rank bottleneck that funnels perturbations into a small fraction of the residual stream's effective dimensions. Our experiments reveal that this gradient and the dimensional collapse are learned rather than architectural, and is largely dissolved when structured non-normality is removed. We further show that the topological positioning of graph communities predicts whether the Jacobian amplifies or suppresses them, with the sign of the coupling determined by the local operator type, a relationship absent at initialization. These results map a learned spectral geometry in LLMs that links perturbation propagation and compression to the network's functional topology.

analysis.tldr: LLM残差流中雅可比矩阵的谱几何呈现从非正态旋转层到近对称层的单调梯度，并伴随低秩瓶颈，且与图社区拓扑耦合。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解大型语言模型中计算如何逐层传播是核心问题，但现有分析依赖标量摘要或近似线性化，未能揭示训练后LLM的完整谱几何。
analysis.problem: 揭示训练后LLM残差流中雅可比矩阵的谱几何结构及其与网络拓扑的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练在深度方向上安装了一个单调谱梯度：从非正态、旋转主导的早期层到近对称的后期层，同时存在累积低秩瓶颈，将扰动压缩到残差流有效维度的一小部分。这种梯度与维度坍缩是学习得到的而非架构固有的，移除结构化非正态性后基本消失。图社区的拓扑位置预测雅可比矩阵是放大还是抑制它们，耦合符号由局部算子类型决定，初始化时不存在此关系。
analysis.method: 对三个生产级LLM进行完整雅可比矩阵特征分解，分析谱几何，并结合图社区拓扑分析耦合关系。
contributions: 首次在多个生产级LLM上完成完整雅可比特征分解，揭示了训练后残差流中单调谱梯度和低秩瓶颈。
发现谱几何与图社区拓扑之间的耦合关系，且该关系是学习得到的。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅分析了三个生产级LLM，可能不适用于所有架构。
未探讨谱几何与下游任务性能的直接关联。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM残差流中雅可比矩阵的谱几何呈现从非正态旋转层到近对称层的单调梯度，并伴随低秩瓶颈，且与图社区拓扑耦合。

papers.title: Not All Timesteps Matter Equally: Selective Alignment Knowledge Distillation for Spiking Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are brain-inspired and spike-driven, achieve high energy efficiency. However, a performance gap between SNNs and artificial neural networks (ANNs) still remains. Knowledge distillation (KD) is commonly adopted to improve SNN performance, but existing methods typically enforce uniform alignment across all timesteps, either from a teacher network or through inter-temporal self-distillation, implicitly assuming that per-timestep predictions should be treated equally. In practice, SNN predictions vary and evolve over time, and intermediate timesteps need not all be individually correct even when the final aggregated output is correct. Under such conditions, effective distillation should not force every timestep toward the same supervision target, but instead provide corrective guidance to erroneous timesteps while preserving useful temporal dynamics. To address this issue, we propose Selective Alignment Knowledge Distillation (SeAl-KD), which selectively aligns class-level and temporal knowledge by equalizing competing logits at erroneous timesteps and reweighting temporal alignment based on confidence and inter-timestep similarity. Extensive experiments on static image and neuromorphic event-based datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over existing distillation methods. The code is available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出选择性对齐知识蒸馏（SeAl-KD），仅对SNN中错误时间步进行校正，保留有用时序动态，提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: SNN性能与ANN存在差距，现有知识蒸馏方法对所有时间步强制统一对齐，忽略了中间时间步预测的演化特性，可能破坏有用时序动态。
analysis.problem: 如何设计知识蒸馏策略，使其仅对SNN中错误时间步提供校正指导，同时保留正确时间步的时序信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SNN预测随时间演化，中间时间步不必全部正确，最终聚合输出可能正确；统一对齐所有时间步会强制错误时间步学习不合适的监督信号，损害性能。
analysis.method: 选择性对齐知识蒸馏（SeAl-KD），通过均衡错误时间步的竞争logits，并基于置信度和时间步间相似性重新加权时序对齐，实现类别级和时间级的选择性对齐。
contributions: 揭示了SNN知识蒸馏中统一对齐所有时间步的问题，并提出选择性对齐策略。
设计了SeAl-KD方法，在静态图像和神经形态事件数据集上均优于现有蒸馏方法。
analysis.experiments: 在静态图像和神经形态事件数据集上进行实验，与现有蒸馏方法比较，显示一致改进。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖超参数（如置信度阈值）的调节。
未在更大规模SNN或更复杂任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出选择性对齐知识蒸馏（SeAl-KD），仅对SNN中错误时间步进行校正，保留有用时序动态，提升性能。

papers.title: Action-Conditioned Risk Gating for Safety-Critical Control under Partial Observability
papers.abstract: Many safety-critical control problems are modeled as risk-sensitive partially observable Markov decision processes, where the controller must make decisions from incomplete observations while balancing task performance against safety risk. Although belief-space planning provides a principled solution, maintaining and planning over beliefs can be computationally costly and sensitive to model specification in practical domains. We propose a lightweight risk-gated reinforcement learning approximation for risk-sensitive control under partial observability. The method constructs a compact finite-history proxy state and learns an action-conditioned predictor of near-term safety violation. This predicted candidate-action risk is used in two complementary ways: as a risk penalty during value learning, and as a decision-time gate that interpolates between optimistic and conservative ensemble value estimates. As a result, low-risk actions are evaluated closer to reward-seeking estimates, while high-risk actions are evaluated more conservatively. We evaluate the approach in two safety-critical partially observable domains: automated glucose regulation and safety-constrained navigation. Across adult and adolescent glucose-control cohorts, the method improves overall glycemic tradeoffs and substantially reduces runtime relative to a belief-space planning baseline. On Safety-Gym navigation benchmarks, it achieves a more favorable reward-cost balance than unconstrained RL and several standard safe-RL baselines. These results suggest that action-conditioned near-term risk can provide an effective local signal for approximate risk-sensitive POMDP control when full belief-space planning is impractical.

analysis.tldr: 提出动作条件风险门控方法，在部分可观测下实现轻量级风险敏感控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全关键控制问题常建模为风险敏感POMDP，但信念空间规划计算成本高且对模型规范敏感，实际应用中难以部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在部分可观测环境中高效近似风险敏感POMDP控制，平衡任务性能与安全风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建紧凑有限历史代理状态，学习动作条件的短期安全违规预测器；将预测风险作为价值学习中的惩罚项，并在决策时作为门控机制，在乐观与保守的集成价值估计之间插值。
contributions: 提出动作条件风险门控的轻量级强化学习近似方法，用于部分可观测下的风险敏感控制。
在自动血糖调节和安全导航两个安全关键领域验证了方法有效性，改善了血糖控制权衡并大幅降低运行时，同时实现了更优的奖励-成本平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在自动血糖调节（成人和青少年队列）和安全导航（Safety-Gym）基准上评估，与信念空间规划基线和标准安全RL基线对比。
limitations: 方法依赖有限历史代理状态，可能无法捕捉长期依赖。
风险预测器的准确性可能影响门控效果，在复杂环境中需要更多调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动作条件风险门控方法，在部分可观测下实现轻量级风险敏感控制。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence-Assistant Cardiotocography: Unified Model for Signal Reconstruction, Fetal Heart Rate Analysis, and Variability Assessment
papers.abstract: The monitoring of fetal heart rate (FHR) and the assessment of its variability are crucial for preventing fetal compromise and adverse outcomes. However, traditional methods encounter limitations arising from equipment performance, data transmission, and subjective assessments by doctors. We have developed a tailored AI-based FHrCTG model specifically for FHR monitoring, which effectively mitigates noise interference and precisely reconstructs signals. Our model was pre-trained on a massive dataset consisting of 558,412 unlabeled data points and further refined using 7,266 expert-reviewed entries. To validate FHR, we introduced the Intersection Overlapping Labels (IOL) approach, which transforms rate analysis into categorical judgments. Testing revealed that our model demonstrates high sensitivity and specificity in detecting critical FHR decelerations (89.13% and 87.78%, respectively) and accelerations (62.5% and 92.04%, respectively). Furthermore, based on Fischer's criteria for clinical application, our model achieved impressive AUC scores of 0.7214 and 0.9643 for verifying FHR periodicity and amplitude variation, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI辅助胎心宫缩图模型FHrCTG，实现信号重建、胎心率分析和变异性评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统胎心率监测受设备性能、数据传输和医生主观评估限制，需要更客观、精准的AI辅助方法。
analysis.problem: 解决胎心率监测中的噪声干扰、信号重建不准确以及变异性评估主观性强的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于大规模无标签数据预训练（558,412条）和专家标注数据微调（7,266条），引入交叠标签（IOL）方法将率分析转化为分类判断。
contributions: 提出针对FHR监测的AI模型FHrCTG，有效抑制噪声并精确重建信号。
引入交叠标签（IOL）方法，将率分析转化为分类判断，提升检测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在检测关键FHR减速和加速时，模型灵敏度分别为89.13%和62.5%，特异度分别为87.78%和92.04%；基于Fischer标准，验证FHR周期性和幅度变化的AUC分别为0.7214和0.9643。
limitations: 模型在加速检测上的灵敏度较低（62.5%），可能需进一步优化。
摘要未提及模型在不同临床场景或人群中的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI辅助胎心宫缩图模型FHrCTG，实现信号重建、胎心率分析和变异性评估。

papers.title: Active Learners as Efficient PRP Rerankers
authors: Francisco Nattero Santiago Mauricio Barron Bucolo
papers.abstract: Pairwise Ranking Prompting (PRP) elicits pairwise preference judgments from an LLM, which are then aggregated into a ranking, usually via classical sorting algorithms. However, judgments are noisy, order-sensitive, and sometimes intransitive, so sorting assumptions do not match the setting. Because sorting aims to recover a full permutation, truncating it to meet a call budget does not produce a dependable top-K. We thus reframe PRP reranking as active learning from noisy pairwise comparisons and show that active rankers are drop-in replacements that improve NDCG@10 per call in the call-constrained regime. Our noise-robust framework also introduces a randomized-direction oracle that uses a single LLM call per pair. This approach converts systematic position bias into zero-mean noise, enabling unbiased aggregate ranking without the cost of bidirectional calls.

analysis.tldr: 将PRP重排序重新定义为带噪声成对比较的主动学习，提升调用受限场景下的NDCG@10。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有PRP方法依赖排序算法，但LLM判断存在噪声、顺序敏感且非传递性，导致排序假设不匹配，且截断排序无法可靠得到top-K。
analysis.problem: 在调用预算受限下，如何从带噪声的成对偏好判断中高效获得高质量top-K排序。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出PRP中LLM判断存在噪声、顺序敏感性和非传递性，经典排序算法假设不成立；截断排序无法保证top-K质量。
analysis.method: 将PRP重排序视为带噪声成对比较的主动学习，引入随机方向oracle（每对仅需一次LLM调用），将系统位置偏差转化为零均值噪声，实现无偏聚合排序。
contributions: 提出将PRP重排序重新定义为主动学习问题，并证明主动排序器可作为即插即用替代方案，在调用受限下提升NDCG@10。
引入噪声鲁棒的随机方向oracle，仅需单次LLM调用即可消除位置偏差，无需双向调用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于成对比较场景，未讨论其他偏好获取方式。
随机方向oracle的方差可能影响稳定性，摘要未分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将PRP重排序重新定义为带噪声成对比较的主动学习，提升调用受限场景下的NDCG@10。

papers.title: AudioMosaic: Contrastive Masked Audio Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Audio self-supervised learning (SSL) aims to learn general-purpose representations from large-scale unlabeled audio data. While recent advances have been driven mainly by generative reconstruction objectives, contrastive approaches remain less explored, partly due to the difficulty of designing effective audio augmentations and the large batch sizes required for contrastive pre-training. We introduce \textbf{AudioMosaic}, a contrastive learning-based audio encoder for general audio understanding. During pre-training, AudioMosaic constructs positive pairs by applying structured time-frequency masking to spectrogram patches, which reduces memory usage and enables efficient large-batch training. Compared with generative approaches, the AudioMosaic encoder learns more discriminative utterance-level representations that demonstrate strong transferability across datasets, domains, and acoustic conditions. Extensive experiments show that AudioMosaic achieves state-of-the-art performance on several standard audio benchmarks under both linear probing and fine-tuning. We further show that integrating the pretrained AudioMosaic encoder into audio-language models improves performance on audio-language tasks. The code is publicly available in our \href{ this https URL }{GitHub repository}.

analysis.tldr: 提出对比掩码音频表征学习框架AudioMosaic，通过结构化时频掩码构建正样本对，实现高效大规模对比预训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频自监督学习主要依赖生成式重建目标，对比方法因数据增强设计困难和批量大小需求大而探索不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效的对比学习框架用于通用音频表征学习，克服生成式方法在判别性表征上的不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成式方法学习到的表征判别性不足，对比方法受限于数据增强和内存需求。
analysis.method: 在预训练时对声谱图块应用结构化时频掩码构建正样本对，降低内存使用并支持大批量训练。
contributions: 提出AudioMosaic，一种基于对比学习的音频编码器，通过结构化时频掩码构建正样本对。
在多个音频基准上达到最先进性能，并提升音频-语言模型在下游任务上的表现。
analysis.experiments: 在多个标准音频基准上进行了线性探测和微调实验，达到最先进性能；集成到音频-语言模型中提升音频-语言任务表现。
limitations: 可能对特定音频类型或噪声环境敏感。
对比学习仍需较大批量，可能对资源有限场景不友好。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出对比掩码音频表征学习框架AudioMosaic，通过结构化时频掩码构建正样本对，实现高效大规模对比预训练。

papers.title: Wavelet-Based Observables for Koopman Analysis: An Extended Dynamic Mode Decomposition Framework
papers.abstract: We present an in-depth analysis of the Koopman semigroup via wavelet transform. Towards this goal, we start by introducing the wavelet-based observables and show that they are eigenfunctions of the Koopman semigroup when this semigroup is considered over the Banach space of continuous functions on a compact forward-invariant set endowed with the supremum norm. We then construct closed-form expressions of the action of the Koopman semigroup and its resolvent in terms of these observables. To approximate the action of Koopman semigroup numerically, we combine Extended Dynamic Mode Decomposition (EDMD) with the proposed wavelet-based observables leading to the Wavelet Dynamic Mode Decomposition via Continuous Wavelet Transform (cWDMD) algorithm. We validate our theoretical results on two numerical examples.

analysis.tldr: 将小波变换与扩展动态模态分解结合，提出基于小波可观测量的Koopman分析方法。
analysis.research_motivation: Koopman算子理论为非线性动力系统分析提供了线性框架，但传统可观测函数（如径向基函数）在捕捉多尺度动态特征时存在局限，小波变换具有多分辨率特性，有望提升Koopman分析的表达能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构造小波基可观测函数，使其成为Koopman半群的特征函数，并实现数值逼近。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于连续小波变换的动态模态分解算法（cWDMD），将小波可观测函数与扩展动态模态分解（EDMD）结合，推导Koopman半群及其预解式的闭式表达式。
contributions: 证明在紧致前向不变集上的连续函数Banach空间中，小波可观测函数是Koopman半群的特征函数。
给出Koopman半群及其预解式在小波可观测函数下的闭式表达式。
提出cWDMD算法，将小波可观测函数与EDMD结合进行数值逼近。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析限于紧致前向不变集上的连续函数空间，实际系统可能不满足该条件。
数值验证仅基于两个示例，泛化能力有待进一步检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将小波变换与扩展动态模态分解结合，提出基于小波可观测量的Koopman分析方法。

papers.title: Diagnosing Training Inference Mismatch in LLM Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Modern LLM RL systems separate rollout generation from policy optimization. These two stages are expected to produce token probabilities that match exactly. However, implementation differences can make them assign different values to the same sequence under the same model weights, inducing Training-Inference Mismatch (TIM). TIM is difficult to inspect because it is entangled with off-policy drift and common stabilization mechanisms. In this work, we isolate TIM in a zero-mismatch diagnostic setting (VeXact), and show that small token-level numerical disagreements can independently cause training collapse. We further show that TIM changes the effective optimization problem, and identify a set of remedies that could mitigate TIM. Our results suggest that TIM is not benign numerical noise, but a systems-level perturbation that should be treated as a first-order factor in analyzing LLM RL stability.

analysis.tldr: LLM强化学习中训练与推理阶段因实现差异导致的数值不匹配（TIM）会独立引发训练崩溃，需作为一阶因素处理。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM强化学习将rollout生成与策略优化分离，理论上两阶段应产生完全匹配的token概率，但实际实现差异可能导致数值不一致，这种训练-推理不匹配（TIM）难以检测且常被忽视，可能影响训练稳定性。
analysis.problem: 诊断并量化LLM强化学习中训练与推理阶段之间的数值不匹配（TIM）及其对训练稳定性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出TIM与off-policy漂移和常见稳定机制纠缠，难以独立观察。
analysis.method: 提出零不匹配诊断设置（VeXact）来隔离TIM，通过精确控制实现数值一致性，从而观察TIM的独立影响。
contributions: 首次在零不匹配诊断设置中隔离并证明TIM可独立导致训练崩溃
揭示TIM会改变有效优化问题，并识别出一组缓解TIM的补救措施
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 诊断设置VeXact可能无法完全模拟真实场景的复杂性
识别的补救措施可能无法完全消除TIM影响
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM强化学习中训练与推理阶段因实现差异导致的数值不匹配（TIM）会独立引发训练崩溃，需作为一阶因素处理。

papers.title: PreFT: Prefill-only finetuning for efficient inference
papers.abstract: Large language models can now be personalised efficiently at scale using parameter efficient finetuning methods (PEFTs), but serving user-specific PEFTs harms throughput, even with specialised kernels and memory management techniques. This is because, theoretically and empirically, a mismatch exists between prefill (processing a large number of tokens at once) and decode (generating a single token autoregressively): the latter has far lower throughput when serving multiple adapters. Rather than optimising performance relative to parameter count, for efficient multi-adapter serving, we instead ought to optimise performance relative to serving throughput. We therefore propose PreFT (Prefill-only Finetuning), wherein we only apply the adapter to prefill tokens and discard it afterwards. PreFT significantly increases throughput with minimal effect on performance. We develop and release an efficient implementation of two prefill-only PEFTs, LoRA and ReFT, on the vLLM inference engine. We first show that serving multi-user PreFTs is more efficient than traditional PEFTs ($1.9\times$ the throughput when serving $512$ adapters on Llama 3.1 70B). Then, we compare the performance of prefill-only vs. all-token adapters on a variety of supervised finetuning and reinforcement learning tasks with LMs at varying scales. On SFT, we observe that the evaluation loss of PreFTs is higher than PEFTs, but can be compensated by increasing rank with nearly no reduction in throughput. On RL, we consistently find that PreFTs approach parity with standard PEFTs. Together, this work validates prefill-only adaptation of LLMs as a more favourable accuracy-throughput tradeoff than existing PEFTs for personalised serving.

analysis.tldr: 提出 PreFT，仅在预填充阶段应用适配器，大幅提升多适配器推理吞吐量，性能损失极小。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法在服务多用户个性化模型时，因预填充与解码阶段吞吐量不匹配，导致推理效率低下，亟需一种面向吞吐量优化的微调范式。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种微调方法，在保持模型性能的同时，显著提升多适配器场景下的推理吞吐量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预填充阶段处理大量token，解码阶段逐个生成，后者在多适配器服务时吞吐量远低于前者，存在固有吞吐量不匹配。
analysis.method: PreFT：仅在预填充阶段应用适配器（如LoRA、ReFT），解码阶段丢弃，从而避免解码阶段的适配器开销。
contributions: 提出PreFT微调范式，仅对预填充token应用适配器，显著提升多适配器推理吞吐量。
在vLLM引擎上高效实现两种预填充仅适配器（LoRA和ReFT），并开源。
通过实验验证PreFT在SFT和RL任务上性能接近传统PEFT，但吞吐量提升1.9倍（512适配器，Llama 3.1 70B）。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama 3.1 70B上服务512个适配器时，PreFT吞吐量是传统PEFT的1.9倍；在多种规模的LM上，SFT评估损失略高但可通过增加秩补偿，RL任务性能接近标准PEFT。
limitations: PreFT在SFT任务上评估损失略高于传统PEFT，可能需要增加秩来补偿。
仅验证了LoRA和ReFT两种适配器，其他适配器类型未测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 PreFT，仅在预填充阶段应用适配器，大幅提升多适配器推理吞吐量，性能损失极小。

papers.title: Towards Fine-Grained and Verifiable Concept Bottleneck Models
papers.abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) offer interpretable alternatives to black-box predictors by introducing human-relatable concepts before the final output. However, existing CBMs struggle to verify whether predicted concepts correspond to the correct visual evidence, limiting their reliability. We propose a fine-grained CBM framework that grounds each concept in localized visual evidence, enabling direct inspection of where and how concepts are encoded. This design allows users to interpret predictions and verify that the model learns intended concepts rather than spurious correlations. Experiments on medical imaging benchmarks show that our learned concept space is information-complete and achieves predictive performance comparable to standard CBMs, while substantially improving transparency. Unlike post-hoc attribution methods, our framework validates both the presence and correctness of concept representations, bridging interpretability with verifiability. Our approach enhances the trustworthiness of CBMs and establishes a principled mechanism for human-model interaction at the concept level, paving the way toward more reliable and clinically actionable concept-based learning systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出细粒度概念瓶颈模型，将每个概念锚定到局部视觉证据，实现可验证的透明预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型无法验证预测概念是否对应正确的视觉证据，限制了其可靠性，尤其在医疗等高风险场景中需要可验证的透明性。
analysis.problem: 如何使概念瓶颈模型中的每个概念都能被定位到具体的视觉证据，从而支持用户直接检查概念编码的位置和正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出细粒度CBM框架，将每个概念与局部视觉证据绑定，允许直接检查概念编码的位置和方式。
contributions: 提出细粒度CBM框架，实现概念与局部视觉证据的对应，支持直接验证。
在医学影像基准上达到与标准CBM相当的预测性能，同时显著提升透明性。
analysis.experiments: 在医学影像基准上评估，显示学习到的概念空间信息完整，预测性能与标准CBM相当，透明性大幅提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的概念标注。
局部视觉证据的提取可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出细粒度概念瓶颈模型，将每个概念锚定到局部视觉证据，实现可验证的透明预测。

papers.title: LLM-Based Robustness Testing of Microservice Applications: An Empirical Study
papers.abstract: Malformed, missing, or boundary-value inputs in microservice APIs can cascade across dependent services, threatening reliability. Robustness testing systematically exercises such inputs to expose server-side failures, but generating diverse, effective tests remains challenging. Large Language Models can generate such tests from API specifications; however, it is unknown whether different models and prompt strategies produce diverse failure sets or converge on the same failures. We report a controlled experiment applying 7 prompt strategies to 3 open-source LLMs (14B-70B parameters) targeting 2 architecturally distinct microservice systems: one Java monolingual (6 services, 9 failure modes) and one polyglot (27 services, 14 failure modes), yielding 38 valid runs and 663 generated tests. We find that prompt strategy explains more variation in diversity than model size: a Structured prompt collapses diversity entirely, while a single model varied across three prompt strategies achieves complete failure-mode coverage on one system, outperforming any multi-model ensemble under a fixed prompt. We introduce two strategies, Guided and GuidedFewShot, that embed a mutation taxonomy from prior robustness testing research as domain context. GuidedFewShot achieves the highest single-run coverage on both systems (5 of 9 and 8 of 14 failure modes) while maintaining low cross-model similarity. A key lesson is that taxonomy rules alone are insufficient: LLMs cannot distinguish key-absent from value-empty mutations without concrete examples. Findings replicate across both systems.

analysis.tldr: LLM提示策略比模型大小更能影响微服务鲁棒性测试的多样性，结构化提示会完全丧失多样性，而嵌入突变分类学的引导策略能实现高覆盖率。
analysis.research_motivation: 微服务API中的畸形、缺失或边界值输入可能级联传播，威胁系统可靠性。鲁棒性测试需要生成多样化的有效测试用例，但现有方法生成能力有限。
analysis.problem: 不同LLM和提示策略是否会产生多样化的故障集，还是收敛于相同故障？如何设计提示策略以最大化故障模式覆盖率？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 提示策略对测试多样性的影响远大于模型大小；结构化提示完全丧失多样性；单一模型配合多种提示策略可超越多模型集成；仅靠分类学规则不足，LLM无法区分键缺失与值空突变。
analysis.method: 对3个开源LLM（14B-70B参数）应用7种提示策略，针对两个微服务系统（Java单语言和多语言）进行鲁棒性测试，引入Guided和GuidedFewShot策略嵌入突变分类学。
contributions: 系统比较了7种提示策略和3种LLM在微服务鲁棒性测试中的效果，发现提示策略比模型大小更关键
提出Guided和GuidedFewShot策略，通过嵌入突变分类学实现高故障模式覆盖率（5/9和8/14）并保持低跨模型相似性
analysis.experiments: 在Java单语言系统（6个服务，9种故障模式）和多语言系统（27个服务，14种故障模式）上进行38次有效运行，生成663个测试用例。
limitations: 仅使用开源LLM，未测试闭源模型如GPT-4
仅针对两个微服务系统，泛化性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM提示策略比模型大小更能影响微服务鲁棒性测试的多样性，结构化提示会完全丧失多样性，而嵌入突变分类学的引导策略能实现高覆盖率。

papers.title: Why Retrieval-Augmented Generation Fails: A Graph Perspective
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a powerful and widely used approach for improving large language models by grounding generation in retrieved evidence. However, RAG systems still produce incorrect answers in many cases. Why RAG fails despite having access to external information remains poorly understood. We present a model-internal study of retrieval-augmented generation that examines how retrieved evidence influences answer generation. Using circuit tracing, we construct attribution graphs that model the flow of information through transformer layers during decoding. These graphs represent interactions among retrieved context, intermediate model activations, and generated tokens, providing a graph, circuit-level view of how external evidence is integrated into the model's reasoning process across multiple question answering benchmarks, we observe consistent structural differences: correct predictions exhibit deeper reasoning paths, more distributed evidence flow, and a more structured pattern of local connectivity, while failed predictions show shallower, fragmented, and overly concentrated evidence flow. Building on these findings, we develop a graph-based error detection framework that uses attribution-graph topology features. Furthermore, we show that attribution graphs enable targeted interventions. By reinforcing question-constrained evidence grounding, we reshape internal routing so that answer generation remains guided by the question, leading to more effective integration of retrieved information and fewer errors.

analysis.tldr: 从图视角揭示RAG失败原因，通过归因图分析证据流结构差异，并提出基于图的错误检测与干预方法。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG虽广泛应用但仍常产生错误答案，其失败原因缺乏深入理解，现有研究未从模型内部机制层面分析证据如何影响生成。
analysis.problem: 理解RAG系统为何在拥有外部信息时仍失败，并基于此开发错误检测与干预方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正确预测与失败预测在归因图拓扑上存在一致的结构差异：正确预测具有更深推理路径、更分散的证据流和更结构化的局部连接模式，而失败预测则表现出浅层、碎片化且过度集中的证据流。
analysis.method: 使用电路追踪构建归因图，建模检索证据、中间激活和生成token之间的信息流；基于图拓扑特征开发错误检测框架；通过强化问题约束的证据接地进行目标干预。
contributions: 首次从图视角对RAG失败进行模型内部研究，揭示正确与失败预测的归因图结构差异。
提出基于归因图拓扑特征的错误检测框架。
展示归因图可用于目标干预，通过重塑内部路由减少错误。
analysis.experiments: 在多个问答基准上观察结构差异，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的问答任务或模型架构。
归因图构建的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从图视角揭示RAG失败原因，通过归因图分析证据流结构差异，并提出基于图的错误检测与干预方法。

papers.title: Thinking Ahead: Prospection-Guided Retrieval of Memory with Language Models
papers.abstract: Long-horizon personalization requires dialogue assistants to retrieve user-specific facts from extended interaction histories. In practice, many relevant facts often have low semanticsimilarity to the query under dense retrieval. Standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and GraphRAG systems are still largely retrospective: they rely on embedding similarity to the query or on fixed graph traversals, so they often miss facts that matter for the user's needs but lie far from the query in embedding space. Inspired by prospection, the human ability to use imagined futures as cues for recall, we introduce Prospection-Guided Retrieval (PGR), which decouples retrieval from how memories are stored. Given a user query, PGR first expands the goal into a short Tree-of-Thought (ToT) or linear chain of plausible next steps, and uses these steps as retrieval probes rather than relying on the original query alone. The facts retrieved by these probes are then used to personalize the next round of prospection, enabling PGR to uncover additional memories that become relevant only after the simulation is grounded in the user's history. We also introduce MemoryQuest, a challenging multi-session benchmark in which each query is annotated with 3--5 dated reference facts subject to a low query-reference similarity constraint. Across 1,625 queries spanning 185 user profiles from 3 publicly available datasets, PGR-TOT substantially improves retrieval, including nearly 3x recall on MemoryQuest over the strongest baseline. In pairwise LLM-as-judge comparisons against baselines, PGR-generated responses are preferred on 89--98% of queries, with blinded human annotations on held-out subsets showing the same trend. Overall, the results demonstrate that explicit prospection yields large gains in long-horizon retrieval and response quality relative to similarity-only baselines.

analysis.tldr: 通过模拟未来步骤作为检索线索，大幅提升长程个性化对话中的事实召回率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG和GraphRAG系统依赖嵌入相似性或固定图遍历，难以检索到与查询语义相似度低但对用户需求重要的事实，限制了长程个性化对话的效果。
analysis.problem: 如何从长程交互历史中检索与用户查询相关但语义相似度低的事实。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 许多相关事实与查询的语义相似度低，导致基于嵌入相似性的检索方法失效。
analysis.method: 提出前瞻引导检索（PGR），先用思维树或线性链扩展查询为可能的未来步骤，用这些步骤作为检索探针，再根据检索结果更新前瞻，迭代发现更多相关记忆。
contributions: 提出PGR方法，将检索与记忆存储解耦，通过模拟未来步骤提升长程个性化检索。
构建MemoryQuest基准，包含多会话、低查询-参考相似度的标注数据。
在1625个查询上验证PGR-TOT显著提升召回率，在MemoryQuest上召回率接近最强基线的3倍，且生成响应在LLM和人工评估中更受偏好。
analysis.experiments: 在3个公开数据集的185个用户画像、1625个查询上评估，MemoryQuest基准上PGR-TOT召回率接近最强基线的3倍；LLM-as-judge比较中PGR在89-98%查询上更受偏好，人工评估趋势一致。
limitations: 可能依赖思维树或线性链的质量，对复杂查询的扩展可能不准确。
迭代检索可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过模拟未来步骤作为检索线索，大幅提升长程个性化对话中的事实召回率。

papers.title: ExploitBench: A Capability Ladder Benchmark for LLM Cybersecurity Agents
papers.abstract: Exploitation is not a binary event. It is a ladder of acquiring progressive capabilities, from executing a single buggy line of code to taking full control of the target. However, existing LLM security benchmarks treat a crash as exploitation success. That single binary outcome collapses the hard parts of exploitation: the transition from triggering a bug to constructing reusable primitives and control. We present ExploitBench, a capability-graded benchmark that decomposes exploitation into 16 measurable flags, from coverage and crash through sandbox primitives, arbitrary read/write, control-flow hijack, and arbitrary code execution. Each capability is verified by a deterministic oracle that uses a per-run randomized challenge-response for primitives, differential execution against ground-truth binaries to measure progress, and a signal-handler proof for code execution. We instantiate ExploitBench on 41 V8 bugs because V8 is both widely deployed and exploitation-hardened. We report three arms: <model,env> as the primary measurement of model-environment capability, <model,env, adaptive coaching> as a secondary arm that adds adaptive coaching to test whether targeted feedback shifts outcomes, and <model,env,harness> as an ablation that swaps in the model's native CLI to check whether vendor-side optimizations increase exploitation capabilities. Our results show a sharp capability split between publicly deployed frontier models and the private frontier. Across the 8 publicly deployed models tested, reaching the vulnerable code and triggering a crash is routine, but arbitrary code execution is not. The private model shows arbitrary code execution on approximately half. Overall, results suggest that exploit construction against hardened targets is an emerging frontier capability.

analysis.tldr: 提出 ExploitBench，将漏洞利用分解为16级能力阶梯，评估LLM网络安全Agent的真实利用能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全基准将崩溃视为利用成功，忽略了从触发漏洞到完全控制目标的渐进能力获取过程，无法准确衡量LLM Agent的真实利用能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个细粒度、可验证的基准，来评估LLM Agent在漏洞利用中逐步获取不同能力（如代码覆盖、崩溃、沙箱逃逸、任意代码执行等）的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 公开部署的前沿模型在触发漏洞和崩溃上表现常规，但任意代码执行能力不足；私有模型在约一半的测试中实现了任意代码执行，表明针对加固目标的利用构建是新兴的前沿能力。
analysis.method: 将漏洞利用分解为16个可测量的能力标志（从覆盖、崩溃到沙箱原语、任意读写、控制流劫持、任意代码执行），每个能力通过确定性预言机验证（随机挑战-响应原语、差分执行、信号处理证明），并在41个V8漏洞上实例化。
contributions: 提出ExploitBench，一个能力分级的漏洞利用基准，将利用过程分解为16个可测量标志。
设计了确定性预言机验证机制，包括随机挑战-响应、差分执行和信号处理证明。
在41个V8漏洞上进行了三组实验（模型-环境、自适应指导、原生CLI消融），揭示了公开与私有模型之间的能力差距。
analysis.experiments: 在41个V8漏洞上测试了8个公开部署模型和1个私有模型，包含三组实验：主测量（模型-环境）、辅助测量（添加自适应指导）、消融（替换为模型原生CLI）。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对V8漏洞，可能无法泛化到其他软件或漏洞类型。
基准的16个能力标志可能未覆盖所有利用步骤，且预言机设计可能对某些利用技术不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 ExploitBench，将漏洞利用分解为16级能力阶梯，评估LLM网络安全Agent的真实利用能力。

papers.title: ROK-FORTRESS: Measuring the Effect of Geopolitical Transcreation for National Security and Public Safety
papers.abstract: Safety evaluations for large language models (LLMs) increasingly target high-stakes National Security and Public Safety (NSPS) risks, yet multilingual safety is typically assessed through translation-only benchmarks that preserve the underlying scenario, and empirical evidence of how language and geopolitical context interact remains limited to a narrow set of language pairs. We introduce \emph{ROK-FORTRESS} this https URL , a bilingual, culturally adversarial NSPS benchmark that uses the English--Korean language pair and U.S.--ROK geopolitical axis as a case study, separating the effects of language and geopolitical grounding via a \emph{transcreation matrix}: adversarial intents are evaluated under controlled combinations of (i) English versus Korean language and (ii) U.S.\ versus Korean entities, institutions, and operational details. Each adversarial prompt is paired with a dual-use benign counterpart to quantify over-refusal. Model responses are then scored using calibrated LLM-as-a-judge panels, applying our expert-crafted, prompt-specific binary rubrics. Across a dual-track set of frontier and Korean-optimized models, we find a consistent suppression effect in Korean variants and substantial model-to-model variation in how geopolitical grounding interacts with language. In many models, Korean grounding mitigates the Korean language-driven suppression -- with no model showing significant amplification in the other direction -- indicating that, at least in the English--Korean case, safety behavior is shaped by language-as-risk signals and context interactions that translation-only evaluations miss. The transcreation matrix methodology is designed to generalize to other language--culture pairs.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个双语、文化对抗的NSPS基准ROK-FORTRESS，通过创译矩阵分离语言和地缘政治背景对LLM安全行为的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM安全评估主要针对高风险国家安全与公共安全（NSPS）场景，但多语言安全评估通常仅通过翻译基准进行，忽略了语言和地缘政治背景的交互作用，且实证证据仅限于少数语言对。
analysis.problem: 如何系统测量语言和地缘政治背景对LLM安全行为的影响，并区分两者的独立效应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在韩语变体中观察到一致的抑制效应，且地缘政治背景与语言的交互作用在不同模型间差异显著；许多模型中，韩国背景缓解了韩语驱动的抑制，而反向未出现显著放大，表明安全行为受语言作为风险信号和上下文交互的影响。
analysis.method: 提出ROK-FORTRESS基准，采用创译矩阵：在英语-韩语语言对和美-韩地缘政治轴下，控制语言（英语vs韩语）和地缘政治背景（美国vs韩国实体）的组合，评估对抗性意图，并配以双用途良性对应项以量化过度拒绝，使用校准的LLM-as-a-judge和专家设计的二元评分标准。
contributions: 引入创译矩阵方法，分离语言和地缘政治背景对LLM安全行为的影响
构建ROK-FORTRESS基准，提供英语-韩语对和NSPS场景的实证分析
analysis.experiments: 在前沿模型和韩语优化模型上进行双轨评估，发现韩语变体的抑制效应及模型间差异。
limitations: 仅针对英语-韩语对和美-韩地缘政治轴，泛化性需进一步验证
未提供具体数值结果或与其他基准的定量比较
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个双语、文化对抗的NSPS基准ROK-FORTRESS，通过创译矩阵分离语言和地缘政治背景对LLM安全行为的影响。

papers.title: Reinforcement Learning for Tool-Calling Agents in Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources (FHIR)
papers.abstract: Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources (FHIR) is the dominant standard for interoperable exchange of healthcare data. In FHIR, electronic health records form a directed graph of resources. Answering clinically meaningful questions over FHIR requires agents to perform multi-step reasoning, filtering, and aggregation across multiple resource types. Prior work shows that even tool-augmented LLM agents (retrieval, code execution, multi-turn planning) often select the wrong resources or violate traversal constraints. We study this problem in the context of FHIR-AgentBench, a benchmark for realistic question answering over real-world hospital data, and frame reasoning on FHIR as a sequential decision-making problem over a queryable structured graph. We implement a multi-turn CodeAct agent and post-train it with reinforcement learning using a custom harness and tools. A LLM Judge provides execution-grounded rewards. Compared to prompt-based, closed-model baselines, RL post-training improves performance while enforcing data-integrity constraints. Empirically, our approach improves answer correctness from 50% (o4-mini) to 77% on FHIR-AgentBench using a smaller and cheaper Qwen3-8B model. We present an end-to-end post-training pipeline (environment building, harness construction, model training and custom evaluation) that reliably improves multi-turn reasoning over structured clinical graphs.

analysis.tldr: 用强化学习后训练提升FHIR医疗数据问答中工具调用智能体的多步推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: FHIR是医疗数据互操作标准，但回答临床问题需要多步推理和资源遍历，现有LLM智能体常选错资源或违反约束，亟需提升其结构化图上的推理可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何让工具增强的LLM智能体在FHIR结构化图上进行准确的多步推理，避免资源选择错误和遍历约束违反。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将FHIR推理建模为序列决策问题，实现多轮CodeAct智能体，并用强化学习后训练，LLM Judge提供执行奖励，同时强制数据完整性约束。
contributions: 提出将FHIR推理作为序列决策问题，并用强化学习后训练工具调用智能体。
在FHIR-AgentBench上，使用更小的Qwen3-8B模型将正确率从50%提升至77%。
analysis.experiments: 在FHIR-AgentBench基准上评估，对比o4-mini等基线，RL后训练将正确率从50%提升至77%。
limitations: 仅在一个基准上验证，泛化性未知。
依赖LLM Judge提供奖励，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用强化学习后训练提升FHIR医疗数据问答中工具调用智能体的多步推理能力。

papers.title: Generative Floor Plan Design with LLMs via Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
papers.abstract: An AI system for professional floor plan design must precisely control room dimensions and areas while respecting the desired connectivity between rooms and maintaining functional and aesthetic quality. Existing generative approaches focus primarily on respecting the requested connectivity between rooms, but do not support generating floor plans that respect numerical constraints. We introduce a text-based floor plan generation approach that fine-tunes a large language model (LLM) on real plans and then applies reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) to improve adherence to topological and numerical constraints while discouraging invalid or overlapping outputs. Furthermore, we design a set of constraint adherence metrics to systematically measure how generated floor plans align with user-defined constraints. Our model generates floor plans that satisfy user-defined connectivity and numerical constraints and outperforms existing methods on Realism, Compatibility, and Diversity metrics. Across all tasks, our approach achieves at least a 94% relative reduction in Compatibility compared with existing methods. Our results demonstrate that LLMs can effectively handle constraints in this setting, suggesting broader applications for text-based generative modeling.

analysis.tldr: 用强化学习+可验证奖励微调LLM，实现满足拓扑和数值约束的文本生成户型图。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有户型图生成方法主要关注房间连通性，无法处理房间尺寸、面积等数值约束，而专业设计需要同时满足拓扑和数值要求。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM生成的户型图同时满足用户定义的连通性约束和数值约束（如房间尺寸、面积），并避免无效或重叠输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在真实户型图上微调LLM，然后使用强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）优化模型，奖励函数鼓励满足拓扑和数值约束、惩罚无效输出。同时设计了一套约束遵守度量指标。
contributions: 提出基于LLM的文本生成户型图方法，结合RLVR同时满足拓扑和数值约束。
设计约束遵守度量指标，系统评估生成户型图与用户约束的对齐程度。
analysis.experiments: 在Realism、Compatibility、Diversity指标上优于现有方法，Compatibility相对降低至少94%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于文本表示，未涉及视觉生成。
约束类型可能有限，复杂几何约束未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用强化学习+可验证奖励微调LLM，实现满足拓扑和数值约束的文本生成户型图。

papers.title: CRANE: Constrained Reasoning Injection for Code Agents via Nullspace Editing
papers.abstract: Code agents must both reason over long-horizon repository state and obey strict tool-use protocols. In paired Instruct/Thinking checkpoints, these capabilities are complementary but misaligned. The Instruct model is concise and tool-disciplined, whereas the Thinking model offers stronger planning and recovery behavior but often over-deliberates and degrades agent performance. We present CRANE (Constrained Reasoning Injection for Code Agents via Nullspace Editing), a training-free parameter-editing method that treats the Thinking-Instruct delta as a directional pool of candidate reasoning edits for the Instruct backbone. CRANE combines magnitude thresholding to denoise the delta, a Conservative Taylor Gate to retain edits that are jointly beneficial for reasoning transfer and tool-use preservation, and Graduated Sigmoidal Projection to suppress format-critical update directions. By merging paired Instruct and Thinking checkpoints, CRANE delivers strong gains over either individual model while preserving Instruct-level efficiency: on Roo-Eval it achieves pass1 of 66.2% (+19.5%) for Qwen3-30B-A3B and 81.5% (+8.7%) for Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B; on SWE-bench-Verified it resolves up to 14 additional instances at both scales (122/500 and 180/500); and on Terminal-Bench v2 it improves pass1/pass5 by up to 2.3%/7.8%, reaching 7.6%/17.9% and 14.8%/30.3%, respectively, consistently outperforming alternative merging strategies across all three benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 通过零空间编辑将思考模型的推理能力注入指令模型，提升代码Agent性能且不牺牲工具使用纪律。
analysis.research_motivation: 代码Agent需要同时具备长程推理和严格工具使用能力，但现有Instruct模型和Thinking模型各有优劣：Instruct模型简洁但推理弱，Thinking模型推理强但过度思考导致性能下降，两者能力互补但不对齐。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行额外训练的情况下，将Thinking模型的推理优势注入Instruct模型，同时保持其工具使用纪律和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Instruct模型和Thinking模型在代码Agent任务中能力互补但不对齐：Instruct模型工具使用纪律好但推理弱，Thinking模型推理和恢复能力强但过度思考，导致Agent性能下降。
analysis.method: CRANE是一种免训练的参数编辑方法，将Thinking-Instruct参数差作为候选推理编辑池，通过幅度阈值去噪、保守泰勒门筛选联合有益编辑、以及渐进S形投影抑制格式关键更新方向，最终将编辑注入Instruct骨干。
contributions: 提出CRANE，一种免训练的参数编辑方法，通过零空间编辑将Thinking模型的推理能力注入Instruct模型。
在三个代码Agent基准上取得显著提升，同时保持Instruct级别的效率。
analysis.experiments: 在Roo-Eval、SWE-bench-Verified和Terminal-Bench v2上评估，使用Qwen3-30B-A3B和Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B模型，CRANE在pass1、pass5和解决实例数上均优于单个模型和其他合并策略。
limitations: 方法依赖于成对的Instruct和Thinking检查点，可能不适用于未配对场景。
零空间编辑的泛化性可能受限于特定模型架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过零空间编辑将思考模型的推理能力注入指令模型，提升代码Agent性能且不牺牲工具使用纪律。

papers.title: AttnGen: Attention-Guided Saliency Learning for Interpretable Genomic Sequence Classification
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks have achieved strong performance in genomic sequence classification; however, relating their predictions to biologically meaningful sequence patterns remains challenging. In this work, we present AttnGen, an attention-guided training framework that embeds interpretability directly into the optimization process. AttnGen computes nucleotide-level importance scores using an attention mechanism and progressively suppresses low-contribution positions during training. This encourages the model to focus its predictions on a compact set of informative regions while reducing reliance on noisy sequence elements. We evaluate AttnGen on the standardized demo_human_or_worm benchmark, a binary classification task over 200-nucleotide sequences. With moderate masking, AttnGen achieves a validation accuracy of 96.73%, outperforming a conventional CNN baseline with 95.83% accuracy, while also exhibiting faster convergence and improved training stability. To assess whether the learned importance scores reflect functionally relevant signal, we conduct perturbation-based analysis by removing high-saliency nucleotides. This causes accuracy to drop from 96.9% to near chance level on a 3,000-sequence evaluation set, indicating that the model relies on a relatively small subset of informative positions. Our analysis shows that masking 10--20% of positions provides the most favorable trade-off between predictive performance and interpretability. These results suggest that attention-guided masking not only improves classification performance but also reshapes how models distribute importance across sequence positions. Although this study focuses on short genomic sequences, the proposed approach may extend to more complex interpretable sequence modeling settings.

analysis.tldr: AttnGen 通过注意力引导的掩码训练，在提升基因组序列分类精度的同时实现可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络在基因组序列分类中表现优异，但难以将预测与有生物学意义的序列模式关联起来，缺乏可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何在训练过程中嵌入可解释性，使模型聚焦于信息丰富的序列区域，同时提升分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 AttnGen 框架，利用注意力机制计算核苷酸重要性分数，在训练中逐步抑制低贡献位置，引导模型关注紧凑的信息区域。
contributions: 提出一种注意力引导的训练框架，将可解释性直接融入优化过程。
在 demo_human_or_worm 基准上验证了方法在提升分类精度和训练稳定性方面的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 demo_human_or_worm 基准上，AttnGen 达到 96.73% 验证准确率，优于 CNN 基线的 95.83%；扰动分析显示移除高重要性核苷酸使准确率从 96.9% 降至接近随机水平。
limitations: 当前仅针对短基因组序列（200核苷酸）进行验证。
未在更复杂的长序列或真实生物数据集上测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AttnGen 通过注意力引导的掩码训练，在提升基因组序列分类精度的同时实现可解释性。

papers.title: A Benchmark for Early-stage Parkinson's Disease Detection from Speech
papers.abstract: Early-stage Parkinson's disease (EarlyPD) detection from speech is clinically meaningful yet underexplored, and published results are hard to compare because studies differ in datasets, languages, tasks, evaluation protocols, and EarlyPD definitions. To address this issue, we propose the first benchmark for speech-based EarlyPD detection, with a speaker-independent split designed for fair and replicable cross-method evaluation on researcher-accessible datasets. The benchmark covers three common speech tasks and evaluates methods under different training-resource settings. We also present multi-dimensional evaluation breakdowns by dataset, aggregation level, gender, and disease stage to support fine-grained comparisons and clinical adoption. Our results provide a replicable reference and actionable insights, encouraging the adoption of this publicly available benchmark to advance robust and clinically meaningful EarlyPD detection from speech.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向早期帕金森病语音检测的标准化基准，提供可复现的评估框架与多维度分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 早期帕金森病语音检测具有临床意义但研究不足，现有结果因数据集、语言、任务、评估协议和疾病定义不同而难以比较，亟需统一基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏标准化、可复现的早期帕金森病语音检测评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建首个语音早期帕金森病检测基准，包含说话人独立划分、三种常见语音任务、多种训练资源设置，并提供按数据集、聚合级别、性别和疾病阶段的多维评估分解。
contributions: 提出首个公开可用的早期帕金森病语音检测基准，支持公平可复现的跨方法评估。
提供多维评估分解，为细粒度比较和临床采纳提供可复现参考与可行见解。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有语言或方言。

papers.title: PEML: Parameter-efficient Multi-Task Learning with Optimized Continuous Prompts
papers.abstract: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) is widely used for adapting Large Language Models (LLMs) for various tasks. Recently, there has been an increasing demand for fine-tuning a single LLM for multiple tasks because it requires overall less data for fine-tuning thanks to the common features shared among tasks. More importantly, LLMs are resource demanding and deploying a single model for multiple tasks facilitates resource consolidation and consumes significantly less resources compared to deploying individual large model for each task. Existing PEFT methods like LoRA and Prefix Tuning are designed to adapt LLMs to a specific task. LoRA and its variation focus on aligning the model itself for tasks, overlooking the importance of prompt tuning in multi-task learning while Prefix Tuning only adopts a simple architecture to optimize prompts, which limits the adaption capabilities for multi-task. To enable efficient fine-tuning for multi-task learning, it is important to co-optimize prompt optimization and model adaptation. In this work, we propose a Parameter-Efficient Multi-task Learning (\PM), which employs a neural architecture engineering method for optimizing the continuous prompts while also performing low-rank adaption for model weights. We prototype PEML by creating an automated framework for optimizing the continuous prompts and adapting model weights. We evaluate PEML against state-of-the-arts multi-task learning methods MTL-LoRA, MultiLoRa, C-Poly, and MoE, on the GLUE, SuperGLUE, Massive Multitask Language Understanding, and commonsense reasoning benchmarks. The evaluation results present an average accuracy improvement of up to 6.67%, with individual tasks showing peak gains of up to 10.75%.

analysis.tldr: 提出PEML方法，通过神经架构工程优化连续提示并联合低秩适应，实现参数高效多任务学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 多任务微调单个LLM可减少数据需求并节省资源，但现有PEFT方法（如LoRA、Prefix Tuning）未充分协同优化提示和模型适应，限制了多任务能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计参数高效的多任务学习方法，同时优化连续提示和模型权重适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PEML，采用神经架构工程方法自动优化连续提示，并结合低秩适应（如LoRA）调整模型权重。
contributions: 提出一种参数高效的多任务学习框架PEML，联合优化提示和模型权重。
在GLUE、SuperGLUE、MMLU和常识推理基准上平均提升6.67%准确率，单任务最高提升10.75%。
analysis.experiments: 在GLUE、SuperGLUE、MMLU和常识推理基准上评估，与MTL-LoRA、MultiLoRa、C-Poly、MoE等方法对比，平均准确率提升6.67%，单任务最高10.75%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定模型架构（如Transformer）。
